authors_text: Lin Yuan,Zhen He,Qiang Wang,Leiyang Xu,Xiang Ma
title: Spatial Transformer Network with Transfer Learning for Small-scale Fine-grained Skeleton-based Tai Chi Action Recognition
title_zh: 具有迁移学习功能的空间变换器网络用于基于小规模细粒度骨架的太极动作识别
abstract: Human action recognition is a quite hugely investigated area where most remarkable action recognition networks usually use large-scale coarse-grained action datasets of daily human actions as inputs to state the superiority of their networks. We intend to recognize our small-scale fine-grained Tai Chi action dataset using neural networks and propose a transfer-learning method using NTU RGB+D dataset to pre-train our network. More specifically, the proposed method first uses a large-scale NTU RGB+D dataset to pre-train the Transformer-based network for action recognition to extract common features among human motion. Then we freeze the network weights except for the fully connected (FC) layer and take our Tai Chi actions as inputs only to train the initialized FC weights. Experimental results show that our general model pipeline can reach a high accuracy of small-scale fine-grained Tai Chi action recognition with even few inputs and demonstrate that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance compared with previous Tai Chi action recognition methods.
summary: Human action recognition is a quite hugely investigated area where most remarkable action recognition networks usually use large-scale coarse-grained action datasets of daily human actions as inputs to state the superiority of their networks. We intend to recognize our small-scale fine-grained Tai Chi action dataset using neural networks and propose a transfer-learning method using NTU RGB+D dataset to pre-train our network. More specifically, the proposed method first uses a large-scale NTU RGB+D dataset to pre-train the Transformer-based network for action recognition to extract common features among human motion. Then we freeze the network weights except for the fully connected (FC) layer and take our Tai Chi actions as inputs only to train the initialized FC weights. Experimental results show that our general model pipeline can reach a high accuracy of small-scale fine-grained Tai Chi action recognition with even few inputs and demonstrate that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance compared with previous Tai Chi action recognition methods.
abstract_zh: 人类动作识别是一个被广泛研究的领域，其中最出色的动作识别网络通常使用日常人类动作的大规模粗粒度动作数据集作为输入来说明其网络的优越性。我们打算使用神经网络来识别我们的小规模细粒度太极拳动作数据集，并提出一种使用 NTU RGB+D 数据集来预训练我们的网络的迁移学习方法。更具体地说，该方法首先使用大规模 NTU RGB+D 数据集来预训练基于 Transformer 的动作识别网络，以提取人体运动中的共同特征。然后我们冻结除全连接（FC）层之外的网络权重，并将太极拳动作作为输入，仅训练初始化的 FC 权重。实验结果表明，我们的通用模型管道即使在很少的输入下也可以达到高精度的小规模细粒度太极动作识别，并证明我们的方法与以前的太极动作识别方法相比实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合空间变换网络和迁移学习的方法，用于小规模细粒度太极动作识别。
AI.motivation: 现有动作识别网络多依赖大规模粗粒度数据集，而太极动作数据集规模小且细粒度，需探索适合小数据集的迁移学习方案。
AI.method: 使用NTU RGB+D数据集预训练Transformer网络提取通用运动特征，冻结除全连接层外的参数，仅用太极动作数据微调全连接层。
AI.result: 模型在少量输入下达到高识别准确率，相较以往太极动作识别方法取得最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过迁移学习有效解决了小规模细粒度太极动作识别难题，验证了Transformer架构在动作识别中的适用性。

authors_text: Shraddha Barke,Michael B. James,Nadia Polikarpova
title: Grounded Copilot: How Programmers Interact with Code-Generating Models
title_zh: 接地副驾驶：程序员如何与代码生成模型交互
abstract: Powered by recent advances in code-generating models, AI assistants like Github Copilot promise to change the face of programming forever. But what is this new face of programming? We present the first grounded theory analysis of how programmers interact with Copilot, based on observing 20 participants--with a range of prior experience using the assistant--as they solve diverse programming tasks across four languages. Our main finding is that interactions with programming assistants are bimodal: in acceleration mode, the programmer knows what to do next and uses Copilot to get there faster; in exploration mode, the programmer is unsure how to proceed and uses Copilot to explore their options. Based on our theory, we provide recommendations for improving the usability of future AI programming assistants.
summary: Powered by recent advances in code-generating models, AI assistants like Github Copilot promise to change the face of programming forever. But what is this new face of programming? We present the first grounded theory analysis of how programmers interact with Copilot, based on observing 20 participants--with a range of prior experience using the assistant--as they solve diverse programming tasks across four languages. Our main finding is that interactions with programming assistants are bimodal: in acceleration mode, the programmer knows what to do next and uses Copilot to get there faster; in exploration mode, the programmer is unsure how to proceed and uses Copilot to explore their options. Based on our theory, we provide recommendations for improving the usability of future AI programming assistants.
abstract_zh: 在代码生成模型的最新进展的推动下，Github Copilot 等人工智能助手有望永远改变编程的面貌。但编程的新面貌是什么？我们对程序员如何与 Copilot 交互进行了首次扎根理论分析，该分析基于对 20 名参与者（具有使用助手的一系列经验）在解决跨四种语言的各种编程任务时的观察。我们的主要发现是，与编程助手的交互是双模式的：在加速模式下，程序员知道下一步该做什么，并使用 Copilot 更快地到达目的地；在加速模式下，程序员知道下一步要做什么，并使用 Copilot 更快地到达目标；在探索模式下，程序员不确定如何继续，并使用 Copilot 来探索他们的选项。根据我们的理论，我们为提高未来人工智能编程助手的可用性提供建议。

AI.tldr: 分析程序员如何与代码生成模型（如GitHub Copilot）进行交互
AI.motivation: 探讨AI编程助手如何改变编程方式，并为未来改进提供依据
AI.method: 通过观察20名不同经验水平的程序员使用Copilot解决多语言编程任务，进行扎根理论分析
AI.result: 发现程序员与AI助手的交互存在两种模式：加速模式（明确目标时快速生成代码）和探索模式（不确定时探索选项）
AI.conclusion: 提出基于双模式理论的AI编程助手可用性改进建议

authors_text: Zeyu Zhang,Ziyuan Jiao,Weiqi Wang,Yixin Zhu,Song-Chun Zhu,Hangxin Liu
title: Understanding Physical Effects for Effective Tool-use
title_zh: 了解物理效应以有效使用工具
abstract: We present a robot learning and planning framework that produces an effective tool-use strategy with the least joint efforts, capable of handling objects different from training. Leveraging a Finite Element Method (FEM)-based simulator that reproduces fine-grained, continuous visual and physical effects given observed tool-use events, the essential physical properties contributing to the effects are identified through the proposed Iterative Deepening Symbolic Regression (IDSR) algorithm. We further devise an optimal control-based motion planning scheme to integrate robot- and tool-specific kinematics and dynamics to produce an effective trajectory that enacts the learned properties. In simulation, we demonstrate that the proposed framework can produce more effective tool-use strategies, drastically different from the observed ones in two exemplar tasks.
summary: We present a robot learning and planning framework that produces an effective tool-use strategy with the least joint efforts, capable of handling objects different from training. Leveraging a Finite Element Method (FEM)-based simulator that reproduces fine-grained, continuous visual and physical effects given observed tool-use events, the essential physical properties contributing to the effects are identified through the proposed Iterative Deepening Symbolic Regression (IDSR) algorithm. We further devise an optimal control-based motion planning scheme to integrate robot- and tool-specific kinematics and dynamics to produce an effective trajectory that enacts the learned properties. In simulation, we demonstrate that the proposed framework can produce more effective tool-use strategies, drastically different from the observed ones in two exemplar tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个机器人学习和规划框架，该框架以最少的联合努力产生有效的工具使用策略，能够处理与训练不同的物体。利用基于有限元法 (FEM) 的模拟器，在给定观察到的工具使用事件的情况下重现细粒度、连续的视觉和物理效果，通过提出的迭代深化符号回归 (IDSR) 算法来识别对效果产生影响的基本物理属性。我们进一步设计了一种基于最佳控制的运动规划方案，以集成机器人和工具特定的运动学和动力学，以产生有效的轨迹来实现所学习的属性。在模拟中，我们证明所提出的框架可以产生更有效的工具使用策略，与两个示例任务中观察到的策略截然不同。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种机器人学习与规划框架，通过理解物理效应来实现有效的工具使用策略，减少关节努力并适应新物体。
AI.motivation: 现有工具使用策略可能依赖特定训练数据，难以泛化到新物体或优化关节努力，需更高效的方法识别物理属性并生成适应性策略。
AI.method: 基于有限元法（FEM）的模拟器生成视觉与物理效应，结合迭代深化符号回归（IDSR）算法识别关键物理属性，并通过最优控制运动规划整合机器人与工具的运动学和动力学特性。
AI.result: 模拟实验显示，框架在两个示例任务中生成了与观察策略显著不同的更有效工具使用策略，且能处理训练中未见的物体。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过解耦物理效应识别与运动规划，证明了理解物理属性对生成高效、泛化工具使用策略的重要性。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文提出了一种机器人学习与规划框架，通过理解物理效应来实现有效的工具使用策略，减少关节努力并适应新物体。

Leveraging a Finite Element Method (FEM)-based simulator that reproduces fine-grained, continuous visual and physical effects given observed tool-use events, the essential physical properties contributing to the effects are identified through the proposed Iterative Deepening Symbolic Regression (IDSR) algorithm. We further devise an optimal control-based motion planning scheme to integrate robot- and tool-specific kinematics and dynamics to produce an effective trajectory that enacts the learned properties. In simulation, we demonstrate that the proposed framework can produce more effective tool-use strategies, drastically different from the observed ones in two exemplar tasks. 我们提出了一个机器人学习和规划框架，该框架以最少的联合努力产生有效的工具使用策略，能够处理与训练不同的物体。利用基于有限元法 (FEM) 的模拟器，在给定观察到的工具使用事件的情况下重现细粒度、连续的视觉和物理效果，通过提出的迭代深化符号回归 (IDSR) 算法来识别对效果产生影响的基本物理属性。我们进一步设计了一种基于最佳控制的运动规划方案，以集成机器人和工具特定的运动学和动力学，以产生有效的轨迹来实现所学习的属性。在模拟中，我们证明所提出的框架可以产生更有效的工具使用策略，与两个示例任务中观察到的策略截然不同。 该论文提出了一种机器人学习与规划框架，通过理解物理效应来实现有效的工具使用策略，减少关节努力并适应新物体。 Zeyu Zhang,Ziyuan Jiao,Weiqi Wang,Yixin Zhu,Song-Chun Zhu,Hangxin Liu cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Shangchao Su,Bin Li,Chengzhi Zhang,Mingzhao Yang,Xiangyang Xue
title: Cross-domain Federated Object Detection
title_zh: 跨域联合对象检测
abstract: Detection models trained by one party (including server) may face severe performance degradation when distributed to other users (clients). Federated learning can enable multi-party collaborative learning without leaking client data. In this paper, we focus on a special cross-domain scenario in which the server has large-scale labeled data and multiple clients only have a small amount of labeled data; meanwhile, there exist differences in data distributions among the clients. In this case, traditional federated learning methods can't help a client learn both the global knowledge of all participants and its own unique knowledge. To make up for this limitation, we propose a cross-domain federated object detection framework, named FedOD. The proposed framework first performs the federated training to obtain a public global aggregated model through multi-teacher distillation, and sends the aggregated model back to each client for fine-tuning its personalized local model. After a few rounds of communication, on each client we can perform weighted ensemble inference on the public global model and the personalized local model. We establish a federated object detection dataset which has significant background differences and instance differences based on multiple public autonomous driving datasets, and then conduct extensive experiments on the dataset. The experimental results validate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

abstract_zh: 由一方（包括服务器）训练的检测模型在分发给其他用户（客户端）时可能会面临严重的性能下降。联邦学习可以在不泄露客户数据的情况下实现多方协作学习。本文关注一种特殊的跨域场景，其中服务器有大规模的标签数据，而多个客户端只有少量的标签数据；同时，客户之间的数据分布也存在差异。在这种情况下，传统的联邦学习方法无法帮助客户同时学习所有参与者的全局知识和自己独特的知识。为了弥补这一限制，我们提出了一种跨域联合对象检测框架，名为 FedOD。所提出的框架首先进行联合训练，通过多教师蒸馏获得公共全局聚合模型，并将聚合模型发送回每个客户端以微调其个性化本地模型。经过几轮的沟通，我们可以在每个客户端上对公共全局模型和个性化局部模型进行加权集成推理。我们基于多个公共自动驾驶数据集建立了一个具有显着背景差异和实例差异的联合对象检测数据集，然后对该数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果验证了所提方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种跨领域联邦目标检测框架FedOD，解决客户端数据分布差异导致的性能下降问题
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习在跨领域场景下难以平衡全局知识与本地独特知识的学习，导致模型性能下降
AI.method: 通过多教师蒸馏获取全局模型并下发至客户端微调本地模型，最终进行加权集成推理
AI.result: 在跨领域数据集上实验验证了FedOD的有效性，显著提升检测性能
AI.conclusion: FedOD框架有效解决了跨领域联邦目标检测中的知识共享与个性化平衡问题，具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Brian Hempel,Ravi Chugh
title: Maniposynth: Bimodal Tangible Functional Programming
title_zh: Maniposynth：双峰有形函数编程
comment: ECOOP 2022 Paper + Appendices. 34 pages, 15 figures. For video figure and artifact, see https://maniposynth.org/
comments: ECOOP 2022 Paper + Appendices. 34 pages, 15 figures. For video figure and artifact, see https://maniposynth.org/
abstract: Traditionally, writing code is a non-graphical, abstract, and linear process. Not everyone is comfortable with this way of thinking at all times. Can programming be transformed into a graphical, concrete, non-linear activity? While nodes-and-wires and blocks-based programming environments do leverage graphical direct manipulation, users perform their manipulations on abstract syntax tree elements, which are still abstract. Is it possible to be more concrete - could users instead directly manipulate live program values to create their program? We present a system, Maniposynth, that reimagines functional programming as a non-linear workflow where program expressions are spread on a 2D canvas. The live results of those expressions are continuously displayed and available for direct manipulation. The non-linear canvas liberates users to work out-of-order, and the live values can be interacted with via drag-and-drop. Incomplete programs are gracefully handled via hole expressions, which allow Maniposynth to offer program synthesis. Throughout the workflow, the program is valid OCaml code which the user may inspect and edit in their preferred text editor at any time. With Maniposynth's direct manipulation features, we created 38 programs drawn from a functional data structures course. We additionally hired two professional OCaml developers to implement a subset of these programs. We report on these experiences and discuss to what degree Maniposynth meets its goals of providing a non-linear, concrete, graphical programming workflow.

Can programming be transformed into a graphical, concrete, non-linear activity? While nodes-and-wires and blocks-based programming environments do leverage graphical direct manipulation, users perform their manipulations on abstract syntax tree elements, which are still abstract. Is it possible to be more concrete - could users instead directly manipulate live program values to create their program? The live results of those expressions are continuously displayed and available for direct manipulation. The non-linear canvas liberates users to work out-of-order, and the live values can be interacted with via drag-and-drop. Incomplete programs are gracefully handled via hole expressions, which allow Maniposynth to offer program synthesis. Throughout the workflow, the program is valid OCaml code which the user may inspect and edit in their preferred text editor at any time. With Maniposynth's direct manipulation features, we created 38 programs drawn from a functional data structures course. We additionally hired two professional OCaml developers to implement a subset of these programs. We report on these experiences and discuss to what degree Maniposynth meets its goals of providing a non-linear, concrete, graphical programming workflow.
abstract_zh: 传统上，编写代码是一个非图形、抽象和线性的过程。并不是每个人在任何时候都对这种思维方式感到满意。编程能否转化为图形化、具体的、非线性的活动？虽然节点和线以及基于块的编程环境确实利用图形直接操作，但用户在抽象语法树元素上执行操作，这些元素仍然是抽象的。是否可以更具体 - 用户可以直接操纵实时程序值来创建他们的程序吗？我们提出了一个系统 Maniposynth，它将函数式编程重新想象为非线性工作流程，其中程序表达式分布在 2D 画布上。这些表达式的实时结果会持续显示并可用于直接操作。非线性画布使用户能够无序地工作，并且可以通过拖放来与实时值进行交互。不完整的程序可以通过洞表达式得到妥善处理，这使得 Maniposynth 能够提供程序合成。在整个工作流程中，该程序是有效的 OCaml 代码，用户可以随时在其首选文本编辑器中检查和编辑。利用 Maniposynth 的直接操作功能，我们创建了 38 个取自函数式数据结构课程的程序。我们还聘请了两名专业的 OCaml 开发人员来实施这些程序的一部分。我们报告这些经验并讨论 Maniposynth 在多大程度上实现了提供非线性、具体、图形化编程工作流程的目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Maniposynth系统，将函数式编程重构为非线性的图形化工作流，允许用户通过直接操作实时程序值进行编程。
AI.motivation: 传统编程是抽象且线性的，难以满足所有用户的认知习惯。现有图形化编程环境仍基于抽象语法树，缺乏具体交互性，需探索更直观的编程方式。
AI.method: 通过2D画布展示程序表达式及其实时结果，支持拖拽操作和非线性编辑；使用hole表达式处理不完整程序，结合OCaml代码验证与文本编辑器兼容性。
AI.result: 成功开发38个函数式数据结构课程程序，并由专业OCaml开发者验证部分实现，证明系统可实现非线性、具体化的图形化编程目标。
AI.conclusion: Maniposynth通过直接操作实时值和非线性工作流，为函数式编程提供了新的可视化交互范式，提升了编程的直观性和灵活性。

authors_text: Yangyang Guo,Liqiang Nie,Yongkang Wong,Yibing Liu,Zhiyong Cheng,Mohan Kankanhalli
title: A Unified End-to-End Retriever-Reader Framework for Knowledge-based VQA
title_zh: 基于知识的 VQA 的统一端到端检索器-阅读器框架
abstract: Knowledge-based Visual Question Answering (VQA) expects models to rely on external knowledge for robust answer prediction. Though significant it is, this paper discovers several leading factors impeding the advancement of current state-of-the-art methods. On the one hand, methods which exploit the explicit knowledge take the knowledge as a complement for the coarsely trained VQA model. Despite their effectiveness, these approaches often suffer from noise incorporation and error propagation. On the other hand, pertaining to the implicit knowledge, the multi-modal implicit knowledge for knowledge-based VQA still remains largely unexplored. This work presents a unified end-to-end retriever-reader framework towards knowledge-based VQA. In particular, we shed light on the multi-modal implicit knowledge from vision-language pre-training models to mine its potential in knowledge reasoning. As for the noise problem encountered by the retrieval operation on explicit knowledge, we design a novel scheme to create pseudo labels for effective knowledge supervision. This scheme is able to not only provide guidance for knowledge retrieval, but also drop these instances potentially error-prone towards question answering. To validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, we conduct extensive experiments on the benchmark dataset. The experimental results reveal that our method outperforms existing baselines by a noticeable margin. Beyond the reported numbers, this paper further spawns several insights on knowledge utilization for future research with some empirical findings.
summary: Knowledge-based Visual Question Answering (VQA) expects models to rely on external knowledge for robust answer prediction. Though significant it is, this paper discovers several leading factors impeding the advancement of current state-of-the-art methods. On the one hand, methods which exploit the explicit knowledge take the knowledge as a complement for the coarsely trained VQA model. Despite their effectiveness, these approaches often suffer from noise incorporation and error propagation. On the other hand, pertaining to the implicit knowledge, the multi-modal implicit knowledge for knowledge-based VQA still remains largely unexplored. This work presents a unified end-to-end retriever-reader framework towards knowledge-based VQA. In particular, we shed light on the multi-modal implicit knowledge from vision-language pre-training models to mine its potential in knowledge reasoning. As for the noise problem encountered by the retrieval operation on explicit knowledge, we design a novel scheme to create pseudo labels for effective knowledge supervision. This scheme is able to not only provide guidance for knowledge retrieval, but also drop these instances potentially error-prone towards question answering. To validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, we conduct extensive experiments on the benchmark dataset. The experimental results reveal that our method outperforms existing baselines by a noticeable margin. Beyond the reported numbers, this paper further spawns several insights on knowledge utilization for future research with some empirical findings.
abstract_zh: 基于知识的视觉问答（VQA）期望模型依赖外部知识来进行稳健的答案预测。尽管这篇论文很重要，但它发现了阻碍当前最先进方法进步的几个主要因素。一方面，利用显式知识的方法将这些知识作为粗略训练的 VQA 模型的补充。尽管它们很有效，但这些方法经常受到噪声掺入和错误传播的影响。另一方面，关于隐性知识，基于知识的 VQA 的多模态隐性知识仍然很大程度上未被探索。这项工作提出了一个面向基于知识的 VQA 的统一的端到端检索器-阅读器框架。特别是，我们阐明了视觉语言预训练模型中的多模态隐式知识，以挖掘其在知识推理中的潜力。针对显性知识检索操作遇到的噪声问题，我们设计了一种新颖的方案来创建伪标签以进行有效的知识监督。该方案不仅能够为知识检索提供指导，而且能够消除这些可能容易出错的问题回答实例。为了验证所提出方法的有效性，我们在基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的方法明显优于现有基线。除了报告的数字之外，本文还通过一些实证研究结果进一步提出了关于未来研究知识利用的一些见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的端到端检索器-阅读器框架，旨在通过结合显式和隐式知识提升基于知识的视觉问答（VQA）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用显式知识时易受噪声干扰并导致误差传播，而隐式多模态知识在知识引导的VQA中尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 框架融合视觉-语言预训练模型的隐式多模态知识，并设计伪标签生成方案以减少显式知识检索中的噪声干扰，同时过滤潜在错误样本。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有基线模型，并为知识利用提供了新的研究洞察。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一整合显式与隐式知识，该框架有效解决了现有方法的局限性，为未来知识引导的VQA研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Zihan Chen,Songshang Liu,Hualiang Wang,Howard H. Yang,Tony Q. S. Quek,Zuozhu Liu
title: Towards Federated Long-Tailed Learning
title_zh: 迈向联邦长尾学习
comment: Accepted by International Workshop on Trustworthy Federated Learning in Conjunction with IJCAI 2022 (FL-IJCAI'22)
comments: Accepted by International Workshop on Trustworthy Federated Learning in Conjunction with IJCAI 2022 (FL-IJCAI'22)
abstract: Data privacy and class imbalance are the norm rather than the exception in many machine learning tasks. Recent attempts have been launched to, on one side, address the problem of learning from pervasive private data, and on the other side, learn from long-tailed data. However, both assumptions might hold in practical applications, while an effective method to simultaneously alleviate both issues is yet under development. In this paper, we focus on learning with long-tailed (LT) data distributions under the context of the popular privacy-preserved federated learning (FL) framework. We characterize three scenarios with different local or global long-tailed data distributions in the FL framework, and highlight the corresponding challenges. The preliminary results under different scenarios reveal that substantial future work are of high necessity to better resolve the characterized federated long-tailed learning tasks.
summary: Data privacy and class imbalance are the norm rather than the exception in many machine learning tasks. Recent attempts have been launched to, on one side, address the problem of learning from pervasive private data, and on the other side, learn from long-tailed data. However, both assumptions might hold in practical applications, while an effective method to simultaneously alleviate both issues is yet under development. In this paper, we focus on learning with long-tailed (LT) data distributions under the context of the popular privacy-preserved federated learning (FL) framework. We characterize three scenarios with different local or global long-tailed data distributions in the FL framework, and highlight the corresponding challenges. The preliminary results under different scenarios reveal that substantial future work are of high necessity to better resolve the characterized federated long-tailed learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 在许多机器学习任务中，数据隐私和类别不平衡是常态，而不是例外。最近的尝试一方面解决从普遍存在的私人数据中学习的问题，另一方面从长尾数据中学习。然而，这两种假设在实际应用中可能成立，而同时缓解这两个问题的有效方法仍在开发中。在本文中，我们重点关注在流行的隐私保护联邦学习（FL）框架背景下使用长尾（LT）数据分布进行学习。我们描述了 FL 框架中具有不同本地或全局长尾数据分布的三种场景，并强调了相应的挑战。不同场景下的初步结果表明，为了更好地解决特征联邦长尾学习任务，未来需要开展大量工作。

AI.tldr: 研究在联邦学习框架下如何处理长尾数据分布问题
AI.motivation: 解决联邦学习中数据隐私与类别不平衡共存的挑战，现有方法未能有效兼顾两者
AI.method: 分析三种不同长尾数据分布场景，识别联邦学习中的关键挑战
AI.result: 初步结果显示当前方法在联邦长尾学习任务中存在显著不足，亟需进一步研究
AI.conclusion: 联邦长尾学习需更多研究以解决隐私保护与类别不平衡的协同问题

authors_text: Eunwoo Song,Ryuichi Yamamoto,Ohsung Kwon,Chan-Ho Song,Min-Jae Hwang,Suhyeon Oh,Hyun-Wook Yoon,Jin-Seob Kim,Jae-Min Kim
title: TTS-by-TTS 2: Data-selective augmentation for neural speech synthesis using ranking support vector machine with variational autoencoder
title_zh: TTS-by-TTS 2：使用带有变分自动编码器的排序支持向量机对神经语音合成进行数据选择性增强
comment: Accepted to the conference of INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: Accepted to the conference of INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Recent advances in synthetic speech quality have enabled us to train text-to-speech (TTS) systems by using synthetic corpora. However, merely increasing the amount of synthetic data is not always advantageous for improving training efficiency. Our aim in this study is to selectively choose synthetic data that are beneficial to the training process. In the proposed method, we first adopt a variational autoencoder whose posterior distribution is utilized to extract latent features representing acoustic similarity between the recorded and synthetic corpora. By using those learned features, we then train a ranking support vector machine (RankSVM) that is well known for effectively ranking relative attributes among binary classes. By setting the recorded and synthetic ones as two opposite classes, RankSVM is used to determine how the synthesized speech is acoustically similar to the recorded data. Then, synthetic TTS data, whose distribution is close to the recorded data, are selected from large-scale synthetic corpora. By using these data for retraining the TTS model, the synthetic quality can be significantly improved. Objective and subjective evaluation results show the superiority of the proposed method over the conventional methods.
summary: Recent advances in synthetic speech quality have enabled us to train text-to-speech (TTS) systems by using synthetic corpora. However, merely increasing the amount of synthetic data is not always advantageous for improving training efficiency. Our aim in this study is to selectively choose synthetic data that are beneficial to the training process. In the proposed method, we first adopt a variational autoencoder whose posterior distribution is utilized to extract latent features representing acoustic similarity between the recorded and synthetic corpora. By using those learned features, we then train a ranking support vector machine (RankSVM) that is well known for effectively ranking relative attributes among binary classes. By setting the recorded and synthetic ones as two opposite classes, RankSVM is used to determine how the synthesized speech is acoustically similar to the recorded data. Then, synthetic TTS data, whose distribution is close to the recorded data, are selected from large-scale synthetic corpora. By using these data for retraining the TTS model, the synthetic quality can be significantly improved. Objective and subjective evaluation results show the superiority of the proposed method over the conventional methods.
abstract_zh: 合成语音质量的最新进展使我们能够使用合成语料库来训练文本转语音 (TTS) 系统。然而，仅仅增加合成数据量并不总是有利于提高训练效率。我们本研究的目的是有选择地选择有利于训练过程的合成数据。在所提出的方法中，我们首先采用变分自动编码器，其后验分布用于提取表示记录语料库和合成语料库之间的声学​​相似性的潜在特征。然后，通过使用这些学习到的特征，我们训练一个排名支持向量机（RankSVM），该机器因有效地对二元类中的相关属性进行排名而闻名。通过将录制的语音和合成的语音设置为两个相反的类别，RankSVM 用于确定合成语音在声学上与录制数据的相似程度。然后，从大规模合成语料库中选择分布与记录数据接近的合成 TTS 数据。通过使用这些数据重新训练 TTS 模型，可以显着提高合成质量。客观和主观评价结果表明该方法相对于传统方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分自编码器和排名支持向量机的数据选择性增强方法，用于改进神经语音合成质量。
AI.motivation: 单纯增加合成数据量未必提升训练效率，需筛选对模型训练更有价值的合成数据以优化效果。
AI.method: 利用变分自编码器提取声学相似性特征，训练RankSVM区分真实与合成数据，筛选分布接近真实数据的合成样本进行模型重训练。
AI.result: 客观与主观评估表明，该方法在合成语音质量上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 数据选择性增强策略能有效提升TTS系统性能，为合成语音质量优化提供新思路。

method: 利用变分自编码器提取声学相似性特征，训练RankSVM区分真实与合成数据，筛选分布接近真实数据的合成样本进行模型重训练。
result: 客观与主观评估表明，该方法在合成语音质量上优于传统方法。
conclusion: 数据选择性增强策略能有效提升TTS系统性能，为合成语音质量优化提供新思路。
search_text: TTS-by-TTS 2: Data-selective augmentation for neural speech synthesis using ranking support vector machine with variational autoencoder TTS-by-TTS 2：使用带有变分自动编码器的排序支持向量机对神经语音合成进行数据选择性增强 Recent advances in synthetic speech quality have enabled us to train text-to-speech (TTS) systems by using synthetic corpora. However, merely increasing the amount of synthetic data is not always advantageous for improving training efficiency. Our aim in this study is to selectively choose synthetic data that are beneficial to the training process. In the proposed method, we first adopt a variational autoencoder whose posterior distribution is utilized to extract latent features representing acoustic similarity between the recorded and synthetic corpora. By using those learned features, we then train a ranking support vector machine (RankSVM) that is well known for effectively ranking relative attributes among binary classes. By setting the recorded and synthetic ones as two opposite classes, RankSVM is used to determine how the synthesized speech is acoustically similar to the recorded data. Then, synthetic TTS data, whose distribution is close to the recorded data, are selected from large-scale synthetic corpora. By using these data for retraining the TTS model, the synthetic quality can be significantly improved. Objective and subjective evaluation results show the superiority of the proposed method over the conventional methods. 合成语音质量的最新进展使我们能够使用合成语料库来训练文本转语音 (TTS) 系统。然而，仅仅增加合成数据量并不总是有利于提高训练效率。我们本研究的目的是有选择地选择有利于训练过程的合成数据。在所提出的方法中，我们首先采用变分自动编码器，其后验分布用于提取表示记录语料库和合成语料库之间的声学​​相似性的潜在特征。然后，通过使用这些学习到的特征，我们训练一个排名支持向量机（RankSVM），该机器因有效地对二元类中的相关属性进行排名而闻名。通过将录制的语音和合成的语音设置为两个相反的类别，RankSVM 用于确定合成语音在声学上与录制数据的相似程度。然后，从大规模合成语料库中选择分布与记录数据接近的合成 TTS 数据。通过使用这些数据重新训练 TTS 模型，可以显着提高合成质量。客观和主观评价结果表明该方法相对于传统方法的优越性。 本文提出一种基于变分自编码器和排名支持向量机的数据选择性增强方法，用于改进神经语音合成质量。 Eunwoo Song,Ryuichi Yamamoto,Ohsung Kwon,Chan-Ho Song,Min-Jae Hwang,Suhyeon Oh,Hyun-Wook Yoon,Jin-Seob Kim,Jae-Min Kim eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Amanda Coston,Anna Kawakami,Haiyi Zhu,Ken Holstein,Hoda Heidari
title: A Validity Perspective on Evaluating the Justified Use of Data-driven Decision-making Algorithms
title_zh: 评估数据驱动决策算法合理使用的有效性视角
comment: in IEEE Conference on Secure and Trustworthy Machine Learning (SaTML) 2023
comments: in IEEE Conference on Secure and Trustworthy Machine Learning (SaTML) 2023
abstract: Recent research increasingly brings to question the appropriateness of using predictive tools in complex, real-world tasks. While a growing body of work has explored ways to improve value alignment in these tools, comparatively less work has centered concerns around the fundamental justifiability of using these tools. This work seeks to center validity considerations in deliberations around whether and how to build data-driven algorithms in high-stakes domains. Toward this end, we translate key concepts from validity theory to predictive algorithms. We apply the lens of validity to re-examine common challenges in problem formulation and data issues that jeopardize the justifiability of using predictive algorithms and connect these challenges to the social science discourse around validity. Our interdisciplinary exposition clarifies how these concepts apply to algorithmic decision making contexts. We demonstrate how these validity considerations could distill into a series of high-level questions intended to promote and document reflections on the legitimacy of the predictive task and the suitability of the data.
summary: Recent research increasingly brings to question the appropriateness of using predictive tools in complex, real-world tasks. While a growing body of work has explored ways to improve value alignment in these tools, comparatively less work has centered concerns around the fundamental justifiability of using these tools. This work seeks to center validity considerations in deliberations around whether and how to build data-driven algorithms in high-stakes domains. Toward this end, we translate key concepts from validity theory to predictive algorithms. We apply the lens of validity to re-examine common challenges in problem formulation and data issues that jeopardize the justifiability of using predictive algorithms and connect these challenges to the social science discourse around validity. Our interdisciplinary exposition clarifies how these concepts apply to algorithmic decision making contexts. We demonstrate how these validity considerations could distill into a series of high-level questions intended to promote and document reflections on the legitimacy of the predictive task and the suitability of the data.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究越来越多地质疑在复杂的现实任务中使用预测工具的适当性。虽然越来越多的工作探索了改善这些工具价值一致性的方法，但相对较少的工作集中在使用这些工具的基本合理性上。这项工作旨在将有效性考虑集中在围绕是否以及如何在高风险领域构建数据驱动算法的审议中。为此，我们将关键概念从有效性理论转化为预测算法。我们运用有效性的视角来重新审视问题表述和数据问题中的常见挑战，这些挑战危及使用预测算法的合理性，并将这些挑战与围绕有效性的社会科学论述联系起来。我们的跨学科阐述阐明了这些概念如何应用于算法决策环境。我们演示了如何将这些有效性考虑因素提炼成一系列高级问题，旨在促进和记录对预测任务的合法性和数据的适用性的反思。

AI.tldr: 本文从有效性理论视角出发，探讨数据驱动决策算法在高风险领域中的合理使用问题，通过翻译有效性理论概念并应用于算法问题，提出评估预测任务合法性与数据适用性的高层问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究关注算法价值对齐，但对使用预测工具的根本合理性缺乏探讨，尤其在高风险领域需明确算法决策的正当性与数据适用性。
AI.method: 将有效性理论核心概念转化为算法评估框架，分析问题定义与数据问题对算法正当性的威胁，并结合社会科学研究讨论有效性内涵。
AI.result: 构建了基于有效性的评估问题清单，阐明了算法决策中合法性与数据适用性的关联，为实践提供反思工具。
AI.conclusion: 有效性考量应成为算法设计的核心维度，通过系统性问题引导对预测任务社会正当性与数据基础的深度审视。

authors_text: Akiko Eriguchi,Shufang Xie,Tao Qin,Hany Hassan Awadalla
title: Building Multilingual Machine Translation Systems That Serve Arbitrary X-Y Translations
title_zh: 构建提供任意 X-Y 翻译服务的多语言机器翻译系统
abstract: Multilingual Neural Machine Translation (MNMT) enables one system to translate sentences from multiple source languages to multiple target languages, greatly reducing deployment costs compared with conventional bilingual systems. The MNMT training benefit, however, is often limited to many-to-one directions. The model suffers from poor performance in one-to-many and many-to-many with zero-shot setup. To address this issue, this paper discusses how to practically build MNMT systems that serve arbitrary X-Y translation directions while leveraging multilinguality with a two-stage training strategy of pretraining and finetuning. Experimenting with the WMT'21 multilingual translation task, we demonstrate that our systems outperform the conventional baselines of direct bilingual models and pivot translation models for most directions, averagely giving +6.0 and +4.1 BLEU, without the need for architecture change or extra data collection. Moreover, we also examine our proposed approach in an extremely large-scale data setting to accommodate practical deployment scenarios.
summary: Multilingual Neural Machine Translation (MNMT) enables one system to translate sentences from multiple source languages to multiple target languages, greatly reducing deployment costs compared with conventional bilingual systems. The MNMT training benefit, however, is often limited to many-to-one directions. The model suffers from poor performance in one-to-many and many-to-many with zero-shot setup. To address this issue, this paper discusses how to practically build MNMT systems that serve arbitrary X-Y translation directions while leveraging multilinguality with a two-stage training strategy of pretraining and finetuning. Experimenting with the WMT'21 multilingual translation task, we demonstrate that our systems outperform the conventional baselines of direct bilingual models and pivot translation models for most directions, averagely giving +6.0 and +4.1 BLEU, without the need for architecture change or extra data collection. Moreover, we also examine our proposed approach in an extremely large-scale data setting to accommodate practical deployment scenarios.
abstract_zh: 多语言神经机器翻译（MNMT）使一个系统能够将多种源语言的句子翻译成多种目标语言，与传统双语系统相比，大大降低了部署成本。然而，MNMT 训练的好处通常仅限于多对一的方向。该模型在零样本设置的一对多和多对多中表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，本文讨论了如何实际构建服务于任意 X-Y 翻译方向的 MNMT 系统，同时通过预训练和微调的两阶段训练策略利用多语言。通过 WMT'21 多语言翻译任务的实验，我们证明我们的系统在大多数方向上都优于直接双语模型和枢轴翻译模型的传统基线，平均给出 +6.0 和 +4.1 BLEU，而不需要架构更改或额外的数据收集。此外，我们还在超大规模的数据设置中检查了我们提出的方法，以适应实际的部署场景。

AI.tldr: 构建支持任意X-Y翻译方向的多语言机器翻译系统
AI.motivation: 传统多语言神经机器翻译在one-to-many和many-to-many场景下表现不佳，需提升模型灵活性与零样本翻译能力
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练策略（预训练+微调），通过多语言数据联合训练，无需改变模型架构或额外收集数据
AI.result: 在WMT'21任务中，多数方向BLEU值较双语模型提升6.0，较中继翻译模型提升4.1，且在大规模数据场景下保持有效性
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分阶段训练有效提升多语言翻译系统的通用性，在无需架构调整和额外数据情况下实现性能突破

authors_text: Nibraas Khan,Nilanjan Sarkar
title: Semi-Supervised Generative Adversarial Network for Stress Detection Using Partially Labeled Physiological Data
title_zh: 使用部分标记的生理数据进行压力检测的半监督生成对抗网络
abstract: Physiological measurements involves observing variables that attribute to the normative functioning of human systems and subsystems directly or indirectly. The measurements can be used to detect affective states of a person with aims such as improving human-computer interactions. There are several methods of collecting physiological data, but wearable sensors are a common, non-invasive tool for accurate readings. However, valuable information is hard to extract from the raw physiological data, especially for affective state detection. Machine Learning techniques are used to detect the affective state of a person through labeled physiological data. A clear problem with using labeled data is creating accurate labels. An expert is needed to analyze a form of recording of participants and mark sections with different states such as stress and calm. While expensive, this method delivers a complete dataset with labeled data that can be used in any number of supervised algorithms. An interesting question arises from the expensive labeling: how can we reduce the cost while maintaining high accuracy? Semi-Supervised learning (SSL) is a potential solution to this problem. These algorithms allow for machine learning models to be trained with only a small subset of labeled data (unlike unsupervised which use no labels). They provide a way of avoiding expensive labeling. This paper compares a fully supervised algorithm to a SSL on the public WESAD (Wearable Stress and Affect Detection) Dataset for stress detection. This paper shows that Semi-Supervised algorithms are a viable method for inexpensive affective state detection systems with accurate results.
summary: Physiological measurements involves observing variables that attribute to the normative functioning of human systems and subsystems directly or indirectly. The measurements can be used to detect affective states of a person with aims such as improving human-computer interactions. There are several methods of collecting physiological data, but wearable sensors are a common, non-invasive tool for accurate readings. However, valuable information is hard to extract from the raw physiological data, especially for affective state detection. Machine Learning techniques are used to detect the affective state of a person through labeled physiological data. A clear problem with using labeled data is creating accurate labels. An expert is needed to analyze a form of recording of participants and mark sections with different states such as stress and calm. While expensive, this method delivers a complete dataset with labeled data that can be used in any number of supervised algorithms. An interesting question arises from the expensive labeling: how can we reduce the cost while maintaining high accuracy? Semi-Supervised learning (SSL) is a potential solution to this problem. These algorithms allow for machine learning models to be trained with only a small subset of labeled data (unlike unsupervised which use no labels). They provide a way of avoiding expensive labeling. This paper compares a fully supervised algorithm to a SSL on the public WESAD (Wearable Stress and Affect Detection) Dataset for stress detection. This paper shows that Semi-Supervised algorithms are a viable method for inexpensive affective state detection systems with accurate results.
abstract_zh: 生理测量涉及直接或间接观察归因于人类系统和子系统规范功能的变量。这些测量可用于检测人的情感状态，其目的包括改善人机交互。收集生理数据的方法有多种，但可穿戴传感器是一种常见的、非侵入性的准确读数工具。然而，很难从原始生理数据中提取有价值的信息，尤其是情感状态检测。机器学习技术用于通过标记的生理数据来检测人的情感状态。使用标记数据的一个明显问题是创建准确的标签。需要专家分析参与者的录音形式，并标记具有不同状态（例如压力和平静）的部分。虽然昂贵，但这种方法提供了带有标记数据的完整数据集，可用于任意数量的监督算法。昂贵的标签引发了一个有趣的问题：如何在保持高精度的同时降低成本？半监督学习（SSL）是解决这个问题的一个潜在方案。这些算法允许仅使用一小部分标记数据来训练机器学习模型（与不使用标签的无监督模型不同）。它们提供了一种避免昂贵标签的方法。本文在用于压力检测的公共 WESAD（可穿戴压力和情感检测）数据集上将完全监督算法与 SSL 进行了比较。本文表明，半监督算法是一种廉价的情感状态检测系统的可行方法，且结果准确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督生成对抗网络（SGAN），用于利用部分标记的生理数据进行压力检测。
AI.motivation: 生理数据标注成本高昂且耗时，而完全依赖标注数据的监督学习方法难以兼顾成本与准确性，需探索低成本高效的压力检测方案。
AI.method: 基于公开的WESAD数据集，对比全监督算法与半监督学习方法，设计半监督生成对抗网络模型，利用少量标注数据与大量未标注数据训练压力检测系统。
AI.result: 实验表明，半监督方法在保持高检测准确率的同时显著降低了数据标注成本，验证了其在情感状态检测中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习为构建低成本、高精度的生理信号驱动的情感检测系统提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Yunlong Zhang,Yuxuan Sun,Honglin Li,Sunyi Zheng,Chenglu Zhu,Lin Yang
title: Benchmarking the Robustness of Deep Neural Networks to Common Corruptions in Digital Pathology
title_zh: 对深度神经网络的鲁棒性进行基准测试以应对数字病理学中的常见损坏
abstract: When designing a diagnostic model for a clinical application, it is crucial to guarantee the robustness of the model with respect to a wide range of image corruptions. Herein, an easy-to-use benchmark is established to evaluate how deep neural networks perform on corrupted pathology images. Specifically, corrupted images are generated by injecting nine types of common corruptions into validation images. Besides, two classification and one ranking metrics are designed to evaluate the prediction and confidence performance under corruption. Evaluated on two resulting benchmark datasets, we find that (1) a variety of deep neural network models suffer from a significant accuracy decrease (double the error on clean images) and the unreliable confidence estimation on corrupted images; (2) A low correlation between the validation and test errors while replacing the validation set with our benchmark can increase the correlation. Our codes are available on https://github.com/superjamessyx/robustness_benchmark.
summary: When designing a diagnostic model for a clinical application, it is crucial to guarantee the robustness of the model with respect to a wide range of image corruptions. Herein, an easy-to-use benchmark is established to evaluate how deep neural networks perform on corrupted pathology images. Specifically, corrupted images are generated by injecting nine types of common corruptions into validation images. Besides, two classification and one ranking metrics are designed to evaluate the prediction and confidence performance under corruption. Evaluated on two resulting benchmark datasets, we find that (1) a variety of deep neural network models suffer from a significant accuracy decrease (double the error on clean images) and the unreliable confidence estimation on corrupted images; (2) A low correlation between the validation and test errors while replacing the validation set with our benchmark can increase the correlation. Our codes are available on https://github.com/superjamessyx/robustness_benchmark.
abstract_zh: 在设计临床应用的诊断模型时，保证模型对于各种图像损坏的鲁棒性至关重要。在此，建立了一个易于使用的基准来评估深度神经网络在损坏的病理图像上的表现。具体来说，损坏的图像是通过将九种常见损坏注入到验证图像中来生成的。此外，还设计了两个分类和一个排名指标来评估腐败情况下的预测和置信度性能。对两个生成的基准数据集进行评估，我们发现（1）各种深度神经网络模型的准确性显着下降（干净图像上的误差加倍），并且对损坏图像的置信度估计不可靠； (2) 验证和测试错误之间的相关性较低，而用我们的基准替换验证集可以增加相关性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/superjamessyx/robustness_benchmark 上获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了一个基准测试，用于评估深度神经网络在数字病理学中对常见图像损坏的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 在临床诊断模型设计中，确保模型对各种图像损坏的鲁棒性至关重要，但缺乏相应的评估基准。
AI.method: 通过向验证图像注入九种常见损坏生成数据集，并设计两种分类指标和一种排序指标评估模型在损坏图像下的性能。
AI.result: 发现多种模型在损坏图像上准确率下降显著（误差翻倍），置信度估计不可靠；替换验证集可提升验证与测试误差的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该基准揭示了现有模型的鲁棒性缺陷，为改进病理诊断模型的可靠性提供了评估工具和方向。

authors_text: Wu Zheng,Mingxuan Hong,Li Jiang,Chi-Wing Fu
title: Boosting 3D Object Detection by Simulating Multimodality on Point Clouds
title_zh: 通过在点云上模拟多模态来增强 3D 对象检测
abstract: This paper presents a new approach to boost a single-modality (LiDAR) 3D object detector by teaching it to simulate features and responses that follow a multi-modality (LiDAR-image) detector. The approach needs LiDAR-image data only when training the single-modality detector, and once well-trained, it only needs LiDAR data at inference. We design a novel framework to realize the approach: response distillation to focus on the crucial response samples and avoid the background samples; sparse-voxel distillation to learn voxel semantics and relations from the estimated crucial voxels; a fine-grained voxel-to-point distillation to better attend to features of small and distant objects; and instance distillation to further enhance the deep-feature consistency. Experimental results on the nuScenes dataset show that our approach outperforms all SOTA LiDAR-only 3D detectors and even surpasses the baseline LiDAR-image detector on the key NDS metric, filling 72% mAP gap between the single- and multi-modality detectors.
summary: This paper presents a new approach to boost a single-modality (LiDAR) 3D object detector by teaching it to simulate features and responses that follow a multi-modality (LiDAR-image) detector. The approach needs LiDAR-image data only when training the single-modality detector, and once well-trained, it only needs LiDAR data at inference. We design a novel framework to realize the approach: response distillation to focus on the crucial response samples and avoid the background samples; sparse-voxel distillation to learn voxel semantics and relations from the estimated crucial voxels; a fine-grained voxel-to-point distillation to better attend to features of small and distant objects; and instance distillation to further enhance the deep-feature consistency. Experimental results on the nuScenes dataset show that our approach outperforms all SOTA LiDAR-only 3D detectors and even surpasses the baseline LiDAR-image detector on the key NDS metric, filling 72% mAP gap between the single- and multi-modality detectors.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新方法，通过教导单模态 (LiDAR) 3D 物体检测器模拟多模态（LiDAR 图像）检测器的特征和响应来增强单模态 (LiDAR) 3D 物体检测器。该方法仅在训练单模态检测器时才需要 LiDAR 图像数据，并且一旦训练良好，在推理时只需要 LiDAR 数据。我们设计了一个新颖的框架来实现该方法：响应蒸馏，专注于关键响应样本并避免背景样本；稀疏体素蒸馏，从估计的关键体素中学习体素语义和关系；细粒度的体素到点的蒸馏，以更好地关注小而远的物体的特征；并进行实例蒸馏，进一步增强深层特征一致性。 nuScenes 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于所有仅使用 SOTA LiDAR 的 3D 检测器，甚至在关键 NDS 指标上超过了基线 LiDAR 图像检测器，填补了单模态检测器和多模态检测器之间 72% 的 mAP 差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过模拟多模态特征来提升单模态（LiDAR）3D目标检测性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 单模态LiDAR检测器性能低于多模态（LiDAR-图像）检测器，但多模态检测需依赖图像数据。本文旨在通过训练阶段模拟多模态特征，使单模态检测器在推理时仅依赖LiDAR数据即可达到接近多模态的性能。
AI.method: 设计包含响应蒸馏、稀疏体素蒸馏、细粒度体素到点蒸馏和实例蒸馏的框架，通过多阶段知识蒸馏机制学习多模态检测器的特征与响应模式。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，该方法超越所有SOTA单模态LiDAR检测器，并在NDS指标上超过基线多模态检测器，缩小72%的mAP性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 通过模拟多模态特征的知识蒸馏框架，可显著提升单模态LiDAR检测性能，有效弥合单模态与多模态检测器间的性能差距。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种通过模拟多模态特征来提升单模态（LiDAR）3D目标检测性能的方法。
ai_content.motivation: 单模态LiDAR检测器性能低于多模态（LiDAR-图像）检测器，但多模态检测需依赖图像数据。本文旨在通过训练阶段模拟多模态特征，使单模态检测器在推理时仅依赖LiDAR数据即可达到接近多模态的性能。
ai_content.method: 设计包含响应蒸馏、稀疏体素蒸馏、细粒度体素到点蒸馏和实例蒸馏的框架，通过多阶段知识蒸馏机制学习多模态检测器的特征与响应模式。
ai_content.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，该方法超越所有SOTA单模态LiDAR检测器，并在NDS指标上超过基线多模态检测器，缩小72%的mAP性能差距。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过模拟多模态特征的知识蒸馏框架，可显著提升单模态LiDAR检测性能，有效弥合单模态与多模态检测器间的性能差距。

search_text: Boosting 3D Object Detection by Simulating Multimodality on Point Clouds 通过在点云上模拟多模态来增强 3D 对象检测 This paper presents a new approach to boost a single-modality (LiDAR) 3D object detector by teaching it to simulate features and responses that follow a multi-modality (LiDAR-image) detector. The approach needs LiDAR-image data only when training the single-modality detector, and once well-trained, it only needs LiDAR data at inference. We design a novel framework to realize the approach: response distillation to focus on the crucial response samples and avoid the background samples; sparse-voxel distillation to learn voxel semantics and relations from the estimated crucial voxels; a fine-grained voxel-to-point distillation to better attend to features of small and distant objects; and instance distillation to further enhance the deep-feature consistency. Experimental results on the nuScenes dataset show that our approach outperforms all SOTA LiDAR-only 3D detectors and even surpasses the baseline LiDAR-image detector on the key NDS metric, filling 72% mAP gap between the single- and multi-modality detectors. 本文提出了一种新方法，通过教导单模态 (LiDAR) 3D 物体检测器模拟多模态（LiDAR 图像）检测器的特征和响应来增强单模态 (LiDAR) 3D 物体检测器。该方法仅在训练单模态检测器时才需要 LiDAR 图像数据，并且一旦训练良好，在推理时只需要 LiDAR 数据。我们设计了一个新颖的框架来实现该方法：响应蒸馏，专注于关键响应样本并避免背景样本；稀疏体素蒸馏，从估计的关键体素中学习体素语义和关系；细粒度的体素到点的蒸馏，以更好地关注小而远的物体的特征；并进行实例蒸馏，进一步增强深层特征一致性。 nuScenes 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于所有仅使用 SOTA LiDAR 的 3D 检测器，甚至在关键 NDS 指标上超过了基线 LiDAR 图像检测器，填补了单模态检测器和多模态检测器之间 72% 的 mAP 差距。 本文提出一种通过模拟多模态特征来提升单模态（LiDAR）3D目标检测性能的方法。 Wu Zheng,Mingxuan Hong,Li Jiang,Chi-Wing Fu cs.CV

authors_text: Xiang Zhou,Shiyue Zhang,Mohit Bansal
title: Masked Part-Of-Speech Model: Does Modeling Long Context Help Unsupervised POS-tagging?
title_zh: 屏蔽词性模型：长上下文建模是否有助于无监督词性标记？
abstract: Previous Part-Of-Speech (POS) induction models usually assume certain independence assumptions (e.g., Markov, unidirectional, local dependency) that do not hold in real languages. For example, the subject-verb agreement can be both long-term and bidirectional. To facilitate flexible dependency modeling, we propose a Masked Part-of-Speech Model (MPoSM), inspired by the recent success of Masked Language Models (MLM). MPoSM can model arbitrary tag dependency and perform POS induction through the objective of masked POS reconstruction. We achieve competitive results on both the English Penn WSJ dataset as well as the universal treebank containing 10 diverse languages. Though modeling the long-term dependency should ideally help this task, our ablation study shows mixed trends in different languages. To better understand this phenomenon, we design a novel synthetic experiment that can specifically diagnose the model's ability to learn tag agreement. Surprisingly, we find that even strong baselines fail to solve this problem consistently in a very simplified setting: the agreement between adjacent words. Nonetheless, MPoSM achieves overall better performance. Lastly, we conduct a detailed error analysis to shed light on other remaining challenges. Our code is available at https://github.com/owenzx/MPoSM
summary: Previous Part-Of-Speech (POS) induction models usually assume certain independence assumptions (e.g., Markov, unidirectional, local dependency) that do not hold in real languages. For example, the subject-verb agreement can be both long-term and bidirectional. To facilitate flexible dependency modeling, we propose a Masked Part-of-Speech Model (MPoSM), inspired by the recent success of Masked Language Models (MLM). MPoSM can model arbitrary tag dependency and perform POS induction through the objective of masked POS reconstruction. We achieve competitive results on both the English Penn WSJ dataset as well as the universal treebank containing 10 diverse languages. Though modeling the long-term dependency should ideally help this task, our ablation study shows mixed trends in different languages. To better understand this phenomenon, we design a novel synthetic experiment that can specifically diagnose the model's ability to learn tag agreement. Surprisingly, we find that even strong baselines fail to solve this problem consistently in a very simplified setting: the agreement between adjacent words. Nonetheless, MPoSM achieves overall better performance. Lastly, we conduct a detailed error analysis to shed light on other remaining challenges. Our code is available at https://github.com/owenzx/MPoSM
abstract_zh: 以前的词性 (POS) 归纳模型通常假设某些独立性假设（例如，马尔可夫、单向、局部依赖），而这些假设在真实语言中并不成立。例如，主谓一致可以是长期的和双向的。为了促进灵活的依赖关系建模，受最近成功的屏蔽语言模型（MLM）的启发，我们提出了屏蔽词性模型（MPoSM）。 MPoSM 可以对任意标签依赖性进行建模，并通过屏蔽 POS 重建的目标来执行 POS 归纳。我们在英语 Penn WSJ 数据集以及包含 10 种不同语言的通用树库上取得了有竞争力的结果。尽管对长期依赖性进行建模理想情况下应该有助于完成这项任务，但我们的消融研究显示了不同语言的混合趋势。为了更好地理解这种现象，我们设计了一种新颖的综合实验，可以专门诊断模型学习标签一致性的能力。令人惊讶的是，我们发现即使是强大的基线也无法在非常简单的设置中一致地解决这个问题：相邻单词之间的一致性。尽管如此，MPoSM 总体上取得了更好的性能。最后，我们进行了详细的错误分析，以阐明其他剩余的挑战。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/owenzx/MPoSM

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩码语言模型思想的无监督词性标注模型MPoSM，旨在通过建模长距离依赖关系提升词性归纳性能。
AI.motivation: 传统词性归纳模型存在马尔可夫假设等局限性，无法有效处理主谓一致等长距离双向依赖现象，需要更灵活的建模方式。
AI.method: 设计掩码词性模型（MPoSM），通过掩码词性重建目标学习任意标签依赖关系，结合消融实验与合成实验验证模型效果。
AI.result: 在英语Penn WSJ数据集及10种语言的通用树库中取得竞争力结果，但长距离依赖建模效果因语言而异；合成实验显示强基线难以解决相邻词一致性问题，而MPoSM表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 长距离建模对词性标注有帮助但效果因语言差异，模型在简化场景下仍存在标签一致性学习难题，需进一步优化。

authors_text: Xinmeng Xu,Yang Wang,Jie Jia,Binbin Chen,Dejun Li
title: Improving Visual Speech Enhancement Network by Learning Audio-visual Affinity with Multi-head Attention
title_zh: 通过学习多头注意力的视听亲和力来改进视觉语音增强网络
comment: Accepted by Interspeech 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2101.06268
comments: Accepted by Interspeech 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2101.06268
abstract: Audio-visual speech enhancement system is regarded as one of promising solutions for isolating and enhancing speech of desired speaker. Typical methods focus on predicting clean speech spectrum via a naive convolution neural network based encoder-decoder architecture, and these methods a) are not adequate to use data fully, b) are unable to effectively balance audio-visual features. The proposed model alleviates these drawbacks by a) applying a model that fuses audio and visual features layer by layer in encoding phase, and that feeds fused audio-visual features to each corresponding decoder layer, and more importantly, b) introducing a 2-stage multi-head cross attention (MHCA) mechanism to infer audio-visual speech enhancement for balancing the fused audio-visual features and eliminating irrelevant features. This paper proposes attentional audio-visual multi-layer feature fusion model, in which MHCA units are applied to feature mapping at every layer of decoder. The proposed model demonstrates the superior performance of the network against the state-of-the-art models.
summary: Audio-visual speech enhancement system is regarded as one of promising solutions for isolating and enhancing speech of desired speaker. Typical methods focus on predicting clean speech spectrum via a naive convolution neural network based encoder-decoder architecture, and these methods a) are not adequate to use data fully, b) are unable to effectively balance audio-visual features. The proposed model alleviates these drawbacks by a) applying a model that fuses audio and visual features layer by layer in encoding phase, and that feeds fused audio-visual features to each corresponding decoder layer, and more importantly, b) introducing a 2-stage multi-head cross attention (MHCA) mechanism to infer audio-visual speech enhancement for balancing the fused audio-visual features and eliminating irrelevant features. This paper proposes attentional audio-visual multi-layer feature fusion model, in which MHCA units are applied to feature mapping at every layer of decoder. The proposed model demonstrates the superior performance of the network against the state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 视听语音增强系统被认为是隔离和增强所需说话者语音的有前途的解决方案之一。典型的方法侧重于通过基于朴素卷积神经网络的编码器-解码器架构来预测干净的语音频谱，这些方法a）不足以充分利用数据，b）无法有效平衡视听特征。所提出的模型通过以下方式减轻了这些缺点：a）应用在编码阶段逐层融合音频和视觉特征的模型，并将融合的视听特征馈送到每个相应的解码器层，更重要的是，b）引入2阶段多头交叉注意（MHCA）机制来推断视听语音增强，以平衡融合的视听特征并消除不相关的特征。本文提出了注意力视听多层特征融合模型，其中MHCA单元应用于解码器每一层的特征映射。所提出的模型展示了网络相对于最先进模型的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多头交叉注意力机制的视听特征融合模型，以改进视觉语音增强网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在数据利用效率和视听特征平衡方面存在不足，导致语音增强效果受限。
AI.method: 采用分层视听特征融合架构，结合两阶段多头交叉注意力机制，实现特征映射与无关信息抑制。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在语音增强任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力机制优化视听特征融合，有效提升了语音增强网络的性能与鲁棒性。

search_text: Improving Visual Speech Enhancement Network by Learning Audio-visual Affinity with Multi-head Attention 通过学习多头注意力的视听亲和力来改进视觉语音增强网络 Audio-visual speech enhancement system is regarded as one of promising solutions for isolating and enhancing speech of desired speaker. Typical methods focus on predicting clean speech spectrum via a naive convolution neural network based encoder-decoder architecture, and these methods a) are not adequate to use data fully, b) are unable to effectively balance audio-visual features. The proposed model alleviates these drawbacks by a) applying a model that fuses audio and visual features layer by layer in encoding phase, and that feeds fused audio-visual features to each corresponding decoder layer, and more importantly, b) introducing a 2-stage multi-head cross attention (MHCA) mechanism to infer audio-visual speech enhancement for balancing the fused audio-visual features and eliminating irrelevant features. This paper proposes attentional audio-visual multi-layer feature fusion model, in which MHCA units are applied to feature mapping at every layer of decoder. The proposed model demonstrates the superior performance of the network against the state-of-the-art models. 视听语音增强系统被认为是隔离和增强所需说话者语音的有前途的解决方案之一。典型的方法侧重于通过基于朴素卷积神经网络的编码器-解码器架构来预测干净的语音频谱，这些方法a）不足以充分利用数据，b）无法有效平衡视听特征。所提出的模型通过以下方式减轻了这些缺点：a）应用在编码阶段逐层融合音频和视觉特征的模型，并将融合的视听特征馈送到每个相应的解码器层，更重要的是，b）引入2阶段多头交叉注意（MHCA）机制来推断视听语音增强，以平衡融合的视听特征并消除不相关的特征。本文提出了注意力视听多层特征融合模型，其中MHCA单元应用于解码器每一层的特征映射。所提出的模型展示了网络相对于最先进模型的优越性能。 本文提出一种基于多头交叉注意力机制的视听特征融合模型，以改进视觉语音增强网络的性能。 Xinmeng Xu,Yang Wang,Jie Jia,Binbin Chen,Dejun Li eess.AS,cs.MM,cs.SD

authors_text: Xinmeng Xu,Yang Wang,Jie Jia,Binbin Chen,Jianjun Hao
title: GLD-Net: Improving Monaural Speech Enhancement by Learning Global and Local Dependency Features with GLD Block
title_zh: GLD-Net：通过使用 GLD 块学习全局和局部依赖特征来改进单声道语音增强
abstract: For monaural speech enhancement, contextual information is important for accurate speech estimation. However, commonly used convolution neural networks (CNNs) are weak in capturing temporal contexts since they only build blocks that process one local neighborhood at a time. To address this problem, we learn from human auditory perception to introduce a two-stage trainable reasoning mechanism, referred as global-local dependency (GLD) block. GLD blocks capture long-term dependency of time-frequency bins both in global level and local level from the noisy spectrogram to help detecting correlations among speech part, noise part, and whole noisy input. What is more, we conduct a monaural speech enhancement network called GLD-Net, which adopts encoder-decoder architecture and consists of speech object branch, interference branch, and global noisy branch. The extracted speech feature at global-level and local-level are efficiently reasoned and aggregated in each of the branches. We compare the proposed GLD-Net with existing state-of-art methods on WSJ0 and DEMAND dataset. The results show that GLD-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of PESQ and STOI.
summary: For monaural speech enhancement, contextual information is important for accurate speech estimation. However, commonly used convolution neural networks (CNNs) are weak in capturing temporal contexts since they only build blocks that process one local neighborhood at a time. To address this problem, we learn from human auditory perception to introduce a two-stage trainable reasoning mechanism, referred as global-local dependency (GLD) block. GLD blocks capture long-term dependency of time-frequency bins both in global level and local level from the noisy spectrogram to help detecting correlations among speech part, noise part, and whole noisy input. What is more, we conduct a monaural speech enhancement network called GLD-Net, which adopts encoder-decoder architecture and consists of speech object branch, interference branch, and global noisy branch. The extracted speech feature at global-level and local-level are efficiently reasoned and aggregated in each of the branches. We compare the proposed GLD-Net with existing state-of-art methods on WSJ0 and DEMAND dataset. The results show that GLD-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of PESQ and STOI.
abstract_zh: 对于单耳语音增强，上下文信息对于准确的语音估计非常重要。然而，常用的卷积神经网络（CNN）在捕获时间上下文方面很弱，因为它们只构建一次处理一个局部邻域的块。为了解决这个问题，我们从人类听觉感知中学习，引入了一种两阶段可训练推理机制，称为全局局部依赖（GLD）块。 GLD 块从噪声频谱图中捕获全局级别和局部级别的时频箱的长期依赖性，以帮助检测语音部分、噪声部分和整个噪声输入之间的相关性。此外，我们还建立了一个称为 GLD-Net 的单声道语音增强网络，它采用编码器-解码器架构，由语音对象分支、干扰分支和全局噪声分支组成。在全局级别和局部级别提取的语音特征在每个分支中被有效地推理和聚合。我们将所提出的 GLD-Net 与 WSJ0 和 DEMAND 数据集上现有的最先进方法进行比较。结果表明，GLD-Net 在 PESQ 和 STOI 方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLD-Net，通过学习全局和局部依赖特征改进单声道语音增强。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN难以捕捉语音信号的长时依赖关系，导致语音增强效果受限，需引入更有效的上下文建模机制。
AI.method: 设计GLD模块，结合全局与局部时间频率依赖关系，构建包含语音对象分支、干扰分支和全局噪声分支的编码器-解码器网络。
AI.result: 在WSJ0和DEMAND数据集上，GLD-Net在PESQ和STOI指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GLD-Net通过建模全局局部依赖关系有效提升了语音增强性能，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Shawn Mathew,Saad Nadeem,Arie Kaufman
title: CLTS-GAN: Color-Lighting-Texture-Specular Reflection Augmentation for Colonoscopy
title_zh: CLTS-GAN：结肠镜检查的颜色-照明-纹理-镜面反射增强
abstract: Automated analysis of optical colonoscopy (OC) video frames (to assist endoscopists during OC) is challenging due to variations in color, lighting, texture, and specular reflections. Previous methods either remove some of these variations via preprocessing (making pipelines cumbersome) or add diverse training data with annotations (but expensive and time-consuming). We present CLTS-GAN, a new deep learning model that gives fine control over color, lighting, texture, and specular reflection synthesis for OC video frames. We show that adding these colonoscopy-specific augmentations to the training data can improve state-of-the-art polyp detection/segmentation methods as well as drive next generation of OC simulators for training medical students. The code and pre-trained models for CLTS-GAN are available on Computational Endoscopy Platform GitHub (https://github.com/nadeemlab/CEP).
summary: Automated analysis of optical colonoscopy (OC) video frames (to assist endoscopists during OC) is challenging due to variations in color, lighting, texture, and specular reflections. Previous methods either remove some of these variations via preprocessing (making pipelines cumbersome) or add diverse training data with annotations (but expensive and time-consuming). We present CLTS-GAN, a new deep learning model that gives fine control over color, lighting, texture, and specular reflection synthesis for OC video frames. We show that adding these colonoscopy-specific augmentations to the training data can improve state-of-the-art polyp detection/segmentation methods as well as drive next generation of OC simulators for training medical students. The code and pre-trained models for CLTS-GAN are available on Computational Endoscopy Platform GitHub (https://github.com/nadeemlab/CEP).
abstract_zh: 由于颜色、照明、纹理和镜面反射的变化，光学结肠镜 (OC) 视频帧的自动分析（以在 OC 期间协助内窥镜医师）具有挑战性。以前的方法要么通过预处理消除其中一些变化（使管道变得繁琐），要么通过注释添加不同的训练数据（但昂贵且耗时）。我们推出了 CLTS-GAN，这是一种新的深度学习模型，可以对 OC 视频帧的颜色、光照、纹理和镜面反射合成进行精细控制。我们表明，将这些结肠镜检查特定的增强功能添加到训练数据中可以改进最先进的息肉检测/分割方法，并驱动下一代 OC 模拟器来培训医学生。 CLTS-GAN 的代码和预训练模型可在计算内窥镜平台 GitHub (https://github.com/nadeemlab/CEP) 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLTS-GAN模型，通过颜色-光照-纹理-镜面反射增强技术，提升结肠镜图像分析的自动化水平。
AI.motivation: 结肠镜图像分析受颜色、光照等多因素干扰，传统预处理方法繁琐且数据标注成本高昂，亟需高效的数据增强方案。
AI.method: 设计CLTS-GAN生成对抗网络，实现对结肠镜图像颜色、光照、纹理及镜面反射的可控合成，生成多样化训练数据。
AI.result: 增强数据显著提升息肉检测/分割算法性能，并为下一代结肠镜模拟训练系统提供技术支持。
AI.conclusion: CLTS-GAN通过针对性图像增强有效解决结肠镜分析难题，推动医疗AI与教学模拟器发展。

authors_text: Thibaud Ehret,Roger Marí,Gabriele Facciolo
title: Regularization of NeRFs using differential geometry
title_zh: 使用微分几何对 NeRF 进行正则化
abstract: Neural radiance fields, or NeRF, represent a breakthrough in the field of novel view synthesis and 3D modeling of complex scenes from multi-view image collections. Numerous recent works have shown the importance of making NeRF models more robust, by means of regularization, in order to train with possibly inconsistent and/or very sparse data. In this work, we explore how differential geometry can provide elegant regularization tools for robustly training NeRF-like models, which are modified so as to represent continuous and infinitely differentiable functions. In particular, we present a generic framework for regularizing different types of NeRFs observations to improve the performance in challenging conditions. We also show how the same formalism can also be used to natively encourage the regularity of surfaces by means of Gaussian or mean curvatures.
summary: Neural radiance fields, or NeRF, represent a breakthrough in the field of novel view synthesis and 3D modeling of complex scenes from multi-view image collections. Numerous recent works have shown the importance of making NeRF models more robust, by means of regularization, in order to train with possibly inconsistent and/or very sparse data. In this work, we explore how differential geometry can provide elegant regularization tools for robustly training NeRF-like models, which are modified so as to represent continuous and infinitely differentiable functions. In particular, we present a generic framework for regularizing different types of NeRFs observations to improve the performance in challenging conditions. We also show how the same formalism can also be used to natively encourage the regularity of surfaces by means of Gaussian or mean curvatures.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 代表了多视图图像集合中复杂场景的新颖视图合成和 3D 建模领域的突破。最近的许多工作表明了通过正则化使 NeRF 模型更加稳健的重要性，以便使用可能不一致和/或非常稀疏的数据进行训练。在这项工作中，我们探索微分几何如何提供优雅的正则化工具来稳健地训练类似 NeRF 的模型，这些模型经过修改以表示连续且无限可微的函数。特别是，我们提出了一个通用框架，用于规范不同类型的 NeRF 观测，以提高在挑战性条件下的性能。我们还展示了如何使用相同的形式通过高斯曲率或平均曲率来自然地促进表面的规则性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用微分几何方法对神经辐射场（NeRF）进行正则化，以提升模型在稀疏或不一致数据下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF模型在面对不一致或稀疏的多视角图像数据时，容易产生不稳定结果，亟需有效的正则化手段。
AI.method: 构建基于微分几何的通用正则化框架，通过高斯曲率和平均曲率约束，使NeRF模型能够表示连续且无限可微的函数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在复杂场景下显著提升了NeRF的重建质量，并有效改善了表面几何的正则性。
AI.conclusion: 微分几何正则化为NeRF训练提供了新范式，在保持细节精度的同时增强了模型鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用微分几何方法对神经辐射场（NeRF）进行正则化，以提升模型在稀疏或不一致数据下的鲁棒性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有NeRF模型在面对不一致或稀疏的多视角图像数据时，容易产生不稳定结果，亟需有效的正则化手段。
ai_content.method: 构建基于微分几何的通用正则化框架，通过高斯曲率和平均曲率约束，使NeRF模型能够表示连续且无限可微的函数。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法在复杂场景下显著提升了NeRF的重建质量，并有效改善了表面几何的正则性。
ai_content.conclusion: 微分几何正则化为NeRF训练提供了新范式，在保持细节精度的同时增强了模型鲁棒性。

search_text: Regularization of NeRFs using differential geometry 使用微分几何对 NeRF 进行正则化 Neural radiance fields, or NeRF, represent a breakthrough in the field of novel view synthesis and 3D modeling of complex scenes from multi-view image collections. Numerous recent works have shown the importance of making NeRF models more robust, by means of regularization, in order to train with possibly inconsistent and/or very sparse data. In this work, we explore how differential geometry can provide elegant regularization tools for robustly training NeRF-like models, which are modified so as to represent continuous and infinitely differentiable functions. In particular, we present a generic framework for regularizing different types of NeRFs observations to improve the performance in challenging conditions. We also show how the same formalism can also be used to natively encourage the regularity of surfaces by means of Gaussian or mean curvatures. 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 代表了多视图图像集合中复杂场景的新颖视图合成和 3D 建模领域的突破。最近的许多工作表明了通过正则化使 NeRF 模型更加稳健的重要性，以便使用可能不一致和/或非常稀疏的数据进行训练。在这项工作中，我们探索微分几何如何提供优雅的正则化工具来稳健地训练类似 NeRF 的模型，这些模型经过修改以表示连续且无限可微的函数。特别是，我们提出了一个通用框架，用于规范不同类型的 NeRF 观测，以提高在挑战性条件下的性能。我们还展示了如何使用相同的形式通过高斯曲率或平均曲率来自然地促进表面的规则性。 本文提出利用微分几何方法对神经辐射场（NeRF）进行正则化，以提升模型在稀疏或不一致数据下的鲁棒性。 Thibaud Ehret,Roger Marí,Gabriele Facciolo cs.CV

authors_text: Luyao Zhang,Tianyu Wu,Saad Lahrichi,Carlos-Gustavo Salas-Flores,Jiayi Li
title: A Data Science Pipeline for Algorithmic Trading: A Comparative Study of Applications for Finance and Cryptoeconomics
title_zh: 算法交易的数据科学管道：金融和加密经济学应用的比较研究
comment: Accepted at: The First International Symposium on Recent Advances of Blockchain Evolution: Architecture, Intelligence, Incentive, and Applications
comments: Accepted at: The First International Symposium on Recent Advances of Blockchain Evolution: Architecture, Intelligence, Incentive, and Applications
abstract: Recent advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) have made algorithmic trading play a central role in finance. However, current research and applications are disconnected information islands. We propose a generally applicable pipeline for designing, programming, and evaluating the algorithmic trading of stock and crypto assets. Moreover, we demonstrate how our data science pipeline works with respect to four conventional algorithms: the moving average crossover, volume-weighted average price, sentiment analysis, and statistical arbitrage algorithms. Our study offers a systematic way to program, evaluate, and compare different trading strategies. Furthermore, we implement our algorithms through object-oriented programming in Python3, which serves as open-source software for future academic research and applications.
summary: Recent advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) have made algorithmic trading play a central role in finance. However, current research and applications are disconnected information islands. We propose a generally applicable pipeline for designing, programming, and evaluating the algorithmic trading of stock and crypto assets. Moreover, we demonstrate how our data science pipeline works with respect to four conventional algorithms: the moving average crossover, volume-weighted average price, sentiment analysis, and statistical arbitrage algorithms. Our study offers a systematic way to program, evaluate, and compare different trading strategies. Furthermore, we implement our algorithms through object-oriented programming in Python3, which serves as open-source software for future academic research and applications.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 的最新进展使算法交易在金融领域发挥着核心作用。然而，当前的研究和应用是互不相连的信息孤岛。我们提出了一种普遍适用的管道，用于设计、编程和评估股票和加密资产的算法交易。此外，我们还展示了我们的数据科学管道如何与四种传统算法相关：移动平均交叉、成交量加权平均价格、情绪分析和统计套利算法。我们的研究提供了一种系统的方法来编程、评估和比较不同的交易策略。此外，我们通过Python3中面向对象的编程来实现我们的算法，Python3作为未来学术研究和应用的开源软件。

AI.tldr: 提出一个通用的数据科学流程，用于设计和评估股票及加密资产的算法交易策略，并通过四种传统算法进行验证。
AI.motivation: 现有算法交易研究和应用分散，缺乏统一框架，需系统化方法进行策略设计与比较。
AI.method: 构建数据科学流程，采用移动平均线交叉等四种算法进行验证，并通过Python3面向对象编程实现开源工具。
AI.result: 验证了流程在股票和加密资产中的有效性，提供系统化策略比较方法，并开发开源Python工具。
AI.conclusion: 提出的流程和工具为算法交易研究提供统一框架，促进金融和加密经济领域的发展。

authors_text: Minsang Kim,Seungjun Baek
title: ComDensE : Combined Dense Embedding of Relation-aware and Common Features for Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: ComDensE：用于知识图补全的关系感知和通用特征的组合密集嵌入
comment: International Conference on Pattern Recognition 2022, Accepted
comments: International Conference on Pattern Recognition 2022, Accepted
abstract: Real-world knowledge graphs (KG) are mostly incomplete. The problem of recovering missing relations, called KG completion, has recently become an active research area. Knowledge graph (KG) embedding, a low-dimensional representation of entities and relations, is the crucial technique for KG completion. Convolutional neural networks in models such as ConvE, SACN, InteractE, and RGCN achieve recent successes. This paper takes a different architectural view and proposes ComDensE which combines relation-aware and common features using dense neural networks. In the relation-aware feature extraction, we attempt to create relational inductive bias by applying an encoding function specific to each relation. In the common feature extraction, we apply the common encoding function to all input embeddings. These encoding functions are implemented using dense layers in ComDensE. ComDensE achieves the state-of-the-art performance in the link prediction in terms of MRR, HIT@1 on FB15k-237 and HIT@1 on WN18RR compared to the previous baseline approaches. We conduct an extensive ablation study to examine the effects of the relation-aware layer and the common layer of the ComDensE. Experimental results illustrate that the combined dense architecture as implemented in ComDensE achieves the best performance.
summary: Real-world knowledge graphs (KG) are mostly incomplete. The problem of recovering missing relations, called KG completion, has recently become an active research area. Knowledge graph (KG) embedding, a low-dimensional representation of entities and relations, is the crucial technique for KG completion. Convolutional neural networks in models such as ConvE, SACN, InteractE, and RGCN achieve recent successes. This paper takes a different architectural view and proposes ComDensE which combines relation-aware and common features using dense neural networks. In the relation-aware feature extraction, we attempt to create relational inductive bias by applying an encoding function specific to each relation. In the common feature extraction, we apply the common encoding function to all input embeddings. These encoding functions are implemented using dense layers in ComDensE. ComDensE achieves the state-of-the-art performance in the link prediction in terms of MRR, HIT@1 on FB15k-237 and HIT@1 on WN18RR compared to the previous baseline approaches. We conduct an extensive ablation study to examine the effects of the relation-aware layer and the common layer of the ComDensE. Experimental results illustrate that the combined dense architecture as implemented in ComDensE achieves the best performance.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的知识图谱（KG）大多是不完整的。恢复缺失关系的问题（称为 KG 补全）最近已成为一个活跃的研究领域。知识图（KG）嵌入是实体和关系的低维表示，是知识图谱补全的关键技术。 ConvE、SACN、InteractE 和 RGCN 等模型中的卷积神经网络最近取得了成功。本文采用了不同的架构观点，并提出了 ComDensE，它使用密集神经网络结合了关系感知和共同特征。在关系感知特征提取中，我们尝试通过应用特定于每个关系的编码函数来创建关系归纳偏差。在公共特征提取中，我们将公共编码函数应用于所有输入嵌入。这些编码功能是使用 ComDensE 中的密集层实现的。与之前的基线方法相比，ComDensE 在 MRR、FB15k-237 上的 HIT@1 和 WN18RR 上的 HIT@1 方面实现了最先进的链路预测性能。我们进行了广泛的消融研究，以检查 ComDensE 的关系感知层和公共层的影响。实验结果表明，ComDensE 中实现的组合密集架构实现了最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ComDensE方法，通过结合关系感知特征和通用特征的密集嵌入，解决知识图谱补全中的缺失关系预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法在捕捉关系特异性特征方面存在不足，需探索更有效的特征融合方式以提升链接预测性能。
AI.method: 设计密集神经网络架构，通过关系感知编码层（特定关系编码函数）和通用编码层（统一编码函数）分别提取特征，并进行特征组合。
AI.result: 在FB15k-237和WN18RR数据集上，ComDensE在MRR和HIT@1指标上优于现有基线方法，消融实验验证了双层特征融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合关系感知与通用特征的密集嵌入架构能显著提升知识图谱补全性能，为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: ComDensE : Combined Dense Embedding of Relation-aware and Common Features for Knowledge Graph Completion ComDensE：用于知识图补全的关系感知和通用特征的组合密集嵌入 Real-world knowledge graphs (KG) are mostly incomplete. The problem of recovering missing relations, called KG completion, has recently become an active research area. Knowledge graph (KG) embedding, a low-dimensional representation of entities and relations, is the crucial technique for KG completion. Convolutional neural networks in models such as ConvE, SACN, InteractE, and RGCN achieve recent successes. This paper takes a different architectural view and proposes ComDensE which combines relation-aware and common features using dense neural networks. In the relation-aware feature extraction, we attempt to create relational inductive bias by applying an encoding function specific to each relation. In the common feature extraction, we apply the common encoding function to all input embeddings. These encoding functions are implemented using dense layers in ComDensE. ComDensE achieves the state-of-the-art performance in the link prediction in terms of MRR, HIT@1 on FB15k-237 and HIT@1 on WN18RR compared to the previous baseline approaches. We conduct an extensive ablation study to examine the effects of the relation-aware layer and the common layer of the ComDensE. Experimental results illustrate that the combined dense architecture as implemented in ComDensE achieves the best performance. 现实世界的知识图谱（KG）大多是不完整的。恢复缺失关系的问题（称为 KG 补全）最近已成为一个活跃的研究领域。知识图（KG）嵌入是实体和关系的低维表示，是知识图谱补全的关键技术。 ConvE、SACN、InteractE 和 RGCN 等模型中的卷积神经网络最近取得了成功。本文采用了不同的架构观点，并提出了 ComDensE，它使用密集神经网络结合了关系感知和共同特征。在关系感知特征提取中，我们尝试通过应用特定于每个关系的编码函数来创建关系归纳偏差。在公共特征提取中，我们将公共编码函数应用于所有输入嵌入。这些编码功能是使用 ComDensE 中的密集层实现的。与之前的基线方法相比，ComDensE 在 MRR、FB15k-237 上的 HIT@1 和 WN18RR 上的 HIT@1 方面实现了最先进的链路预测性能。我们进行了广泛的消融研究，以检查 ComDensE 的关系感知层和公共层的影响。实验结果表明，ComDensE 中实现的组合密集架构实现了最佳性能。 本文提出ComDensE方法，通过结合关系感知特征和通用特征的密集嵌入，解决知识图谱补全中的缺失关系预测问题。 Minsang Kim,Seungjun Baek cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xinting Hu,Yulei Niu,Chunyan Miao,Xian-Sheng Hua,Hanwang Zhang
title: On Non-Random Missing Labels in Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 关于半监督学习中的非随机缺失标签
abstract: Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) is fundamentally a missing label problem, in which the label Missing Not At Random (MNAR) problem is more realistic and challenging, compared to the widely-adopted yet naive Missing Completely At Random assumption where both labeled and unlabeled data share the same class distribution. Different from existing SSL solutions that overlook the role of "class" in causing the non-randomness, e.g., users are more likely to label popular classes, we explicitly incorporate "class" into SSL. Our method is three-fold: 1) We propose Class-Aware Propensity (CAP) that exploits the unlabeled data to train an improved classifier using the biased labeled data. 2) To encourage rare class training, whose model is low-recall but high-precision that discards too many pseudo-labeled data, we propose Class-Aware Imputation (CAI) that dynamically decreases (or increases) the pseudo-label assignment threshold for rare (or frequent) classes. 3) Overall, we integrate CAP and CAI into a Class-Aware Doubly Robust (CADR) estimator for training an unbiased SSL model. Under various MNAR settings and ablations, our method not only significantly outperforms existing baselines but also surpasses other label bias removal SSL methods. Please check our code at: https://github.com/JoyHuYY1412/CADR-FixMatch.

Our method is three-fold: 1) We propose Class-Aware Propensity (CAP) that exploits the unlabeled data to train an improved classifier using the biased labeled data. 2) To encourage rare class training, whose model is low-recall but high-precision that discards too many pseudo-labeled data, we propose Class-Aware Imputation (CAI) that dynamically decreases (or increases) the pseudo-label assignment threshold for rare (or frequent) classes. 3) Overall, we integrate CAP and CAI into a Class-Aware Doubly Robust (CADR) estimator for training an unbiased SSL model. Under various MNAR settings and ablations, our method not only significantly outperforms existing baselines but also surpasses other label bias removal SSL methods. Please check our code at: https://github.com/JoyHuYY1412/CADR-FixMatch.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）从根本上来说是一个缺失标签问题，其中标签非随机缺失（MNAR）问题比广泛采用但幼稚的完全随机缺失假设（其中标记和未标记数据共享相同的类分布）更现实和更具挑战性。与现有的 SSL 解决方案忽视“类”在导致非随机性中的作用（例如，用户更有可能标记流行类）不同，我们明确地将“类”合并到 SSL 中。我们的方法有三部分：1）我们提出了类别感知倾向（CAP），它利用未标记的数据来使用有偏差的标记数据来训练改进的分类器。 2）为了鼓励稀有类训练，其模型召回率低但精度高，会丢弃太多伪标签数据，我们提出了类感知插补（CAI），它动态降低（或增加）稀有（或频繁）类的伪标签分配阈值。 3) 总体而言，我们将 CAP 和 CAI 集成到类感知双鲁棒 (CADR) 估计器中，用于训练无偏 SSL 模型。在各种 MNAR 设置和消融下，我们的方法不仅显着优于现有基线，而且还超过了其他标签偏差消除 SSL 方法。请检查我们的代码：https://github.com/JoyHuYY1412/CADR-FixMatch。

AI.tldr: 本文研究半监督学习中标签非随机缺失（MNAR）问题，提出结合类别信息的解决方案以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法通常假设标签缺失完全随机（MCAR），但实际中用户更倾向于标注流行类别，导致标签分布偏差。传统方法忽视了类别对缺失机制的影响，难以有效处理真实场景下的MNAR问题。
AI.method: 提出三步方法：1) 类别感知倾向性估计（CAP）利用无标签数据优化分类器；2) 类别感知插补（CAI）动态调整稀有/常见类别的伪标签阈值；3) 将CAP与CAI整合为类别感知双重稳健估计器（CADR），实现无偏模型训练。
AI.result: 在多种MNAR设置下，CADR方法显著优于现有基线及标签偏差消除方法，实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模类别对标签缺失的影响，本文提出的CADR方法有效解决了半监督学习中的非随机缺失问题，为真实场景下的标签偏差处理提供了新思路。
