authors_text: Leonie Henschel,David Kügler,Derek S Andrews,Christine W Nordahl,Martin Reuter
title: Identifying and Combating Bias in Segmentation Networks by leveraging multiple resolutions
title_zh: 利用多种分辨率识别和消除分割网络中的偏差
abstract: Exploration of bias has significant impact on the transparency and applicability of deep learning pipelines in medical settings, yet is so far woefully understudied. In this paper, we consider two separate groups for which training data is only available at differing image resolutions. For group H, available images and labels are at the preferred high resolution while for group L only deprecated lower resolution data exist. We analyse how this resolution-bias in the data distribution propagates to systematically biased predictions for group L at higher resolutions. Our results demonstrate that single-resolution training settings result in significant loss of volumetric group differences that translate to erroneous segmentations as measured by DSC and subsequent classification failures on the low resolution group. We further explore how training data across resolutions can be used to combat this systematic bias. Specifically, we investigate the effect of image resampling, scale augmentation and resolution independence and demonstrate that biases can effectively be reduced with multi-resolution approaches.
summary: Exploration of bias has significant impact on the transparency and applicability of deep learning pipelines in medical settings, yet is so far woefully understudied. In this paper, we consider two separate groups for which training data is only available at differing image resolutions. For group H, available images and labels are at the preferred high resolution while for group L only deprecated lower resolution data exist. We analyse how this resolution-bias in the data distribution propagates to systematically biased predictions for group L at higher resolutions. Our results demonstrate that single-resolution training settings result in significant loss of volumetric group differences that translate to erroneous segmentations as measured by DSC and subsequent classification failures on the low resolution group. We further explore how training data across resolutions can be used to combat this systematic bias. Specifically, we investigate the effect of image resampling, scale augmentation and resolution independence and demonstrate that biases can effectively be reduced with multi-resolution approaches.
abstract_zh: 偏见的探索对医疗环境中深度学习管道的透明度和适用性产生了重大影响，但迄今为止的研究还远远不够。在本文中，我们考虑两个单独的组，其训练数据仅在不同的图像分辨率下可用。对于 H 组，可用图像和标签具有首选的高分辨率，而对于 L 组，仅存在已弃用的较低分辨率数据。我们分析了数据分布中的这种分辨率偏差如何传播到 L 组在更高分辨率下的系统偏差预测。我们的结果表明，单分辨率训练设置会导致体积组差异的显着损失，从而转化为 DSC 测量的错误分割以及随后对低分辨率组的分类失败。我们进一步探索如何使用跨分辨率的训练数据来对抗这种系统性偏差。具体来说，我们研究了图像重采样、尺度增强和分辨率独立性的影响，并证明通过多分辨率方法可以有效减少偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文研究因训练数据分辨率差异导致的分割网络偏见问题，并提出多分辨率训练方法以减少此类系统性偏差。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域深度学习模型因数据分辨率差异可能导致预测偏差，但该问题尚未被充分研究，影响模型透明性和临床应用。
AI.method: 通过分析高/低分辨率数据分布差异，评估单分辨率训练的缺陷，并探索图像重采样、尺度增强及分辨率独立性等多分辨率训练策略。
AI.result: 单分辨率训练导致低分辨率组在高分辨率预测中出现显著体积差异损失和分割错误，而多分辨率方法有效缓解了这一偏见。
AI.conclusion: 多分辨率训练能显著降低因数据分辨率差异引发的系统性偏见，提升模型在不同分辨率数据下的分割准确性和泛化能力。

authors_text: Andrea Roli,Stuart A. Kauffman
title: The Hiatus Between Organism and Machine Evolution: Contrasting Mixed Microbial Communities with Robots
title_zh: 有机体与机器进化之间的差距：混合微生物群落与机器人的对比
abstract: Mixed microbial communities, usually composed of various bacterial and fungal species, are fundamental in a plethora of environments, from soil to human gut and skin. Their evolution is a paradigmatic example of intertwined dynamics, where not just the relations among species plays a role, but also the opportunities -- and possible harms -- that each species presents to the others. These opportunities are in fact \textit{affordances}, which can be seized by heritable variation and selection. In this paper, starting from a systemic viewpoint of mixed microbial communities, we focus on the pivotal role of affordances in evolution and we contrast it to the artificial evolution of programs and robots. We maintain that the two realms are neatly separated, in that natural evolution proceeds by extending the space of its possibilities in a completely open way, while the latter is inherently limited by the algorithmic framework it is defined. This discrepancy characterises also an envisioned setting in which robots evolve in the physical world. We present arguments supporting our claim and we propose an experimental setting for assessing our statements. Rather than just discussing the limitations of the artificial evolution of machines, the aim of this contribution is to emphasize the tremendous potential of the evolution of the biosphere, beautifully represented by the evolution of communities of microbes.

We present arguments supporting our claim and we propose an experimental setting for assessing our statements. Rather than just discussing the limitations of the artificial evolution of machines, the aim of this contribution is to emphasize the tremendous potential of the evolution of the biosphere, beautifully represented by the evolution of communities of microbes.
abstract_zh: 混合微生物群落通常由各种细菌和真菌物种组成，是从土壤到人类肠道和皮肤等多种环境的基础。它们的进化是相互交织的动态的典型例子，其中不仅物种之间的关系发挥作用，而且每个物种给其他物种带来的机会和可能的危害也发挥着作用。这些机会实际上是\textit{可供性}，可以通过遗传变异和选择来抓住。在本文中，我们从混合微生物群落的系统观点出发，重点关注可供性在进化中的关键作用，并将其与程序和机器人的人工进化进行对比。我们认为，这两个领域是完全分开的，因为自然进化是通过以完全开放的方式扩展其可能性的空间来进行的，而后者本质上受到它所定义的算法框架的限制。这种差异也是机器人在物理世界中进化的设想环境的特征。我们提出支持我们主张的论据，并提出一个实验设置来评估我们的陈述。这篇文章的目的不仅仅是讨论机器人工进化的局限性，而是强调生物圈进化的巨大潜力，微生物群落的进化完美地体现了这一潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文从系统视角对比微生物群落与机器的进化机制，强调自然进化通过‘可供性’实现开放可能性，而人工进化受算法框架限制。
AI.motivation: 揭示生物进化与人工进化在可能性扩展上的本质差异，突出生物圈进化的独特潜力，为人工系统设计提供反思。
AI.method: 基于系统论分析微生物群落的进化动态，结合理论论证与实验设计框架，对比自然进化与算法驱动的机器人进化模式。
AI.result: 论证自然进化通过物种间相互作用的‘可供性’实现开放性扩展，而人工进化因算法限制存在本质局限，并提出验证该论点的实验方案。
AI.conclusion: 生物进化（如微生物群落）展现远超人工系统的适应潜力，人工进化需突破算法框架限制以实现更开放的进化空间。

search_text: The Hiatus Between Organism and Machine Evolution: Contrasting Mixed Microbial Communities with Robots 有机体与机器进化之间的差距：混合微生物群落与机器人的对比 Mixed microbial communities, usually composed of various bacterial and fungal species, are fundamental in a plethora of environments, from soil to human gut and skin. Their evolution is a paradigmatic example of intertwined dynamics, where not just the relations among species plays a role, but also the opportunities -- and possible harms -- that each species presents to the others. These opportunities are in fact \textit{affordances}, which can be seized by heritable variation and selection. In this paper, starting from a systemic viewpoint of mixed microbial communities, we focus on the pivotal role of affordances in evolution and we contrast it to the artificial evolution of programs and robots. We maintain that the two realms are neatly separated, in that natural evolution proceeds by extending the space of its possibilities in a completely open way, while the latter is inherently limited by the algorithmic framework it is defined. This discrepancy characterises also an envisioned setting in which robots evolve in the physical world. We present arguments supporting our claim and we propose an experimental setting for assessing our statements. Rather than just discussing the limitations of the artificial evolution of machines, the aim of this contribution is to emphasize the tremendous potential of the evolution of the biosphere, beautifully represented by the evolution of communities of microbes. 混合微生物群落通常由各种细菌和真菌物种组成，是从土壤到人类肠道和皮肤等多种环境的基础。它们的进化是相互交织的动态的典型例子，其中不仅物种之间的关系发挥作用，而且每个物种给其他物种带来的机会和可能的危害也发挥着作用。这些机会实际上是\textit{可供性}，可以通过遗传变异和选择来抓住。在本文中，我们从混合微生物群落的系统观点出发，重点关注可供性在进化中的关键作用，并将其与程序和机器人的人工进化进行对比。我们认为，这两个领域是完全分开的，因为自然进化是通过以完全开放的方式扩展其可能性的空间来进行的，而后者本质上受到它所定义的算法框架的限制。这种差异也是机器人在物理世界中进化的设想环境的特征。我们提出支持我们主张的论据，并提出一个实验设置来评估我们的陈述。这篇文章的目的不仅仅是讨论机器人工进化的局限性，而是强调生物圈进化的巨大潜力，微生物群落的进化完美地体现了这一潜力。 本文从系统视角对比微生物群落与机器的进化机制，强调自然进化通过‘可供性’实现开放可能性，而人工进化受算法框架限制。 Andrea Roli,Stuart A. Kauffman q-bio.PE,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Aldo Pacchiano,Christoph Dann,Claudio Gentile
title: Best of Both Worlds Model Selection
title_zh: 两全其美的模型选择
abstract: We study the problem of model selection in bandit scenarios in the presence of nested policy classes, with the goal of obtaining simultaneous adversarial and stochastic ("best of both worlds") high-probability regret guarantees. Our approach requires that each base learner comes with a candidate regret bound that may or may not hold, while our meta algorithm plays each base learner according to a schedule that keeps the base learner's candidate regret bounds balanced until they are detected to violate their guarantees. We develop careful mis-specification tests specifically designed to blend the above model selection criterion with the ability to leverage the (potentially benign) nature of the environment. We recover the model selection guarantees of the CORRAL algorithm for adversarial environments, but with the additional benefit of achieving high probability regret bounds, specifically in the case of nested adversarial linear bandits. More importantly, our model selection results also hold simultaneously in stochastic environments under gap assumptions. These are the first theoretical results that achieve best of both world (stochastic and adversarial) guarantees while performing model selection in (linear) bandit scenarios.
summary: We study the problem of model selection in bandit scenarios in the presence of nested policy classes, with the goal of obtaining simultaneous adversarial and stochastic ("best of both worlds") high-probability regret guarantees. Our approach requires that each base learner comes with a candidate regret bound that may or may not hold, while our meta algorithm plays each base learner according to a schedule that keeps the base learner's candidate regret bounds balanced until they are detected to violate their guarantees. We develop careful mis-specification tests specifically designed to blend the above model selection criterion with the ability to leverage the (potentially benign) nature of the environment. We recover the model selection guarantees of the CORRAL algorithm for adversarial environments, but with the additional benefit of achieving high probability regret bounds, specifically in the case of nested adversarial linear bandits. More importantly, our model selection results also hold simultaneously in stochastic environments under gap assumptions. These are the first theoretical results that achieve best of both world (stochastic and adversarial) guarantees while performing model selection in (linear) bandit scenarios.
abstract_zh: 我们研究存在嵌套策略类的情况下强盗场景中的模型选择问题，目的是获得同时对抗性和随机（“两全其美”）高概率遗憾保证。我们的方法要求每个基学习器都带有一个可能成立或不成立的候选遗憾边界，而我们的元算法根据时间表来播放每个基学习器，以保持基学习器的候选遗憾边界平衡，直到检测到它们违反了保证。我们开发了仔细的错误规范测试，专门设计用于将上述模型选择标准与利用环境（潜在良性）性质的能力相结合。我们恢复了 CORRAL 算法针对对抗环境的模型选择保证，但具有实现高概率遗憾界限的额外好处，特别是在嵌套对抗线性老虎机的情况下。更重要的是，我们的模型选择结果在间隙假设下的随机环境中也同时成立。这些是在（线性）强盗场景中执行模型选择时实现两全其美（随机和对抗）保证的第一个理论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在嵌套策略类的老虎机场景中进行模型选择的问题，旨在同时获得对抗性和随机性环境下的高概率遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在对抗性和随机性环境中同时实现模型选择的理论保证，且缺乏对环境良性性质的利用能力。
AI.method: 设计了一种元算法，通过调度基础学习器并平衡其候选遗憾界，结合精心设计的误指定检测机制，以适应环境特性。
AI.result: 在对抗性线性老虎机中实现高概率遗憾界，同时在满足间隙假设的随机性环境中保持模型选择保证，首次实现线性老虎机场景下的双重保证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为线性老虎机的模型选择提供了首个同时适用于对抗性和随机性环境的理论结果，提升了算法的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Patrizio Angelini,Michael A. Bekos,Julia Katheder,Michael Kaufmann,Maximilian Pfister
title: RAC Drawings of Graphs with Low Degree
title_zh: 低次图的 RAC 绘制
comment: Extended version of a paper presented at MFCS 2022
comments: Extended version of a paper presented at MFCS 2022
abstract: Motivated by cognitive experiments providing evidence that large crossing-angles do not impair the readability of a graph drawing, RAC (Right Angle Crossing) drawings were introduced to address the problem of producing readable representations of non-planar graphs by supporting the optimal case in which all crossings form 90° angles. In this work, we make progress on the problem of finding RAC drawings of graphs of low degree. In this context, a long-standing open question asks whether all degree-3 graphs admit straight-line RAC drawings. This question has been positively answered for the Hamiltonian degree-3 graphs. We improve on this result by extending to the class of 3-edge-colorable degree-3 graphs. When each edge is allowed to have one bend, we prove that degree-4 graphs admit such RAC drawings, a result which was previously known only for degree-3 graphs. Finally, we show that 7-edge-colorable degree-7 graphs admit RAC drawings with two bends per edge. This improves over the previous result on degree-6 graphs.
summary: Motivated by cognitive experiments providing evidence that large crossing-angles do not impair the readability of a graph drawing, RAC (Right Angle Crossing) drawings were introduced to address the problem of producing readable representations of non-planar graphs by supporting the optimal case in which all crossings form 90° angles. In this work, we make progress on the problem of finding RAC drawings of graphs of low degree. In this context, a long-standing open question asks whether all degree-3 graphs admit straight-line RAC drawings. This question has been positively answered for the Hamiltonian degree-3 graphs. We improve on this result by extending to the class of 3-edge-colorable degree-3 graphs. When each edge is allowed to have one bend, we prove that degree-4 graphs admit such RAC drawings, a result which was previously known only for degree-3 graphs. Finally, we show that 7-edge-colorable degree-7 graphs admit RAC drawings with two bends per edge. This improves over the previous result on degree-6 graphs.
abstract_zh: 受认知实验提供的证据表明大交叉角度不会损害图形绘制的可读性的启发，RAC（直角交叉）绘图被引入，通过支持所有交叉形成 90° 角的最佳情况来解决生成非平面图的可读表示的问题。在这项工作中，我们在寻找低度图的 RAC 绘图问题上取得了进展。在这种情况下，一个长期悬而未决的问题是，是否所有 3 阶图都允许直线 RAC 绘图。这个问题在哈密顿三阶图上已经得到了肯定的回答。我们通过扩展到 3 边可着色 3 度图类来改进此结果。当允许每条边有一个弯曲时，我们证明 4 度图允许这样的 RAC 绘图，这一结果以前仅在 3 度图上已知。最后，我们展示了 7 边可着色 7 度图允许每条边有两个弯曲的 RAC 绘图。这比之前在 6 阶图上的结果有所改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究低度数图的RAC绘图问题，探讨不同度数图是否能通过特定条件实现直线条或带弯折的RAC绘图。
AI.motivation: 认知实验表明大交叉角有助于提升图的可读性，RAC绘图通过强制交叉为90°角解决非平面图的可读性问题，但低度数图的RAC绘图可行性仍存在开放问题。
AI.method: 基于图的边着色性质（如3-edge-colorable）和允许边弯折的约束条件，结合图论与计算几何方法进行构造性证明。
AI.result: 证明3-edge-colorable的3度图存在直线条RAC绘图；4度图允许1个弯折时存在RAC绘图；7-edge-colorable的7度图允许2个弯折时存在RAC绘图。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展边着色条件与弯折限制，推进了低度数图RAC绘图的理论边界，部分解决长期未决的开放问题。

search_text: RAC Drawings of Graphs with Low Degree 低次图的 RAC 绘制 Motivated by cognitive experiments providing evidence that large crossing-angles do not impair the readability of a graph drawing, RAC (Right Angle Crossing) drawings were introduced to address the problem of producing readable representations of non-planar graphs by supporting the optimal case in which all crossings form 90° angles. In this work, we make progress on the problem of finding RAC drawings of graphs of low degree. In this context, a long-standing open question asks whether all degree-3 graphs admit straight-line RAC drawings. This question has been positively answered for the Hamiltonian degree-3 graphs. We improve on this result by extending to the class of 3-edge-colorable degree-3 graphs. When each edge is allowed to have one bend, we prove that degree-4 graphs admit such RAC drawings, a result which was previously known only for degree-3 graphs. Finally, we show that 7-edge-colorable degree-7 graphs admit RAC drawings with two bends per edge. This improves over the previous result on degree-6 graphs. 受认知实验提供的证据表明大交叉角度不会损害图形绘制的可读性的启发，RAC（直角交叉）绘图被引入，通过支持所有交叉形成 90° 角的最佳情况来解决生成非平面图的可读表示的问题。在这项工作中，我们在寻找低度图的 RAC 绘图问题上取得了进展。在这种情况下，一个长期悬而未决的问题是，是否所有 3 阶图都允许直线 RAC 绘图。这个问题在哈密顿三阶图上已经得到了肯定的回答。我们通过扩展到 3 边可着色 3 度图类来改进此结果。当允许每条边有一个弯曲时，我们证明 4 度图允许这样的 RAC 绘图，这一结果以前仅在 3 度图上已知。最后，我们展示了 7 边可着色 7 度图允许每条边有两个弯曲的 RAC 绘图。这比之前在 6 阶图上的结果有所改进。 本文研究低度数图的RAC绘图问题，探讨不同度数图是否能通过特定条件实现直线条或带弯折的RAC绘图。 Patrizio Angelini,Michael A. Bekos,Julia Katheder,Michael Kaufmann,Maximilian Pfister cs.CG,cs.DM,cs.DS

authors_text: Wookjin Choi,Navdeep Dahiya,Saad Nadeem
title: CIRDataset: A large-scale Dataset for Clinically-Interpretable lung nodule Radiomics and malignancy prediction
title_zh: CIRDataset：用于临床可解释的肺结节放射组学和恶性肿瘤预测的大型数据集
abstract: Spiculations/lobulations, sharp/curved spikes on the surface of lung nodules, are good predictors of lung cancer malignancy and hence, are routinely assessed and reported by radiologists as part of the standardized Lung-RADS clinical scoring criteria. Given the 3D geometry of the nodule and 2D slice-by-slice assessment by radiologists, manual spiculation/lobulation annotation is a tedious task and thus no public datasets exist to date for probing the importance of these clinically-reported features in the SOTA malignancy prediction algorithms. As part of this paper, we release a large-scale Clinically-Interpretable Radiomics Dataset, CIRDataset, containing 956 radiologist QA/QC'ed spiculation/lobulation annotations on segmented lung nodules from two public datasets, LIDC-IDRI (N=883) and LUNGx (N=73). We also present an end-to-end deep learning model based on multi-class Voxel2Mesh extension to segment nodules (while preserving spikes), classify spikes (sharp/spiculation and curved/lobulation), and perform malignancy prediction. Previous methods have performed malignancy prediction for LIDC and LUNGx datasets but without robust attribution to any clinically reported/actionable features (due to known hyperparameter sensitivity issues with general attribution schemes). With the release of this comprehensively-annotated CIRDataset and end-to-end deep learning baseline, we hope that malignancy prediction methods can validate their explanations, benchmark against our baseline, and provide clinically-actionable insights. Dataset, code, pretrained models, and docker containers are available at https://github.com/nadeemlab/CIR.
summary: Spiculations/lobulations, sharp/curved spikes on the surface of lung nodules, are good predictors of lung cancer malignancy and hence, are routinely assessed and reported by radiologists as part of the standardized Lung-RADS clinical scoring criteria. Given the 3D geometry of the nodule and 2D slice-by-slice assessment by radiologists, manual spiculation/lobulation annotation is a tedious task and thus no public datasets exist to date for probing the importance of these clinically-reported features in the SOTA malignancy prediction algorithms. As part of this paper, we release a large-scale Clinically-Interpretable Radiomics Dataset, CIRDataset, containing 956 radiologist QA/QC'ed spiculation/lobulation annotations on segmented lung nodules from two public datasets, LIDC-IDRI (N=883) and LUNGx (N=73). We also present an end-to-end deep learning model based on multi-class Voxel2Mesh extension to segment nodules (while preserving spikes), classify spikes (sharp/spiculation and curved/lobulation), and perform malignancy prediction. Previous methods have performed malignancy prediction for LIDC and LUNGx datasets but without robust attribution to any clinically reported/actionable features (due to known hyperparameter sensitivity issues with general attribution schemes). With the release of this comprehensively-annotated CIRDataset and end-to-end deep learning baseline, we hope that malignancy prediction methods can validate their explanations, benchmark against our baseline, and provide clinically-actionable insights. Dataset, code, pretrained models, and docker containers are available at https://github.com/nadeemlab/CIR.
abstract_zh: 肺结节表面的毛刺/分叶、尖锐/弯曲的尖峰是肺癌恶性肿瘤的良好预测因子，因此，放射科医生定期评估和报告，作为标准化 Lung-RADS 临床评分标准的一部分。考虑到结节的 3D 几何形状和放射科医生逐层进行的 2D 切片评估，手动毛刺/分叶注释是一项繁琐的任务，因此迄今为止不存在公共数据集来探讨这些临床报告特征在 SOTA 恶性肿瘤预测算法中的重要性。作为本文的一部分，我们发布了一个大规模的临床可解释的放射组学数据集 CIRDataset，其中包含来自两个公共数据集 LIDC-IDRI (N=883) 和 LUNGx (N=73) 的分段肺结节的 956 名放射科医生 QA/QC 的毛刺/分叶注释。我们还提出了一种基于多类 Voxel2Mesh 扩展的端到端深度学习模型，用于分割结节（同时保留尖峰）、对尖峰进行分类（尖锐/针状和弯曲/分叶状），并执行恶性肿瘤预测。以前的方法已经对 LIDC 和 LUNGx 数据集进行了恶性肿瘤预测，但没有对任何临床报告/可操作特征进行可靠的归因（由于一般归因方案的已知超参数敏感性问题）。随着这个全面注释的 CIR 数据集和端到端深度学习基线的发布，我们希望恶性肿瘤预测方法能够验证其解释，对照我们的基线进行基准测试，并提供临床上可行的见解。数据集、代码、预训练模型和 Docker 容器可从 https://github.com/nadeemlab/CIR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模临床可解释肺结节放射组学数据集CIRDataset，并开发端到端深度学习模型用于肺结节分割、棘突分类及恶性预测。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集缺乏放射科医生标注的临床关键特征（如棘突/叶状特征），导致恶性预测模型无法有效验证临床可解释性。
AI.method: 整合LIDC-IDRI和LUNGx数据集，构建包含956个放射科标注的棘突/叶状特征的CIRDataset；设计基于多类Voxel2Mesh架构的深度学习模型，实现结节分割、棘突分类与恶性预测一体化。
AI.result: 发布包含临床标注的基准数据集及端到端模型，为后续研究提供可验证的临床特征关联分析基础。
AI.conclusion: CIRDataset与模型基线将推动肺结节恶性预测算法的临床可解释性研究，助力开发具有临床行动价值的诊断工具。

authors_text: Patrizio Angelini,Michael A. Bekos,Giordano Da Lozzo,Martin Gronemann,Fabrizio Montecchiani,Alessandra Tappini
title: Recognizing Map Graphs of Bounded Treewidth
title_zh: 识别有界树宽的地图
abstract: A map graph is a graph admitting a representation in which vertices are nations on a spherical map and edges are shared curve segments or points between nations. We present an explicit fixed-parameter tractable algorithm for recognizing map graphs parameterized by treewidth. The algorithm has time complexity that is linear in the size of the graph and, if the input is a yes-instance, it reports a certificate in the form of a so-called witness. Furthermore, this result is developed within a more general algorithmic framework that allows to test, for any $k$, if the input graph admits a $k$-map (where at most $k$ nations meet at a common point) or a hole-free~$k$-map (where each point of the sphere is covered by at least one nation). We point out that, although bounding the treewidth of the input graph also bounds the size of its largest clique, the latter alone does not seem to be a strong enough structural limitation to obtain an efficient time complexity. In fact, while the largest clique in a $k$-map graph is $\lfloor 3k/2 \rfloor$, the recognition of $k$-map graphs is still open for any fixed $k \ge 5$.
summary: A map graph is a graph admitting a representation in which vertices are nations on a spherical map and edges are shared curve segments or points between nations. We present an explicit fixed-parameter tractable algorithm for recognizing map graphs parameterized by treewidth. The algorithm has time complexity that is linear in the size of the graph and, if the input is a yes-instance, it reports a certificate in the form of a so-called witness. Furthermore, this result is developed within a more general algorithmic framework that allows to test, for any $k$, if the input graph admits a $k$-map (where at most $k$ nations meet at a common point) or a hole-free~$k$-map (where each point of the sphere is covered by at least one nation). We point out that, although bounding the treewidth of the input graph also bounds the size of its largest clique, the latter alone does not seem to be a strong enough structural limitation to obtain an efficient time complexity. In fact, while the largest clique in a $k$-map graph is $\lfloor 3k/2 \rfloor$, the recognition of $k$-map graphs is still open for any fixed $k \ge 5$.
abstract_zh: 地图图是一种允许表示的图，其中顶点是球形地图上的国家，边是国家之间共享的曲线段或点。我们提出了一种显式的固定参数易处理算法，用于识别由树宽参数化的地图图。该算法的时间复杂度与图的大小成线性关系，如果输入是“是”实例，它会以所谓的见证人的形式报告证书。此外，这个结果是在一个更通用的算法框架内开发的，该框架允许测试对于任何 $k$，输入图是否允许 $k$ 地图（其中最多 $k$ 国家在一个公共点相遇）或无洞 ~$k$ 地图（其中球体的每个点都被至少一个国家覆盖）。我们指出，虽然限制输入图的树宽也限制了其最大团的大小，但仅后者似乎不足以成为获得有效时间复杂度的结构限制。事实上，虽然 $k$-map 图中最大的集团是 $\lfloor 3k/2 \rfloor$，但 $k$-map 图的识别对于任何固定的 $k \ge 5$ 仍然是开放的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于树宽参数的固定参数多项式时间算法，用于识别地图图（map graphs）并生成证书。
AI.motivation: 地图图的识别问题在计算几何和图论中具有挑战性，尤其是当树宽受限时，需寻找高效的算法框架以处理复杂结构。
AI.method: 设计了一种线性时间复杂度的固定参数算法，结合一般性框架测试k-地图图及无洞k-地图图的可行性，并分析树宽与最大团的关系。
AI.result: 实现了参数化树宽的地图图识别算法，可在输入为肯定实例时生成证明，并扩展至k-地图图的通用检验框架。
AI.conclusion: 树宽限制虽能控制最大团规模，但单独依赖团大小不足以实现高效算法，且k≥5时的k-地图图识别问题仍待解决。

ai_content_json.method: 设计了一种线性时间复杂度的固定参数算法，结合一般性框架测试k-地图图及无洞k-地图图的可行性，并分析树宽与最大团的关系。
ai_content_json.result: 实现了参数化树宽的地图图识别算法，可在输入为肯定实例时生成证明，并扩展至k-地图图的通用检验框架。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 树宽限制虽能控制最大团规模，但单独依赖团大小不足以实现高效算法，且k≥5时的k-地图图识别问题仍待解决。

search_text: Recognizing Map Graphs of Bounded Treewidth 识别有界树宽的地图 A map graph is a graph admitting a representation in which vertices are nations on a spherical map and edges are shared curve segments or points between nations. We present an explicit fixed-parameter tractable algorithm for recognizing map graphs parameterized by treewidth. The algorithm has time complexity that is linear in the size of the graph and, if the input is a yes-instance, it reports a certificate in the form of a so-called witness. Furthermore, this result is developed within a more general algorithmic framework that allows to test, for any $k$, if the input graph admits a $k$-map (where at most $k$ nations meet at a common point) or a hole-free~$k$-map (where each point of the sphere is covered by at least one nation). We point out that, although bounding the treewidth of the input graph also bounds the size of its largest clique, the latter alone does not seem to be a strong enough structural limitation to obtain an efficient time complexity. In fact, while the largest clique in a $k$-map graph is $\lfloor 3k/2 \rfloor$, the recognition of $k$-map graphs is still open for any fixed $k \ge 5$. 地图图是一种允许表示的图，其中顶点是球形地图上的国家，边是国家之间共享的曲线段或点。我们提出了一种显式的固定参数易处理算法，用于识别由树宽参数化的地图图。该算法的时间复杂度与图的大小成线性关系，如果输入是“是”实例，它会以所谓的见证人的形式报告证书。此外，这个结果是在一个更通用的算法框架内开发的，该框架允许测试对于任何 $k$，输入图是否允许 $k$ 地图（其中最多 $k$ 国家在一个公共点相遇）或无洞 ~$k$ 地图（其中球体的每个点都被至少一个国家覆盖）。我们指出，虽然限制输入图的树宽也限制了其最大团的大小，但仅后者似乎不足以成为获得有效时间复杂度的结构限制。事实上，虽然 $k$-map 图中最大的集团是 $\lfloor 3k/2 \rfloor$，但 $k$-map 图的识别对于任何固定的 $k \ge 5$ 仍然是开放的。 本文提出了一种基于树宽参数的固定参数多项式时间算法，用于识别地图图（map graphs）并生成证书。 Patrizio Angelini,Michael A. Bekos,Giordano Da Lozzo,Martin Gronemann,Fabrizio Montecchiani,Alessandra Tappini cs.DS

authors_text: Mustafa Shukor,Xu Yao,Bharath Bushan Damodaran,Pierre Hellier
title: Semantic Unfolding of StyleGAN Latent Space
title_zh: StyleGAN 潜在空间的语义展开
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have proven to be surprisingly efficient for image editing by inverting and manipulating the latent code corresponding to an input real image. This editing property emerges from the disentangled nature of the latent space. In this paper, we identify that the facial attribute disentanglement is not optimal, thus facial editing relying on linear attribute separation is flawed. We thus propose to improve semantic disentanglement with supervision. Our method consists in learning a proxy latent representation using normalizing flows, and we show that this leads to a more efficient space for face image editing.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have proven to be surprisingly efficient for image editing by inverting and manipulating the latent code corresponding to an input real image. This editing property emerges from the disentangled nature of the latent space. In this paper, we identify that the facial attribute disentanglement is not optimal, thus facial editing relying on linear attribute separation is flawed. We thus propose to improve semantic disentanglement with supervision. Our method consists in learning a proxy latent representation using normalizing flows, and we show that this leads to a more efficient space for face image editing.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，生成对抗网络（GAN）通过反转和操作与输入真实图像相对应的潜在代码，在图像编辑方面具有惊人的效率。这种编辑特性源于潜在空间的解开性质。在本文中，我们发现面部属性分离不是最优的，因此依赖于线性属性分离的面部编辑是有缺陷的。因此，我们建议通过监督来改善语义解缠。我们的方法包括使用归一化流学习代理潜在表示，并且我们表明这可以为面部图像编辑提供更有效的空间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过监督学习改进StyleGAN潜在空间的语义解耦，以提升面部图像编辑效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在面部属性解耦上存在不足，导致基于线性分离的面部编辑效果受限。
AI.method: 采用归一化流学习代理潜在表示，通过监督机制优化潜在空间的语义结构。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能构建更高效的面部图像编辑空间，提升属性操控的准确性与自然度。
AI.conclusion: 监督引导的潜在空间重构有效改善了StyleGAN的语义解耦能力，为精确图像编辑提供新思路。

authors_text: Christophe Van Gysel,Mirko Hannemann,Ernest Pusateri,Youssef Oualil,Ilya Oparin
title: Space-Efficient Representation of Entity-centric Query Language Models
title_zh: 以实体为中心的查询语言模型的空间高效表示
abstract: Virtual assistants make use of automatic speech recognition (ASR) to help users answer entity-centric queries. However, spoken entity recognition is a difficult problem, due to the large number of frequently-changing named entities. In addition, resources available for recognition are constrained when ASR is performed on-device. In this work, we investigate the use of probabilistic grammars as language models within the finite-state transducer (FST) framework. We introduce a deterministic approximation to probabilistic grammars that avoids the explicit expansion of non-terminals at model creation time, integrates directly with the FST framework, and is complementary to n-gram models. We obtain a 10% relative word error rate improvement on long tail entity queries compared to when a similarly-sized n-gram model is used without our method.
summary: Virtual assistants make use of automatic speech recognition (ASR) to help users answer entity-centric queries. However, spoken entity recognition is a difficult problem, due to the large number of frequently-changing named entities. In addition, resources available for recognition are constrained when ASR is performed on-device. In this work, we investigate the use of probabilistic grammars as language models within the finite-state transducer (FST) framework. We introduce a deterministic approximation to probabilistic grammars that avoids the explicit expansion of non-terminals at model creation time, integrates directly with the FST framework, and is complementary to n-gram models. We obtain a 10% relative word error rate improvement on long tail entity queries compared to when a similarly-sized n-gram model is used without our method.
abstract_zh: 虚拟助理利用自动语音识别 (ASR) 来帮助用户回答以实体为中心的查询。然而，由于大量频繁变化的命名实体，语音实体识别是一个难题。此外，当在设备上执行 ASR 时，可用于识别的资源受到限制。在这项工作中，我们研究了在有限状态转换器（FST）框架内使用概率语法作为语言模型。我们引入了概率语法的确定性近似，避免了在模型创建时显式扩展非终结符，直接与 FST 框架集成，并且是 n-gram 模型的补充。与不使用我们的方法而使用类似大小的 n-gram 模型相比，我们在长尾实体查询上获得了 10% 的相对词错误率改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种空间高效的实体为中心查询语言模型表示方法，通过概率语法与有限状态转换器框架结合解决设备端实体识别难题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动语音识别在处理频繁变化的实体名称时面临资源受限和识别准确率低的双重挑战，传统n-gram模型难以有效应对长尾实体查询。
AI.method: 开发确定性概率语法近似方法，在有限状态转换器框架中实现非终端符号的隐式展开，与n-gram模型形成互补性集成。
AI.result: 在长尾实体查询任务中实现10%的相对词错误率下降，验证了该方法在资源受限场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为设备端实体识别提供了更高效的语言模型解决方案，通过语法结构优化显著提升了长尾实体的识别性能。

In addition, resources available for recognition are constrained when ASR is performed on-device. We introduce a deterministic approximation to probabilistic grammars that avoids the explicit expansion of non-terminals at model creation time, integrates directly with the FST framework, and is complementary to n-gram models. authors_text: Shashanka Venkataramanan,Ewa Kijak,Laurent Amsaleg,Yannis Avrithis
title: Teach me how to Interpolate a Myriad of Embeddings
title_zh: 教我如何插入无数的嵌入
abstract: Mixup refers to interpolation-based data augmentation, originally motivated as a way to go beyond empirical risk minimization (ERM). Yet, its extensions focus on the definition of interpolation and the space where it takes place, while the augmentation itself is less studied: For a mini-batch of size $m$, most methods interpolate between $m$ pairs with a single scalar interpolation factor $λ$. In this work, we make progress in this direction by introducing MultiMix, which interpolates an arbitrary number $n$ of tuples, each of length $m$, with one vector $λ$ per tuple. On sequence data, we further extend to dense interpolation and loss computation over all spatial positions. Overall, we increase the number of tuples per mini-batch by orders of magnitude at little additional cost. This is possible by interpolating at the very last layer before the classifier. Finally, to address inconsistencies due to linear target interpolation, we introduce a self-distillation approach to generate and interpolate synthetic targets. We empirically show that our contributions result in significant improvement over state-of-the-art mixup methods on four benchmarks. By analyzing the embedding space, we observe that the classes are more tightly clustered and uniformly spread over the embedding space, thereby explaining the improved behavior.
summary: Mixup refers to interpolation-based data augmentation, originally motivated as a way to go beyond empirical risk minimization (ERM). Yet, its extensions focus on the definition of interpolation and the space where it takes place, while the augmentation itself is less studied: For a mini-batch of size $m$, most methods interpolate between $m$ pairs with a single scalar interpolation factor $λ$. In this work, we make progress in this direction by introducing MultiMix, which interpolates an arbitrary number $n$ of tuples, each of length $m$, with one vector $λ$ per tuple. On sequence data, we further extend to dense interpolation and loss computation over all spatial positions. Overall, we increase the number of tuples per mini-batch by orders of magnitude at little additional cost. This is possible by interpolating at the very last layer before the classifier. Finally, to address inconsistencies due to linear target interpolation, we introduce a self-distillation approach to generate and interpolate synthetic targets. We empirically show that our contributions result in significant improvement over state-of-the-art mixup methods on four benchmarks. By analyzing the embedding space, we observe that the classes are more tightly clustered and uniformly spread over the embedding space, thereby explaining the improved behavior.
abstract_zh: Mixup 是指基于插值的数据增强，最初是为了超越经验风险最小化 (ERM)。然而，它的扩展集中于插值的定义和插值发生的空间，而增强本身的研究较少：对于大小为$m$的小批量，大多数方法使用单个标量插值因子$λ$在$m$对之间进行插值。在这项工作中，我们通过引入 MultiMix 在这个方向上取得了进展，它插入任意数量的 $n$ 元组，每个元组长度为 $m$，每个元组有一个向量 $λ$。在序列数据上，我们进一步扩展到所有空间位置上的密集插值和损失计算。总的来说，我们以很少的额外成本将每个小批量的元组数量增加了几个数量级。这可以通过在分类器之前的最后一层进行插值来实现。最后，为了解决线性目标插值导致的不一致问题，我们引入了一种自蒸馏方法来生成和插值合成目标。我们的经验表明，我们的贡献在四个基准上比最先进的混合方法有了显着的改进。通过分析嵌入空间，我们观察到类在嵌入空间上聚集得更紧密并且均匀分布，从而解释了改进的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MultiMix方法，通过改进插值策略和引入自蒸馏机制，显著提升数据增强效果。
AI.motivation: 现有Mixup方法在插值定义和空间扩展上研究较多，但对插值操作本身研究不足，且单标量插值因子限制了数据利用效率。
AI.method: MultiMix采用向量λ对n个元组进行插值，支持序列数据的密集插值与全空间损失计算，并通过自蒸馏生成合成目标解决线性插值不一致性。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试中优于现有方法，嵌入空间中类别聚类更紧密且分布更均匀。
AI.conclusion: MultiMix通过多维度插值优化和目标生成机制，有效提升了模型性能与嵌入空间结构质量。

search_text: Teach me how to Interpolate a Myriad of Embeddings 教我如何插入无数的嵌入 Mixup refers to interpolation-based data augmentation, originally motivated as a way to go beyond empirical risk minimization (ERM). Yet, its extensions focus on the definition of interpolation and the space where it takes place, while the augmentation itself is less studied: For a mini-batch of size $m$, most methods interpolate between $m$ pairs with a single scalar interpolation factor $λ$. In this work, we make progress in this direction by introducing MultiMix, which interpolates an arbitrary number $n$ of tuples, each of length $m$, with one vector $λ$ per tuple. On sequence data, we further extend to dense interpolation and loss computation over all spatial positions. Overall, we increase the number of tuples per mini-batch by orders of magnitude at little additional cost. This is possible by interpolating at the very last layer before the classifier. Finally, to address inconsistencies due to linear target interpolation, we introduce a self-distillation approach to generate and interpolate synthetic targets. We empirically show that our contributions result in significant improvement over state-of-the-art mixup methods on four benchmarks. By analyzing the embedding space, we observe that the classes are more tightly clustered and uniformly spread over the embedding space, thereby explaining the improved behavior. Mixup 是指基于插值的数据增强，最初是为了超越经验风险最小化 (ERM)。然而，它的扩展集中于插值的定义和插值发生的空间，而增强本身的研究较少：对于大小为$m$的小批量，大多数方法使用单个标量插值因子$λ$在$m$对之间进行插值。在这项工作中，我们通过引入 MultiMix 在这个方向上取得了进展，它插入任意数量的 $n$ 元组，每个元组长度为 $m$，每个元组有一个向量 $λ$。在序列数据上，我们进一步扩展到所有空间位置上的密集插值和损失计算。总的来说，我们以很少的额外成本将每个小批量的元组数量增加了几个数量级。这可以通过在分类器之前的最后一层进行插值来实现。最后，为了解决线性目标插值导致的不一致问题，我们引入了一种自蒸馏方法来生成和插值合成目标。我们的经验表明，我们的贡献在四个基准上比最先进的混合方法有了显着的改进。通过分析嵌入空间，我们观察到类在嵌入空间上聚集得更紧密并且均匀分布，从而解释了改进的行为。 本文提出MultiMix方法，通过改进插值策略和引入自蒸馏机制，显著提升数据增强效果。 Shashanka Venkataramanan,Ewa Kijak,Laurent Amsaleg,Yannis Avrithis cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Zechen Xiong,Liqi Chen,Wenxiong Hao,Pengfei Yang,Xi Chen
title: Pre-stressed Bi-stable Hair Clip Mechanism for Faster Swimming Robots
title_zh: 用于更快游泳机器人的预应力双稳态发夹机构
abstract: Structural instability is a hazard that leads to catastrophic failure and is generally avoided through special designs. A trend, however, has emerged over the past decades pointing to the harnessing of mechanisms with instability. Inspired by the snapping of a hair clip, we are finessing the unique characteristics of the lateral-torsional buckling of beams and the snap-through of pre-buckled dome-like thin-wall structures in a new field: the in-plane prestressed mechanism. Analyses reveal how the 2D-3D assembly of an in-plane prestressed actuator (IPA) is achieved and how the post-buckling energy landscape is pictured. Combining them with soft robotics, we show that the inclusion of a bistable IPA can enormously enhance the performance of an underwater fish robot as well as inspire a finger-like soft gripper.
summary: Structural instability is a hazard that leads to catastrophic failure and is generally avoided through special designs. A trend, however, has emerged over the past decades pointing to the harnessing of mechanisms with instability. Inspired by the snapping of a hair clip, we are finessing the unique characteristics of the lateral-torsional buckling of beams and the snap-through of pre-buckled dome-like thin-wall structures in a new field: the in-plane prestressed mechanism. Analyses reveal how the 2D-3D assembly of an in-plane prestressed actuator (IPA) is achieved and how the post-buckling energy landscape is pictured. Combining them with soft robotics, we show that the inclusion of a bistable IPA can enormously enhance the performance of an underwater fish robot as well as inspire a finger-like soft gripper.
abstract_zh: 结构不稳定是一种导致灾难性故障的危险，通常可以通过特殊设计来避免。然而，过去几十年出现了一种趋势，表明利用不稳定的机制。受发夹折断的启发，我们正在一个新领域：面内预应力机构中，巧妙地研究梁的横向扭转屈曲和预屈曲圆顶状薄壁结构的突弹的独特特性。分析揭示了平面内预应力执行器 (IPA) 的 2D-3D 组装是如何实现的，以及如何描绘屈曲后的能量景观。将它们与软机器人技术相结合，我们证明了双稳态 IPA 的加入可以极大地提高水下鱼类机器人的性能，并激发出手指状的软抓手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预应力双稳态发夹机制的新型平面预应力执行器（IPA），用于提升水下机器人和软体抓取器的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统结构不稳定性被视为危险因素被规避，但近年研究发现可利用不稳定性实现机械突变，受发夹 snapping 机制启发，探索其在软体机器人中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 通过分析梁的侧扭屈曲与预屈曲穹顶结构的snap-through特性，构建2D-3D装配的IPA执行器，并将其与软体机器人结合进行实验验证。
AI.result: 双稳态IPA显著提升水下鱼形机器人游动速度，并启发了仿生手指软抓取器的设计。
AI.conclusion: 利用不稳定性机制可突破传统设计限制，为软体机器人提供新型驱动方案，拓展了双稳态结构的应用场景。

authors_text: Guangyan Zhang,Ying Qin,Wenjie Zhang,Jialun Wu,Mei Li,Yutao Gai,Feijun Jiang,Tan Lee
title: iEmoTTS: Toward Robust Cross-Speaker Emotion Transfer and Control for Speech Synthesis based on Disentanglement between Prosody and Timbre
title_zh: iEmoTTS：基于韵律和音色的解开，实现语音合成的鲁棒跨说话者情感传递和控制
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
abstract: The capability of generating speech with specific type of emotion is desired for many applications of human-computer interaction. Cross-speaker emotion transfer is a common approach to generating emotional speech when speech with emotion labels from target speakers is not available for model training. This paper presents a novel cross-speaker emotion transfer system, named iEmoTTS. The system is composed of an emotion encoder, a prosody predictor, and a timbre encoder. The emotion encoder extracts the identity of emotion type as well as the respective emotion intensity from the mel-spectrogram of input speech. The emotion intensity is measured by the posterior probability that the input utterance carries that emotion. The prosody predictor is used to provide prosodic features for emotion transfer. The timber encoder provides timbre-related information for the system. Unlike many other studies which focus on disentangling speaker and style factors of speech, the iEmoTTS is designed to achieve cross-speaker emotion transfer via disentanglement between prosody and timbre. Prosody is considered as the main carrier of emotion-related speech characteristics and timbre accounts for the essential characteristics for speaker identification. Zero-shot emotion transfer, meaning that speech of target speakers are not seen in model training, is also realized with iEmoTTS. Extensive experiments of subjective evaluation have been carried out. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of iEmoTTS as compared with other recently proposed systems of cross-speaker emotion transfer. It is shown that iEmoTTS can produce speech with designated emotion type and controllable emotion intensity. With appropriate information bottleneck capacity, iEmoTTS is able to effectively transfer emotion information to a new speaker. Audio samples are publicly available https://patrick-g-zhang.github.io/iemotts/
summary: The capability of generating speech with specific type of emotion is desired for many applications of human-computer interaction. Cross-speaker emotion transfer is a common approach to generating emotional speech when speech with emotion labels from target speakers is not available for model training. This paper presents a novel cross-speaker emotion transfer system, named iEmoTTS. The system is composed of an emotion encoder, a prosody predictor, and a timbre encoder. The emotion encoder extracts the identity of emotion type as well as the respective emotion intensity from the mel-spectrogram of input speech. The emotion intensity is measured by the posterior probability that the input utterance carries that emotion. The prosody predictor is used to provide prosodic features for emotion transfer. The timber encoder provides timbre-related information for the system. Unlike many other studies which focus on disentangling speaker and style factors of speech, the iEmoTTS is designed to achieve cross-speaker emotion transfer via disentanglement between prosody and timbre. Prosody is considered as the main carrier of emotion-related speech characteristics and timbre accounts for the essential characteristics for speaker identification. Zero-shot emotion transfer, meaning that speech of target speakers are not seen in model training, is also realized with iEmoTTS. Extensive experiments of subjective evaluation have been carried out. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of iEmoTTS as compared with other recently proposed systems of cross-speaker emotion transfer. It is shown that iEmoTTS can produce speech with designated emotion type and controllable emotion intensity. With appropriate information bottleneck capacity, iEmoTTS is able to effectively transfer emotion information to a new speaker. Audio samples are publicly available https://patrick-g-zhang.github.io/iemotts/
abstract_zh: 人机交互的许多应用都需要生成具有特定类型情感的语音的能力。当带有目标说话者情感标签的语音无法用于模型训练时，跨说话者情感转移是生成情感语音的常用方法。本文提出了一种新颖的跨说话者情感传输系统，名为 iEmoTTS。该系统由情感编码器、韵律预测器和音色编码器组成。情感编码器从输入语音的梅尔频谱图中提取情感类型的标识以及各自的情感强度。情绪强度是通过输入话语携带该情绪的后验概率来衡量的。韵律预测器用于提供情感传递的韵律特征。木材编码器为系统提供音色相关信息。与许多其他专注于解开说话者和语音风格因素的研究不同，iEmoTTS 旨在通过解开韵律和音色之间的关系来实现跨说话者的情感传递。韵律被认为是与情感相关的语音特征的主要载体，而音色则是说话人识别的本质特征。 iEmoTTS 还实现了零样本情感转移，即在模型训练中看不到目标说话人的语音。主观评价方面进行了大量的实验。结果证明了 iEmoTTS 与其他最近提出的跨说话者情感转移系统相比的有效性。结果表明，iEmoTTS 可以产生指定情感类型和可控情感强度的语音。凭借适当的信息瓶颈容量，iEmoTTS能够有效地将情感信息传递给新的说话人。音频样本可公开获取 https://patrick-g-zhang.github.io/iemotts/

AI.tldr: 本文提出iEmoTTS系统，通过分离韵律与音色实现跨说话人情感迁移与控制，解决无目标说话人情感语音数据时的情感合成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跨说话人情感迁移方法依赖目标说话人数据，且难以分离情感与说话人身份特征。需设计无需目标数据且能解耦情感相关韵律与音色特征的模型。
AI.method: 构建包含情感编码器（提取情感类型与强度）、韵律预测器（提供情感迁移的韵律特征）和音色编码器（保留说话人身份信息）的框架，通过解耦韵律（情感载体）与音色（说话人标识）实现跨说话人情感迁移。
AI.result: 主观评估实验表明iEmoTTS在情感类型与强度控制上优于现有方法，可有效迁移情感至未见过的说话人，音频样本公开验证效果。
AI.conclusion: iEmoTTS通过韵律-音色解耦实现零样本情感迁移，为无目标说话人数据场景下的情感语音合成提供新思路，验证了方法有效性。

motivation: 现有跨说话人情感迁移方法依赖目标说话人数据，且难以分离情感与说话人身份特征。需设计无需目标数据且能解耦情感相关韵律与音色特征的模型。
method: 构建包含情感编码器（提取情感类型与强度）、韵律预测器（提供情感迁移的韵律特征）和音色编码器（保留说话人身份信息）的框架，通过解耦韵律（情感载体）与音色（说话人标识）实现跨说话人情感迁移。
result: 主观评估实验表明iEmoTTS在情感类型与强度控制上优于现有方法，可有效迁移情感至未见过的说话人，音频样本公开验证效果。
conclusion: iEmoTTS通过韵律-音色解耦实现零样本情感迁移，为无目标说话人数据场景下的情感语音合成提供新思路，验证了方法有效性。
search_text: iEmoTTS: Toward Robust Cross-Speaker Emotion Transfer and Control for Speech Synthesis based on Disentanglement between Prosody and Timbre iEmoTTS：基于韵律和音色的解开，实现语音合成的鲁棒跨说话者情感传递和控制 The capability of generating speech with specific type of emotion is desired for many applications of human-computer interaction. Cross-speaker emotion transfer is a common approach to generating emotional speech when speech with emotion labels from target speakers is not available for model training. This paper presents a novel cross-speaker emotion transfer system, named iEmoTTS. The system is composed of an emotion encoder, a prosody predictor, and a timbre encoder. The emotion encoder extracts the identity of emotion type as well as the respective emotion intensity from the mel-spectrogram of input speech. The emotion intensity is measured by the posterior probability that the input utterance carries that emotion. The prosody predictor is used to provide prosodic features for emotion transfer. The timber encoder provides timbre-related information for the system. Unlike many other studies which focus on disentangling speaker and style factors of speech, the iEmoTTS is designed to achieve cross-speaker emotion transfer via disentanglement between prosody and timbre. Prosody is considered as the main carrier of emotion-related speech characteristics and timbre accounts for the essential characteristics for speaker identification. Zero-shot emotion transfer, meaning that speech of target speakers are not seen in model training, is also realized with iEmoTTS. Extensive experiments of subjective evaluation have been carried out. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of iEmoTTS as compared with other recently proposed systems of cross-speaker emotion transfer. It is shown that iEmoTTS can produce speech with designated emotion type and controllable emotion intensity. With appropriate information bottleneck capacity, iEmoTTS is able to effectively transfer emotion information to a new speaker. Audio samples are publicly available https://patrick-g-zhang.github.io/iemotts/ 人机交互的许多应用都需要生成具有特定类型情感的语音的能力。当带有目标说话者情感标签的语音无法用于模型训练时，跨说话者情感转移是生成情感语音的常用方法。本文提出了一种新颖的跨说话者情感传输系统，名为 iEmoTTS。该系统由情感编码器、韵律预测器和音色编码器组成。情感编码器从输入语音的梅尔频谱图中提取情感类型的标识以及各自的情感强度。情绪强度是通过输入话语携带该情绪的后验概率来衡量的。韵律预测器用于提供情感传递的韵律特征。木材编码器为系统提供音色相关信息。与许多其他专注于解开说话者和语音风格因素的研究不同，iEmoTTS 旨在通过解开韵律和音色之间的关系来实现跨说话者的情感传递。韵律被认为是与情感相关的语音特征的主要载体，而音色则是说话人识别的本质特征。 iEmoTTS 还实现了零样本情感转移，即在模型训练中看不到目标说话人的语音。主观评价方面进行了大量的实验。结果证明了 iEmoTTS 与其他最近提出的跨说话者情感转移系统相比的有效性。结果表明，iEmoTTS 可以产生指定情感类型和可控情感强度的语音。凭借适当的信息瓶颈容量，iEmoTTS能够有效地将情感信息传递给新的说话人。音频样本可公开获取 https://patrick-g-zhang.github.io/iemotts/ 本文提出iEmoTTS系统，通过分离韵律与音色实现跨说话人情感迁移与控制，解决无目标说话人情感语音数据时的情感合成问题。 Guangyan Zhang,Ying Qin,Wenjie Zhang,Jialun Wu,Mei Li,Yutao Gai,Feijun Jiang,Tan Lee eess.AS,cs.HC

authors_text: Ruijia Cheng,Alison Smith-Renner,Ke Zhang,Joel R. Tetreault,Alejandro Jaimes
title: Mapping the Design Space of Human-AI Interaction in Text Summarization
title_zh: 绘制文本摘要中人机交互的设计空间
abstract: Automatic text summarization systems commonly involve humans for preparing data or evaluating model performance, yet, there lacks a systematic understanding of humans' roles, experience, and needs when interacting with or being assisted by AI. From a human-centered perspective, we map the design opportunities and considerations for human-AI interaction in text summarization and broader text generation tasks. We first conducted a systematic literature review of 70 papers, developing a taxonomy of five interactions in AI-assisted text generation and relevant design dimensions. We designed text summarization prototypes for each interaction. We then interviewed 16 users, aided by the prototypes, to understand their expectations, experience, and needs regarding efficiency, control, and trust with AI in text summarization and propose design considerations accordingly.
summary: Automatic text summarization systems commonly involve humans for preparing data or evaluating model performance, yet, there lacks a systematic understanding of humans' roles, experience, and needs when interacting with or being assisted by AI. From a human-centered perspective, we map the design opportunities and considerations for human-AI interaction in text summarization and broader text generation tasks. We first conducted a systematic literature review of 70 papers, developing a taxonomy of five interactions in AI-assisted text generation and relevant design dimensions. We designed text summarization prototypes for each interaction. We then interviewed 16 users, aided by the prototypes, to understand their expectations, experience, and needs regarding efficiency, control, and trust with AI in text summarization and propose design considerations accordingly.
abstract_zh: 自动文本摘要系统通常需要人类准备数据或评估模型性能，但在与人工智能交互或接受人工智能协助时，缺乏对人类角色、经验和需求的系统理解。从以人为中心的角度来看，我们描绘了文本摘要和更广泛的文本生成任务中人机交互的设计机会和考虑因素。我们首先对 70 篇论文进行了系统的文献综述，制定了人工智能辅助文本生成和相关设计维度的五种交互的分类法。我们为每次交互设计了文本摘要原型。然后，我们在原型的帮助下采访了 16 位用户，了解他们对文本摘要中人工智能的效率、控制和信任的期望、体验和需求，并提出相应的设计考虑。

AI.tldr: 本文从以人为中心的视角，绘制了文本摘要中人机交互的设计空间，探索人类在与AI协作时的角色、体验和需求。
AI.motivation: 尽管人类在数据准备和模型评估中参与自动文本摘要系统，但缺乏对人类在与AI交互时角色、体验和需求的系统性理解。
AI.method: 通过系统综述70篇论文，构建AI辅助文本生成的五类交互及设计维度；设计对应原型并采访16名用户，分析其对效率、控制和信任的需求。
AI.result: 提出五类人机交互类型及设计维度，基于用户反馈总结出效率、控制和信任相关的设计考量。
AI.conclusion: 需从人类需求出发设计人机协作系统，为文本摘要及更广泛的文本生成任务提供设计框架与方向。

authors_text: Ghazal Farhani,Alexander Kazachek,Boyu Wang
title: Momentum Diminishes the Effect of Spectral Bias in Physics-Informed Neural Networks
title_zh: 动量减少了物理信息神经网络中光谱偏差的影响
abstract: Physics-informed neural network (PINN) algorithms have shown promising results in solving a wide range of problems involving partial differential equations (PDEs). However, they often fail to converge to desirable solutions when the target function contains high-frequency features, due to a phenomenon known as spectral bias. In the present work, we exploit neural tangent kernels (NTKs) to investigate the training dynamics of PINNs evolving under stochastic gradient descent with momentum (SGDM). This demonstrates SGDM significantly reduces the effect of spectral bias. We have also examined why training a model via the Adam optimizer can accelerate the convergence while reducing the spectral bias. Moreover, our numerical experiments have confirmed that wide-enough networks using SGDM still converge to desirable solutions, even in the presence of high-frequency features. In fact, we show that the width of a network plays a critical role in convergence.
summary: Physics-informed neural network (PINN) algorithms have shown promising results in solving a wide range of problems involving partial differential equations (PDEs). However, they often fail to converge to desirable solutions when the target function contains high-frequency features, due to a phenomenon known as spectral bias. In the present work, we exploit neural tangent kernels (NTKs) to investigate the training dynamics of PINNs evolving under stochastic gradient descent with momentum (SGDM). This demonstrates SGDM significantly reduces the effect of spectral bias. We have also examined why training a model via the Adam optimizer can accelerate the convergence while reducing the spectral bias. Moreover, our numerical experiments have confirmed that wide-enough networks using SGDM still converge to desirable solutions, even in the presence of high-frequency features. In fact, we show that the width of a network plays a critical role in convergence.
abstract_zh: 物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 算法在解决涉及偏微分方程 (PDE) 的各种问题方面显示出良好的结果。然而，当目标函数包含高频特征时，由于一种称为谱偏差的现象，它们通常无法收敛到所需的解决方案。在目前的工作中，我们利用神经正切核 (NTK) 来研究 PINN 在动量随机梯度下降 (SGDM) 下演化的训练动态。这表明 SGDM 显着降低了光谱偏差的影响。我们还研究了为什么通过 Adam 优化器训练模型可以加速收敛，同时减少谱偏差。此外，我们的数值实验已经证实，即使存在高频特征，使用 SGDM 的足够宽的网络仍然可以收敛到理想的解决方案。事实上，我们表明网络的宽度在收敛中起着至关重要的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了动量优化器如何减轻物理信息神经网络（PINN）中的谱偏差问题，并通过神经切线核分析训练动态。
AI.motivation: PINN在处理包含高频特征的目标函数时因谱偏差导致收敛困难，需探索优化方法以改善这一问题。
AI.method: 利用神经切线核（NTK）分析随机梯度下降动量法（SGDM）的训练动态，并对比Adam优化器的效果。
AI.result: SGDM显著降低谱偏差影响，宽网络结合SGDM可收敛至理想解，网络宽度对收敛性起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 动量优化器与网络宽度共同影响PINN收敛性能，为解决高频特征问题提供理论依据与实践指导。

authors_text: Weijun Tan,Qi Yao,Jingfeng Liu
title: Two-Stage COVID19 Classification Using BERT Features
title_zh: 使用 BERT 功能进行两阶段 COVID19 分类
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.14403
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.14403
abstract: We propose an automatic COVID1-19 diagnosis framework from lung CT-scan slice images using double BERT feature extraction. In the first BERT feature extraction, A 3D-CNN is first used to extract CNN internal feature maps. Instead of using the global average pooling, a late BERT temporal pooing is used to aggregate the temporal information in these feature maps, followed by a classification layer. This 3D-CNN-BERT classification network is first trained on sampled fixed number of slice images from every original CT scan volume. In the second stage, the 3D-CNN-BERT embedding features are extracted on all slice images of every CT scan volume, and these features are averaged into a fixed number of segments. Then another BERT network is used to aggregate these multiple features into a single feature followed by another classification layer. The classification results of both stages are combined to generate final outputs. On the validation dataset, we achieve macro F1 score of 0.9164.
summary: We propose an automatic COVID1-19 diagnosis framework from lung CT-scan slice images using double BERT feature extraction. In the first BERT feature extraction, A 3D-CNN is first used to extract CNN internal feature maps. Instead of using the global average pooling, a late BERT temporal pooing is used to aggregate the temporal information in these feature maps, followed by a classification layer. This 3D-CNN-BERT classification network is first trained on sampled fixed number of slice images from every original CT scan volume. In the second stage, the 3D-CNN-BERT embedding features are extracted on all slice images of every CT scan volume, and these features are averaged into a fixed number of segments. Then another BERT network is used to aggregate these multiple features into a single feature followed by another classification layer. The classification results of both stages are combined to generate final outputs. On the validation dataset, we achieve macro F1 score of 0.9164.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用双 BERT 特征提取的肺部 CT 扫描切片图像的自动 COVID1-19 诊断框架。在第一次BERT特征提取中，首先使用3D-CNN来提取CNN内部特征图。不是使用全局平均池，而是使用后期 BERT 时间 pooing 来聚合这些特征图中的时间信息，然后是分类层。该 3D-CNN-BERT 分类网络首先对来自每个原始 CT 扫描体积的固定数量的采样切片图像进行训练。在第二阶段，在每个 CT 扫描体积的所有切片图像上提取 3D-CNN-BERT 嵌入特征，并将这些特征平均为固定数量的片段。然后使用另一个 BERT 网络将这些多个特征聚合成一个特征，然后是另一个分类层。两个阶段的分类结果相结合以生成最终输出。在验证数据集上，我们获得了 0.9164 的宏观 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双阶段BERT特征提取的COVID-19自动诊断框架，利用肺部CT扫描切片图像进行分类。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在提取CT切片特征时可能忽略时序信息，而BERT模型擅长捕捉序列特征，通过两阶段特征融合可提升分类精度。
AI.method: 第一阶段使用3D-CNN提取特征并采用BERT时序池化替代全局平均池化；第二阶段对所有切片提取特征后分段平均，再通过另一BERT网络聚合特征，最终融合两阶段结果进行分类。
AI.result: 在验证数据集上达到宏F1分数0.9164的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 双阶段BERT特征融合方法有效提升了基于CT切片的COVID-19分类准确率。

search_text: Two-Stage COVID19 Classification Using BERT Features 使用 BERT 功能进行两阶段 COVID19 分类 We propose an automatic COVID1-19 diagnosis framework from lung CT-scan slice images using double BERT feature extraction. In the first BERT feature extraction, A 3D-CNN is first used to extract CNN internal feature maps. Instead of using the global average pooling, a late BERT temporal pooing is used to aggregate the temporal information in these feature maps, followed by a classification layer. This 3D-CNN-BERT classification network is first trained on sampled fixed number of slice images from every original CT scan volume. In the second stage, the 3D-CNN-BERT embedding features are extracted on all slice images of every CT scan volume, and these features are averaged into a fixed number of segments. Then another BERT network is used to aggregate these multiple features into a single feature followed by another classification layer. The classification results of both stages are combined to generate final outputs. On the validation dataset, we achieve macro F1 score of 0.9164. 我们提出了一种使用双 BERT 特征提取的肺部 CT 扫描切片图像的自动 COVID1-19 诊断框架。在第一次BERT特征提取中，首先使用3D-CNN来提取CNN内部特征图。不是使用全局平均池，而是使用后期 BERT 时间 pooing 来聚合这些特征图中的时间信息，然后是分类层。该 3D-CNN-BERT 分类网络首先对来自每个原始 CT 扫描体积的固定数量的采样切片图像进行训练。在第二阶段，在每个 CT 扫描体积的所有切片图像上提取 3D-CNN-BERT 嵌入特征，并将这些特征平均为固定数量的片段。然后使用另一个 BERT 网络将这些多个特征聚合成一个特征，然后是另一个分类层。两个阶段的分类结果相结合以生成最终输出。在验证数据集上，我们获得了 0.9164 的宏观 F1 分数。 本文提出一种基于双阶段BERT特征提取的COVID-19自动诊断框架，利用肺部CT扫描切片图像进行分类。 Weijun Tan,Qi Yao,Jingfeng Liu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Aitor Lewkowycz,Anders Andreassen,David Dohan,Ethan Dyer,Henryk Michalewski,Vinay Ramasesh,Ambrose Slone,Cem Anil,Imanol Schlag,Theo Gutman-Solo,Yuhuai Wu,Behnam Neyshabur,Guy Gur-Ari,Vedant Misra
title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models
title_zh: 用语言模型解决定量推理问题
abstract: Language models have achieved remarkable performance on a wide range of tasks that require natural language understanding. Nevertheless, state-of-the-art models have generally struggled with tasks that require quantitative reasoning, such as solving mathematics, science, and engineering problems at the college level. To help close this gap, we introduce Minerva, a large language model pretrained on general natural language data and further trained on technical content. The model achieves state-of-the-art performance on technical benchmarks without the use of external tools. We also evaluate our model on over two hundred undergraduate-level problems in physics, biology, chemistry, economics, and other sciences that require quantitative reasoning, and find that the model can correctly answer nearly a third of them.
summary: Language models have achieved remarkable performance on a wide range of tasks that require natural language understanding. Nevertheless, state-of-the-art models have generally struggled with tasks that require quantitative reasoning, such as solving mathematics, science, and engineering problems at the college level. To help close this gap, we introduce Minerva, a large language model pretrained on general natural language data and further trained on technical content. The model achieves state-of-the-art performance on technical benchmarks without the use of external tools. We also evaluate our model on over two hundred undergraduate-level problems in physics, biology, chemistry, economics, and other sciences that require quantitative reasoning, and find that the model can correctly answer nearly a third of them.
abstract_zh: 语言模型在需要自然语言理解的广泛任务上取得了显着的性能。然而，最先进的模型通常难以完成需要定量推理的任务，例如解决大学水平的数学、科学和工程问题。为了帮助缩小这一差距，我们引入了 Minerva，这是一种针对一般自然语言数据进行预训练并针对技术内容进行进一步训练的大型语言模型。该模型无需使用外部工具即可在技术基准上实现最先进的性能。我们还对物理、生物、化学、经济学和其他需要定量推理的科学领域的 200 多个本科水平问题评估了我们的模型，发现该模型可以正确回答其中近三分之一的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Minerva的大型语言模型，旨在解决需要量化推理的科学和工程问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型在处理需要数学、科学和工程领域量化推理的任务时表现不足，尤其是大学水平的问题。
AI.method: 通过在通用自然语言数据上预训练模型，并进一步使用技术内容进行训练，无需依赖外部工具。
AI.result: Minerva在技术基准测试中达到最先进水平，并在200多个本科科学问题中正确回答近三分之一的问题。
AI.conclusion: Minerva展示了语言模型在量化推理任务上的潜力，但仍需进一步改进以提高正确率。

authors_text: Yun-Chun Chen,Adithyavairavan Murali,Balakumar Sundaralingam,Wei Yang,Animesh Garg,Dieter Fox
title: Neural Motion Fields: Encoding Grasp Trajectories as Implicit Value Functions
title_zh: 神经运动场：将抓取轨迹编码为隐式值函数
comment: RSS 2022 Workshop on Implicit Representations for Robotic Manipulation
comments: RSS 2022 Workshop on Implicit Representations for Robotic Manipulation
abstract: The pipeline of current robotic pick-and-place methods typically consists of several stages: grasp pose detection, finding inverse kinematic solutions for the detected poses, planning a collision-free trajectory, and then executing the open-loop trajectory to the grasp pose with a low-level tracking controller. While these grasping methods have shown good performance on grasping static objects on a table-top, the problem of grasping dynamic objects in constrained environments remains an open problem. We present Neural Motion Fields, a novel object representation which encodes both object point clouds and the relative task trajectories as an implicit value function parameterized by a neural network. This object-centric representation models a continuous distribution over the SE(3) space and allows us to perform grasping reactively by leveraging sampling-based MPC to optimize this value function.
summary: The pipeline of current robotic pick-and-place methods typically consists of several stages: grasp pose detection, finding inverse kinematic solutions for the detected poses, planning a collision-free trajectory, and then executing the open-loop trajectory to the grasp pose with a low-level tracking controller. While these grasping methods have shown good performance on grasping static objects on a table-top, the problem of grasping dynamic objects in constrained environments remains an open problem. We present Neural Motion Fields, a novel object representation which encodes both object point clouds and the relative task trajectories as an implicit value function parameterized by a neural network. This object-centric representation models a continuous distribution over the SE(3) space and allows us to perform grasping reactively by leveraging sampling-based MPC to optimize this value function.
abstract_zh: 当前机器人拾放方法的流程通常由几个阶段组成：抓取姿势检测，为检测到的姿势找到逆运动学解决方案，规划无碰撞轨迹，然后使用低级跟踪控制器执行抓取姿势的开环轨迹。虽然这些抓取方法在抓取桌面上的静态物体方面表现出了良好的性能，但在受限环境中抓取动态物体的问题仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们提出了神经运动场，这是一种新颖的对象表示，它将对象点云和相对任务轨迹编码为由神经网络参数化的隐式值函数。这种以对象为中心的表示对 SE(3) 空间上的连续分布进行建模，并允许我们通过利用基于采样的 MPC 来优化该价值函数来进行反应式抓取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Neural Motion Fields的新方法，通过将物体点云和任务轨迹编码为隐式价值函数，解决机器人抓取动态物体时的轨迹规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现有抓取方法在处理静态物体时表现良好，但在动态物体和受限环境中仍存在不足，需要一种能实时反应的连续轨迹优化方案。
AI.method: 利用神经网络将物体点云与相对任务轨迹编码为隐式价值函数，通过采样-based模型预测控制（MPC）优化该函数，实现连续SE(3)空间中的分布建模。
AI.result: 方法成功实现了对动态物体的反应式抓取，克服了传统分阶段方法在受限环境中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: Neural Motion Fields为机器人抓取提供了物体中心的连续轨迹优化框架，为复杂动态场景下的抓取任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Seung Yeon Shin,Ronald M. Summers
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Small Bowel Path Tracking using Different Types of Annotations
title_zh: 使用不同类型注释的小肠路径跟踪深度强化学习
abstract: Small bowel path tracking is a challenging problem considering its many folds and contact along its course. For the same reason, it is very costly to achieve the ground-truth (GT) path of the small bowel in 3D. In this work, we propose to train a deep reinforcement learning tracker using datasets with different types of annotations. Specifically, we utilize CT scans that have only GT small bowel segmentation as well as ones with the GT path. It is enabled by designing a unique environment that is compatible for both, including a reward definable even without the GT path. The performed experiments proved the validity of the proposed method. The proposed method holds a high degree of usability in this problem by being able to utilize the scans with weak annotations, and thus by possibly reducing the required annotation cost.
summary: Small bowel path tracking is a challenging problem considering its many folds and contact along its course. For the same reason, it is very costly to achieve the ground-truth (GT) path of the small bowel in 3D. In this work, we propose to train a deep reinforcement learning tracker using datasets with different types of annotations. Specifically, we utilize CT scans that have only GT small bowel segmentation as well as ones with the GT path. It is enabled by designing a unique environment that is compatible for both, including a reward definable even without the GT path. The performed experiments proved the validity of the proposed method. The proposed method holds a high degree of usability in this problem by being able to utilize the scans with weak annotations, and thus by possibly reducing the required annotation cost.
abstract_zh: 考虑到小肠路径沿途有许多折叠和接触，小肠路径追踪是一个具有挑战性的问题。出于同样的原因，以 3D 方式实现小肠的真实 (GT) 路径的成本非常高。在这项工作中，我们建议使用具有不同类型注释的数据集来训练深度强化学习跟踪器。具体来说，我们使用仅具有 GT 小肠分割以及具有 GT 路径的 CT 扫描。它是通过设计一个与两者兼容的独特环境来实现的，包括即使没有 GT 路径也可以定义的奖励。所进行的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。所提出的方法通过能够利用具有弱注释的扫描，从而可能降低所需的注释成本，在该问题上具有高度的可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的小肠路径追踪方法，通过利用不同类型的标注数据（如分割标注和路径标注）降低标注成本。
AI.motivation: 小肠结构复杂且标注成本高昂，传统方法依赖昂贵的地面真实路径标注，亟需一种能有效利用弱标注数据的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计兼容多种标注类型的环境，结合深度强化学习框架，定义无需地面真实路径的奖励函数，利用分割标注和路径标注数据联合训练模型。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法的有效性，证明其能够利用弱标注数据实现小肠路径追踪，显著降低标注成本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过灵活利用不同类型的标注数据，在保证追踪精度的同时减少对高成本标注的依赖，具有较高的实用价值。

authors_text: Subash Khanal,Benjamin Brodie,Xin Xing,Ai-Ling Lin,Nathan Jacobs
title: Causality for Inherently Explainable Transformers: CAT-XPLAIN
title_zh: 本质上可解释的 Transformer 的因果关系：CAT-XPLAIN
comment: Accepted for spotlight presentation at the Explainable Artificial Intelligence for Computer Vision Workshop at CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted for spotlight presentation at the Explainable Artificial Intelligence for Computer Vision Workshop at CVPR 2022
abstract: There have been several post-hoc explanation approaches developed to explain pre-trained black-box neural networks. However, there is still a gap in research efforts toward designing neural networks that are inherently explainable. In this paper, we utilize a recently proposed instance-wise post-hoc causal explanation method to make an existing transformer architecture inherently explainable. Once trained, our model provides an explanation in the form of top-$k$ regions in the input space of the given instance contributing to its decision. We evaluate our method on binary classification tasks using three image datasets: MNIST, FMNIST, and CIFAR. Our results demonstrate that compared to the causality-based post-hoc explainer model, our inherently explainable model achieves better explainability results while eliminating the need of training a separate explainer model. Our code is available at https://github.com/mvrl/CAT-XPLAIN.
summary: There have been several post-hoc explanation approaches developed to explain pre-trained black-box neural networks. However, there is still a gap in research efforts toward designing neural networks that are inherently explainable. In this paper, we utilize a recently proposed instance-wise post-hoc causal explanation method to make an existing transformer architecture inherently explainable. Once trained, our model provides an explanation in the form of top-$k$ regions in the input space of the given instance contributing to its decision. We evaluate our method on binary classification tasks using three image datasets: MNIST, FMNIST, and CIFAR. Our results demonstrate that compared to the causality-based post-hoc explainer model, our inherently explainable model achieves better explainability results while eliminating the need of training a separate explainer model. Our code is available at https://github.com/mvrl/CAT-XPLAIN.
abstract_zh: 已经开发了几种事后解释方法来解释预先训练的黑盒神经网络。然而，在设计本质上可解释的神经网络方面的研究工作仍然存在差距。在本文中，我们利用最近提出的实例级事后因果解释方法来使现有的变压器架构本质上可解释。经过训练后，我们的模型会以给定实例的输入空间中的 top-$k$ 区域的形式提供解释，从而有助于其决策。我们使用三个图像数据集：MNIST、FMNIST 和 CIFAR 在二元分类任务上评估我们的方法。我们的结果表明，与基于因果关系的事后解释器模型相比，我们本质上可解释的模型实现了更好的可解释性结果，同时消除了训练单独的解释器模型的需要。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/mvrl/CAT-XPLAIN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种固有可解释的Transformer模型CAT-XPLAIN，通过因果分析方法直接生成输入特征的top-k区域解释。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络解释方法依赖事后分析且需额外训练解释模型，而固有可解释模型的研究仍存在不足。
AI.method: 采用实例级因果解释方法改造Transformer架构，在训练过程中直接学习输入特征与决策的因果关系，输出top-k贡献区域。
AI.result: 在MNIST/FMNIST/CIFAR数据集上，相较因果事后解释方法，CAT-XPLAIN在可解释性指标上表现更优且无需独立解释模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过架构级改造实现了更高效可靠的模型解释，为构建固有可解释深度学习模型提供了新思路。

authors_text: Siddharth Mishra-Sharma,Ge Yang
title: Strong Lensing Source Reconstruction Using Continuous Neural Fields
title_zh: 使用连续神经场的强透镜源重建
comment: 9+2 pages, 3+2 figures, Spotlight at the Machine Learning for Astrophysics Workshop at ICML 2022; v2, references added
comments: 9+2 pages, 3+2 figures, Spotlight at the Machine Learning for Astrophysics Workshop at ICML 2022; v2, references added
abstract: From the nature of dark matter to the rate of expansion of our Universe, observations of distant galaxies distorted through strong gravitational lensing have the potential to answer some of the major open questions in astrophysics. Modeling galaxy-galaxy strong lensing observations presents a number of challenges as the exact configuration of both the background source and foreground lens galaxy is unknown. A timely call, prompted by a number of upcoming surveys anticipating high-resolution lensing images, demands methods that can efficiently model lenses at their full complexity. In this work, we introduce a method that uses continuous neural fields to non-parametrically reconstruct the complex morphology of a source galaxy while simultaneously inferring a distribution over foreground lens galaxy configurations. We demonstrate the efficacy of our method through experiments on simulated data targeting high-resolution lensing images similar to those anticipated in near-future astrophysical surveys.
summary: From the nature of dark matter to the rate of expansion of our Universe, observations of distant galaxies distorted through strong gravitational lensing have the potential to answer some of the major open questions in astrophysics. Modeling galaxy-galaxy strong lensing observations presents a number of challenges as the exact configuration of both the background source and foreground lens galaxy is unknown. A timely call, prompted by a number of upcoming surveys anticipating high-resolution lensing images, demands methods that can efficiently model lenses at their full complexity. In this work, we introduce a method that uses continuous neural fields to non-parametrically reconstruct the complex morphology of a source galaxy while simultaneously inferring a distribution over foreground lens galaxy configurations. We demonstrate the efficacy of our method through experiments on simulated data targeting high-resolution lensing images similar to those anticipated in near-future astrophysical surveys.
abstract_zh: 从暗物质的性质到宇宙的膨胀速度，对强引力透镜扭曲的遥远星系的观测有可能回答天体物理学中一些主要的开放性问题。由于背景源和前景透镜星系的确切配置未知，对星系-星系强透镜效应观测进行建模提出了许多挑战。一些即将进行的预期高分辨率镜头图像的调查促使我们及时发出呼吁，要求能够有效地对镜头的全部复杂性进行建模的方法。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种使用连续神经场非参数重建源星系的复杂形态的方法，同时推断前景透镜星系配置的分布。我们通过针对类似于近期天体物理调查中预期的高分辨率透镜图像的模拟数据进行实验，证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 利用连续神经场进行强引力透镜源重建，以解决宇宙学和天体物理学中的关键问题。
AI.motivation: 强引力透镜观测有助于解答暗物质和宇宙膨胀等关键问题，但现有方法在处理未知的源和透镜配置时存在挑战，亟需高效建模方法以应对未来高分辨率观测数据。
AI.method: 提出基于连续神经场的非参数化方法，同时重建背景源星系的复杂形态并推断前景透镜的分布。
AI.result: 通过模拟数据验证了方法在高分辨率透镜图像重建中的有效性，展示了其在处理复杂形态和透镜配置上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够高效建模强透镜系统的复杂性，为未来高分辨率天文调查提供有效工具，推动对暗物质和宇宙结构的理解。

search_text: Strong Lensing Source Reconstruction Using Continuous Neural Fields 使用连续神经场的强透镜源重建 From the nature of dark matter to the rate of expansion of our Universe, observations of distant galaxies distorted through strong gravitational lensing have the potential to answer some of the major open questions in astrophysics. Modeling galaxy-galaxy strong lensing observations presents a number of challenges as the exact configuration of both the background source and foreground lens galaxy is unknown. A timely call, prompted by a number of upcoming surveys anticipating high-resolution lensing images, demands methods that can efficiently model lenses at their full complexity. In this work, we introduce a method that uses continuous neural fields to non-parametrically reconstruct the complex morphology of a source galaxy while simultaneously inferring a distribution over foreground lens galaxy configurations. We demonstrate the efficacy of our method through experiments on simulated data targeting high-resolution lensing images similar to those anticipated in near-future astrophysical surveys. 从暗物质的性质到宇宙的膨胀速度，对强引力透镜扭曲的遥远星系的观测有可能回答天体物理学中一些主要的开放性问题。由于背景源和前景透镜星系的确切配置未知，对星系-星系强透镜效应观测进行建模提出了许多挑战。一些即将进行的预期高分辨率镜头图像的调查促使我们及时发出呼吁，要求能够有效地对镜头的全部复杂性进行建模的方法。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种使用连续神经场非参数重建源星系的复杂形态的方法，同时推断前景透镜星系配置的分布。我们通过针对类似于近期天体物理调查中预期的高分辨率透镜图像的模拟数据进行实验，证明了我们方法的有效性。 利用连续神经场进行强引力透镜源重建，以解决宇宙学和天体物理学中的关键问题。 Siddharth Mishra-Sharma,Ge Yang astro-ph.CO,astro-ph.IM,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Colin Kohler,Robert Platt
title: Visual Foresight With a Local Dynamics Model
title_zh: 具有局部动力学模型的视觉预见
abstract: Model-free policy learning has been shown to be capable of learning manipulation policies which can solve long-time horizon tasks using single-step manipulation primitives. However, training these policies is a time-consuming process requiring large amounts of data. We propose the Local Dynamics Model (LDM) which efficiently learns the state-transition function for these manipulation primitives. By combining the LDM with model-free policy learning, we can learn policies which can solve complex manipulation tasks using one-step lookahead planning. We show that the LDM is both more sample-efficient and outperforms other model architectures. When combined with planning, we can outperform other model-based and model-free policies on several challenging manipulation tasks in simulation.
summary: Model-free policy learning has been shown to be capable of learning manipulation policies which can solve long-time horizon tasks using single-step manipulation primitives. However, training these policies is a time-consuming process requiring large amounts of data. We propose the Local Dynamics Model (LDM) which efficiently learns the state-transition function for these manipulation primitives. By combining the LDM with model-free policy learning, we can learn policies which can solve complex manipulation tasks using one-step lookahead planning. We show that the LDM is both more sample-efficient and outperforms other model architectures. When combined with planning, we can outperform other model-based and model-free policies on several challenging manipulation tasks in simulation.
abstract_zh: 无模型策略学习已被证明能够学习操作策略，这些策略可以使用单步操作原语解决长期任务。然而，训练这些策略是一个耗时的过程，需要大量数据。我们提出了局部动力学模型（LDM），它可以有效地学习这些操作原语的状态转换函数。通过将 LDM 与无模型策略学习相结合，我们可以学习能够使用一步前瞻规划解决复杂操作任务的策略。我们证明，LDM 的样本效率更高，而且性能优于其他模型架构。当与规划相结合时，我们可以在模拟中的几个具有挑战性的操作任务上优于其他基于模型和无模型的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出局部动力学模型（LDM），结合无模型策略学习解决复杂操作任务，通过单步前瞻规划提升效率。
AI.motivation: 无模型策略学习虽能处理长期任务，但训练耗时且数据需求大，需更高效的模型与方法。
AI.method: 设计局部动力学模型高效学习状态转移函数，结合无模型策略学习与单步前瞻规划实现复杂任务求解。
AI.result: LDM在样本效率和性能上优于其他模型，结合规划后在多个模拟操作任务中超越模型基与无模型策略。
AI.conclusion: LDM有效提升操作任务学习效率，结合规划方法可显著增强复杂场景下的策略表现。

authors_text: Sherwin Bahmani,Jeong Joon Park,Despoina Paschalidou,Hao Tang,Gordon Wetzstein,Leonidas Guibas,Luc Van Gool,Radu Timofte
title: 3D-Aware Video Generation
title_zh: 3D 感知视频生成
abstract: Generative models have emerged as an essential building block for many image synthesis and editing tasks. Recent advances in this field have also enabled high-quality 3D or video content to be generated that exhibits either multi-view or temporal consistency. With our work, we explore 4D generative adversarial networks (GANs) that learn unconditional generation of 3D-aware videos. By combining neural implicit representations with time-aware discriminator, we develop a GAN framework that synthesizes 3D video supervised only with monocular videos. We show that our method learns a rich embedding of decomposable 3D structures and motions that enables new visual effects of spatio-temporal renderings while producing imagery with quality comparable to that of existing 3D or video GANs.
summary: Generative models have emerged as an essential building block for many image synthesis and editing tasks. Recent advances in this field have also enabled high-quality 3D or video content to be generated that exhibits either multi-view or temporal consistency. With our work, we explore 4D generative adversarial networks (GANs) that learn unconditional generation of 3D-aware videos. By combining neural implicit representations with time-aware discriminator, we develop a GAN framework that synthesizes 3D video supervised only with monocular videos. We show that our method learns a rich embedding of decomposable 3D structures and motions that enables new visual effects of spatio-temporal renderings while producing imagery with quality comparable to that of existing 3D or video GANs.
abstract_zh: 生成模型已成为许多图像合成和编辑任务的重要构建模块。该领域的最新进展还使得能够生成具有多视图或时间一致性的高质量 3D 或视频内容。通过我们的工作，我们探索了 4D 生成对抗网络 (GAN)，它可以学习无条件生成 3D 感知视频。通过将神经隐式表示与时间感知判别器相结合，我们开发了一个 GAN 框架，该框架仅用单目视频来合成 3D 视频。我们表明，我们的方法学习了可分解 3D 结构和运动的丰富嵌入，从而实现时空渲染的新视觉效果，同时生成质量与现有 3D 或视频 GAN 相当的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于4D生成对抗网络（GAN）的3D感知视频生成方法，仅需单目视频即可合成具有时空一致性的3D视频。
AI.motivation: 现有3D或视频生成方法通常依赖多视角数据或复杂监督，难以直接从单目视频中学习可分解的3D结构与运动信息。
AI.method: 结合神经隐式表示与时间感知判别器，构建4D GAN框架，通过单目视频监督学习3D结构和运动的可分解嵌入表征。
AI.result: 生成的视频在质量上可与现有3D/视频GAN匹敌，并能实现新颖的时空渲染效果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了从单目视频到3D感知视频的生成，为后续时空内容创作提供了新思路与技术基础。
