authors_text: Zorik Gekhman,Nadav Oved,Orgad Keller,Idan Szpektor,Roi Reichart
title: On the Robustness of Dialogue History Representation in Conversational Question Answering: A Comprehensive Study and a New Prompt-based Method
title_zh: 对话问答中对话历史表征的鲁棒性：综合研究和基于提示的新方法
comment: Accepted for publication at TACL in December 2022. First two authors contributed equally to this work. Our code and data will be released at: https://github.com/zorikg/MarCQAp
comments: Accepted for publication at TACL in December 2022. First two authors contributed equally to this work. Our code and data will be released at: https://github.com/zorikg/MarCQAp
abstract: Most works on modeling the conversation history in Conversational Question Answering (CQA) report a single main result on a common CQA benchmark. While existing models show impressive results on CQA leaderboards, it remains unclear whether they are robust to shifts in setting (sometimes to more realistic ones), training data size (e.g. from large to small sets) and domain. In this work, we design and conduct the first large-scale robustness study of history modeling approaches for CQA. We find that high benchmark scores do not necessarily translate to strong robustness, and that various methods can perform extremely differently under different settings. Equipped with the insights from our study, we design a novel prompt-based history modeling approach, and demonstrate its strong robustness across various settings. Our approach is inspired by existing methods that highlight historic answers in the passage. However, instead of highlighting by modifying the passage token embeddings, we add textual prompts directly in the passage text. Our approach is simple, easy-to-plug into practically any model, and highly effective, thus we recommend it as a starting point for future model developers. We also hope that our study and insights will raise awareness to the importance of robustness-focused evaluation, in addition to obtaining high leaderboard scores, leading to better CQA systems.
summary: Most works on modeling the conversation history in Conversational Question Answering (CQA) report a single main result on a common CQA benchmark. While existing models show impressive results on CQA leaderboards, it remains unclear whether they are robust to shifts in setting (sometimes to more realistic ones), training data size (e.g. from large to small sets) and domain. In this work, we design and conduct the first large-scale robustness study of history modeling approaches for CQA. We find that high benchmark scores do not necessarily translate to strong robustness, and that various methods can perform extremely differently under different settings. Equipped with the insights from our study, we design a novel prompt-based history modeling approach, and demonstrate its strong robustness across various settings. Our approach is inspired by existing methods that highlight historic answers in the passage. However, instead of highlighting by modifying the passage token embeddings, we add textual prompts directly in the passage text. Our approach is simple, easy-to-plug into practically any model, and highly effective, thus we recommend it as a starting point for future model developers. We also hope that our study and insights will raise awareness to the importance of robustness-focused evaluation, in addition to obtaining high leaderboard scores, leading to better CQA systems.
abstract_zh: 大多数对对话式问答 (CQA) 中的对话历史进行建模的工作都会报告常见 CQA 基准的单一主要结果。虽然现有模型在 CQA 排行榜上显示出令人印象深刻的结果，但仍不清楚它们是否能够适应设置（有时更现实）、训练数据大小（例如从大集到小集）和领域的变化。在这项工作中，我们设计并进行了 CQA 历史建模方法的首次大规模稳健性研究。我们发现高基准分数并不一定意味着强大的稳健性，并且各种方法在不同设置下的表现可能截然不同。根据我们研究的见解，我们设计了一种新颖的基于提示的历史建模方法，并在各种设置中展示了其强大的鲁棒性。我们的方法受到现有方法的启发，这些方法突出了段落中的历史答案。然而，我们不是通过修改段落标记嵌入来突出显示，而是直接在段落文本中添加文本提示。我们的方法很简单，易于插入几乎任何模型，并且非常有效，因此我们推荐它作为未来模型开发人员的起点。我们还希望我们的研究和见解除了获得高排行榜分数之外，还能提高人们对以稳健性为中心的评估重要性的认识，从而形成更好的 CQA 系统。

AI.tldr: 本文针对对话历史表示在问答系统中的鲁棒性进行大规模研究，并提出一种基于提示的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在CQA基准测试中表现优异，但其在不同设置、数据规模和领域下的鲁棒性尚未明确，需系统性评估并改进。
AI.method: 设计一种基于文本提示的对话历史建模方法，通过在上下文中直接添加提示文本而非修改嵌入表示，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 发现高基准分数不等于强鲁棒性，所提方法在多种设置下均表现稳定且效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 推荐该方法作为未来模型开发的起点，并呼吁重视鲁棒性评估以提升CQA系统质量。

ai_content.conclusion: 推荐该方法作为未来模型开发的起点，并呼吁重视鲁棒性评估以提升CQA系统质量。

search_text: On the Robustness of Dialogue History Representation in Conversational Question Answering: A Comprehensive Study and a New Prompt-based Method 对话问答中对话历史表征的鲁棒性：综合研究和基于提示的新方法 Most works on modeling the conversation history in Conversational Question Answering (CQA) report a single main result on a common CQA benchmark. While existing models show impressive results on CQA leaderboards, it remains unclear whether they are robust to shifts in setting (sometimes to more realistic ones), training data size (e.g. from large to small sets) and domain. In this work, we design and conduct the first large-scale robustness study of history modeling approaches for CQA. We find that high benchmark scores do not necessarily translate to strong robustness, and that various methods can perform extremely differently under different settings. Equipped with the insights from our study, we design a novel prompt-based history modeling approach, and demonstrate its strong robustness across various settings. Our approach is inspired by existing methods that highlight historic answers in the passage. However, instead of highlighting by modifying the passage token embeddings, we add textual prompts directly in the passage text. Our approach is simple, easy-to-plug into practically any model, and highly effective, thus we recommend it as a starting point for future model developers. We also hope that our study and insights will raise awareness to the importance of robustness-focused evaluation, in addition to obtaining high leaderboard scores, leading to better CQA systems. 大多数对对话式问答 (CQA) 中的对话历史进行建模的工作都会报告常见 CQA 基准的单一主要结果。虽然现有模型在 CQA 排行榜上显示出令人印象深刻的结果，但仍不清楚它们是否能够适应设置（有时更现实）、训练数据大小（例如从大集到小集）和领域的变化。在这项工作中，我们设计并进行了 CQA 历史建模方法的首次大规模稳健性研究。我们发现高基准分数并不一定意味着强大的稳健性，并且各种方法在不同设置下的表现可能截然不同。根据我们研究的见解，我们设计了一种新颖的基于提示的历史建模方法，并在各种设置中展示了其强大的鲁棒性。我们的方法受到现有方法的启发，这些方法突出了段落中的历史答案。然而，我们不是通过修改段落标记嵌入来突出显示，而是直接在段落文本中添加文本提示。我们的方法很简单，易于插入几乎任何模型，并且非常有效，因此我们推荐它作为未来模型开发人员的起点。我们还希望我们的研究和见解除了获得高排行榜分数之外，还能提高人们对以稳健性为中心的评估重要性的认识，从而形成更好的 CQA 系统。 本文针对对话历史表示在问答系统中的鲁棒性进行大规模研究，并提出一种基于提示的新方法。 Zorik Gekhman,Nadav Oved,Orgad Keller,Idan Szpektor,Roi Reichart cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Apoorv Malik,Liang Zhang,Milan Gautam,Ning Dai,Sizhen Li,He Zhang,David H. Mathews,Liang Huang
title: LinearAlifold: Linear-Time Consensus Structure Prediction for RNA Alignments
title_zh: LinearAlifold：RNA 比对的线性时间一致性结构预测
abstract: Predicting the consensus structure of a set of aligned RNA homologs is a convenient method to find conserved structures in an RNA genome, which has many applications including viral diagnostics and therapeutics. However, the most commonly used tool for this task, RNAalifold, is prohibitively slow for long sequences, due to a cubic scaling with the sequence length, taking over a day on 400 SARS-CoV-2 and SARS-related genomes (~30,000nt). We present LinearAlifold, a much faster alternative that scales linearly with both the sequence length and the number of sequences, based on our work LinearFold that folds a single RNA in linear time. Our work is orders of magnitude faster than RNAalifold (0.7 hours on the above 400 genomes, or ~36$\times$ speedup) and achieves higher accuracies when compared to a database of known structures. More interestingly, LinearAlifold's prediction on SARS-CoV-2 correlates well with experimentally determined structures, substantially outperforming RNAalifold. Finally, LinearAlifold supports two energy models (Vienna and BL*) and four modes: minimum free energy (MFE), maximum expected accuracy (MEA), ThreshKnot, and stochastic sampling, each of which takes under an hour for hundreds of SARS-CoV variants. Our resource is at: https://github.com/LinearFold/LinearAlifold (code) and http://linearfold.org/linear-alifold (server).
summary: Predicting the consensus structure of a set of aligned RNA homologs is a convenient method to find conserved structures in an RNA genome, which has many applications including viral diagnostics and therapeutics. However, the most commonly used tool for this task, RNAalifold, is prohibitively slow for long sequences, due to a cubic scaling with the sequence length, taking over a day on 400 SARS-CoV-2 and SARS-related genomes (~30,000nt). We present LinearAlifold, a much faster alternative that scales linearly with both the sequence length and the number of sequences, based on our work LinearFold that folds a single RNA in linear time. Our work is orders of magnitude faster than RNAalifold (0.7 hours on the above 400 genomes, or ~36$\times$ speedup) and achieves higher accuracies when compared to a database of known structures. More interestingly, LinearAlifold's prediction on SARS-CoV-2 correlates well with experimentally determined structures, substantially outperforming RNAalifold. Finally, LinearAlifold supports two energy models (Vienna and BL*) and four modes: minimum free energy (MFE), maximum expected accuracy (MEA), ThreshKnot, and stochastic sampling, each of which takes under an hour for hundreds of SARS-CoV variants. Our resource is at: https://github.com/LinearFold/LinearAlifold (code) and http://linearfold.org/linear-alifold (server).
abstract_zh: 预测一组比对的 RNA 同源物的共有结构是一种在 RNA 基因组中寻找保守结构的便捷方法，它具有许多应用，包括病毒诊断和治疗。然而，执行此任务最常用的工具 RNAalifold 对于长序列来说速度慢得令人望而却步，因为序列长度呈三次方缩放，需要一天多的时间处理 400 个 SARS-CoV-2 和 SARS 相关基因组（约 30,000nt）。我们提出了 LinearAlifold，这是一种更快的替代方案，它可以随序列长度和序列数量线性缩放，基于我们在线性时间内折叠单个 RNA 的工作 LinearFold。我们的工作比 RNAalifold 快几个数量级（在上述 400 个基因组上运行 0.7 小时，或加速约 36 倍），并且与已知结构的数据库相比，具有更高的准确性。更有趣的是，LinearAlifold 对 SARS-CoV-2 的预测与实验确定的结构密切相关，大大优于 RNAalifold。最后，LinearAlifold 支持两种能量模型（Vienna 和 BL*）和四种模式：最小自由能 (MFE)、最大预期精度 (MEA)、ThreshKnot 和随机采样，对于数百个 SARS-CoV 变体，每种模式都需要不到一个小时。我们的资源位于：https://github.com/LinearFold/LinearAlifold（代码）和http://linearfold.org/linear-alifold（服务器）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LinearAlifold的工具，用于在RNA比对中线性时间内预测共识结构。
AI.motivation: 现有工具RNAalifold在处理长序列时速度过慢，无法满足实际需求，需开发更高效的RNA共识结构预测方法。
AI.method: 基于LinearFold的线性时间单链RNA折叠技术，设计LinearAlifold实现序列长度和数量的线性扩展，并支持多种能量模型和预测模式。
AI.result: 在400个SARS-CoV-2基因组数据集上，速度较RNAalifold提升36倍，准确率更高且与实验结构相关性更强。
AI.conclusion: LinearAlifold为RNA结构预测提供了高效且准确的解决方案，适用于大规模RNA数据分析。

authors_text: Massimiliano Kaucic,Filippo Piccotto,Gabriele Sbaiz,Giorgio Valentinuz
title: A hybrid level-based learning swarm algorithm with mutation operator for solving large-scale cardinality-constrained portfolio optimization problems
title_zh: 一种具有变异算子的混合基于水平的学习群算法，用于解决大规模基数约束的投资组合优化问题
abstract: In this work, we propose a hybrid variant of the level-based learning swarm optimizer (LLSO) for solving large-scale portfolio optimization problems. Our goal is to maximize a modified formulation of the Sharpe ratio subject to cardinality, box and budget constraints. The algorithm involves a projection operator to deal with these three constraints simultaneously and we implicitly control transaction costs thanks to a rebalancing constraint. We also introduce a suitable exact penalty function to manage the turnover constraint. In addition, we develop an ad hoc mutation operator to modify candidate exemplars in the highest level of the swarm. The experimental results, using three large-scale data sets, show that the inclusion of this procedure improves the accuracy of the solutions. Then, a comparison with other variants of the LLSO algorithm and two state-of-the-art swarm optimizers points out the outstanding performance of the proposed solver in terms of exploration capabilities and solution quality. Finally, we assess the profitability of the portfolio allocation strategy in the last five years using an investible pool of 1119 constituents from the MSCI World Index.
summary: In this work, we propose a hybrid variant of the level-based learning swarm optimizer (LLSO) for solving large-scale portfolio optimization problems. Our goal is to maximize a modified formulation of the Sharpe ratio subject to cardinality, box and budget constraints. The algorithm involves a projection operator to deal with these three constraints simultaneously and we implicitly control transaction costs thanks to a rebalancing constraint. We also introduce a suitable exact penalty function to manage the turnover constraint. In addition, we develop an ad hoc mutation operator to modify candidate exemplars in the highest level of the swarm. The experimental results, using three large-scale data sets, show that the inclusion of this procedure improves the accuracy of the solutions. Then, a comparison with other variants of the LLSO algorithm and two state-of-the-art swarm optimizers points out the outstanding performance of the proposed solver in terms of exploration capabilities and solution quality. Finally, we assess the profitability of the portfolio allocation strategy in the last five years using an investible pool of 1119 constituents from the MSCI World Index.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了基于级别的学习群优化器（LLSO）的混合变体，用于解决大规模投资组合优化问题。我们的目标是在基数、框和预算约束下最大化夏普比率的修改公式。该算法涉及一个投影算子来同时处理这三个约束，并且由于重新平衡约束，我们隐式地控制了交易成本。我们还引入了合适的精确惩罚函数来管理营业额约束。此外，我们开发了一个临时变异算子来修改群体最高层的候选样本。使用三个大型数据集的实验结果表明，包含此过程可以提高解决方案的准确性。然后，与 LLSO 算法的其他变体和两个最先进的群体优化器进行比较，指出所提出的求解器在探索能力和解质量方面具有出色的性能。最后，我们使用 MSCI 世界指数的 1119 只成分股的可投资池来评估过去五年投资组合配置策略的盈利能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合级基于学习的群体优化算法，用于解决大规模有卡数约束的组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理大规模组合优化问题时，难以同时满足卡数、箱型和预算约束，且交易成本控制不足。
AI.method: 结合投影算子处理多约束，引入精确惩罚函数管理周转率，并设计专用变异算子优化群体高层候选解。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在三个大规模数据集上提升了解的准确性，在探索能力和解质量上优于其他群体优化器，且五年回测显示策略盈利性显著。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效解决了大规模组合优化的约束处理难题，兼具理论优势与实际投资价值。

The experimental results, using three large-scale data sets, show that the inclusion of this procedure improves the accuracy of the solutions. Then, a comparison with other variants of the LLSO algorithm and two state-of-the-art swarm optimizers points out the outstanding performance of the proposed solver in terms of exploration capabilities and solution quality. Finally, we assess the profitability of the portfolio allocation strategy in the last five years using an investible pool of 1119 constituents from the MSCI World Index. 在这项工作中，我们提出了基于级别的学习群优化器（LLSO）的混合变体，用于解决大规模投资组合优化问题。我们的目标是在基数、框和预算约束下最大化夏普比率的修改公式。该算法涉及一个投影算子来同时处理这三个约束，并且由于重新平衡约束，我们隐式地控制了交易成本。我们还引入了合适的精确惩罚函数来管理营业额约束。此外，我们开发了一个临时变异算子来修改群体最高层的候选样本。使用三个大型数据集的实验结果表明，包含此过程可以提高解决方案的准确性。然后，与 LLSO 算法的其他变体和两个最先进的群体优化器进行比较，指出所提出的求解器在探索能力和解质量方面具有出色的性能。最后，我们使用 MSCI 世界指数的 1119 只成分股的可投资池来评估过去五年投资组合配置策略的盈利能力。 本文提出一种混合级基于学习的群体优化算法，用于解决大规模有卡数约束的组合优化问题。 Massimiliano Kaucic,Filippo Piccotto,Gabriele Sbaiz,Giorgio Valentinuz math.OC,cs.NE

authors_text: Veronika A. Zimmer,Alberto Gomez,Emily Skelton,Robert Wright,Gavin Wheeler,Shujie Deng,Nooshin Ghavami,Karen Lloyd,Jacqueline Matthew,Bernhard Kainz,Daniel Rueckert,Joseph V. Hajnal,Julia A. Schnabel
title: Placenta Segmentation in Ultrasound Imaging: Addressing Sources of Uncertainty and Limited Field-of-View
title_zh: 超声成像中的胎盘分割：解决不确定性和有限视野的来源
abstract: Automatic segmentation of the placenta in fetal ultrasound (US) is challenging due to the (i) high diversity of placenta appearance, (ii) the restricted quality in US resulting in highly variable reference annotations, and (iii) the limited field-of-view of US prohibiting whole placenta assessment at late gestation. In this work, we address these three challenges with a multi-task learning approach that combines the classification of placental location (e.g., anterior, posterior) and semantic placenta segmentation in a single convolutional neural network. Through the classification task the model can learn from larger and more diverse datasets while improving the accuracy of the segmentation task in particular in limited training set conditions. With this approach we investigate the variability in annotations from multiple raters and show that our automatic segmentations (Dice of 0.86 for anterior and 0.83 for posterior placentas) achieve human-level performance as compared to intra- and inter-observer variability. Lastly, our approach can deliver whole placenta segmentation using a multi-view US acquisition pipeline consisting of three stages: multi-probe image acquisition, image fusion and image segmentation. This results in high quality segmentation of larger structures such as the placenta in US with reduced image artifacts which are beyond the field-of-view of single probes.
summary: Automatic segmentation of the placenta in fetal ultrasound (US) is challenging due to the (i) high diversity of placenta appearance, (ii) the restricted quality in US resulting in highly variable reference annotations, and (iii) the limited field-of-view of US prohibiting whole placenta assessment at late gestation. In this work, we address these three challenges with a multi-task learning approach that combines the classification of placental location (e.g., anterior, posterior) and semantic placenta segmentation in a single convolutional neural network. Through the classification task the model can learn from larger and more diverse datasets while improving the accuracy of the segmentation task in particular in limited training set conditions. With this approach we investigate the variability in annotations from multiple raters and show that our automatic segmentations (Dice of 0.86 for anterior and 0.83 for posterior placentas) achieve human-level performance as compared to intra- and inter-observer variability. Lastly, our approach can deliver whole placenta segmentation using a multi-view US acquisition pipeline consisting of three stages: multi-probe image acquisition, image fusion and image segmentation. This results in high quality segmentation of larger structures such as the placenta in US with reduced image artifacts which are beyond the field-of-view of single probes.
abstract_zh: 胎儿超声（US）中胎盘的自动分割具有挑战性，因为（i）胎盘外观的高度多样性，（ii）US的质量有限导致参考注释高度可变，以及（iii）US的视野有限，禁止在妊娠晚期进行整个胎盘评估。在这项工作中，我们通过多任务学习方法解决了这三个挑战，该方法将胎盘位置分类（例如，前位、后位）和语义胎盘分割结合在单个卷积神经网络中。通过分类任务，模型可以从更大、更多样化的数据集中学习，同时提高分割任务的准确性，特别是在有限的训练集条件下。通过这种方法，我们研究了多个评估者注释的变异性，并表明与观察者内和观察者间的变异性相比，我们的自动分割（前胎盘的 Dice 为 0.86，后胎盘的 Dice 为 0.83）实现了人类水平的性能。最后，我们的方法可以使用多视图 US 采集管道提供整个胎盘分割，该管道由三个阶段组成：多探头图像采集、图像融合和图像分割。这可以实现对较大结构（例如美国的胎盘）的高质量分割，并减少超出单个探头视野的图像伪影。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多任务学习方法，用于解决胎儿超声图像中胎盘分割的挑战，包括胎盘外观多样性、超声图像质量限制及视野局限问题。
AI.motivation: 胎盘在超声图像中的自动分割面临三大挑战：胎盘外观高度多样、超声图像质量差导致标注不一致，以及视野限制无法完整评估胎盘。
AI.method: 采用多任务卷积神经网络，结合胎盘位置分类（如前壁、后壁）与语义分割任务，并通过多视角超声采集管道（多探头成像、图像融合与分割）实现全胎盘分割。
AI.result: 在有限训练数据下，模型分割Dice系数达到前壁0.86、后壁0.83，接近人类标注者间的一致性水平，并有效减少图像伪影。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多任务学习与多视角融合，在超声图像质量受限条件下实现了高精度胎盘分割，为临床应用提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Francesco Carli,Pietro Foini,Nicolò Gozzi,Nicola Perra,Rossano Schifanella
title: Modeling Teams Performance Using Deep Representational Learning on Graphs
title_zh: 使用图上的深度表征学习对团队绩效进行建模
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: The large majority of human activities require collaborations within and across formal or informal teams. Our understanding of how the collaborative efforts spent by teams relate to their performance is still a matter of debate. Teamwork results in a highly interconnected ecosystem of potentially overlapping components where tasks are performed in interaction with team members and across other teams. To tackle this problem, we propose a graph neural network model designed to predict a team's performance while identifying the drivers that determine such an outcome. In particular, the model is based on three architectural channels: topological, centrality, and contextual which capture different factors potentially shaping teams' success. We endow the model with two attention mechanisms to boost model performance and allow interpretability. A first mechanism allows pinpointing key members inside the team. A second mechanism allows us to quantify the contributions of the three driver effects in determining the outcome performance. We test model performance on a wide range of domains outperforming most of the classical and neural baselines considered. Moreover, we include synthetic datasets specifically designed to validate how the model disentangles the intended properties on which our model vastly outperforms baselines.
summary: The large majority of human activities require collaborations within and across formal or informal teams. Our understanding of how the collaborative efforts spent by teams relate to their performance is still a matter of debate. Teamwork results in a highly interconnected ecosystem of potentially overlapping components where tasks are performed in interaction with team members and across other teams. To tackle this problem, we propose a graph neural network model designed to predict a team's performance while identifying the drivers that determine such an outcome. In particular, the model is based on three architectural channels: topological, centrality, and contextual which capture different factors potentially shaping teams' success. We endow the model with two attention mechanisms to boost model performance and allow interpretability. A first mechanism allows pinpointing key members inside the team. A second mechanism allows us to quantify the contributions of the three driver effects in determining the outcome performance. We test model performance on a wide range of domains outperforming most of the classical and neural baselines considered. Moreover, we include synthetic datasets specifically designed to validate how the model disentangles the intended properties on which our model vastly outperforms baselines.
abstract_zh: 绝大多数人类活动都需要正式或非正式团队内部和之间的协作。我们对团队协作努力与绩效的关系的理解仍然存在争议。团队合作形成了一个由潜在重叠组件组成的高度互连的生态系统，其中的任务是在与团队成员和其他团队的交互中执行的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种图神经网络模型，旨在预测团队的表现，同时识别决定这种结果的驱动因素。特别是，该模型基于三个架构渠道：拓扑、中心性和上下文，它们捕获了可能影响团队成功的不同因素。我们赋予模型两种注意力机制，以提高模型性能并允许可解释性。第一个机制允许精确定位团队内部的关键成员。第二种机制使我们能够量化三个驱动效应在确定结果绩效方面的贡献。我们在广泛的领域测试模型性能，其性能优于大多数所考虑的经典和神经基线。此外，我们还提供了专门设计的合成数据集，用于验证模型如何解开预期属性，在这些属性上，我们的模型远远优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的模型，通过拓扑、中心性及上下文三个通道预测团队绩效并识别关键影响因素。
AI.motivation: 团队协作对人类活动至关重要，但现有研究难以明确协作努力与团队绩效之间的关系，需更有效的建模方法。
AI.method: 构建包含拓扑、中心性、上下文三通道的图神经网络，结合两种注意力机制：一是定位团队核心成员，二是量化三个驱动因素的贡献度。
AI.result: 模型在多领域数据集上优于传统及神经基线方法，合成数据集验证了其有效解耦目标属性的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该模型能准确预测团队绩效并提供可解释性分析，适用于跨领域团队协作效果评估。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的模型，通过拓扑、中心性及上下文三个通道预测团队绩效并识别关键影响因素。

ai_content.result: 模型在多领域数据集上优于传统及神经基线方法，合成数据集验证了其有效解耦目标属性的能力。
ai_content.conclusion: 该模型能准确预测团队绩效并提供可解释性分析，适用于跨领域团队协作效果评估。

authors_text: Jingwen Wang,Tymoteusz Bleja,Lourdes Agapito
title: GO-Surf: Neural Feature Grid Optimization for Fast, High-Fidelity RGB-D Surface Reconstruction
title_zh: GO-Surf：神经特征网格优化，用于快速、高保真 RGB-D 表面重建
comment: 3DV2022 (Oral), first two authors contributed equally. Project page: https://jingwenwang95.github.io/go_surf/
comments: 3DV2022 (Oral), first two authors contributed equally. Project page: https://jingwenwang95.github.io/go_surf/
abstract: We present GO-Surf, a direct feature grid optimization method for accurate and fast surface reconstruction from RGB-D sequences. We model the underlying scene with a learned hierarchical feature voxel grid that encapsulates multi-level geometric and appearance local information. Feature vectors are directly optimized such that after being tri-linearly interpolated, decoded by two shallow MLPs into signed distance and radiance values, and rendered via surface volume rendering, the discrepancy between synthesized and observed RGB/depth values is minimized. Our supervision signals -- RGB, depth and approximate SDF -- can be obtained directly from input images without any need for fusion or post-processing. We formulate a novel SDF gradient regularization term that encourages surface smoothness and hole filling while maintaining high frequency details. GO-Surf can optimize sequences of $1$-$2$K frames in $15$-$45$ minutes, a speedup of $\times60$ over NeuralRGB-D, the most related approach based on an MLP representation, while maintaining on par performance on standard benchmarks. Project page: https://jingwenwang95.github.io/go_surf/
summary: We present GO-Surf, a direct feature grid optimization method for accurate and fast surface reconstruction from RGB-D sequences. We model the underlying scene with a learned hierarchical feature voxel grid that encapsulates multi-level geometric and appearance local information. Feature vectors are directly optimized such that after being tri-linearly interpolated, decoded by two shallow MLPs into signed distance and radiance values, and rendered via surface volume rendering, the discrepancy between synthesized and observed RGB/depth values is minimized. Our supervision signals -- RGB, depth and approximate SDF -- can be obtained directly from input images without any need for fusion or post-processing. We formulate a novel SDF gradient regularization term that encourages surface smoothness and hole filling while maintaining high frequency details. GO-Surf can optimize sequences of $1$-$2$K frames in $15$-$45$ minutes, a speedup of $\times60$ over NeuralRGB-D, the most related approach based on an MLP representation, while maintaining on par performance on standard benchmarks. Project page: https://jingwenwang95.github.io/go_surf/
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 GO-Surf，一种直接特征网格优化方法，用于根据 RGB-D 序列进行准确快速的表面重建。我们使用学习的分层特征体素网格对底层场景进行建模，该网格封装了多级几何和外观局部信息。特征向量被直接优化，以便在经过三线性插值、由两个浅层 MLP 解码为有符号距离和辐射值并通过表面体积渲染进行渲染后，合成和观察到的 RGB/深度值之间的差异被最小化。我们的监督信号——RGB、深度和近似 SDF——可以直接从输入图像获得，无需任何融合或后处理。我们制定了一种新颖的 SDF 梯度正则化项，可促进表面平滑度和孔洞填充，同时保持高频细节。 GO-Surf 可以在 15$-$45$ 分钟内优化 $1$-$2$K 帧的序列，比基于 MLP 表示的最相关方法 NeuralRGB-D 加速 $\times60$，同时在标准基准测试中保持同等性能。项目页面：https://jingwenwang95.github.io/go_surf/

AI.tldr: 本文提出GO-Surf方法，通过神经特征网格优化实现快速且高保真的RGB-D表面重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MLP的神经重建方法速度较慢且需复杂后处理，难以满足实时或大规模数据需求。
AI.method: 构建分层特征体素网格，直接优化特征向量并通过三线性插值与浅层MLP解码为距离场和辐射场，结合SDF梯度正则化提升表面平滑性与细节保留。
AI.result: 在1-2K帧数据集上优化速度较NeuralRGB-D提升60倍，同时保持基准测试性能相当。
AI.conclusion: GO-Surf通过特征网格优化实现了高效高精度的RGB-D重建，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

GO-Surf can optimize sequences of $1$-$2$K frames in $15$-$45$ minutes, a speedup of $\times60$ over NeuralRGB-D, the most related approach based on an MLP representation, while maintaining on par performance on standard benchmarks. authors_text: Venelin Kovatchev,Trina Chatterjee,Venkata S Govindarajan,Jifan Chen,Eunsol Choi,Gabriella Chronis,Anubrata Das,Katrin Erk,Matthew Lease,Junyi Jessy Li,Yating Wu,Kyle Mahowald
title: longhorns at DADC 2022: How many linguists does it take to fool a Question Answering model? A systematic approach to adversarial attacks
title_zh: DADC 2022 上的长角牛：需要多少语言学家才能愚弄问答模型？对抗性攻击的系统方法
abstract: Developing methods to adversarially challenge NLP systems is a promising avenue for improving both model performance and interpretability. Here, we describe the approach of the team "longhorns" on Task 1 of the The First Workshop on Dynamic Adversarial Data Collection (DADC), which asked teams to manually fool a model on an Extractive Question Answering task. Our team finished first, with a model error rate of 62%. We advocate for a systematic, linguistically informed approach to formulating adversarial questions, and we describe the results of our pilot experiments, as well as our official submission.
summary: Developing methods to adversarially challenge NLP systems is a promising avenue for improving both model performance and interpretability. Here, we describe the approach of the team "longhorns" on Task 1 of the The First Workshop on Dynamic Adversarial Data Collection (DADC), which asked teams to manually fool a model on an Extractive Question Answering task. Our team finished first, with a model error rate of 62%. We advocate for a systematic, linguistically informed approach to formulating adversarial questions, and we describe the results of our pilot experiments, as well as our official submission.
abstract_zh: 开发对抗性挑战 NLP 系统的方法是提高模型性能和可解释性的一个有前途的途径。在这里，我们描述了“longhorns”团队在第一届动态对抗数据收集 (DADC) 研讨会任务 1 中的方法，该方法要求团队在提取问答任务中手动愚弄模型。我们的团队获得了第一名，模型错误率为 62%。我们提倡采用系统的、语言学上的方法来制定对抗性问题，并描述我们的试点实验的结果以及我们的正式提交内容。

AI.tldr: 开发对抗性方法挑战NLP系统，通过系统化语言学方法在抽取式问答任务中制造对抗样本
AI.motivation: 通过对抗攻击提升NLP模型的性能和可解释性，验证模型鲁棒性
AI.method: 采用系统化、语言学指导的方法设计对抗性问题，进行试点实验和正式提交
AI.result: 团队在DADC 2022任务1中以62%错误率获得第一名
AI.conclusion: 系统化语言学方法在对抗攻击中有效，为改进模型鲁棒性提供新思路

authors_text: Javier Nistal,Cyran Aouameur,Ithan Velarde,Stefan Lattner
title: DrumGAN VST: A Plugin for Drum Sound Analysis/Synthesis With Autoencoding Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: DrumGAN VST：具有自动编码生成对抗网络的鼓声分析/合成插件
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables, ICML2022 Machine Learning for Audio Synthesis (MLAS) Workshop, for sound examples visit https://cslmusicteam.sony.fr/drumgan-vst/
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables, ICML2022 Machine Learning for Audio Synthesis (MLAS) Workshop, for sound examples visit https://cslmusicteam.sony.fr/drumgan-vst/
abstract: In contemporary popular music production, drum sound design is commonly performed by cumbersome browsing and processing of pre-recorded samples in sound libraries. One can also use specialized synthesis hardware, typically controlled through low-level, musically meaningless parameters. Today, the field of Deep Learning offers methods to control the synthesis process via learned high-level features and allows generating a wide variety of sounds. In this paper, we present DrumGAN VST, a plugin for synthesizing drum sounds using a Generative Adversarial Network. DrumGAN VST operates on 44.1 kHz sample-rate audio, offers independent and continuous instrument class controls, and features an encoding neural network that maps sounds into the GAN's latent space, enabling resynthesis and manipulation of pre-existing drum sounds. We provide numerous sound examples and a demo of the proposed VST plugin.
summary: In contemporary popular music production, drum sound design is commonly performed by cumbersome browsing and processing of pre-recorded samples in sound libraries. One can also use specialized synthesis hardware, typically controlled through low-level, musically meaningless parameters. Today, the field of Deep Learning offers methods to control the synthesis process via learned high-level features and allows generating a wide variety of sounds. In this paper, we present DrumGAN VST, a plugin for synthesizing drum sounds using a Generative Adversarial Network. DrumGAN VST operates on 44.1 kHz sample-rate audio, offers independent and continuous instrument class controls, and features an encoding neural network that maps sounds into the GAN's latent space, enabling resynthesis and manipulation of pre-existing drum sounds. We provide numerous sound examples and a demo of the proposed VST plugin.
abstract_zh: 在当代流行音乐制作中，鼓声设计通常是通过对声音库中预先录制的样本进行繁琐的浏览和处理来完成的。人们还可以使用专门的合成硬件，通常通过低级的、在音乐上无意义的参数进行控制。如今，深度学习领域提供了通过学习的高级特征来控制合成过程的方法，并允许生成各种声音。在本文中，我们提出了 DrumGAN VST，这是一个使用生成对抗网络合成鼓声音的插件。 DrumGAN VST 在 44.1 kHz 采样率音频上运行，提供独立且连续的乐器类控制，并具有将声音映射到 GAN 潜在空间的编码神经网络，从而能够重新合成和操纵预先存在的鼓声音。我们提供了大量的声音示例和提议的 VST 插件的演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DrumGAN VST插件，利用生成对抗网络（GAN）实现鼓声的分析与合成。
AI.motivation: 传统鼓声设计依赖繁琐的样本处理或低级参数控制，缺乏高效且直观的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 基于GAN构建插件，通过编码器将鼓声映射到潜在空间，实现预存声音的重新合成与操控，并支持44.1kHz采样率及连续乐器类别控制。
AI.result: 提供多个声音示例及插件演示，验证了DrumGAN VST在鼓声生成与编辑中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DrumGAN VST通过深度学习高阶特征控制，为鼓声合成提供了更直观高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Zifeng Wang,Jimeng Sun
title: Trial2Vec: Zero-Shot Clinical Trial Document Similarity Search using Self-Supervision
title_zh: Trial2Vec：使用自我监督的零样本临床试验文档相似性搜索
abstract: Clinical trials are essential for drug development but are extremely expensive and time-consuming to conduct. It is beneficial to study similar historical trials when designing a clinical trial. However, lengthy trial documents and lack of labeled data make trial similarity search difficult. We propose a zero-shot clinical trial retrieval method, Trial2Vec, which learns through self-supervision without annotating similar clinical trials. Specifically, the meta-structure of trial documents (e.g., title, eligibility criteria, target disease) along with clinical knowledge (e.g., UMLS knowledge base https://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/index.html) are leveraged to automatically generate contrastive samples. Besides, Trial2Vec encodes trial documents considering meta-structure thus producing compact embeddings aggregating multi-aspect information from the whole document. We show that our method yields medically interpretable embeddings by visualization and it gets a 15% average improvement over the best baselines on precision/recall for trial retrieval, which is evaluated on our labeled 1600 trial pairs. In addition, we prove the pre-trained embeddings benefit the downstream trial outcome prediction task over 240k trials. Software ias available at https://github.com/RyanWangZf/Trial2Vec.
summary: Clinical trials are essential for drug development but are extremely expensive and time-consuming to conduct. It is beneficial to study similar historical trials when designing a clinical trial. However, lengthy trial documents and lack of labeled data make trial similarity search difficult. We propose a zero-shot clinical trial retrieval method, Trial2Vec, which learns through self-supervision without annotating similar clinical trials. Specifically, the meta-structure of trial documents (e.g., title, eligibility criteria, target disease) along with clinical knowledge (e.g., UMLS knowledge base https://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/index.html) are leveraged to automatically generate contrastive samples. Besides, Trial2Vec encodes trial documents considering meta-structure thus producing compact embeddings aggregating multi-aspect information from the whole document. We show that our method yields medically interpretable embeddings by visualization and it gets a 15% average improvement over the best baselines on precision/recall for trial retrieval, which is evaluated on our labeled 1600 trial pairs. In addition, we prove the pre-trained embeddings benefit the downstream trial outcome prediction task over 240k trials. Software ias available at https://github.com/RyanWangZf/Trial2Vec.
abstract_zh: 临床试验对于药物开发至关重要，但进行起来极其昂贵且耗时。在设计临床试验时研究类似的历史试验是有益的。然而，冗长的试验文档和缺乏标记数据使得试验相似性搜索变得困难。我们提出了一种零样本临床试验检索方法 Trial2Vec，它通过自我监督进行学习，而无需注释类似的临床试验。具体来说，利用试验文件的元结构（例如标题、资格标准、目标疾病）以及临床知识（例如 UMLS 知识库 https://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/index.html）来自动生成对比样本。此外，Trial2Vec 考虑元结构对试验文档进行编码，从而产生紧凑的嵌入，聚合整个文档的多方面信息。我们表明，我们的方法通过可视化产生了医学上可解释的嵌入，并且在试验检索的精确度/召回率方面比最佳基线平均提高了 15%，这是在我们标记的 1600 个试验对上进行评估的。此外，我们在 24 万次试验中证明了预训练嵌入有利于下游试验结果预测任务。软件可从 https://github.com/RyanWangZf/Trial2Vec 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Trial2Vec方法，通过自监督学习实现无需标注数据的临床试验文档相似性检索。
AI.motivation: 临床试验设计需参考历史相似试验，但现有方法受限于长文档处理难度和标注数据缺乏，难以高效实现相似性检索。
AI.method: 利用试验文档元结构（标题、纳入标准等）和临床知识库（如UMLS）自动生成对比样本，通过编码器融合多维度信息生成紧凑嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在1600对标注试验数据上实现比最佳基线高15%的精确率/召回率，预训练嵌入在24万试验的下游结果预测任务中也表现更优。
AI.conclusion: Trial2Vec通过自监督学习有效捕捉医学语义，为临床试验检索和预测提供了可解释且性能优越的解决方案。

authors_text: Zihan Li,Yunxiang Li,Qingde Li,Puyang Wang,Dazhou Guo,Le Lu,Dakai Jin,You Zhang,Qingqi Hong
title: LViT: Language meets Vision Transformer in Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: LViT：医学图像分割中的语言与视觉转换器的结合
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (TMI)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (TMI)
abstract: Deep learning has been widely used in medical image segmentation and other aspects. However, the performance of existing medical image segmentation models has been limited by the challenge of obtaining sufficient high-quality labeled data due to the prohibitive data annotation cost. To alleviate this limitation, we propose a new text-augmented medical image segmentation model LViT (Language meets Vision Transformer). In our LViT model, medical text annotation is incorporated to compensate for the quality deficiency in image data. In addition, the text information can guide to generate pseudo labels of improved quality in the semi-supervised learning. We also propose an Exponential Pseudo label Iteration mechanism (EPI) to help the Pixel-Level Attention Module (PLAM) preserve local image features in semi-supervised LViT setting. In our model, LV (Language-Vision) loss is designed to supervise the training of unlabeled images using text information directly. For evaluation, we construct three multimodal medical segmentation datasets (image + text) containing X-rays and CT images. Experimental results show that our proposed LViT has superior segmentation performance in both fully-supervised and semi-supervised setting. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/HUANGLIZI/LViT.
summary: Deep learning has been widely used in medical image segmentation and other aspects. However, the performance of existing medical image segmentation models has been limited by the challenge of obtaining sufficient high-quality labeled data due to the prohibitive data annotation cost. To alleviate this limitation, we propose a new text-augmented medical image segmentation model LViT (Language meets Vision Transformer). In our LViT model, medical text annotation is incorporated to compensate for the quality deficiency in image data. In addition, the text information can guide to generate pseudo labels of improved quality in the semi-supervised learning. We also propose an Exponential Pseudo label Iteration mechanism (EPI) to help the Pixel-Level Attention Module (PLAM) preserve local image features in semi-supervised LViT setting. In our model, LV (Language-Vision) loss is designed to supervise the training of unlabeled images using text information directly. For evaluation, we construct three multimodal medical segmentation datasets (image + text) containing X-rays and CT images. Experimental results show that our proposed LViT has superior segmentation performance in both fully-supervised and semi-supervised setting. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/HUANGLIZI/LViT.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已广泛应用于医学图像分割等方面。然而，由于数据注释成本过高，现有医学图像分割模型的性能受到获取足够高质量标记数据的挑战的限制。为了缓解这一限制，我们提出了一种新的文本增强医学图像分割模型 LViT（Language meet Vision Transformer）。在我们的 LViT 模型中，结合了医学文本注释来弥补图像数据的质量缺陷。此外，文本信息可以指导在半监督学习中生成质量提高的伪标签。我们还提出了指数伪标签迭代机制（EPI）来帮助像素级注意力模块（PLAM）在半监督 LViT 设置中保留局部图像特征。在我们的模型中，LV（语言-视觉）损失旨在直接使用文本信息监督未标记图像的训练。为了进行评估，我们构建了三个包含 X 射线和 CT 图像的多模态医学分割数据集（图像 + 文本）。实验结果表明，我们提出的 LViT 在全监督和半监督设置中都具有优异的分割性能。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/HUANGLIZI/LViT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LViT模型，通过结合语言信息与视觉Transformer技术，提升医疗图像分割性能。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像分割面临标注数据不足且成本高昂的问题，现有模型受限于高质量标注数据的缺乏。
AI.method: 融合医学文本标注补偿图像质量缺陷，设计伪标签生成机制(EPI)与像素级注意力模块(PLAM)，并引入语言-视觉(LV)损失函数直接利用文本信息训练未标注图像。
AI.result: 在三个多模态医疗数据集上验证，LViT在全监督和半监督设置下均取得优于现有方法的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过文本增强与半监督学习机制，LViT有效缓解了医疗图像分割中数据标注不足的问题。

authors_text: Ke Hu,Tara N. Sainath,Yanzhang He,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Trevor Strohman,Sepand Mavandadi,Weiran Wang
title: Improving Deliberation by Text-Only and Semi-Supervised Training
title_zh: 通过纯文本和半监督培训改进审议
abstract: Text-only and semi-supervised training based on audio-only data has gained popularity recently due to the wide availability of unlabeled text and speech data. In this work, we propose incorporating text-only and semi-supervised training into an attention-based deliberation model. By incorporating text-only data in training a bidirectional encoder representation from transformer (BERT) for the deliberation text encoder, and large-scale text-to-speech and audio-only utterances using joint acoustic and text decoder (JATD) and semi-supervised training, we achieved 4%-12% WER reduction for various tasks compared to the baseline deliberation. Compared to a state-of-the-art language model (LM) rescoring method, the deliberation model reduces the Google Voice Search WER by 11% relative. We show that the deliberation model also achieves a positive human side-by-side evaluation compared to the state-of-the-art LM rescorer with reasonable endpointer latencies.
summary: Text-only and semi-supervised training based on audio-only data has gained popularity recently due to the wide availability of unlabeled text and speech data. In this work, we propose incorporating text-only and semi-supervised training into an attention-based deliberation model. By incorporating text-only data in training a bidirectional encoder representation from transformer (BERT) for the deliberation text encoder, and large-scale text-to-speech and audio-only utterances using joint acoustic and text decoder (JATD) and semi-supervised training, we achieved 4%-12% WER reduction for various tasks compared to the baseline deliberation. Compared to a state-of-the-art language model (LM) rescoring method, the deliberation model reduces the Google Voice Search WER by 11% relative. We show that the deliberation model also achieves a positive human side-by-side evaluation compared to the state-of-the-art LM rescorer with reasonable endpointer latencies.
abstract_zh: 由于未标记的文本和语音数据的广泛可用性，基于纯音频数据的纯文本和半监督训练最近越来越受欢迎。在这项工作中，我们建议将纯文本和半监督训练纳入基于注意力的审议模型。通过将纯文本数据纳入训练来自 Transformer (BERT) 的双向编码器表示以用于审议文本编码器，以及使用联合声学和文本解码器 (JATD) 和半监督训练进行大规模文本到语音和纯音频话语，与基线审议相比，我们在各种任务中实现了 4%-12% 的 WER 减少。与最先进的语言模型 (LM) 重新评分方法相比，审议模型将 Google 语音搜索 WER 相对降低了 11%。我们表明，与具有合理端点延迟的最先进的 LM 重新评分器相比，深思熟虑模型还实现了积极的人类并行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合文本仅训练和半监督训练的注意机制深思模型，以提高语音识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 由于未标记的文本和语音数据广泛可用，基于音频仅数据的文本仅和半监督训练变得流行，因此本文旨在通过结合这些方法来改进深思模型。
AI.method: 通过在训练双向编码器表示（BERT）中使用文本仅数据，以及使用联合声学和文本解码器（JATD）和半监督训练处理大规模文本到语音和音频仅语句，提出了一种注意机制深思模型。
AI.result: 与基线深思模型相比，该模型在各种任务中实现了4%-12%的词错误率（WER）降低，并且在Google语音搜索任务中比最先进的语言模型（LM）重评分方法减少了11%的相对WER。
AI.conclusion: 该深思模型在人类侧边比较评估中表现出优于最先进的LM重评分方法，并且具有合理的端点延迟。

search_text: Improving Deliberation by Text-Only and Semi-Supervised Training 通过纯文本和半监督培训改进审议 Text-only and semi-supervised training based on audio-only data has gained popularity recently due to the wide availability of unlabeled text and speech data. In this work, we propose incorporating text-only and semi-supervised training into an attention-based deliberation model. By incorporating text-only data in training a bidirectional encoder representation from transformer (BERT) for the deliberation text encoder, and large-scale text-to-speech and audio-only utterances using joint acoustic and text decoder (JATD) and semi-supervised training, we achieved 4%-12% WER reduction for various tasks compared to the baseline deliberation. Compared to a state-of-the-art language model (LM) rescoring method, the deliberation model reduces the Google Voice Search WER by 11% relative. We show that the deliberation model also achieves a positive human side-by-side evaluation compared to the state-of-the-art LM rescorer with reasonable endpointer latencies. 由于未标记的文本和语音数据的广泛可用性，基于纯音频数据的纯文本和半监督训练最近越来越受欢迎。在这项工作中，我们建议将纯文本和半监督训练纳入基于注意力的审议模型。通过将纯文本数据纳入训练来自 Transformer (BERT) 的双向编码器表示以用于审议文本编码器，以及使用联合声学和文本解码器 (JATD) 和半监督训练进行大规模文本到语音和纯音频话语，与基线审议相比，我们在各种任务中实现了 4%-12% 的 WER 减少。与最先进的语言模型 (LM) 重新评分方法相比，审议模型将 Google 语音搜索 WER 相对降低了 11%。我们表明，与具有合理端点延迟的最先进的 LM 重新评分器相比，深思熟虑模型还实现了积极的人类并行评估。 本文提出了一种结合文本仅训练和半监督训练的注意机制深思模型，以提高语音识别的准确性。 Ke Hu,Tara N. Sainath,Yanzhang He,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Trevor Strohman,Sepand Mavandadi,Weiran Wang cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Pavan C. Madhusudana,Neil Birkbeck,Yilin Wang,Balu Adsumilli,Alan C. Bovik
title: CONVIQT: Contrastive Video Quality Estimator
title_zh: CONVIQT：对比视频质量估计器
abstract: Perceptual video quality assessment (VQA) is an integral component of many streaming and video sharing platforms. Here we consider the problem of learning perceptually relevant video quality representations in a self-supervised manner. Distortion type identification and degradation level determination is employed as an auxiliary task to train a deep learning model containing a deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) that extracts spatial features, as well as a recurrent unit that captures temporal information. The model is trained using a contrastive loss and we therefore refer to this training framework and resulting model as CONtrastive VIdeo Quality EstimaTor (CONVIQT). During testing, the weights of the trained model are frozen, and a linear regressor maps the learned features to quality scores in a no-reference (NR) setting. We conduct comprehensive evaluations of the proposed model on multiple VQA databases by analyzing the correlations between model predictions and ground-truth quality ratings, and achieve competitive performance when compared to state-of-the-art NR-VQA models, even though it is not trained on those databases. Our ablation experiments demonstrate that the learned representations are highly robust and generalize well across synthetic and realistic distortions. Our results indicate that compelling representations with perceptual bearing can be obtained using self-supervised learning. The implementations used in this work have been made available at https://github.com/pavancm/CONVIQT.
summary: Perceptual video quality assessment (VQA) is an integral component of many streaming and video sharing platforms. Here we consider the problem of learning perceptually relevant video quality representations in a self-supervised manner. Distortion type identification and degradation level determination is employed as an auxiliary task to train a deep learning model containing a deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) that extracts spatial features, as well as a recurrent unit that captures temporal information. The model is trained using a contrastive loss and we therefore refer to this training framework and resulting model as CONtrastive VIdeo Quality EstimaTor (CONVIQT). During testing, the weights of the trained model are frozen, and a linear regressor maps the learned features to quality scores in a no-reference (NR) setting. We conduct comprehensive evaluations of the proposed model on multiple VQA databases by analyzing the correlations between model predictions and ground-truth quality ratings, and achieve competitive performance when compared to state-of-the-art NR-VQA models, even though it is not trained on those databases. Our ablation experiments demonstrate that the learned representations are highly robust and generalize well across synthetic and realistic distortions. Our results indicate that compelling representations with perceptual bearing can be obtained using self-supervised learning. The implementations used in this work have been made available at https://github.com/pavancm/CONVIQT.
abstract_zh: 感知视频质量评估 (VQA) 是许多流媒体和视频共享平台不可或缺的组成部分。在这里，我们考虑以自我监督的方式学习感知相关的视频质量表示的问题。采用失真类型识别和退化级别确定作为辅助任务来训练深度学习模型，该模型包含提取空间特征的深度卷积神经网络（CNN）以及捕获时间信息的循环单元。该模型使用对比损失进行训练，因此我们将此训练框架和生成的模型称为对比视频质量估计器 (CONVIQT)。在测试过程中，训练模型的权重被冻结，线性回归器将学习到的特征映射到无参考 (NR) 设置中的质量分数。我们通过分析模型预测和真实质量评级之间的相关性，在多个 VQA 数据库上对所提出的模型进行综合评估，并与最先进的 NR-VQA 模型相比，取得了有竞争力的性能，即使它没有在这些数据库上进行训练。我们的消融实验表明，学习到的表示非常稳健，并且可以很好地概括合成和现实的扭曲。我们的结果表明，使用自我监督学习可以获得具有感知轴承的令人信服的表征。这项工作中使用的实现已在 https://github.com/pavancm/CONVIQT 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的无参考视频质量评估模型CONVIQT，通过对比损失训练CNN和循环单元以提取时空特征，并映射为质量评分。
AI.motivation: 现有视频质量评估模型依赖有参考数据或特定数据库训练，缺乏对合成与真实失真场景的泛化能力，需探索更鲁棒的自监督学习方法。
AI.method: 结合CNN提取空间特征与循环单元捕捉时序信息，通过对比损失训练模型；测试阶段冻结权重并使用线性回归器映射特征到质量分数，实现无参考评估。
AI.result: 在多个VQA数据库中，CONVIQT未直接训练数据库的情况下仍达到与先进模型相当的性能，且对合成与真实失真具有强鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习能有效生成感知相关的视频质量表征，CONVIQT的开源实现为无参考视频质量评估提供了新思路和实用工具。

authors_text: Florent Bonnet,Jocelyn Ahmed Mazari,Thibaut Munzer,Pierre Yser,Patrick Gallinari
title: An extensible Benchmarking Graph-Mesh dataset for studying Steady-State Incompressible Navier-Stokes Equations
title_zh: 用于研究稳态不可压缩纳维斯托克斯方程的可扩展基准图网格数据集
comment: ICLR 2022 Workshop on Geometrical and Topological Representation Learning
comments: ICLR 2022 Workshop on Geometrical and Topological Representation Learning
abstract: Recent progress in \emph{Geometric Deep Learning} (GDL) has shown its potential to provide powerful data-driven models. This gives momentum to explore new methods for learning physical systems governed by \emph{Partial Differential Equations} (PDEs) from Graph-Mesh data. However, despite the efforts and recent achievements, several research directions remain unexplored and progress is still far from satisfying the physical requirements of real-world phenomena. One of the major impediments is the absence of benchmarking datasets and common physics evaluation protocols. In this paper, we propose a 2-D graph-mesh dataset to study the airflow over airfoils at high Reynolds regime (from $10^6$ and beyond). We also introduce metrics on the stress forces over the airfoil in order to evaluate GDL models on important physical quantities. Moreover, we provide extensive GDL baselines.
summary: Recent progress in \emph{Geometric Deep Learning} (GDL) has shown its potential to provide powerful data-driven models. This gives momentum to explore new methods for learning physical systems governed by \emph{Partial Differential Equations} (PDEs) from Graph-Mesh data. However, despite the efforts and recent achievements, several research directions remain unexplored and progress is still far from satisfying the physical requirements of real-world phenomena. One of the major impediments is the absence of benchmarking datasets and common physics evaluation protocols. In this paper, we propose a 2-D graph-mesh dataset to study the airflow over airfoils at high Reynolds regime (from $10^6$ and beyond). We also introduce metrics on the stress forces over the airfoil in order to evaluate GDL models on important physical quantities. Moreover, we provide extensive GDL baselines.
abstract_zh: \emph{几何深度学习} (GDL) 的最新进展显示了其提供强大的数据驱动模型的潜力。这为探索从图网格数据中学习由偏微分方程（PDE）控制的物理系统的新方法提供了动力。然而，尽管付出了努力并取得了最近的成就，但仍有一些研究方向尚未探索，进展仍远未满足现实世界现象的物理要求。主要障碍之一是缺乏基准数据集和通用物理评估协议。在本文中，我们提出了一个二维图网格数据集来研究高雷诺状态（10^6 美元及以上）下机翼上的气流。我们还引入了机翼应力的指标，以便评估重要物理量的 GDL 模型。此外，我们还提供广泛的 GDL 基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个二维图-网格基准数据集，用于研究高雷诺数下机翼气流的稳态不可压缩纳维-斯托克斯方程，并引入应力力评估指标及GDL基线模型。
AI.motivation: 几何深度学习在物理系统建模中潜力显著，但缺乏标准化数据集和评估协议，阻碍了该领域对实际物理现象的满足度。
AI.method: 构建高雷诺数（10^6及以上）机翼气流的二维图-网格数据集，设计应力力评估指标，并提供多种GDL基线模型供对比实验。
AI.result: 发布可扩展的基准数据集，建立物理量评估体系，为后续GDL模型研究提供实验基础与对比参照。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集与评估框架为几何深度学习在PDE物理系统中的应用提供了标准化工具，有助于推动相关研究进展。

search_text: An extensible Benchmarking Graph-Mesh dataset for studying Steady-State Incompressible Navier-Stokes Equations 用于研究稳态不可压缩纳维斯托克斯方程的可扩展基准图网格数据集 Recent progress in \emph{Geometric Deep Learning} (GDL) has shown its potential to provide powerful data-driven models. This gives momentum to explore new methods for learning physical systems governed by \emph{Partial Differential Equations} (PDEs) from Graph-Mesh data. However, despite the efforts and recent achievements, several research directions remain unexplored and progress is still far from satisfying the physical requirements of real-world phenomena. One of the major impediments is the absence of benchmarking datasets and common physics evaluation protocols. In this paper, we propose a 2-D graph-mesh dataset to study the airflow over airfoils at high Reynolds regime (from $10^6$ and beyond). We also introduce metrics on the stress forces over the airfoil in order to evaluate GDL models on important physical quantities. Moreover, we provide extensive GDL baselines. \emph{几何深度学习} (GDL) 的最新进展显示了其提供强大的数据驱动模型的潜力。这为探索从图网格数据中学习由偏微分方程（PDE）控制的物理系统的新方法提供了动力。然而，尽管付出了努力并取得了最近的成就，但仍有一些研究方向尚未探索，进展仍远未满足现实世界现象的物理要求。主要障碍之一是缺乏基准数据集和通用物理评估协议。在本文中，我们提出了一个二维图网格数据集来研究高雷诺状态（10^6 美元及以上）下机翼上的气流。我们还引入了机翼应力的指标，以便评估重要物理量的 GDL 模型。此外，我们还提供广泛的 GDL 基线。 本文提出一个二维图-网格基准数据集，用于研究高雷诺数下机翼气流的稳态不可压缩纳维-斯托克斯方程，并引入应力力评估指标及GDL基线模型。 Florent Bonnet,Jocelyn Ahmed Mazari,Thibaut Munzer,Pierre Yser,Patrick Gallinari cs.LG,cs.CV,math.NA

authors_text: Wenwen Qiang,Jiangmeng Li,Changwen Zheng,Bing Su,Hui Xiong
title: Interventional Contrastive Learning with Meta Semantic Regularizer
title_zh: 使用元语义正则器进行干预对比学习
abstract: Contrastive learning (CL)-based self-supervised learning models learn visual representations in a pairwise manner. Although the prevailing CL model has achieved great progress, in this paper, we uncover an ever-overlooked phenomenon: When the CL model is trained with full images, the performance tested in full images is better than that in foreground areas; when the CL model is trained with foreground areas, the performance tested in full images is worse than that in foreground areas. This observation reveals that backgrounds in images may interfere with the model learning semantic information and their influence has not been fully eliminated. To tackle this issue, we build a Structural Causal Model (SCM) to model the background as a confounder. We propose a backdoor adjustment-based regularization method, namely Interventional Contrastive Learning with Meta Semantic Regularizer (ICL-MSR), to perform causal intervention towards the proposed SCM. ICL-MSR can be incorporated into any existing CL methods to alleviate background distractions from representation learning. Theoretically, we prove that ICL-MSR achieves a tighter error bound. Empirically, our experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that ICL-MSR is able to improve the performances of different state-of-the-art CL methods.
summary: Contrastive learning (CL)-based self-supervised learning models learn visual representations in a pairwise manner. Although the prevailing CL model has achieved great progress, in this paper, we uncover an ever-overlooked phenomenon: When the CL model is trained with full images, the performance tested in full images is better than that in foreground areas; when the CL model is trained with foreground areas, the performance tested in full images is worse than that in foreground areas. This observation reveals that backgrounds in images may interfere with the model learning semantic information and their influence has not been fully eliminated. To tackle this issue, we build a Structural Causal Model (SCM) to model the background as a confounder. We propose a backdoor adjustment-based regularization method, namely Interventional Contrastive Learning with Meta Semantic Regularizer (ICL-MSR), to perform causal intervention towards the proposed SCM. ICL-MSR can be incorporated into any existing CL methods to alleviate background distractions from representation learning. Theoretically, we prove that ICL-MSR achieves a tighter error bound. Empirically, our experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that ICL-MSR is able to improve the performances of different state-of-the-art CL methods.
abstract_zh: 基于对比学习（CL）的自监督学习模型以成对的方式学习视觉表征。尽管当前的 CL 模型已经取得了很大的进步，但在本文中，我们发现了一个一直被忽视的现象：当使用全图训练 CL 模型时，全图测试的性能优于前景区域；当使用前景区域训练 CL 模型时，在全图像中测试的性能比在前景区域中测试的性能差。这一观察结果表明，图像中的背景可能会干扰模型学习语义信息，并且其影响尚未完全消除。为了解决这个问题，我们建立了一个结构因果模型（SCM）来将背景建模为混杂因素。我们提出了一种基于后门调整的正则化方法，即使用元语义正则化器的介入对比学习（ICL-MSR），以对所提出的 SCM 进行因果干预。 ICL-MSR 可以合并到任何现有的 CL 方法中，以减轻表示学习的背景干扰。理论上，我们证明 ICL-MSR 实现了更严格的误差范围。根据经验，我们在多个基准数据集上进行的实验表明，ICL-MSR 能够提高不同最先进的 CL 方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ICL-MSR的干预对比学习方法，通过因果干预消除图像背景对视觉表征学习的干扰。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习模型在训练和测试时因背景干扰导致性能不一致，背景信息会干扰语义学习且未被充分消除。
AI.method: 构建结构因果模型（SCM）将背景建模为混杂变量，提出基于后门调整的正则化方法ICL-MSR进行因果干预。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了ICL-MSR能提升多种先进对比学习方法的性能，并理论证明其误差界更紧。
AI.conclusion: ICL-MSR通过因果干预有效缓解背景干扰，为对比学习中的语义表征优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Aleksander Figiel,Vincent Froese,André Nichterlein,Rolf Niedermeier
title: There and Back Again: On Applying Data Reduction Rules by Undoing Others
title_zh: 来来回回：通过撤销其他规则来应用数据缩减规则
comment: extended abstract to appear at ESA 2022
comments: extended abstract to appear at ESA 2022
abstract: Data reduction rules are an established method in the algorithmic toolbox for tackling computationally challenging problems. A data reduction rule is a polynomial-time algorithm that, given a problem instance as input, outputs an equivalent, typically smaller instance of the same problem. The application of data reduction rules during the preprocessing of problem instances allows in many cases to considerably shrink their size, or even solve them directly. Commonly, these data reduction rules are applied exhaustively and in some fixed order to obtain irreducible instances. It was often observed that by changing the order of the rules, different irreducible instances can be obtained. We propose to "undo" data reduction rules on irreducible instances, by which they become larger, and then subsequently apply data reduction rules again to shrink them. We show that this somewhat counter-intuitive approach can lead to significantly smaller irreducible instances. The process of undoing data reduction rules is not limited to "rolling back" data reduction rules applied to the instance during preprocessing. Instead, we formulate so-called backward rules, which essentially undo a data reduction rule, but without using any information about which data reduction rules were applied to it previously. In particular, based on the example of Vertex Cover we propose two methods applying backward rules to shrink the instances further. In our experiments we show that this way smaller irreducible instances consisting of real-world graphs from the SNAP and DIMACS datasets can be computed.
summary: Data reduction rules are an established method in the algorithmic toolbox for tackling computationally challenging problems. A data reduction rule is a polynomial-time algorithm that, given a problem instance as input, outputs an equivalent, typically smaller instance of the same problem. The application of data reduction rules during the preprocessing of problem instances allows in many cases to considerably shrink their size, or even solve them directly. Commonly, these data reduction rules are applied exhaustively and in some fixed order to obtain irreducible instances. It was often observed that by changing the order of the rules, different irreducible instances can be obtained. We propose to "undo" data reduction rules on irreducible instances, by which they become larger, and then subsequently apply data reduction rules again to shrink them. We show that this somewhat counter-intuitive approach can lead to significantly smaller irreducible instances. The process of undoing data reduction rules is not limited to "rolling back" data reduction rules applied to the instance during preprocessing. Instead, we formulate so-called backward rules, which essentially undo a data reduction rule, but without using any information about which data reduction rules were applied to it previously. In particular, based on the example of Vertex Cover we propose two methods applying backward rules to shrink the instances further. In our experiments we show that this way smaller irreducible instances consisting of real-world graphs from the SNAP and DIMACS datasets can be computed.
abstract_zh: 数据缩减规则是算法工具箱中用于解决计算难题的既定方法。数据缩减规则是一种多项式时间算法，在给定问题实例作为输入的情况下，输出同一问题的等效实例（通常较小）。在问题实例的预处理过程中应用数据缩减规则可以在许多情况下大大缩小其大小，甚至直接解决它们。通常，这些数据缩减规则被详尽地并以某种固定顺序应用以获得不可缩减的实例。人们经常观察到，通过改变规则的顺序，可以获得不同的不可约实例。我们建议“撤消”不可约实例上的数据约简规则，使它们变得更大，然后再次应用数据约简规则来缩小它们。我们证明，这种有点违反直觉的方法可以导致明显更小的不可约实例。撤销数据缩减规则的过程不限于“回滚”在预处理期间应用于实例的数据缩减规则。相反，我们制定所谓的后向规则，该规则本质上撤消数据缩减规则，但不使用有关先前应用了哪些数据缩减规则的任何信息。特别是，基于顶点覆盖的示例，我们提出了两种应用后向规则来进一步缩小实例的方法。在我们的实验中，我们表明，可以通过这种方式计算由 SNAP 和 DIMACS 数据集的真实世界图组成的更小的不可约实例。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过撤销数据约简规则并重新应用以进一步缩小问题实例的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统数据约简规则按固定顺序应用可能无法获得最优不可约实例，而撤销规则后重新应用可能带来更优结果。
AI.method: 提出向后规则（backward rules）撤销原有约简操作，并基于顶点覆盖问题设计两种方法重新约简实例。
AI.result: 在SNAP和DIMACS真实图数据集上，该方法生成的不可约实例规模显著小于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 撤销与重约简策略能突破传统顺序限制，为数据约简领域提供新思路，具有广泛适用性。

In particular, based on the example of Vertex Cover we propose two methods applying backward rules to shrink the instances further. authors_text: Léon Migus,Yuan Yin,Jocelyn Ahmed Mazari,Patrick Gallinari
title: Multi-scale Physical Representations for Approximating PDE Solutions with Graph Neural Operators
title_zh: 使用图神经算子逼近偏微分方程解的多尺度物理表示
comment: ICLR 2022 Workshop on Geometrical and Topological Representation Learning
comments: ICLR 2022 Workshop on Geometrical and Topological Representation Learning
abstract: Representing physical signals at different scales is among the most challenging problems in engineering. Several multi-scale modeling tools have been developed to describe physical systems governed by \emph{Partial Differential Equations} (PDEs). These tools are at the crossroad of principled physical models and numerical schema. Recently, data-driven models have been introduced to speed-up the approximation of PDE solutions compared to numerical solvers. Among these recent data-driven methods, neural integral operators are a class that learn a mapping between function spaces. These functions are discretized on graphs (meshes) which are appropriate for modeling interactions in physical phenomena. In this work, we study three multi-resolution schema with integral kernel operators that can be approximated with \emph{Message Passing Graph Neural Networks} (MPGNNs). To validate our study, we make extensive MPGNNs experiments with well-chosen metrics considering steady and unsteady PDEs.
summary: Representing physical signals at different scales is among the most challenging problems in engineering. Several multi-scale modeling tools have been developed to describe physical systems governed by \emph{Partial Differential Equations} (PDEs). These tools are at the crossroad of principled physical models and numerical schema. Recently, data-driven models have been introduced to speed-up the approximation of PDE solutions compared to numerical solvers. Among these recent data-driven methods, neural integral operators are a class that learn a mapping between function spaces. These functions are discretized on graphs (meshes) which are appropriate for modeling interactions in physical phenomena. In this work, we study three multi-resolution schema with integral kernel operators that can be approximated with \emph{Message Passing Graph Neural Networks} (MPGNNs). To validate our study, we make extensive MPGNNs experiments with well-chosen metrics considering steady and unsteady PDEs.
abstract_zh: 以不同尺度表示物理信号是工程中最具挑战性的问题之一。已经开发了几种多尺度建模工具来描述由偏微分方程（PDE）控制的物理系统。这些工具处于原则物理模型和数值模式的十字路口。最近，与数值求解器相比，引入了数据驱动模型来加速偏微分方程解的逼近。在这些最新的数据驱动方法中，神经积分算子是学习函数空间之间映射的一类。这些函数在图表（网格）上离散化，适合对物理现象中的相互作用进行建模。在这项工作中，我们研究了三种具有积分核运算符的多分辨率模式，这些模式可以用\emph{消息传递图神经网络}（MPGNN）来近似。为了验证我们的研究，我们使用考虑稳定和非稳定偏微分方程的精心选择的指标进行了广泛的 MPGNN 实验。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用消息传递图神经网络（MPGNNs）近似积分核算子的多尺度方法，以加速偏微分方程（PDE）解的计算。
AI.motivation: 传统多尺度建模工具在物理系统模拟中存在效率瓶颈，而数据驱动的神经积分算子能更快近似PDE解，但需结合多尺度建模优势。
AI.method: 提出三种多分辨率积分核算子方案，利用MPGNNs学习函数空间映射，并通过稳态与非稳态PDE实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法在多种PDE场景下均能高效逼近解析解，且在计算速度与精度上优于传统数值求解器。
AI.conclusion: MPGNNs为多尺度PDE求解提供了高效的数据驱动框架，未来可拓展至更复杂的物理系统建模。

authors_text: Vikram Venkatraghavan,Sebastian R. van der Voort,Daniel Bos,Marion Smits,Frederik Barkhof,Wiro J. Niessen,Stefan Klein,Esther E. Bron
title: Computer-aided diagnosis and prediction in brain disorders
title_zh: 脑部疾病的计算机辅助诊断和预测
abstract: Computer-aided methods have shown added value for diagnosing and predicting brain disorders and can thus support decision making in clinical care and treatment planning. This chapter will provide insight into the type of methods, their working, their input data - such as cognitive tests, imaging and genetic data - and the types of output they provide. We will focus on specific use cases for diagnosis, i.e. estimating the current 'condition' of the patient, such as early detection and diagnosis of dementia, differential diagnosis of brain tumours, and decision making in stroke. Regarding prediction, i.e. estimation of the future 'condition' of the patient, we will zoom in on use cases such as predicting the disease course in multiple sclerosis and predicting patient outcomes after treatment in brain cancer. Furthermore, based on these use cases, we will assess the current state-of-the-art methodology and highlight current efforts on benchmarking of these methods and the importance of open science therein. Finally, we assess the current clinical impact of computer-aided methods and discuss the required next steps to increase clinical impact.
summary: Computer-aided methods have shown added value for diagnosing and predicting brain disorders and can thus support decision making in clinical care and treatment planning. This chapter will provide insight into the type of methods, their working, their input data - such as cognitive tests, imaging and genetic data - and the types of output they provide. We will focus on specific use cases for diagnosis, i.e. estimating the current 'condition' of the patient, such as early detection and diagnosis of dementia, differential diagnosis of brain tumours, and decision making in stroke. Regarding prediction, i.e. estimation of the future 'condition' of the patient, we will zoom in on use cases such as predicting the disease course in multiple sclerosis and predicting patient outcomes after treatment in brain cancer. Furthermore, based on these use cases, we will assess the current state-of-the-art methodology and highlight current efforts on benchmarking of these methods and the importance of open science therein. Finally, we assess the current clinical impact of computer-aided methods and discuss the required next steps to increase clinical impact.
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助方法在诊断和预测脑部疾病方面显示出附加价值，因此可以支持临床护理和治疗计划的决策。本章将深入介绍方法的类型、它们的工作原理、它们的输入数据（例如认知测试、成像和遗传数据）以及它们提供的输出类型。我们将重点关注诊断的具体用例，即估计患者当前的“状况”，例如痴呆症的早期检测和诊断、脑肿瘤的鉴别诊断以及中风的决策。关于预测，即对患者未来“状况”的估计，我们将重点关注用例，例如预测多发性硬化症的病程和预测脑癌治疗后的患者结果。此外，根据这些用例，我们将评估当前最先进的方法，并强调当前对这些方法进行基准测试的努力以及其中开放科学的重要性。最后，我们评估计算机辅助方法当前的临床影响，并讨论增加临床影响所需的后续步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了计算机辅助诊断与预测脑部疾病的方法，涵盖诊断现状分析及未来病情预测的应用场景，并评估其临床影响。
AI.motivation: 计算机辅助方法能提升脑部疾病诊断准确性与预测效率，支持临床决策，但需系统梳理方法论并推动其临床转化。
AI.method: 通过分析认知测试、影像数据及基因数据等多模态输入，结合诊断（如痴呆早期检测、脑瘤鉴别诊断）与预测（如多发性硬化病程、脑癌治疗预后）两类应用场景，评估现有算法及基准测试进展。
AI.result: 明确了当前主流方法的技术路线，指出基准测试不足与开放科学的重要性，并揭示临床应用中的实际挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需加强方法学标准化与跨机构协作，通过开放数据与统一评估体系推动计算机辅助技术在临床的深度应用。

authors_text: Netanell Avisdris,Leo Joskowicz,Brian Dromey,Anna L. David,Donald M. Peebles,Danail Stoyanov,Dafna Ben Bashat,Sophia Bano
title: BiometryNet: Landmark-based Fetal Biometry Estimation from Standard Ultrasound Planes
title_zh: BiometryNet：从标准超声平面进行基于地标的胎儿生物测量估计
abstract: Fetal growth assessment from ultrasound is based on a few biometric measurements that are performed manually and assessed relative to the expected gestational age. Reliable biometry estimation depends on the precise detection of landmarks in standard ultrasound planes. Manual annotation can be time-consuming and operator dependent task, and may results in high measurements variability. Existing methods for automatic fetal biometry rely on initial automatic fetal structure segmentation followed by geometric landmark detection. However, segmentation annotations are time-consuming and may be inaccurate, and landmark detection requires developing measurement-specific geometric methods. This paper describes BiometryNet, an end-to-end landmark regression framework for fetal biometry estimation that overcomes these limitations. It includes a novel Dynamic Orientation Determination (DOD) method for enforcing measurement-specific orientation consistency during network training. DOD reduces variabilities in network training, increases landmark localization accuracy, thus yields accurate and robust biometric measurements. To validate our method, we assembled a dataset of 3,398 ultrasound images from 1,829 subjects acquired in three clinical sites with seven different ultrasound devices. Comparison and cross-validation of three different biometric measurements on two independent datasets shows that BiometryNet is robust and yields accurate measurements whose errors are lower than the clinically permissible errors, outperforming other existing automated biometry estimation methods. Code is available at https://github.com/netanellavisdris/fetalbiometry.

Comparison and cross-validation of three different biometric measurements on two independent datasets shows that BiometryNet is robust and yields accurate measurements whose errors are lower than the clinically permissible errors, outperforming other existing automated biometry estimation methods. Code is available at https://github.com/netanellavisdris/fetalbiometry.
abstract_zh: 超声对胎儿生长的评估基于一些手动执行的生物测量，并相对于预期胎龄进行评估。可靠的生物统计估计取决于标准超声平面中标志的精确检测。手动注释可能是一项耗时且依赖于操作员的任务，并且可能导致测量结果的高度可变性。现有的自动胎儿生物测量方法依赖于初始自动胎儿结构分割，然后进行几何标志检测。然而，分割注释非常耗时并且可能不准确，并且地标检测需要开发特定于测量的几何方法。本文介绍了 BiometryNet，这是一种用于胎儿生物统计估计的端到端里程碑式回归框架，克服了这些限制。它包括一种新颖的动态方向确定（DOD）方法，用于在网络训练期间强制执行特定于测量的方向一致性。 DOD 减少了网络训练的可变性，提高了地标定位精度，从而产生准确且稳健的生物识别测量结果。为了验证我们的方法，我们收集了来自 1,829 名受试者的 3,398 张超声图像的数据集，这些图像是在三个临床地点使用七种不同的超声设备获取的。对两个独立数据集上的三种不同生物特征测量结果进行比较和交叉验证表明，BiometryNet 具有鲁棒性，可产生准确的测量结果，其误差低于临床允许的误差，优于其他现有的自动生物特征估计方法。代码可在 https://github.com/netanellavisdris/fetalbiometry 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiometryNet，一种基于标志点的胎儿生物测量估计框架，用于从标准超声图像中自动估算胎儿生物测量值。
AI.motivation: 传统胎儿生长评估依赖手动测量，存在耗时、操作者依赖性和测量结果差异大的问题。现有自动方法依赖分割和几何方法，存在分割耗时和准确性不足的缺陷。
AI.method: 提出BiometryNet端到端框架，结合动态方向确定（DOD）方法，在训练过程中强制测量特定方向一致性，提升标志点定位精度。
AI.result: 在3,398张超声图像数据集上验证，BiometryNet的测量误差低于临床允许范围，优于现有方法，且在不同设备和临床环境中表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: BiometryNet通过DOD方法有效提升了胎儿生物测量的自动化水平和准确性，为临床提供了可靠工具。

search_text: BiometryNet: Landmark-based Fetal Biometry Estimation from Standard Ultrasound Planes BiometryNet：从标准超声平面进行基于地标的胎儿生物测量估计 Fetal growth assessment from ultrasound is based on a few biometric measurements that are performed manually and assessed relative to the expected gestational age. Reliable biometry estimation depends on the precise detection of landmarks in standard ultrasound planes. Manual annotation can be time-consuming and operator dependent task, and may results in high measurements variability. Existing methods for automatic fetal biometry rely on initial automatic fetal structure segmentation followed by geometric landmark detection. However, segmentation annotations are time-consuming and may be inaccurate, and landmark detection requires developing measurement-specific geometric methods. This paper describes BiometryNet, an end-to-end landmark regression framework for fetal biometry estimation that overcomes these limitations. It includes a novel Dynamic Orientation Determination (DOD) method for enforcing measurement-specific orientation consistency during network training. DOD reduces variabilities in network training, increases landmark localization accuracy, thus yields accurate and robust biometric measurements. To validate our method, we assembled a dataset of 3,398 ultrasound images from 1,829 subjects acquired in three clinical sites with seven different ultrasound devices. Comparison and cross-validation of three different biometric measurements on two independent datasets shows that BiometryNet is robust and yields accurate measurements whose errors are lower than the clinically permissible errors, outperforming other existing automated biometry estimation methods. Code is available at https://github.com/netanellavisdris/fetalbiometry. 超声对胎儿生长的评估基于一些手动执行的生物测量，并相对于预期胎龄进行评估。可靠的生物统计估计取决于标准超声平面中标志的精确检测。手动注释可能是一项耗时且依赖于操作员的任务，并且可能导致测量结果的高度可变性。现有的自动胎儿生物测量方法依赖于初始自动胎儿结构分割，然后进行几何标志检测。然而，分割注释非常耗时并且可能不准确，并且地标检测需要开发特定于测量的几何方法。本文介绍了 BiometryNet，这是一种用于胎儿生物统计估计的端到端里程碑式回归框架，克服了这些限制。它包括一种新颖的动态方向确定（DOD）方法，用于在网络训练期间强制执行特定于测量的方向一致性。 DOD 减少了网络训练的可变性，提高了地标定位精度，从而产生准确且稳健的生物识别测量结果。为了验证我们的方法，我们收集了来自 1,829 名受试者的 3,398 张超声图像的数据集，这些图像是在三个临床地点使用七种不同的超声设备获取的。对两个独立数据集上的三种不同生物特征测量结果进行比较和交叉验证表明，BiometryNet 具有鲁棒性，可产生准确的测量结果，其误差低于临床允许的误差，优于其他现有的自动生物特征估计方法。代码可在 https://github.com/netanellavisdris/fetalbiometry 获取。 本文提出BiometryNet，一种基于标志点的胎儿生物测量估计框架，用于从标准超声图像中自动估算胎儿生物测量值。 Netanell Avisdris,Leo Joskowicz,Brian Dromey,Anna L. authors_text: Lize Alberts
title: Not Cheating on the Turing Test: Towards Grounded Language Learning in Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 不要在图灵测试上作弊：走向人工智能中的扎根语言学习
comment: Philosophy master's thesis (2020) available on the SUNScholar research repository (https://scholar.sun.ac.za/handle/10019.1/109271)
comments: Philosophy master's thesis (2020) available on the SUNScholar research repository (https://scholar.sun.ac.za/handle/10019.1/109271)
abstract: Recent hype surrounding the increasing sophistication of language processing models has renewed optimism regarding machines achieving a human-like command of natural language. Research in the area of natural language understanding (NLU) in artificial intelligence claims to have been making great strides in this area, however, the lack of conceptual clarity/consistency in how 'understanding' is used in this and other disciplines makes it difficult to discern how close we actually are. In this interdisciplinary research thesis, I integrate insights from cognitive science/psychology, philosophy of mind, and cognitive linguistics, and evaluate it against a critical review of current approaches in NLU to explore the basic requirements--and remaining challenges--for developing artificially intelligent systems with human-like capacities for language use and comprehension.
summary: Recent hype surrounding the increasing sophistication of language processing models has renewed optimism regarding machines achieving a human-like command of natural language. Research in the area of natural language understanding (NLU) in artificial intelligence claims to have been making great strides in this area, however, the lack of conceptual clarity/consistency in how 'understanding' is used in this and other disciplines makes it difficult to discern how close we actually are. In this interdisciplinary research thesis, I integrate insights from cognitive science/psychology, philosophy of mind, and cognitive linguistics, and evaluate it against a critical review of current approaches in NLU to explore the basic requirements--and remaining challenges--for developing artificially intelligent systems with human-like capacities for language use and comprehension.
abstract_zh: 最近围绕语言处理模型日益复杂的炒作让人们重新对机器实现类似人类的自然语言命令感到乐观。人工智能自然语言理解（NLU）领域的研究声称在这一领域取得了长足的进步，然而，该学科和其他学科中“理解”的使用方式缺乏概念清晰度/一致性，使得我们很难辨别我们实际上有多接近。在这篇跨学科研究论文中，我整合了认知科学/心理学、心灵哲学和认知语言学的见解，并根据对 NLU 现有方法的批判性审查对其进行评估，以探索开发具有类人语言使用和理解能力的人工智能系统的基本要求和剩余挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨如何通过跨学科方法开发具有人类语言能力的AI系统，强调基于实际经验的语言学习（grounded language learning）以避免在图灵测试中'作弊'。
AI.motivation: 当前自然语言理解（NLU）研究缺乏对'理解'概念的清晰定义，导致难以评估AI语言能力的真实进展，需整合多学科视角明确核心要求与挑战。
AI.method: 结合认知科学、心理学、心灵哲学及认知语言学理论，批判性分析现有NLU方法，探讨人类语言使用与理解的底层机制。
AI.result: 明确了构建人类级语言AI需解决的核心问题，包括概念表征、语境关联及认知过程建模，并指出当前技术路线的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需通过跨学科协作重新定义'语言理解'，推动基于真实认知机制的grounded语言学习框架，而非依赖表面的统计模式匹配。

authors_text: Gabriele Tiboni,Karol Arndt,Giuseppe Averta,Ville Kyrki,Tatiana Tommasi
title: Online vs. Offline Adaptive Domain Randomization Benchmark
title_zh: 在线与离线自适应域随机化基准
abstract: Physics simulators have shown great promise for conveniently learning reinforcement learning policies in safe, unconstrained environments. However, transferring the acquired knowledge to the real world can be challenging due to the reality gap. To this end, several methods have been recently proposed to automatically tune simulator parameters with posterior distributions given real data, for use with domain randomization at training time. These approaches have been shown to work for various robotic tasks under different settings and assumptions. Nevertheless, existing literature lacks a thorough comparison of existing adaptive domain randomization methods with respect to transfer performance and real-data efficiency. In this work, we present an open benchmark for both offline and online methods (SimOpt, BayRn, DROID, DROPO), to shed light on which are most suitable for each setting and task at hand. We found that online methods are limited by the quality of the currently learned policy for the next iteration, while offline methods may sometimes fail when replaying trajectories in simulation with open-loop commands. The code used will be released at https://github.com/gabrieletiboni/adr-benchmark.
summary: Physics simulators have shown great promise for conveniently learning reinforcement learning policies in safe, unconstrained environments. However, transferring the acquired knowledge to the real world can be challenging due to the reality gap. To this end, several methods have been recently proposed to automatically tune simulator parameters with posterior distributions given real data, for use with domain randomization at training time. These approaches have been shown to work for various robotic tasks under different settings and assumptions. Nevertheless, existing literature lacks a thorough comparison of existing adaptive domain randomization methods with respect to transfer performance and real-data efficiency. In this work, we present an open benchmark for both offline and online methods (SimOpt, BayRn, DROID, DROPO), to shed light on which are most suitable for each setting and task at hand. We found that online methods are limited by the quality of the currently learned policy for the next iteration, while offline methods may sometimes fail when replaying trajectories in simulation with open-loop commands. The code used will be released at https://github.com/gabrieletiboni/adr-benchmark.
abstract_zh: 物理模拟器已经显示出在安全、不受约束的环境中方便地学习强化学习策略的巨大前景。然而，由于现实差距，将获得的知识转移到现实世界可能具有挑战性。为此，最近提出了几种方法来根据给定真实数据的后验分布自动调整模拟器参数，以便在训练时与域随机化一起使用。这些方法已被证明适用于不同设置和假设下的各种机器人任务。然而，现有文献缺乏对现有自适应域随机化方法在传输性能和实际数据效率方面的彻底比较。在这项工作中，我们提出了离线和在线方法（SimOpt、BayRn、DROID、DROPO）的开放基准，以阐明最适合每种设置和手头任务的方法。我们发现在线方法受到下一次迭代当前学习策略的质量的限制，而离线方法在使用开环命令重放模拟中的轨迹时有时可能会失败。使用的代码将在 https://github.com/gabrieletiboni/adr-benchmark 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个开源基准，用于比较在线和离线自适应领域随机化方法在机器人任务中的迁移性能和真实数据效率。
AI.motivation: 物理模拟器虽能安全训练强化学习策略，但因现实差距导致知识迁移困难，现有方法缺乏对自适应领域随机化技术的系统性对比。
AI.method: 构建包含SimOpt、BayRn、DROID、DROPO等方法的基准，分析在线与离线方法在不同任务设置下的表现差异。
AI.result: 在线方法受限于当前策略质量，离线方法在使用开环指令回放轨迹时可能失效，不同方法适用于不同场景。
AI.conclusion: 该基准为选择适合特定任务和场景的自适应领域随机化方法提供了实证依据。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一个开源基准，用于比较在线和离线自适应领域随机化方法在机器人任务中的迁移性能和真实数据效率。
ai_content.motivation: 物理模拟器虽能安全训练强化学习策略，但因现实差距导致知识迁移困难，现有方法缺乏对自适应领域随机化技术的系统性对比。
