search_text: Online vs. Offline Adaptive Domain Randomization Benchmark 在线与离线自适应域随机化基准 Physics simulators have shown great promise for conveniently learning reinforcement learning policies in safe, unconstrained environments. However, transferring the acquired knowledge to the real world can be challenging due to the reality gap. To this end, several methods have been recently proposed to automatically tune simulator parameters with posterior distributions given real data, for use with domain randomization at training time. These approaches have been shown to work for various robotic tasks under different settings and assumptions. Nevertheless, existing literature lacks a thorough comparison of existing adaptive domain randomization methods with respect to transfer performance and real-data efficiency. In this work, we present an open benchmark for both offline and online methods (SimOpt, BayRn, DROID, DROPO), to shed light on which are most suitable for each setting and task at hand. We found that online methods are limited by the quality of the currently learned policy for the next iteration, while offline methods may sometimes fail when replaying trajectories in simulation with open-loop commands. The code used will be released at https://github.com/gabrieletiboni/adr-benchmark. 物理模拟器已经显示出在安全、不受约束的环境中方便地学习强化学习策略的巨大前景。然而，由于现实差距，将获得的知识转移到现实世界可能具有挑战性。为此，最近提出了几种方法来根据给定真实数据的后验分布自动调整模拟器参数，以便在训练时与域随机化一起使用。这些方法已被证明适用于不同设置和假设下的各种机器人任务。然而，现有文献缺乏对现有自适应域随机化方法在传输性能和实际数据效率方面的彻底比较。在这项工作中，我们提出了离线和在线方法（SimOpt、BayRn、DROID、DROPO）的开放基准，以阐明最适合每种设置和手头任务的方法。我们发现在线方法受到下一次迭代当前学习策略的质量的限制，而离线方法在使用开环命令重放模拟中的轨迹时有时可能会失败。使用的代码将在 https://github.com/gabrieletiboni/adr-benchmark 发布。 本文提出一个开源基准，用于比较在线和离线自适应领域随机化方法在机器人任务中的迁移性能和真实数据效率。 Gabriele Tiboni,Karol Arndt,Giuseppe Averta,Ville Kyrki,Tatiana Tommasi cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Jing Zhao,Haoyu Wang,Jinpeng Li,Shuzhou Chai,Guan-Bo Wang,Guoguo Chen,Wei-Qiang Zhang
title: The THUEE System Description for the IARPA OpenASR21 Challenge
title_zh: IARPA OpenASR21 挑战赛的 THUEE 系统描述
abstract: This paper describes the THUEE team's speech recognition system for the IARPA Open Automatic Speech Recognition Challenge (OpenASR21), with further experiment explorations. We achieve outstanding results under both the Constrained and Constrained-plus training conditions. For the Constrained training condition, we construct our basic ASR system based on the standard hybrid architecture. To alleviate the Out-Of-Vocabulary (OOV) problem, we extend the pronunciation lexicon using Grapheme-to-Phoneme (G2P) techniques for both OOV and potential new words. Standard acoustic model structures such as CNN-TDNN-F and CNN-TDNN-F-A are adopted. In addition, multiple data augmentation techniques are applied. For the Constrained-plus training condition, we use the self-supervised learning framework wav2vec2.0. We experiment with various fine-tuning techniques with the Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) criterion on top of the publicly available pre-trained model XLSR-53. We find that the frontend feature extractor plays an important role when applying the wav2vec2.0 pre-trained model to the encoder-decoder based CTC/Attention ASR architecture. Extra improvements can be achieved by using the CTC model finetuned in the target language as the frontend feature extractor.
summary: This paper describes the THUEE team's speech recognition system for the IARPA Open Automatic Speech Recognition Challenge (OpenASR21), with further experiment explorations. We achieve outstanding results under both the Constrained and Constrained-plus training conditions. For the Constrained training condition, we construct our basic ASR system based on the standard hybrid architecture. To alleviate the Out-Of-Vocabulary (OOV) problem, we extend the pronunciation lexicon using Grapheme-to-Phoneme (G2P) techniques for both OOV and potential new words. Standard acoustic model structures such as CNN-TDNN-F and CNN-TDNN-F-A are adopted. In addition, multiple data augmentation techniques are applied. For the Constrained-plus training condition, we use the self-supervised learning framework wav2vec2.0. We experiment with various fine-tuning techniques with the Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) criterion on top of the publicly available pre-trained model XLSR-53. We find that the frontend feature extractor plays an important role when applying the wav2vec2.0 pre-trained model to the encoder-decoder based CTC/Attention ASR architecture. Extra improvements can be achieved by using the CTC model finetuned in the target language as the frontend feature extractor.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 THUEE 团队针对 IARPA 开放自动语音识别挑战赛（OpenASR21）的语音识别系统，并进行了进一步的实验探索。我们在约束和约束加训练条件下都取得了出色的成绩。对于约束训练条件，我们基于标准混合架构构建了基本的 ASR 系统。为了缓解词汇外 (OOV) 问题，我们使用字形到音素 (G2P) 技术来扩展 OOV 和潜在新单词的发音词典。采用CNN-TDNN-F、CNN-TDNN-F-A等标准声学模型结构。此外，还应用了多种数据增强技术。对于Constrained-plus训练条件，我们使用自监督学习框架wav2vec2.0。我们在公开的预训练模型 XLSR-53 之上，使用联结主义时间分类 (CTC) 标准试验了各种微调技术。我们发现，当将 wav2vec2.0 预训练模型应用于基于编码器-解码器的 CTC/Attention ASR 架构时，前端特征提取器发挥着重要作用。通过使用在目标语言中微调的 CTC 模型作为前端特征提取器，可以实现额外的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了THUEE团队在IARPA OpenASR21挑战赛中的语音识别系统设计与实验探索。
AI.motivation: 为了解决受限训练条件下语音识别中的词汇外（OOV）问题并提升模型性能，探索基于自监督学习的改进方法。
AI.method: 在受限条件下构建混合架构ASR系统，采用G2P扩展词典、CNN-TDNN-F/A模型及数据增强；在受限加条件下使用wav2vec2.0框架，结合XLSR-53预训练模型进行CTC微调，并优化前端特征提取器设计。
AI.result: 在受限及受限加训练条件下均取得优异识别结果，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 扩展词典与自监督学习结合能显著提升ASR性能，前端特征提取器优化对编码器-解码器架构有关键作用。

authors_text: Andrew Koh,Eng Siong Chng
title: Language-Based Audio Retrieval with Converging Tied Layers and Contrastive Loss
title_zh: 具有收敛绑定层和对比损失的基于语言的音频检索
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the new Language-Based Audio Retrieval task proposed in DCASE 2022. Firstly, we introduce a simple, scalable architecture which ties both the audio and text encoder together. Secondly, we show that using this architecture along with contrastive loss allows the model to significantly beat the performance of the baseline model. Finally, in addition to having an extremely low training memory requirement, we are able to use pretrained models as it is without needing to finetune them. We test our methods and show that using a combination of our methods beats the baseline scores significantly.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the new Language-Based Audio Retrieval task proposed in DCASE 2022. Firstly, we introduce a simple, scalable architecture which ties both the audio and text encoder together. Secondly, we show that using this architecture along with contrastive loss allows the model to significantly beat the performance of the baseline model. Finally, in addition to having an extremely low training memory requirement, we are able to use pretrained models as it is without needing to finetune them. We test our methods and show that using a combination of our methods beats the baseline scores significantly.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了 DCASE 2022 中提出的新的基于语言的音频检索任务。首先，我们介绍了一种简单的、可扩展的架构，它将音频和文本编码器连接在一起。其次，我们表明，使用这种架构以及对比损失可以使模型显着优于基线模型的性能。最后，除了训练内存要求极低之外，我们还能够按原样使用预训练模型，而无需对其进行微调。我们测试了我们的方法，结果表明，使用我们的方法组合可以显着优于基线分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语言的音频检索方法，通过结合音频和文本编码器并使用对比损失来提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 为了解决现有音频检索方法在跨模态对齐和训练效率上的不足，提出一种简单可扩展的联合编码架构以提升性能并降低资源需求。
AI.method: 设计了音频与文本编码器的联合架构，采用对比损失进行训练，并直接使用预训练模型而无需微调。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在DCASE 2022基准测试中显著优于基线模型，同时训练内存消耗极低。
AI.conclusion: 联合编码架构与对比损失的结合能有效提升语言基音频检索性能，且具有高效的训练资源利用优势。

authors_text: Bo-Kyeong Kim,Shinkook Choi,Hancheol Park
title: Cut Inner Layers: A Structured Pruning Strategy for Efficient U-Net GANs
title_zh: 切割内层：高效 U-Net GAN 的结构化剪枝策略
comment: ICML Workshop on Hardware Aware Efficient Training, 2022
comments: ICML Workshop on Hardware Aware Efficient Training, 2022
abstract: Pruning effectively compresses overparameterized models. Despite the success of pruning methods for discriminative models, applying them for generative models has been relatively rarely approached. This study conducts structured pruning on U-Net generators of conditional GANs. A per-layer sensitivity analysis confirms that many unnecessary filters exist in the innermost layers near the bottleneck and can be substantially pruned. Based on this observation, we prune these filters from multiple inner layers or suggest alternative architectures by completely eliminating the layers. We evaluate our approach with Pix2Pix for image-to-image translation and Wav2Lip for speech-driven talking face generation. Our method outperforms global pruning baselines, demonstrating the importance of properly considering where to prune for U-Net generators.
summary: Pruning effectively compresses overparameterized models. Despite the success of pruning methods for discriminative models, applying them for generative models has been relatively rarely approached. This study conducts structured pruning on U-Net generators of conditional GANs. A per-layer sensitivity analysis confirms that many unnecessary filters exist in the innermost layers near the bottleneck and can be substantially pruned. Based on this observation, we prune these filters from multiple inner layers or suggest alternative architectures by completely eliminating the layers. We evaluate our approach with Pix2Pix for image-to-image translation and Wav2Lip for speech-driven talking face generation. Our method outperforms global pruning baselines, demonstrating the importance of properly considering where to prune for U-Net generators.
abstract_zh: 剪枝有效地压缩了过度参数化的模型。尽管判别模型的剪枝方法取得了成功，但将它们应用于生成模型的方法相对较少。本研究对条件 GAN 的 U-Net 生成器进行结构化剪枝。每层敏感性分析证实，在瓶颈附近的最内层中存在许多不必要的过滤器，并且可以被大幅修剪。基于这一观察，我们从多个内层中修剪这些过滤器，或者通过完全消除这些层来建议替代架构。我们使用用于图像到图像转换的 Pix2Pix 和用于语音驱动的说话脸部生成的 Wav2Lip 来评估我们的方法。我们的方法优于全局剪枝基线，证明了正确考虑 U-Net 生成器剪枝位置的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对U-Net生成对抗网络（GAN）的结构化剪枝策略，通过移除内部层的冗余滤波器提升模型效率。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法多用于判别模型，而生成模型（如GAN）的剪枝研究较少。U-Net生成器内部层存在大量冗余参数，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 基于每层敏感性分析，识别并移除瓶颈附近内部层的冗余滤波器，或直接删除整层。在Pix2Pix和Wav2Lip任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 所提方法优于全局剪枝基线，在保持生成质量的同时显著减少参数量和计算量。
AI.conclusion: 针对U-Net生成器内部结构的剪枝策略能有效提升效率，为生成模型压缩提供新思路。

search_text: Cut Inner Layers: A Structured Pruning Strategy for Efficient U-Net GANs 切割内层：高效 U-Net GAN 的结构化剪枝策略 Pruning effectively compresses overparameterized models. Despite the success of pruning methods for discriminative models, applying them for generative models has been relatively rarely approached. This study conducts structured pruning on U-Net generators of conditional GANs. A per-layer sensitivity analysis confirms that many unnecessary filters exist in the innermost layers near the bottleneck and can be substantially pruned. Based on this observation, we prune these filters from multiple inner layers or suggest alternative architectures by completely eliminating the layers. We evaluate our approach with Pix2Pix for image-to-image translation and Wav2Lip for speech-driven talking face generation. Our method outperforms global pruning baselines, demonstrating the importance of properly considering where to prune for U-Net generators. 剪枝有效地压缩了过度参数化的模型。尽管判别模型的剪枝方法取得了成功，但将它们应用于生成模型的方法相对较少。本研究对条件 GAN 的 U-Net 生成器进行结构化剪枝。每层敏感性分析证实，在瓶颈附近的最内层中存在许多不必要的过滤器，并且可以被大幅修剪。基于这一观察，我们从多个内层中修剪这些过滤器，或者通过完全消除这些层来建议替代架构。我们使用用于图像到图像转换的 Pix2Pix 和用于语音驱动的说话脸部生成的 Wav2Lip 来评估我们的方法。我们的方法优于全局剪枝基线，证明了正确考虑 U-Net 生成器剪枝位置的重要性。 本文提出一种针对U-Net生成对抗网络（GAN）的结构化剪枝策略，通过移除内部层的冗余滤波器提升模型效率。 Bo-Kyeong Kim,Shinkook Choi,Hancheol Park cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Nir Aharon,Roy Orfaig,Ben-Zion Bobrovsky
title: BoT-SORT: Robust Associations Multi-Pedestrian Tracking
title_zh: BoT-SORT：强大的关联多人行人跟踪
abstract: The goal of multi-object tracking (MOT) is detecting and tracking all the objects in a scene, while keeping a unique identifier for each object. In this paper, we present a new robust state-of-the-art tracker, which can combine the advantages of motion and appearance information, along with camera-motion compensation, and a more accurate Kalman filter state vector. Our new trackers BoT-SORT, and BoT-SORT-ReID rank first in the datasets of MOTChallenge [29, 11] on both MOT17 and MOT20 test sets, in terms of all the main MOT metrics: MOTA, IDF1, and HOTA. For MOT17: 80.5 MOTA, 80.2 IDF1, and 65.0 HOTA are achieved. The source code and the pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/NirAharon/BOT-SORT
summary: The goal of multi-object tracking (MOT) is detecting and tracking all the objects in a scene, while keeping a unique identifier for each object. In this paper, we present a new robust state-of-the-art tracker, which can combine the advantages of motion and appearance information, along with camera-motion compensation, and a more accurate Kalman filter state vector. Our new trackers BoT-SORT, and BoT-SORT-ReID rank first in the datasets of MOTChallenge [29, 11] on both MOT17 and MOT20 test sets, in terms of all the main MOT metrics: MOTA, IDF1, and HOTA. For MOT17: 80.5 MOTA, 80.2 IDF1, and 65.0 HOTA are achieved. The source code and the pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/NirAharon/BOT-SORT
abstract_zh: 多对象跟踪 (MOT) 的目标是检测和跟踪场景中的所有对象，同时为每个对象保留唯一的标识符。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的鲁棒的最先进的跟踪器，它可以结合运动和外观信息的优点，以及相机运动补偿和更准确的卡尔曼滤波器状态向量。我们的新跟踪器 BoT-SORT 和 BoT-SORT-ReID 在 MOT17 和 MOT20 测试集上的 MOTchallenge [29, 11] 数据集中排名第一，就所有主要 MOT 指标而言：MOTA、IDF1 和 HOTA。对于 MOT17：实现了 80.5 MOTA、80.2 IDF1 和 65.0 HOTA。源代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/NirAharon/BOT-SORT 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BoT-SORT的鲁棒多行人跟踪算法，结合运动和外观信息以提升跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪器在复杂场景下因无法有效融合运动信息与外观特征，导致跟踪精度不足。
AI.method: 通过整合运动与外观信息、相机运动补偿及改进的卡尔曼滤波状态向量，实现更准确的轨迹关联。
AI.result: 在MOT17和MOT20数据集上，BoT-SORT分别达到80.5 MOTA、80.2 IDF1和65.0 HOTA，位列第一。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多模态信息融合显著提升了多行人跟踪的鲁棒性，为后续研究提供了有效方案。

authors_text: Tianwei Cao,Qianqian Xu,Zhiyong Yang,Qingming Huang
title: Meta-Wrapper: Differentiable Wrapping Operator for User Interest Selection in CTR Prediction
title_zh: Meta-Wrapper：用于 CTR 预测中用户兴趣选择的可微分包装算子
abstract: Click-through rate (CTR) prediction, whose goal is to predict the probability of the user to click on an item, has become increasingly significant in the recommender systems. Recently, some deep learning models with the ability to automatically extract the user interest from his/her behaviors have achieved great success. In these work, the attention mechanism is used to select the user interested items in historical behaviors, improving the performance of the CTR predictor. Normally, these attentive modules can be jointly trained with the base predictor by using gradient descents. In this paper, we regard user interest modeling as a feature selection problem, which we call user interest selection. For such a problem, we propose a novel approach under the framework of the wrapper method, which is named Meta-Wrapper. More specifically, we use a differentiable module as our wrapping operator and then recast its learning problem as a continuous bilevel optimization. Moreover, we use a meta-learning algorithm to solve the optimization and theoretically prove its convergence. Meanwhile, we also provide theoretical analysis to show that our proposed method 1) efficiencies the wrapper-based feature selection, and 2) achieves better resistance to overfitting. Finally, extensive experiments on three public datasets manifest the superiority of our method in boosting the performance of CTR prediction.
summary: Click-through rate (CTR) prediction, whose goal is to predict the probability of the user to click on an item, has become increasingly significant in the recommender systems. Recently, some deep learning models with the ability to automatically extract the user interest from his/her behaviors have achieved great success. In these work, the attention mechanism is used to select the user interested items in historical behaviors, improving the performance of the CTR predictor. Normally, these attentive modules can be jointly trained with the base predictor by using gradient descents. In this paper, we regard user interest modeling as a feature selection problem, which we call user interest selection. For such a problem, we propose a novel approach under the framework of the wrapper method, which is named Meta-Wrapper. More specifically, we use a differentiable module as our wrapping operator and then recast its learning problem as a continuous bilevel optimization. Moreover, we use a meta-learning algorithm to solve the optimization and theoretically prove its convergence. Meanwhile, we also provide theoretical analysis to show that our proposed method 1) efficiencies the wrapper-based feature selection, and 2) achieves better resistance to overfitting. Finally, extensive experiments on three public datasets manifest the superiority of our method in boosting the performance of CTR prediction.
abstract_zh: 点击率（CTR）预测，其目标是预测用户点击某个项目的概率，在推荐系统中变得越来越重要。最近，一些能够从用户行为中自动提取用户兴趣的深度学习模型取得了巨大成功。在这些工作中，注意力机制用于选择历史行为中用户感兴趣的项目，提高了CTR预测器的性能。通常，这些注意力模块可以通过使用梯度下降与基本预测器联合训练。在本文中，我们将用户兴趣建模视为特征选择问题，我们称之为用户兴趣选择。针对这样的问题，我们在包装器方法的框架下提出了一种新颖的方法，称为Meta-Wrapper。更具体地说，我们使用可微模块作为包装算子，然后将其学习问题重新构建为连续双层优化。此外，我们使用元学习算法来解决优化问题，并从理论上证明了其收敛性。同时，我们还提供了理论分析来表明我们提出的方法1）提高了基于包装器的特征选择的效率，2）实现了更好的抗过度拟合能力。最后，对三个公共数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的方法在提高 CTR 预测性能方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Meta-Wrapper的可微包装算子，通过用户兴趣选择提升点击率（CTR）预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于注意力机制的用户兴趣选择方法在特征选择效率和过拟合抵抗能力上存在不足，需更高效的优化框架。
AI.method: 将用户兴趣建模为特征选择问题，设计可微包装算子并构建连续双层优化问题，结合元学习算法求解并提供收敛性证明。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有CTR预测方法。
AI.conclusion: Meta-Wrapper通过理论分析和实验验证，在特征选择效率和过拟合抵抗方面具有优势，有效提升CTR预测性能。

Moreover, we use a meta-learning algorithm to solve the optimization and theoretically prove its convergence. Meanwhile, we also provide theoretical analysis to show that our proposed method 1) efficiencies the wrapper-based feature selection, and 2) achieves better resistance to overfitting. Finally, extensive experiments on three public datasets manifest the superiority of our method in boosting the performance of CTR prediction. 点击率（CTR）预测，其目标是预测用户点击某个项目的概率，在推荐系统中变得越来越重要。最近，一些能够从用户行为中自动提取用户兴趣的深度学习模型取得了巨大成功。在这些工作中，注意力机制用于选择历史行为中用户感兴趣的项目，提高了CTR预测器的性能。通常，这些注意力模块可以通过使用梯度下降与基本预测器联合训练。在本文中，我们将用户兴趣建模视为特征选择问题，我们称之为用户兴趣选择。针对这样的问题，我们在包装器方法的框架下提出了一种新颖的方法，称为Meta-Wrapper。更具体地说，我们使用可微模块作为包装算子，然后将其学习问题重新构建为连续双层优化。此外，我们使用元学习算法来解决优化问题，并从理论上证明了其收敛性。同时，我们还提供了理论分析来表明我们提出的方法1）提高了基于包装器的特征选择的效率，2）实现了更好的抗过度拟合能力。最后，对三个公共数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的方法在提高 CTR 预测性能方面的优越性。 本文提出一种名为Meta-Wrapper的可微包装算子，通过用户兴趣选择提升点击率（CTR）预测性能。 Tianwei Cao,Qianqian Xu,Zhiyong Yang,Qingming Huang cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Peter Makarov,Ammar Abbas,Mateusz Łajszczak,Arnaud Joly,Sri Karlapati,Alexis Moinet,Thomas Drugman,Penny Karanasou
title: Simple and Effective Multi-sentence TTS with Expressive and Coherent Prosody
title_zh: 简单有效的多句 TTS，韵律富有表现力和连贯性
comment: Accepted to be published in the Proceedings of InterSpeech 2022
comments: Accepted to be published in the Proceedings of InterSpeech 2022
abstract: Generating expressive and contextually appropriate prosody remains a challenge for modern text-to-speech (TTS) systems. This is particularly evident for long, multi-sentence inputs. In this paper, we examine simple extensions to a Transformer-based FastSpeech-like system, with the goal of improving prosody for multi-sentence TTS. We find that long context, powerful text features, and training on multi-speaker data all improve prosody. More interestingly, they result in synergies. Long context disambiguates prosody, improves coherence, and plays to the strengths of Transformers. Fine-tuning word-level features from a powerful language model, such as BERT, appears to profit from more training data, readily available in a multi-speaker setting. We look into objective metrics on pausing and pacing and perform thorough subjective evaluations for speech naturalness. Our main system, which incorporates all the extensions, achieves consistently strong results, including statistically significant improvements in speech naturalness over all its competitors.
summary: Generating expressive and contextually appropriate prosody remains a challenge for modern text-to-speech (TTS) systems. This is particularly evident for long, multi-sentence inputs. In this paper, we examine simple extensions to a Transformer-based FastSpeech-like system, with the goal of improving prosody for multi-sentence TTS. We find that long context, powerful text features, and training on multi-speaker data all improve prosody. More interestingly, they result in synergies. Long context disambiguates prosody, improves coherence, and plays to the strengths of Transformers. Fine-tuning word-level features from a powerful language model, such as BERT, appears to profit from more training data, readily available in a multi-speaker setting. We look into objective metrics on pausing and pacing and perform thorough subjective evaluations for speech naturalness. Our main system, which incorporates all the extensions, achieves consistently strong results, including statistically significant improvements in speech naturalness over all its competitors.
abstract_zh: 生成富有表现力且适合上下文的韵律仍然是现代文本转语音 (TTS) 系统的一个挑战。这对于长的多句子输入尤其明显。在本文中，我们研究了基于 Transformer 的 FastSpeech 类系统的简单扩展，目标是改进多句 TTS 的韵律。我们发现长上下文、强大的文本特征以及多说话人数据的训练都可以改善韵律。更有趣的是，它们会产生协同效应。长上下文消除了韵律的歧义，提高了连贯性，并发挥了变形金刚的优势。从强大的语言模型（例如 BERT）中微调字级特征似乎可以从更多的训练数据中获益，这些数据可以在多说话者环境中轻松获得。我们研究有关停顿和节奏的客观指标，并对语音自然度进行彻底的主观评估。我们的主系统包含所有扩展，始终取得强劲成果，包括在语音自然度方面比所有竞争对手在统计上显着改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进多句文本到语音（TTS）系统中表达性和连贯性韵律的方法。
AI.motivation: 现代TTS系统在处理长文本或多句输入时，难以生成符合上下文且富有表现力的韵律。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的FastSpeech模型，引入长上下文、强大的文本特征（如BERT）以及多说话人数据训练，并探索其协同效应。
AI.result: 主系统在停顿和节奏的客观指标及语音自然度的主观评估中均显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合长上下文、语言模型特征与多说话人数据可有效提升多句TTS的韵律表现。

authors_text: Yael Segal,Kasia Hitczenko,Matthew Goldrick,Adam Buchwald,Angela Roberts,Joseph Keshet
title: DDKtor: Automatic Diadochokinetic Speech Analysis
title_zh: DDKtor：自动双动动力学语音分析
abstract: Diadochokinetic speech tasks (DDK), in which participants repeatedly produce syllables, are commonly used as part of the assessment of speech motor impairments. These studies rely on manual analyses that are time-intensive, subjective, and provide only a coarse-grained picture of speech. This paper presents two deep neural network models that automatically segment consonants and vowels from unannotated, untranscribed speech. Both models work on the raw waveform and use convolutional layers for feature extraction. The first model is based on an LSTM classifier followed by fully connected layers, while the second model adds more convolutional layers followed by fully connected layers. These segmentations predicted by the models are used to obtain measures of speech rate and sound duration. Results on a young healthy individuals dataset show that our LSTM model outperforms the current state-of-the-art systems and performs comparably to trained human annotators. Moreover, the LSTM model also presents comparable results to trained human annotators when evaluated on unseen older individuals with Parkinson's Disease dataset.
summary: Diadochokinetic speech tasks (DDK), in which participants repeatedly produce syllables, are commonly used as part of the assessment of speech motor impairments. These studies rely on manual analyses that are time-intensive, subjective, and provide only a coarse-grained picture of speech. This paper presents two deep neural network models that automatically segment consonants and vowels from unannotated, untranscribed speech. Both models work on the raw waveform and use convolutional layers for feature extraction. The first model is based on an LSTM classifier followed by fully connected layers, while the second model adds more convolutional layers followed by fully connected layers. These segmentations predicted by the models are used to obtain measures of speech rate and sound duration. Results on a young healthy individuals dataset show that our LSTM model outperforms the current state-of-the-art systems and performs comparably to trained human annotators. Moreover, the LSTM model also presents comparable results to trained human annotators when evaluated on unseen older individuals with Parkinson's Disease dataset.
abstract_zh: 双动动力学言语任务（DDK），其中参与者重复产生音节，通常用作言语运动障碍评估的一部分。这些研究依赖于耗时、主观的手动分析，并且仅提供粗粒度的语音图像。本文提出了两种深度神经网络模型，可以从未注释、未转录的语音中自动分割辅音和元音。两种模型都处理原始波形并使用卷积层进行特征提取。第一个模型基于 LSTM 分类器，后跟全连接层，而第二个模型添加更多卷积层，后跟全连接层。模型预测的这些分段用于获取语速和声音持续时间的测量。年轻健康个体数据集的结果表明，我们的 LSTM 模型优于当前最先进的系统，并且与训练有素的人类注释者的性能相当。此外，当使用帕金森病数据集对看不见的老年人进行评估时，LSTM 模型还提供了与训练有素的人类注释者相当的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出两种深度神经网络模型自动分割DDK语音中的辅音和元音，以评估言语运动障碍。
AI.motivation: 传统DDK分析依赖人工，耗时且主观，需自动化方法提高效率和客观性。
AI.method: 采用两种深度神经网络模型：LSTM分类器加全连接层，及增加卷积层的模型，均基于原始波形和卷积特征提取。
AI.result: LSTM模型在健康数据集上优于现有系统，且在帕金森病数据集上表现与人类标注者相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效，可作为自动化工具辅助临床评估言语运动障碍。

authors_text: Jesús Andrés-Ferrer,Dario Albesano,Puming Zhan,Paul Vozila
title: Contextual Density Ratio for Language Model Biasing of Sequence to Sequence ASR Systems
title_zh: 序列到序列 ASR 系统语言模型偏差的上下文密度比
abstract: End-2-end (E2E) models have become increasingly popular in some ASR tasks because of their performance and advantages. These E2E models directly approximate the posterior distribution of tokens given the acoustic inputs. Consequently, the E2E systems implicitly define a language model (LM) over the output tokens, which makes the exploitation of independently trained language models less straightforward than in conventional ASR systems. This makes it difficult to dynamically adapt E2E ASR system to contextual profiles for better recognizing special words such as named entities. In this work, we propose a contextual density ratio approach for both training a contextual aware E2E model and adapting the language model to named entities. We apply the aforementioned technique to an E2E ASR system, which transcribes doctor and patient conversations, for better adapting the E2E system to the names in the conversations. Our proposed technique achieves a relative improvement of up to 46.5% on the names over an E2E baseline without degrading the overall recognition accuracy of the whole test set. Moreover, it also surpasses a contextual shallow fusion baseline by 22.1 % relative.
summary: End-2-end (E2E) models have become increasingly popular in some ASR tasks because of their performance and advantages. These E2E models directly approximate the posterior distribution of tokens given the acoustic inputs. Consequently, the E2E systems implicitly define a language model (LM) over the output tokens, which makes the exploitation of independently trained language models less straightforward than in conventional ASR systems. This makes it difficult to dynamically adapt E2E ASR system to contextual profiles for better recognizing special words such as named entities. In this work, we propose a contextual density ratio approach for both training a contextual aware E2E model and adapting the language model to named entities. We apply the aforementioned technique to an E2E ASR system, which transcribes doctor and patient conversations, for better adapting the E2E system to the names in the conversations. Our proposed technique achieves a relative improvement of up to 46.5% on the names over an E2E baseline without degrading the overall recognition accuracy of the whole test set. Moreover, it also surpasses a contextual shallow fusion baseline by 22.1 % relative.
abstract_zh: 端到端（E2E）模型因其性能和优势而在一些 ASR 任务中变得越来越流行。这些 E2E 模型直接近似给定声学输入的标记的后验分布。因此，E2E 系统在输出标记上隐式定义语言模型 (LM)，这使得独立训练的语言模型的利用不像传统 ASR 系统那么简单。这使得端到端 ASR 系统难以动态地适应上下文配置文件，以更好地识别特殊单词（例如命名实体）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种上下文密度比方法，用于训练上下文感知的 E2E 模型并使语言模型适应命名实体。我们将上述技术应用于 E2E ASR 系统，该系统转录医生和患者的对话，以便更好地使 E2E 系统适应对话中的姓名。我们提出的技术在 E2E 基线上实现了高达 46.5% 的名称相对改进，而不会降低整个测试集的整体识别准确性。此外，它还相对于上下文浅融合基线超出了 22.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文密度比的方法，用于改进端到端语音识别系统（E2E ASR）对上下文（如专有名词）的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 端到端模型隐式定义语言模型，导致难以动态调整以适应特定上下文（如专有名词），影响特殊词汇的识别效果。
AI.method: 通过引入上下文密度比技术，训练上下文感知的E2E模型，并调整语言模型以适应对话中的专有名词（如人名）。
AI.result: 在医生-患者对话场景中，专有名词识别相对提升46.5%，整体识别准确率未下降，且优于浅层融合基线22.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了E2E系统对上下文的适应性，尤其在专有名词识别上表现显著，且保持整体性能稳定。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文密度比的方法，用于改进端到端语音识别系统（E2E ASR）对上下文（如专有名词）的适应能力。
ai_content.motivation: 端到端模型隐式定义语言模型，导致难以动态调整以适应特定上下文（如专有名词），影响特殊词汇的识别效果。

ai_content.result: 在医生-患者对话场景中，专有名词识别相对提升46.5%，整体识别准确率未下降，且优于浅层融合基线22.1%。

search_text: Contextual Density Ratio for Language Model Biasing of Sequence to Sequence ASR Systems 序列到序列 ASR 系统语言模型偏差的上下文密度比 End-2-end (E2E) models have become increasingly popular in some ASR tasks because of their performance and advantages. These E2E models directly approximate the posterior distribution of tokens given the acoustic inputs. Consequently, the E2E systems implicitly define a language model (LM) over the output tokens, which makes the exploitation of independently trained language models less straightforward than in conventional ASR systems. This makes it difficult to dynamically adapt E2E ASR system to contextual profiles for better recognizing special words such as named entities. In this work, we propose a contextual density ratio approach for both training a contextual aware E2E model and adapting the language model to named entities. We apply the aforementioned technique to an E2E ASR system, which transcribes doctor and patient conversations, for better adapting the E2E system to the names in the conversations. Our proposed technique achieves a relative improvement of up to 46.5% on the names over an E2E baseline without degrading the overall recognition accuracy of the whole test set. Moreover, it also surpasses a contextual shallow fusion baseline by 22.1 % relative. 端到端（E2E）模型因其性能和优势而在一些 ASR 任务中变得越来越流行。这些 E2E 模型直接近似给定声学输入的标记的后验分布。因此，E2E 系统在输出标记上隐式定义语言模型 (LM)，这使得独立训练的语言模型的利用不像传统 ASR 系统那么简单。这使得端到端 ASR 系统难以动态地适应上下文配置文件，以更好地识别特殊单词（例如命名实体）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种上下文密度比方法，用于训练上下文感知的 E2E 模型并使语言模型适应命名实体。我们将上述技术应用于 E2E ASR 系统，该系统转录医生和患者的对话，以便更好地使 E2E 系统适应对话中的姓名。我们提出的技术在 E2E 基线上实现了高达 46.5% 的名称相对改进，而不会降低整个测试集的整体识别准确性。此外，它还相对于上下文浅融合基线超出了 22.1%。 本文提出一种基于上下文密度比的方法，用于改进端到端语音识别系统（E2E ASR）对上下文（如专有名词）的适应能力。 Jesús Andrés-Ferrer,Dario Albesano,Puming Zhan,Paul Vozila eess.AS,cs.AI

authors_text: Dario Albesano,Jesús Andrés-Ferrer,Nicola Ferri,Puming Zhan
title: On the Prediction Network Architecture in RNN-T for ASR
title_zh: ASR 中 RNN-T 的预测网络架构
abstract: RNN-T models have gained popularity in the literature and in commercial systems because of their competitiveness and capability of operating in online streaming mode. In this work, we conduct an extensive study comparing several prediction network architectures for both monotonic and original RNN-T models. We compare 4 types of prediction networks based on a common state-of-the-art Conformer encoder and report results obtained on Librispeech and an internal medical conversation data set. Our study covers both offline batch-mode and online streaming scenarios. In contrast to some previous works, our results show that Transformer does not always outperform LSTM when used as prediction network along with Conformer encoder. Inspired by our scoreboard, we propose a new simple prediction network architecture, N-Concat, that outperforms the others in our on-line streaming benchmark. Transformer and n-gram reduced architectures perform very similarly yet with some important distinct behaviour in terms of previous context. Overall we obtained up to 4.1 % relative WER improvement compared to our LSTM baseline, while reducing prediction network parameters by nearly an order of magnitude (8.4 times).
summary: RNN-T models have gained popularity in the literature and in commercial systems because of their competitiveness and capability of operating in online streaming mode. In this work, we conduct an extensive study comparing several prediction network architectures for both monotonic and original RNN-T models. We compare 4 types of prediction networks based on a common state-of-the-art Conformer encoder and report results obtained on Librispeech and an internal medical conversation data set. Our study covers both offline batch-mode and online streaming scenarios. In contrast to some previous works, our results show that Transformer does not always outperform LSTM when used as prediction network along with Conformer encoder. Inspired by our scoreboard, we propose a new simple prediction network architecture, N-Concat, that outperforms the others in our on-line streaming benchmark. Transformer and n-gram reduced architectures perform very similarly yet with some important distinct behaviour in terms of previous context. Overall we obtained up to 4.1 % relative WER improvement compared to our LSTM baseline, while reducing prediction network parameters by nearly an order of magnitude (8.4 times).
abstract_zh: RNN-T 模型因其竞争力和在线流模式运行的能力而在文献和商业系统中广受欢迎。在这项工作中，我们进行了广泛的研究，比较了单调模型和原始 RNN-T 模型的几种预测网络架构。我们比较了基于常见的最先进的 Conformer 编码器的 4 种类型的预测网络，并报告了在 Librispeech 和内部医学对话数据集上获得的结果。我们的研究涵盖了离线批处理模式和在线流媒体场景。与之前的一些工作相比，我们的结果表明，当与 Conformer 编码器一起用作预测网络时，Transformer 并不总是优于 LSTM。受记分板的启发，我们提出了一种新的简单预测网络架构 N-Concat，它在我们的在线流媒体基准测试中优于其他网络架构。 Transformer 和 n-gram 精简架构的性能非常相似，但在之前的上下文中具有一些重要的不同行为。总体而言，与 LSTM 基线相比，我们获得了高达 4.1% 的相对 WER 改进，同时将预测网络参数减少了近一个数量级（8.4 倍）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了RNN-T模型中预测网络架构对语音识别性能的影响，比较了多种架构并提出新的N-Concat架构。
AI.motivation: RNN-T模型虽具竞争力，但预测网络架构选择对其性能影响显著，需探索更优架构以提升效果并减少参数量。
AI.method: 基于Conformer编码器，比较了4种预测网络架构（含Transformer/LSTM），在Librispeech和医疗数据集上测试离线与在线场景，提出新架构N-Concat。
AI.result: N-Concat架构在在线流测试中优于其他模型，相对WER降低4.1%，参数量减少8.4倍；Transformer与n-gram架构表现相近但上下文处理有差异。
AI.conclusion: N-Concat架构有效平衡性能与参数效率，Transformer并非始终优于LSTM，预测网络设计需结合任务特性优化。

In this work, we conduct an extensive study comparing several prediction network architectures for both monotonic and original RNN-T models. We compare 4 types of prediction networks based on a common state-of-the-art Conformer encoder and report results obtained on Librispeech and an internal medical conversation data set. Our study covers both offline batch-mode and online streaming scenarios. In contrast to some previous works, our results show that Transformer does not always outperform LSTM when used as prediction network along with Conformer encoder. Inspired by our scoreboard, we propose a new simple prediction network architecture, N-Concat, that outperforms the others in our on-line streaming benchmark. Transformer and n-gram reduced architectures perform very similarly yet with some important distinct behaviour in terms of previous context. Overall we obtained up to 4.1 % relative WER improvement compared to our LSTM baseline, while reducing prediction network parameters by nearly an order of magnitude (8.4 times). authors_text: Hany Farid
title: Perspective (In)consistency of Paint by Text
title_zh: 文本绘制的透视（内部）一致性
abstract: Type "a sea otter with a pearl earring by Johannes Vermeer" or "a photo of a teddy bear on a skateboard in Times Square" into OpenAI's DALL-E-2 paint-by-text synthesis engine and you will not be disappointed by the delightful and eerily pertinent results. The ability to synthesize highly realistic images -- with seemingly no limitation other than our imagination -- is sure to yield many exciting and creative applications. These images are also likely to pose new challenges to the photo-forensic community. Motivated by the fact that paint by text is not based on explicit geometric modeling, and the human visual system's often obliviousness to even glaring geometric inconsistencies, we provide an initial exploration of the perspective consistency of DALL-E-2 synthesized images to determine if geometric-based forensic analyses will prove fruitful in detecting this new breed of synthetic media.
summary: Type "a sea otter with a pearl earring by Johannes Vermeer" or "a photo of a teddy bear on a skateboard in Times Square" into OpenAI's DALL-E-2 paint-by-text synthesis engine and you will not be disappointed by the delightful and eerily pertinent results. The ability to synthesize highly realistic images -- with seemingly no limitation other than our imagination -- is sure to yield many exciting and creative applications. These images are also likely to pose new challenges to the photo-forensic community. Motivated by the fact that paint by text is not based on explicit geometric modeling, and the human visual system's often obliviousness to even glaring geometric inconsistencies, we provide an initial exploration of the perspective consistency of DALL-E-2 synthesized images to determine if geometric-based forensic analyses will prove fruitful in detecting this new breed of synthetic media.
abstract_zh: 在 OpenAI 的 DALL-E-2 逐文本绘画合成引擎中输入“约翰内斯·维米尔 (Johannes Vermeer) 创作的戴着珍珠耳环的海獭”或“时代广场滑板上泰迪熊的照片”，您将不会对令人愉悦且出奇相关的结果感到失望。合成高度逼真的图像的能力——除了我们的想象力之外似乎没有任何限制——肯定会产生许多令人兴奋和创造性的应用。这些图像也可能给照片取证界带来新的挑战。受文本绘制并非基于显式几何建模这一事实的启发，并且人类视觉系统常常忽视甚至明显的几何不一致，我们对 DALL-E-2 合成图像的透视一致性进行了初步探索，以确定基于几何的取证分析是否能够在检测这种新型合成媒体方面取得成果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究DALL-E-2生成图像的视角一致性，探索基于几何的取证方法是否能有效检测文本生成的合成图像。
AI.motivation: 文本生成图像不依赖几何建模，且人类视觉系统对几何错误不敏感，因此需要验证几何分析在检测此类合成图像中的可行性。
AI.method: 通过分析DALL-E-2生成图像的几何特征，检测其视角一致性并评估基于几何的取证方法的有效性。
AI.result: 初步发现DALL-E-2生成图像存在几何不一致现象，表明基于几何的取证分析可能对检测合成图像具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: 几何一致性分析可作为检测文本生成合成图像的潜在方法，但需进一步研究以完善检测技术。

authors_text: Chen Wang,Minqiang Gu,Wenxi Kuang,Dongliang Wang,Weicheng Luo,Zhaohui Shi,Zhun Fan
title: AGENT: An Adaptive Grouping Entrapping Method of Flocking Systems
title_zh: AGENT：一种植绒系统的自适应分组诱捕方法
abstract: This study proposes a distributed algorithm that makes agents' adaptive grouping entrap multiple targets via automatic decision making, smooth flocking, and well-distributed entrapping. Agents make their own decisions about which targets to surround based on environmental information. An improved artificial potential field method is proposed to enable agents to smoothly and naturally change the formation to adapt to the environment. The proposed strategies guarantee that the coordination of swarm agents develops the phenomenon of multiple targets entrapping at the swarm level. We validate the performance of the proposed method using simulation experiments and design indicators for the analysis of these simulation and physical experiments.
summary: This study proposes a distributed algorithm that makes agents' adaptive grouping entrap multiple targets via automatic decision making, smooth flocking, and well-distributed entrapping. Agents make their own decisions about which targets to surround based on environmental information. An improved artificial potential field method is proposed to enable agents to smoothly and naturally change the formation to adapt to the environment. The proposed strategies guarantee that the coordination of swarm agents develops the phenomenon of multiple targets entrapping at the swarm level. We validate the performance of the proposed method using simulation experiments and design indicators for the analysis of these simulation and physical experiments.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种分布式算法，通过自动决策、平滑集群和均匀分布诱捕，使智能体自适应分组诱捕多个目标。特工根据环境信息自行决定包围哪些目标。提出了一种改进的人工势场方法，使智能体能够平滑、自然地改变队形以适应环境。所提出的策略保证了群体代理的协调在群体水平上发展了多个目标诱捕的现象。我们使用仿真实验和设计指标来验证所提出方法的性能，以分析这些仿真和物理实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分布式算法，使智能体能够通过自主决策和动态编队实现对多个目标的自适应包围。
AI.motivation: 现有群体系统难以在动态环境中实现多目标的高效协调包围，需提升智能体的自主决策与队形适应能力。
AI.method: 改进人工势场方法实现平滑编队调整，结合分布式决策机制使智能体基于环境信息自主选择目标并协同包围。
AI.result: 仿真与物理实验验证了方法有效性，指标分析显示其具备良好目标包围性能与群体协调性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在动态环境下可实现多目标高效包围，为群体智能系统的实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Anum Mushtaq,Irfan ul Haq,Muhammad Azeem Sarwar,Asifullah Khan,Omair Shafiq
title: Traffic Management of Autonomous Vehicles using Policy Based Deep Reinforcement Learning and Intelligent Routing
title_zh: 使用基于策略的深度强化学习和智能路由的自动驾驶车辆交通管理
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) uses diverse, unstructured data and makes RL capable of learning complex policies in high dimensional environments. Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) based on Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) offers an excellent playground for policy-based DRL. Deep learning architectures solve computational challenges of traditional algorithms while helping in real-world adoption and deployment of AVs. One of the main challenges in AVs implementation is that it can worsen traffic congestion on roads if not reliably and efficiently managed. Considering each vehicle's holistic effect and using efficient and reliable techniques could genuinely help optimise traffic flow management and congestion reduction. For this purpose, we proposed a intelligent traffic control system that deals with complex traffic congestion scenarios at intersections and behind the intersections. We proposed a DRL-based signal control system that dynamically adjusts traffic signals according to the current congestion situation on intersections. To deal with the congestion on roads behind the intersection, we used re-routing technique to load balance the vehicles on road networks. To achieve the actual benefits of the proposed approach, we break down the data silos and use all the data coming from sensors, detectors, vehicles and roads in combination to achieve sustainable results. We used SUMO micro-simulator for our simulations. The significance of our proposed approach is manifested from the results.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) uses diverse, unstructured data and makes RL capable of learning complex policies in high dimensional environments. Intelligent Transportation System (ITS) based on Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) offers an excellent playground for policy-based DRL. Deep learning architectures solve computational challenges of traditional algorithms while helping in real-world adoption and deployment of AVs. One of the main challenges in AVs implementation is that it can worsen traffic congestion on roads if not reliably and efficiently managed. Considering each vehicle's holistic effect and using efficient and reliable techniques could genuinely help optimise traffic flow management and congestion reduction. For this purpose, we proposed a intelligent traffic control system that deals with complex traffic congestion scenarios at intersections and behind the intersections. We proposed a DRL-based signal control system that dynamically adjusts traffic signals according to the current congestion situation on intersections. To deal with the congestion on roads behind the intersection, we used re-routing technique to load balance the vehicles on road networks. To achieve the actual benefits of the proposed approach, we break down the data silos and use all the data coming from sensors, detectors, vehicles and roads in combination to achieve sustainable results. We used SUMO micro-simulator for our simulations. The significance of our proposed approach is manifested from the results.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习 (DRL) 使用多样化的非结构化数据，使 RL 能够在高维环境中学习复杂的策略。基于自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的智能交通系统 (ITS) 为基于策略的 DRL 提供了绝佳的平台。深度学习架构解决了传统算法的计算挑战，同时帮助自动驾驶汽车在现实世界中的采用和部署。自动驾驶汽车实施的主要挑战之一是，如果不进行可靠和有效的管理，它可能会加剧道路交通拥堵。考虑每辆车的整体效果并使用高效可靠的技术可以真正帮助优化交通流管理和减少拥堵。为此，我们提出了一种智能交通控制系统，用于处理交叉口和交叉口后面复杂的交通拥堵场景。我们提出了一种基于 DRL 的信号控制系统，可以根据当前十字路口的拥堵情况动态调整交通信号。为了解决交叉口后面道路的拥堵问题，我们采用了重新路由技术来平衡路网上的车辆负载。为了实现所提出方法的实际好处，我们打破了数据孤岛，结合使用来自传感器、探测器、车辆和道路的所有数据，以实现可持续的结果。我们使用 SUMO 微型模拟器进行模拟。结果表明了我们提出的方法的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于策略深度强化学习和智能路由的交通管理系统，以优化自动驾驶车辆的交通流并缓解拥堵。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆可能因管理不当加剧交通拥堵，需高效技术解决传统算法的计算限制并实现可靠交通控制。
AI.method: 设计DRL动态调整信号灯控制交叉口拥堵，结合重路由技术平衡道路负载，并整合多源数据通过SUMO模拟器验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能有效优化交通流量，减少交叉口及周边道路的拥堵情况。
AI.conclusion: 提出的融合DRL与智能路由的系统可显著提升交通管理效率，为智能交通系统提供可行解决方案。

For this purpose, we proposed a intelligent traffic control system that deals with complex traffic congestion scenarios at intersections and behind the intersections. We proposed a DRL-based signal control system that dynamically adjusts traffic signals according to the current congestion situation on intersections. To deal with the congestion on roads behind the intersection, we used re-routing technique to load balance the vehicles on road networks. To achieve the actual benefits of the proposed approach, we break down the data silos and use all the data coming from sensors, detectors, vehicles and roads in combination to achieve sustainable results. We used SUMO micro-simulator for our simulations. authors_text: Zhuangwei Kang,Ayan Mukhopadhyay,Aniruddha Gokhale,Shijie Wen,Abhishek Dubey
title: Generative Anomaly Detection for Time Series Datasets
title_zh: 时间序列数据集的生成异常检测
comment: A shorter version of the paper was accepted at the ITSC 2022
comments: A shorter version of the paper was accepted at the ITSC 2022
abstract: Traffic congestion anomaly detection is of paramount importance in intelligent traffic systems. The goals of transportation agencies are two-fold: to monitor the general traffic conditions in the area of interest and to locate road segments under abnormal congestion states. Modeling congestion patterns can achieve these goals for citywide roadways, which amounts to learning the distribution of multivariate time series (MTS). However, existing works are either not scalable or unable to capture the spatial-temporal information in MTS simultaneously. To this end, we propose a principled and comprehensive framework consisting of a data-driven generative approach that can perform tractable density estimation for detecting traffic anomalies. Our approach first clusters segments in the feature space and then uses conditional normalizing flow to identify anomalous temporal snapshots at the cluster level in an unsupervised setting. Then, we identify anomalies at the segment level by using a kernel density estimator on the anomalous cluster. Extensive experiments on synthetic datasets show that our approach significantly outperforms several state-of-the-art congestion anomaly detection and diagnosis methods in terms of Recall and F1-Score. We also use the generative model to sample labeled data, which can train classifiers in a supervised setting, alleviating the lack of labeled data for anomaly detection in sparse settings.
summary: Traffic congestion anomaly detection is of paramount importance in intelligent traffic systems. The goals of transportation agencies are two-fold: to monitor the general traffic conditions in the area of interest and to locate road segments under abnormal congestion states. Modeling congestion patterns can achieve these goals for citywide roadways, which amounts to learning the distribution of multivariate time series (MTS). However, existing works are either not scalable or unable to capture the spatial-temporal information in MTS simultaneously. To this end, we propose a principled and comprehensive framework consisting of a data-driven generative approach that can perform tractable density estimation for detecting traffic anomalies. Our approach first clusters segments in the feature space and then uses conditional normalizing flow to identify anomalous temporal snapshots at the cluster level in an unsupervised setting. Then, we identify anomalies at the segment level by using a kernel density estimator on the anomalous cluster. Extensive experiments on synthetic datasets show that our approach significantly outperforms several state-of-the-art congestion anomaly detection and diagnosis methods in terms of Recall and F1-Score. We also use the generative model to sample labeled data, which can train classifiers in a supervised setting, alleviating the lack of labeled data for anomaly detection in sparse settings.
abstract_zh: 交通拥堵异常检测在智能交通系统中至关重要。交通机构的目标有两个：监控感兴趣区域的总体交通状况并定位异常拥堵状态的路段。对拥堵模式进行建模可以实现全市道路的这些目标，这相当于学习多元时间序列 (MTS) 的分布。然而，现有的工作要么不可扩展，要么无法同时捕获 MTS 中​​的时空信息。为此，我们提出了一个原则性的、全面的框架，由数据驱动的生成方法组成，可以执行易于处理的密度估计来检测交通异常。我们的方法首先对特征空间中的片段进行聚类，然后使用条件标准化流在无监督的设置中识别聚类级别的异常时间快照。然后，我们通过在异常簇上使用核密度估计器来识别段级别的异常。对合成数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法在召回率和 F1 分数方面明显优于几种最先进的拥塞异常检测和诊断方法。我们还使用生成模型对标记数据进行采样，这可以在监督设置中训练分类器，从而缓解稀疏设置中用于异常检测的标记数据的缺乏。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成模型的交通拥堵异常检测方法，通过建模多变量时间序列的分布来实现对城市道路异常拥堵状态的检测与诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时捕捉多变量时间序列中的时空信息且可扩展性差，亟需一种能有效处理大规模交通数据并准确识别异常拥堵的解决方案。
AI.method: 框架包含特征空间聚类与条件归一化流模型，通过无监督方式在聚类层级识别异常时间快照，并结合核密度估计实现路段级异常检测，同时利用生成模型采样标注数据辅助监督学习。
AI.result: 在合成数据集上显著优于现有方法（Recall和F1-Score指标提升），且生成模型能有效缓解稀疏场景下标注数据不足的问题。
AI.conclusion: 该生成式框架通过融合时空建模与密度估计，为大规模交通异常检测提供了可扩展且高效的解决方案，尤其适用于标注数据稀缺的场景。

search_text: Generative Anomaly Detection for Time Series Datasets 时间序列数据集的生成异常检测 Traffic congestion anomaly detection is of paramount importance in intelligent traffic systems. The goals of transportation agencies are two-fold: to monitor the general traffic conditions in the area of interest and to locate road segments under abnormal congestion states. Modeling congestion patterns can achieve these goals for citywide roadways, which amounts to learning the distribution of multivariate time series (MTS). However, existing works are either not scalable or unable to capture the spatial-temporal information in MTS simultaneously. To this end, we propose a principled and comprehensive framework consisting of a data-driven generative approach that can perform tractable density estimation for detecting traffic anomalies. Our approach first clusters segments in the feature space and then uses conditional normalizing flow to identify anomalous temporal snapshots at the cluster level in an unsupervised setting. Then, we identify anomalies at the segment level by using a kernel density estimator on the anomalous cluster. Extensive experiments on synthetic datasets show that our approach significantly outperforms several state-of-the-art congestion anomaly detection and diagnosis methods in terms of Recall and F1-Score. We also use the generative model to sample labeled data, which can train classifiers in a supervised setting, alleviating the lack of labeled data for anomaly detection in sparse settings. 交通拥堵异常检测在智能交通系统中至关重要。交通机构的目标有两个：监控感兴趣区域的总体交通状况并定位异常拥堵状态的路段。对拥堵模式进行建模可以实现全市道路的这些目标，这相当于学习多元时间序列 (MTS) 的分布。然而，现有的工作要么不可扩展，要么无法同时捕获 MTS 中​​的时空信息。为此，我们提出了一个原则性的、全面的框架，由数据驱动的生成方法组成，可以执行易于处理的密度估计来检测交通异常。我们的方法首先对特征空间中的片段进行聚类，然后使用条件标准化流在无监督的设置中识别聚类级别的异常时间快照。然后，我们通过在异常簇上使用核密度估计器来识别段级别的异常。对合成数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法在召回率和 F1 分数方面明显优于几种最先进的拥塞异常检测和诊断方法。我们还使用生成模型对标记数据进行采样，这可以在监督设置中训练分类器，从而缓解稀疏设置中用于异常检测的标记数据的缺乏。 本文提出一种基于生成模型的交通拥堵异常检测方法，通过建模多变量时间序列的分布来实现对城市道路异常拥堵状态的检测与诊断。 Zhuangwei Kang,Ayan Mukhopadhyay,Aniruddha Gokhale,Shijie Wen,Abhishek Dubey cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SP

authors_text: Daniel Bermuth,Alexander Poeppel,Wolfgang Reif
title: Finstreder: Simple and fast Spoken Language Understanding with Finite State Transducers using modern Speech-to-Text models
title_zh: Finstreder：使用现代语音到文本模型通过有限状态转换器进行简单快速的口语理解
abstract: In Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) the task is to extract important information from audio commands, like the intent of what a user wants the system to do and special entities like locations or numbers. This paper presents a simple method for embedding intents and entities into Finite State Transducers, and, in combination with a pretrained general-purpose Speech-to-Text model, allows building SLU-models without any additional training. Building those models is very fast and only takes a few seconds. It is also completely language independent. With a comparison on different benchmarks it is shown that this method can outperform multiple other, more resource demanding SLU approaches.
summary: In Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) the task is to extract important information from audio commands, like the intent of what a user wants the system to do and special entities like locations or numbers. This paper presents a simple method for embedding intents and entities into Finite State Transducers, and, in combination with a pretrained general-purpose Speech-to-Text model, allows building SLU-models without any additional training. Building those models is very fast and only takes a few seconds. It is also completely language independent. With a comparison on different benchmarks it is shown that this method can outperform multiple other, more resource demanding SLU approaches.
abstract_zh: 在口语理解 (SLU) 中，任务是从音频命令中提取重要信息，例如用户希望系统执行操作的意图以及位置或数字等特殊实体。本文提出了一种将意图和实体嵌入有限状态换能器的简单方法，并与预训练的通用语音到文本模型相结合，无需任何额外的训练即可构建 SLU 模型。构建这些模型非常快，只需几秒钟。它也完全独立于语言。通过对不同基准的比较，结果表明该方法可以优于多种其他对资源要求更高的 SLU 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于有限状态转换器（FST）和预训练语音转文本模型的快速 spoken language understanding（SLU）方法，无需额外训练即可提取语音指令中的意图和实体信息。
AI.motivation: 现有SLU方法通常需要大量标注数据和计算资源，而本文旨在开发一种语言无关、无需额外训练且高效的SLU解决方案，以降低资源消耗和实现跨语言适用性。
AI.method: 通过将意图和实体信息嵌入有限状态转换器，并结合预训练语音转文本模型，直接从音频输入中解析结构化信息，整个过程无需微调或额外训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法在准确率上超越了多种资源消耗更大的SLU方法，且模型构建速度仅需数秒，同时保持语言无关性。
AI.conclusion: Finstreder方法证明了通过预训练模型与FST结合可实现高效、通用的SLU，为资源受限场景提供了简单有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Mustafizur Rahman,Subhankar Bose,Shantanu Chakrabartty
title: On-device Synaptic Memory Consolidation using Fowler-Nordheim Quantum-tunneling
title_zh: 使用 Fowler-Nordheim 量子隧道的设备上突触内存整合
abstract: Synaptic memory consolidation has been heralded as one of the key mechanisms for supporting continual learning in neuromorphic Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems. Here we report that a Fowler-Nordheim (FN) quantum-tunneling device can implement synaptic memory consolidation similar to what can be achieved by algorithmic consolidation models like the cascade and the elastic weight consolidation (EWC) models. The proposed FN-synapse not only stores the synaptic weight but also stores the synapse's historical usage statistic on the device itself. We also show that the operation of the FN-synapse is near-optimal in terms of the synaptic lifetime and we demonstrate that a network comprising FN-synapses outperforms a comparable EWC network for a small benchmark continual learning task. With an energy footprint of femtojoules per synaptic update, we believe that the proposed FN-synapse provides an ultra-energy-efficient approach for implementing both synaptic memory consolidation and persistent learning.
summary: Synaptic memory consolidation has been heralded as one of the key mechanisms for supporting continual learning in neuromorphic Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems. Here we report that a Fowler-Nordheim (FN) quantum-tunneling device can implement synaptic memory consolidation similar to what can be achieved by algorithmic consolidation models like the cascade and the elastic weight consolidation (EWC) models. The proposed FN-synapse not only stores the synaptic weight but also stores the synapse's historical usage statistic on the device itself. We also show that the operation of the FN-synapse is near-optimal in terms of the synaptic lifetime and we demonstrate that a network comprising FN-synapses outperforms a comparable EWC network for a small benchmark continual learning task. With an energy footprint of femtojoules per synaptic update, we believe that the proposed FN-synapse provides an ultra-energy-efficient approach for implementing both synaptic memory consolidation and persistent learning.
abstract_zh: 突触记忆巩固被认为是支持神经形态人工智能 (AI) 系统持续学习的关键机制之一。在这里，我们报告说，福勒-诺德海姆（FN）量子隧道设备可以实现突触记忆巩固，类似于级联和弹性权重巩固（EWC）模型等算法巩固模型所实现的功能。所提出的 FN-synapse 不仅存储突触权重，还将突触的历史使用统计数据存储在设备本身上。我们还表明，FN 突触的操作在突触寿命方面接近最佳，并且我们证明，对于小型基准连续学习任务，包含 FN 突触的网络优于类似的 EWC 网络。每次突触更新的能量足迹为飞焦耳，我们相信所提出的 FN 突触为实现突触记忆巩固和持续学习提供了一种超节能的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Fowler-Nordheim量子隧穿效应的设备内突触记忆巩固方法，用于实现类脑人工智能系统的持续学习。
AI.motivation: 传统算法模型（如EWC）在持续学习中存在计算开销大、能耗高且难以硬件实现的问题，需探索更高效的物理实现方案。
AI.method: 设计Fowler-Nordheim量子隧穿器件作为突触单元，同时存储突触权重与历史使用统计信息，并通过实验验证其性能与能效。
AI.result: FN突触网络在小型基准任务中超越EWC网络，单次突触更新能耗低至飞焦耳级，且突触寿命接近最优。
AI.conclusion: FN突触为实现超低功耗的突触记忆巩固与长期持续学习提供了新型硬件方案。

The proposed FN-synapse not only stores the synaptic weight but also stores the synapse's historical usage statistic on the device itself. We also show that the operation of the FN-synapse is near-optimal in terms of the synaptic lifetime and we demonstrate that a network comprising FN-synapses outperforms a comparable EWC network for a small benchmark continual learning task. With an energy footprint of femtojoules per synaptic update, we believe that the proposed FN-synapse provides an ultra-energy-efficient approach for implementing both synaptic memory consolidation and persistent learning. 突触记忆巩固被认为是支持神经形态人工智能 (AI) 系统持续学习的关键机制之一。在这里，我们报告说，福勒-诺德海姆（FN）量子隧道设备可以实现突触记忆巩固，类似于级联和弹性权重巩固（EWC）模型等算法巩固模型所实现的功能。所提出的 FN-synapse 不仅存储突触权重，还将突触的历史使用统计数据存储在设备本身上。我们还表明，FN 突触的操作在突触寿命方面接近最佳，并且我们证明，对于小型基准连续学习任务，包含 FN 突触的网络优于类似的 EWC 网络。每次突触更新的能量足迹为飞焦耳，我们相信所提出的 FN 突触为实现突触记忆巩固和持续学习提供了一种超节能的方法。 本文提出一种基于Fowler-Nordheim量子隧穿效应的设备内突触记忆巩固方法，用于实现类脑人工智能系统的持续学习。 Mustafizur Rahman,Subhankar Bose,Shantanu Chakrabartty cs.ET,cs.AI,cs.AR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tongtong Song,Qiang Xu,Meng Ge,Longbiao Wang,Hao Shi,Yongjie Lv,Yuqin Lin,Jianwu Dang
title: Language-specific Characteristic Assistance for Code-switching Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于语码转换语音识别的特定于语言的特征辅助
abstract: Dual-encoder structure successfully utilizes two language-specific encoders (LSEs) for code-switching speech recognition. Because LSEs are initialized by two pre-trained language-specific models (LSMs), the dual-encoder structure can exploit sufficient monolingual data and capture the individual language attributes. However, most existing methods have no language constraints on LSEs and underutilize language-specific knowledge of LSMs. In this paper, we propose a language-specific characteristic assistance (LSCA) method to mitigate the above problems. Specifically, during training, we introduce two language-specific losses as language constraints and generate corresponding language-specific targets for them. During decoding, we take the decoding abilities of LSMs into account by combining the output probabilities of two LSMs and the mixture model to obtain the final predictions. Experiments show that either the training or decoding method of LSCA can improve the model's performance. Furthermore, the best result can obtain up to 15.4% relative error reduction on the code-switching test set by combining the training and decoding methods of LSCA. Moreover, the system can process code-switching speech recognition tasks well without extra shared parameters or even retraining based on two pre-trained LSMs by using our method.
summary: Dual-encoder structure successfully utilizes two language-specific encoders (LSEs) for code-switching speech recognition. Because LSEs are initialized by two pre-trained language-specific models (LSMs), the dual-encoder structure can exploit sufficient monolingual data and capture the individual language attributes. However, most existing methods have no language constraints on LSEs and underutilize language-specific knowledge of LSMs. In this paper, we propose a language-specific characteristic assistance (LSCA) method to mitigate the above problems. Specifically, during training, we introduce two language-specific losses as language constraints and generate corresponding language-specific targets for them. During decoding, we take the decoding abilities of LSMs into account by combining the output probabilities of two LSMs and the mixture model to obtain the final predictions. Experiments show that either the training or decoding method of LSCA can improve the model's performance. Furthermore, the best result can obtain up to 15.4% relative error reduction on the code-switching test set by combining the training and decoding methods of LSCA. Moreover, the system can process code-switching speech recognition tasks well without extra shared parameters or even retraining based on two pre-trained LSMs by using our method.
abstract_zh: 双编码器结构成功地利用两个特定于语言的编码器（LSE）进行代码转换语音识别。由于 LSE 是由两个预先训练的语言特定模型 (LSM) 初始化的，因此双编码器结构可以利用足够的单语言数据并捕获各个语言属性。然而，大多数现有方法对 LSE 没有语言限制，并且没有充分利用 LSM 的特定语言知识。在本文中，我们提出了一种特定于语言的特征辅助（LSCA）方法来缓解上述问题。具体来说，在训练过程中，我们引入两种特定于语言的损失作为语言约束，并为它们生成相应的特定于语言的目标。在解码过程中，我们通过结合两个LSM的输出概率和混合模型来考虑LSM的解码能力，以获得最终的预测。实验表明，无论是LSCA的训练还是解码方法都可以提高模型的性能。此外，结合LSCA的训练和解码方法，最好的结果是在码转换测试集上可以获得高达15.4%的相对误差降低。此外，该系统可以很好地处理语码转换语音识别任务，无需额外的共享参数，甚至无需使用我们的方法基于两个预训练的 LSM 进行重新训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语言特定特征辅助方法（LSCA），通过语言约束和解码策略优化，提升语码转换语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有双编码器结构虽利用预训练语言模型，但未对语言特定编码器施加语言约束，导致语言知识利用不足。
AI.method: 训练阶段引入语言特定损失生成对应目标，解码阶段结合预训练模型输出概率与混合模型进行预测。
AI.result: LSCA训练与解码方法结合后，在语码转换测试集上实现15.4%的相对错误率降低，且无需额外参数或重新训练。
AI.conclusion: LSCA通过语言约束和解码优化有效提升模型性能，证明了语言特定知识在语码转换任务中的重要性。

authors_text: Fenglin Liu,Shen Ge,Yuexian Zou,Xian Wu
title: Competence-based Multimodal Curriculum Learning for Medical Report Generation
title_zh: 基于能力的多模态课程学习用于医学报告生成
abstract: Medical report generation task, which targets to produce long and coherent descriptions of medical images, has attracted growing research interests recently. Different from the general image captioning tasks, medical report generation is more challenging for data-driven neural models. This is mainly due to 1) the serious data bias and 2) the limited medical data. To alleviate the data bias and make best use of available data, we propose a Competence-based Multimodal Curriculum Learning framework (CMCL). Specifically, CMCL simulates the learning process of radiologists and optimizes the model in a step by step manner. Firstly, CMCL estimates the difficulty of each training instance and evaluates the competence of current model; Secondly, CMCL selects the most suitable batch of training instances considering current model competence. By iterating above two steps, CMCL can gradually improve the model's performance. The experiments on the public IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR datasets show that CMCL can be incorporated into existing models to improve their performance.
summary: Medical report generation task, which targets to produce long and coherent descriptions of medical images, has attracted growing research interests recently. Different from the general image captioning tasks, medical report generation is more challenging for data-driven neural models. This is mainly due to 1) the serious data bias and 2) the limited medical data. To alleviate the data bias and make best use of available data, we propose a Competence-based Multimodal Curriculum Learning framework (CMCL). Specifically, CMCL simulates the learning process of radiologists and optimizes the model in a step by step manner. Firstly, CMCL estimates the difficulty of each training instance and evaluates the competence of current model; Secondly, CMCL selects the most suitable batch of training instances considering current model competence. By iterating above two steps, CMCL can gradually improve the model's performance. The experiments on the public IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR datasets show that CMCL can be incorporated into existing models to improve their performance.
abstract_zh: 医学报告生成任务旨在生成医学图像的长而连贯的描述，最近引起了越来越多的研究兴趣。与一般的图像字幕任务不同，医疗报告的生成对于数据驱动的神经模型来说更具挑战性。这主要是由于1）严重的数据偏差和2）有限的医学数据。为了减轻数据偏差并充分利用可用数据，我们提出了基于能力的多模式课程学习框架（CMCL）。具体来说，CMCL模拟放射科医生的学习过程，逐步优化模型。首先，CMCL估计每个训练实例的难度并评估当前模型的能力；其次，CMCL 考虑当前模型的能力，选择最合适的一批训练实例。通过迭代以上两个步骤，CMCL可以逐步提高模型的性能。在公共 IU-Xray 和 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上的实验表明，CMCL 可以合并到现有模型中以提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于能力的多模态课程学习框架（CMCL），用于解决医学报告生成任务中数据偏差和数据量有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学报告生成任务因数据偏差和医疗数据有限，导致数据驱动的神经模型难以有效学习。传统方法难以模拟放射科医生的学习过程，需设计更高效的训练策略。
AI.method: CMCL框架通过两步迭代优化模型：1）评估每个训练样本的难度及当前模型的能力；2）根据模型能力选择最合适的训练批次，逐步提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR公开数据集上的实验表明，CMCL可有效集成到现有模型中，显著提升医学报告生成效果。
AI.conclusion: CMCL通过模拟放射科医生的学习过程，结合样本难度与模型能力动态调整训练策略，为医学报告生成任务提供了有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Marcel Binz,Eric Schulz
title: Using cognitive psychology to understand GPT-3
title_zh: 用认知心理学来理解GPT-3
abstract: We study GPT-3, a recent large language model, using tools from cognitive psychology. More specifically, we assess GPT-3's decision-making, information search, deliberation, and causal reasoning abilities on a battery of canonical experiments from the literature. We find that much of GPT-3's behavior is impressive: it solves vignette-based tasks similarly or better than human subjects, is able to make decent decisions from descriptions, outperforms humans in a multi-armed bandit task, and shows signatures of model-based reinforcement learning. Yet we also find that small perturbations to vignette-based tasks can lead GPT-3 vastly astray, that it shows no signatures of directed exploration, and that it fails miserably in a causal reasoning task. These results enrich our understanding of current large language models and pave the way for future investigations using tools from cognitive psychology to study increasingly capable and opaque artificial agents.
summary: We study GPT-3, a recent large language model, using tools from cognitive psychology. More specifically, we assess GPT-3's decision-making, information search, deliberation, and causal reasoning abilities on a battery of canonical experiments from the literature. We find that much of GPT-3's behavior is impressive: it solves vignette-based tasks similarly or better than human subjects, is able to make decent decisions from descriptions, outperforms humans in a multi-armed bandit task, and shows signatures of model-based reinforcement learning. Yet we also find that small perturbations to vignette-based tasks can lead GPT-3 vastly astray, that it shows no signatures of directed exploration, and that it fails miserably in a causal reasoning task. These results enrich our understanding of current large language models and pave the way for future investigations using tools from cognitive psychology to study increasingly capable and opaque artificial agents.
abstract_zh: 我们使用认知心理学的工具研究 GPT-3，这是一种最新的大型语言模型。更具体地说，我们通过一系列文献中的规范实验来评估 GPT-3 的决策、信息搜索、深思熟虑和因果推理能力。我们发现 GPT-3 的大部分行为都令人印象深刻：它可以与人类受试者类似或更好地解决基于小插图的任务，能够根据描述做出正确的决策，在多臂老虎机任务中超越人类，并显示出基于模型的强化学习的特征。然而我们还发现，对基于小插图的任务的小扰动可能会导致 GPT-3 误入歧途，它没有显示出定向探索的特征，并且在因果推理任务中惨败。这些结果丰富了我们对当前大型语言模型的理解，并为未来使用认知心理学工具来研究能力越来越强且不透明的人工智能体铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 利用认知心理学方法评估GPT-3在决策、信息搜索、推理和因果推理方面的表现
AI.motivation: 通过认知心理学实验深化对大型语言模型行为的理解，并探索其与人类认知的异同
AI.method: 采用多臂老虎机任务、因果推理实验等经典认知心理学实验，评估GPT-3在不同任务中的表现
AI.result: GPT-3在决策和多臂老虎机任务中表现优异，但对微小扰动敏感，缺乏定向探索能力，因果推理能力较弱
AI.conclusion: 当前大型语言模型在部分认知任务上接近或超越人类，但存在脆弱性和局限性，需进一步研究其机制和改进方法

search_text: Using cognitive psychology to understand GPT-3 用认知心理学来理解GPT-3 We study GPT-3, a recent large language model, using tools from cognitive psychology. More specifically, we assess GPT-3's decision-making, information search, deliberation, and causal reasoning abilities on a battery of canonical experiments from the literature. We find that much of GPT-3's behavior is impressive: it solves vignette-based tasks similarly or better than human subjects, is able to make decent decisions from descriptions, outperforms humans in a multi-armed bandit task, and shows signatures of model-based reinforcement learning. Yet we also find that small perturbations to vignette-based tasks can lead GPT-3 vastly astray, that it shows no signatures of directed exploration, and that it fails miserably in a causal reasoning task. These results enrich our understanding of current large language models and pave the way for future investigations using tools from cognitive psychology to study increasingly capable and opaque artificial agents. 我们使用认知心理学的工具研究 GPT-3，这是一种最新的大型语言模型。更具体地说，我们通过一系列文献中的规范实验来评估 GPT-3 的决策、信息搜索、深思熟虑和因果推理能力。我们发现 GPT-3 的大部分行为都令人印象深刻：它可以与人类受试者类似或更好地解决基于小插图的任务，能够根据描述做出正确的决策，在多臂老虎机任务中超越人类，并显示出基于模型的强化学习的特征。然而我们还发现，对基于小插图的任务的小扰动可能会导致 GPT-3 误入歧途，它没有显示出定向探索的特征，并且在因果推理任务中惨败。这些结果丰富了我们对当前大型语言模型的理解，并为未来使用认知心理学工具来研究能力越来越强且不透明的人工智能体铺平了道路。 利用认知心理学方法评估GPT-3在决策、信息搜索、推理和因果推理方面的表现 Marcel Binz,Eric Schulz cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Marco Casadio,Ekaterina Komendantskaya,Verena Rieser,Matthew L. Daggitt,Daniel Kienitz,Luca Arnaboldi,Wen Kokke
title: Why Robust Natural Language Understanding is a Challenge
title_zh: 为什么鲁棒的自然语言理解是一个挑战
abstract: With the proliferation of Deep Machine Learning into real-life applications, a particular property of this technology has been brought to attention: robustness Neural Networks notoriously present low robustness and can be highly sensitive to small input perturbations. Recently, many methods for verifying networks' general properties of robustness have been proposed, but they are mostly applied in Computer Vision. In this paper we propose a Verification specification for Natural Language Understanding classification based on larger regions of interest, and we discuss the challenges of such task. We observe that, although the data is almost linearly separable, the verifier struggles to output positive results and we explain the problems and implications.
summary: With the proliferation of Deep Machine Learning into real-life applications, a particular property of this technology has been brought to attention: robustness Neural Networks notoriously present low robustness and can be highly sensitive to small input perturbations. Recently, many methods for verifying networks' general properties of robustness have been proposed, but they are mostly applied in Computer Vision. In this paper we propose a Verification specification for Natural Language Understanding classification based on larger regions of interest, and we discuss the challenges of such task. We observe that, although the data is almost linearly separable, the verifier struggles to output positive results and we explain the problems and implications.
abstract_zh: 随着深度机器学习在现实生活中的应用不断扩展，该技术的一个特殊属性引起了人们的关注：鲁棒性众所周知，神经网络的鲁棒性较低，并且对小输入扰动高度敏感。最近，已经提出了许多验证网络鲁棒性一般属性的方法，但它们主要应用于计算机视觉。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于更大兴趣区域的自然语言理解分类的验证规范，并讨论了此类任务的挑战。我们观察到，尽管数据几乎是线性可分的，但验证者很难输出积极的结果，我们解释了问题和含义。

AI.tldr: 提出针对自然语言理解分类的验证规范，并探讨其面临的挑战
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒性验证方法主要应用于计算机视觉，而自然语言理解的鲁棒性验证仍面临诸多挑战，需进一步研究
AI.method: 提出基于更大兴趣区域（Region of Interest）的验证规范，用于评估自然语言理解模型的鲁棒性
AI.result: 发现即使数据接近线性可分，验证器仍难以有效验证模型鲁棒性，揭示了验证过程中的技术难题
AI.conclusion: 表明提升自然语言理解模型鲁棒性的验证方法仍需突破，需进一步研究验证技术与模型设计的协同优化

authors_text: Nimesh Bhana,Terence L. van Zyl
title: Knowledge Graph Fusion for Language Model Fine-tuning
title_zh: 用于语言模型微调的知识图融合
abstract: Language Models such as BERT have grown in popularity due to their ability to be pre-trained and perform robustly on a wide range of Natural Language Processing tasks. Often seen as an evolution over traditional word embedding techniques, they can produce semantic representations of text, useful for tasks such as semantic similarity. However, state-of-the-art models often have high computational requirements and lack global context or domain knowledge which is required for complete language understanding. To address these limitations, we investigate the benefits of knowledge incorporation into the fine-tuning stages of BERT. An existing K-BERT model, which enriches sentences with triplets from a Knowledge Graph, is adapted for the English language and extended to inject contextually relevant information into sentences. As a side-effect, changes made to K-BERT for accommodating the English language also extend to other word-based languages. Experiments conducted indicate that injected knowledge introduces noise. We see statistically significant improvements for knowledge-driven tasks when this noise is minimised. We show evidence that, given the appropriate task, modest injection with relevant, high-quality knowledge is most performant.
summary: Language Models such as BERT have grown in popularity due to their ability to be pre-trained and perform robustly on a wide range of Natural Language Processing tasks. Often seen as an evolution over traditional word embedding techniques, they can produce semantic representations of text, useful for tasks such as semantic similarity. However, state-of-the-art models often have high computational requirements and lack global context or domain knowledge which is required for complete language understanding. To address these limitations, we investigate the benefits of knowledge incorporation into the fine-tuning stages of BERT. An existing K-BERT model, which enriches sentences with triplets from a Knowledge Graph, is adapted for the English language and extended to inject contextually relevant information into sentences. As a side-effect, changes made to K-BERT for accommodating the English language also extend to other word-based languages. Experiments conducted indicate that injected knowledge introduces noise. We see statistically significant improvements for knowledge-driven tasks when this noise is minimised. We show evidence that, given the appropriate task, modest injection with relevant, high-quality knowledge is most performant.
abstract_zh: BERT 等语言模型因其能够进行预训练并在各种自然语言处理任务上稳健地执行而越来越受欢迎。它们通常被视为传统词嵌入技术的演变，可以生成文本的语义表示，对于语义相似性等任务很有用。然而，最先进的模型通常具有很高的计算要求，并且缺乏完整语言理解所需的全局上下文或领域知识。为了解决这些限制，我们研究了将知识纳入 BERT 微调阶段的好处。现有的 K-BERT 模型使用知识图谱中的三元组来丰富句子，该模型适用于英语，并经过扩展以将上下文相关信息注入句子中。作为副作用，K-BERT 为适应英语而进行的更改也扩展到了其他基于单词的语言。进行的实验表明注入的知识会引入噪音。当这种噪音最小化时，我们发现知识驱动的任务在统计上有显着的改进。我们的证据表明，给定适当的任务，适度注入相关的高质量知识是最有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过融合知识图谱（KG）信息来优化语言模型（如BERT）的微调过程，以增强其语义理解和任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型（如BERT）虽性能强大，但计算成本高且缺乏全局上下文和领域知识，难以胜任需要深度语义理解的任务。
AI.method: 基于K-BERT模型，将知识图谱中的三元组信息注入句子中，扩展至英文及其他语言，并通过控制知识注入的噪声水平优化模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，在减少噪声干扰后，知识驱动任务的性能有统计显著提升，适度注入高质量相关知识效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: 在适当任务中，结合相关且高质量的知识进行适度注入，能有效提升语言模型的表现。

authors_text: Oliver Bendel,Liliana Margarida Dos Santos Alves
title: Should Social Robots in Retail Manipulate Customers?
title_zh: 零售业的社交机器人应该操纵顾客吗？
comment: Accepted paper of the AAAI 2022 Spring Symposium "How Fair is Fair? Achieving Wellbeing AI" (Stanford University)
comments: Accepted paper of the AAAI 2022 Spring Symposium "How Fair is Fair? Achieving Wellbeing AI" (Stanford University)
abstract: Against the backdrop of structural changes in the retail trade, social robots have found their way into retail stores and shopping malls in order to attract, welcome, and greet customers; to inform them, advise them, and persuade them to make a purchase. Salespeople often have a broad knowledge of their product and rely on offering competent and honest advice, whether it be on shoes, clothing, or kitchen appliances. However, some frequently use sales tricks to secure purchases. The question arises of how consulting and sales robots should "behave". Should they behave like human advisors and salespeople, i.e., occasionally manipulate customers? Or should they be more honest and reliable than us? This article tries to answer these questions. After explaining the basics, it evaluates a study in this context and gives recommendations for companies that want to use consulting and sales robots. Ultimately, fair, honest, and trustworthy robots in retail are a win-win situation for all concerned.

Should they behave like human advisors and salespeople, i.e., occasionally manipulate customers? Or should they be more honest and reliable than us? This article tries to answer these questions. After explaining the basics, it evaluates a study in this context and gives recommendations for companies that want to use consulting and sales robots. Ultimately, fair, honest, and trustworthy robots in retail are a win-win situation for all concerned.
abstract_zh: 在零售业结构性变化的背景下，社交机器人进入零售商店和购物中心，以吸引、欢迎和问候顾客；通知他们、建议他们并说服他们购买。销售人员通常对其产品有广泛的了解，并依赖于提供有能力和诚实的建议，无论是鞋子、服装还是厨房用具。然而，有些人经常使用销售技巧来确保购买。问题是咨询和销售机器人应该如何“表现”。他们的行为是否应该像人类顾问和销售人员一样，即偶尔操纵客户？或者他们应该比我们更诚实、更可靠？本文试图回答这些问题。在解释了基础知识后，它评估了这方面的研究，并为想要使用咨询和销售机器人的公司提供了建议。最终，公平、诚实、值得信赖的零售机器人对于所有相关方来说都是双赢的局面。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨零售领域社会机器人是否应像人类销售人员一样操纵顾客，或应更诚实可靠，并提出相关建议。
AI.motivation: 随着零售业结构变化，社会机器人被用于吸引和说服顾客，但其行为伦理（如是否操纵顾客）引发争议，需明确其行为准则。
AI.method: 通过分析现有研究，评估社会机器人在零售中的行为模式，并结合伦理考量提出企业应用建议。
AI.result: 研究表明，诚实可靠的机器人能提升顾客信任，实现企业与消费者双赢。
AI.conclusion: 零售机器人应避免操纵行为，以公平、诚实为准则，从而建立长期信任关系并提升商业价值。

authors_text: Ramesh Kumar Sah,Michael McDonell,Patricia Pendry,Sara Parent,Hassan Ghasemzadeh,Michael J Cleveland
title: ADARP: A Multi Modal Dataset for Stress and Alcohol Relapse Quantification in Real Life Setting
title_zh: ADARP：现实生活环境中压力和酒精复吸量化的多模态数据集
abstract: Stress detection and classification from wearable sensor data is an emerging area of research with significant implications for individuals' physical and mental health. In this work, we introduce a new dataset, ADARP, which contains physiological data and self-report outcomes collected in real-world ambulatory settings involving individuals diagnosed with alcohol use disorders. We describe the user study, present details of the dataset, establish the significant correlation between physiological data and self-reported outcomes, demonstrate stress classification, and make our dataset public to facilitate research.
summary: Stress detection and classification from wearable sensor data is an emerging area of research with significant implications for individuals' physical and mental health. In this work, we introduce a new dataset, ADARP, which contains physiological data and self-report outcomes collected in real-world ambulatory settings involving individuals diagnosed with alcohol use disorders. We describe the user study, present details of the dataset, establish the significant correlation between physiological data and self-reported outcomes, demonstrate stress classification, and make our dataset public to facilitate research.
abstract_zh: 可穿戴传感器数据的压力检测和分类是一个新兴的研究领域，对个人的身心健康具有重大影响。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个新的数据集 ADARP，其中包含在现实世界的流动环境中收集的生理数据和自我报告结果，涉及被诊断患有酒精使用障碍的个体。我们描述用户研究，提供数据集的详细信息，建立生理数据和自我报告结果之间的显着相关性，展示压力分类，并将我们的数据集公开以促进研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADARP多模态数据集，用于在真实场景中量化压力与酒精复发，包含生理数据和自我报告结果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏真实环境下的多模态数据集，而压力检测与酒精复发量化对心理健康研究至关重要。
AI.method: 通过用户研究收集真实场景下的生理数据与自我报告数据，分析生理指标与主观结果的相关性，并构建压力分类模型。
AI.result: 验证了生理数据与自我报告结果的显著相关性，实现了压力分类，并公开ADARP数据集供研究使用。
AI.conclusion: ADARP数据集为压力与酒精复发的量化研究提供了真实场景的多模态数据支持，推动相关领域的发展。
