authors_text: Robert Scheffler
title: Linearizing Partial Search Orders
title_zh: 线性化部分搜索顺序
comment: full version of an extended abstract to be published in the Proceedings of the 48th International Workshop on Graph-Theoretic Concepts in Computer Science (WG 2022) in Tübingen
comments: full version of an extended abstract to be published in the Proceedings of the 48th International Workshop on Graph-Theoretic Concepts in Computer Science (WG 2022) in Tübingen
abstract: In recent years, questions about the construction of special orderings of a given graph search were studied by several authors. On the one hand, the so called end-vertex problem introduced by Corneil et al. in 2010 asks for search orderings ending in a special vertex. On the other hand, the problem of finding orderings that induce a given search tree was introduced already in the 1980s by Hagerup and received new attention most recently by Beisegel et al. Here, we introduce a generalization of some of these problems by studying the question whether there is a search ordering that is a linear extension of a given partial order on a graph's vertex set. We show that this problem can be solved in polynomial time on chordal bipartite graphs for LBFS, which also implies the first polynomial-time algorithms for the end-vertex problem and two search tree problems for this combination of graph class and search. Furthermore, we present polynomial-time algorithms for LBFS and MCS on split graphs which generalize known results for the end-vertex and search tree problems.
summary: In recent years, questions about the construction of special orderings of a given graph search were studied by several authors. On the one hand, the so called end-vertex problem introduced by Corneil et al. in 2010 asks for search orderings ending in a special vertex. On the other hand, the problem of finding orderings that induce a given search tree was introduced already in the 1980s by Hagerup and received new attention most recently by Beisegel et al. Here, we introduce a generalization of some of these problems by studying the question whether there is a search ordering that is a linear extension of a given partial order on a graph's vertex set. We show that this problem can be solved in polynomial time on chordal bipartite graphs for LBFS, which also implies the first polynomial-time algorithms for the end-vertex problem and two search tree problems for this combination of graph class and search. Furthermore, we present polynomial-time algorithms for LBFS and MCS on split graphs which generalize known results for the end-vertex and search tree problems.
abstract_zh: 近年来，几位作者研究了有关构建给定图搜索的特殊顺序的问题。一方面，Corneil 等人提出的所谓的末端顶点问题。 2010 要求以特殊顶点结尾的搜索顺序。另一方面，寻找引发给定搜索树的排序问题已在 20 世纪 80 年代由 Hagerup 提出，并且最近受到 Beisegel 等人的新关注。在这里，我们通过研究是否存在搜索顺序是图的顶点集上给定偏序的线性扩展的问题来介绍其中一些问题的概括。我们证明这个问题可以在 LBFS 的弦二部图上以多项式时间求解，这也意味着第一个用于端顶点问题的多项式时间算法以及用于图类和搜索组合的两个搜索树问题。此外，我们提出了分割图上的 LBFS 和 MCS 多项式时间算法，该算法概括了末端顶点和搜索树问题的已知结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了图搜索顺序的偏序线性化问题，提出在特定图类上多项式时间算法。
AI.motivation: 扩展图搜索顺序相关问题，解决更一般的偏序线性化需求，推广现有算法结果。
AI.method: 基于LBFS和MCS算法，在弦二分图与split图上设计多项式时间求解方法。
AI.result: 实现弦二分图LBFS多项式算法，首次解决end-vertex及搜索树问题；扩展split图的LBFS/MCS算法。
AI.conclusion: 提出偏序线性化问题的通用解法，为特殊图类搜索顺序问题提供高效算法框架。

authors_text: Hyeonyu Kim,Jongeun Kim,Jeonghun Kang,Sanguk Park,Dongchan Park,Taehwan Kim
title: Technical Report for CVPR 2022 LOVEU AQTC Challenge
title_zh: CVPR 2022 LOVEU AQTC 挑战赛技术报告
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures, technical report for track3 of CVPR 2022 LOVEU challenge
comments: 4 pages, 3 figures, technical report for track3 of CVPR 2022 LOVEU challenge
abstract: This technical report presents the 2nd winning model for AQTC, a task newly introduced in CVPR 2022 LOng-form VidEo Understanding (LOVEU) challenges. This challenge faces difficulties with multi-step answers, multi-modal, and diverse and changing button representations in video. We address this problem by proposing a new context ground module attention mechanism for more effective feature mapping. In addition, we also perform the analysis over the number of buttons and ablation study of different step networks and video features. As a result, we achieved the overall 2nd place in LOVEU competition track 3, specifically the 1st place in two out of four evaluation metrics. Our code is available at https://github.com/jaykim9870/ CVPR-22_LOVEU_unipyler.
summary: This technical report presents the 2nd winning model for AQTC, a task newly introduced in CVPR 2022 LOng-form VidEo Understanding (LOVEU) challenges. This challenge faces difficulties with multi-step answers, multi-modal, and diverse and changing button representations in video. We address this problem by proposing a new context ground module attention mechanism for more effective feature mapping. In addition, we also perform the analysis over the number of buttons and ablation study of different step networks and video features. As a result, we achieved the overall 2nd place in LOVEU competition track 3, specifically the 1st place in two out of four evaluation metrics. Our code is available at https://github.com/jaykim9870/ CVPR-22_LOVEU_unipyler.
abstract_zh: 该技术报告介绍了 AQTC 的第二个获胜模型，这是 CVPR 2022 LOng-form VidEo Understanding (LOVEU) 挑战中新引入的一项任务。这一挑战面临着视频中多步骤答案、多模式以及多样化和变化的按钮表示的困难。我们通过提出一种新的上下文地面模块注意机制来解决这个问题，以实现更有效的特征映射。此外，我们还对按钮数量进行了分析，并对不同步骤网络和视频特征进行了消融研究。结果，我们在 LOVEU 竞赛赛道 3 中获得了总体第二名，特别是在四个评估指标中的两个上获得了第一名。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/jaykim9870/CVPR-22_LOVEU_unipyler 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了在CVPR 2022 LOVEU挑战赛AQTC任务中获得第二名的模型，旨在解决视频中多步骤答案、多模态数据和动态按钮表示的难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理视频中多步骤推理、多模态信息融合及复杂按钮变化时存在性能瓶颈，需更高效的特征映射机制。
AI.method: 提出上下文地面模块注意力机制优化特征映射，并通过按钮数量分析及不同步骤网络与视频特征的消融实验验证效果。
AI.result: 在LOVEU竞赛第三赛道获得总分第二名，在四个评估指标中的两个指标位列第一。
AI.conclusion: 新方法在复杂视频理解任务中表现优异，代码开源便于复现与进一步研究。

authors_text: Kshitij Sirohi,Sajad Marvi,Daniel Büscher,Wolfram Burgard
title: Uncertainty-aware Panoptic Segmentation
title_zh: 不确定性感知全景分割
abstract: Reliable scene understanding is indispensable for modern autonomous systems. Current learning-based methods typically try to maximize their performance based on segmentation metrics that only consider the quality of the segmentation. However, for the safe operation of a system in the real world it is crucial to consider the uncertainty in the prediction as well. In this work, we introduce the novel task of uncertainty-aware panoptic segmentation, which aims to predict per-pixel semantic and instance segmentations, together with per-pixel uncertainty estimates. We define two novel metrics to facilitate its quantitative analysis, the uncertainty-aware Panoptic Quality (uPQ) and the panoptic Expected Calibration Error (pECE). We further propose the novel top-down Evidential Panoptic Segmentation Network (EvPSNet) to solve this task. Our architecture employs a simple yet effective panoptic fusion module that leverages the predicted uncertainties. Furthermore, we provide several strong baselines combining state-of-the-art panoptic segmentation networks with sampling-free uncertainty estimation techniques. Extensive evaluations show that our EvPSNet achieves the new state-of-the-art for the standard Panoptic Quality (PQ), as well as for our uncertainty-aware panoptic metrics. We make the code available at: \url{https://github.com/kshitij3112/EvPSNet}
summary: Reliable scene understanding is indispensable for modern autonomous systems. Current learning-based methods typically try to maximize their performance based on segmentation metrics that only consider the quality of the segmentation. However, for the safe operation of a system in the real world it is crucial to consider the uncertainty in the prediction as well. In this work, we introduce the novel task of uncertainty-aware panoptic segmentation, which aims to predict per-pixel semantic and instance segmentations, together with per-pixel uncertainty estimates. We define two novel metrics to facilitate its quantitative analysis, the uncertainty-aware Panoptic Quality (uPQ) and the panoptic Expected Calibration Error (pECE). We further propose the novel top-down Evidential Panoptic Segmentation Network (EvPSNet) to solve this task. Our architecture employs a simple yet effective panoptic fusion module that leverages the predicted uncertainties. Furthermore, we provide several strong baselines combining state-of-the-art panoptic segmentation networks with sampling-free uncertainty estimation techniques. Extensive evaluations show that our EvPSNet achieves the new state-of-the-art for the standard Panoptic Quality (PQ), as well as for our uncertainty-aware panoptic metrics. We make the code available at: \url{https://github.com/kshitij3112/EvPSNet}
abstract_zh: 可靠的场景理解对于现代自主系统是必不可少的。当前基于学习的方法通常尝试基于仅考虑分割质量的分割指标来最大化其性能。然而，为了系统在现实世界中的安全运行，考虑预测的不确定性也至关重要。在这项工作中，我们介绍了不确定性感知全景分割的新任务，其目的是预测每像素语义和实例分割，以及每像素不确定性估计。我们定义了两个新颖的指标来促进其定量分析，即不确定性感知全景质量（uPQ）和全景预期校准误差（pECE）。我们进一步提出了新颖的自上而下证据全景分割网络（EvPSNet）来解决此任务。我们的架构采用了一个简单而有效的全景融合模块，该模块利用了预测的不确定性。此外，我们提供了几个强大的基线，将最先进的全景分割网络与无采样不确定性估计技术相结合。广泛的评估表明，我们的 EvPSNet 在标准全景质量 (PQ) 以及我们的不确定性感知全景指标方面达到了最先进的水平。我们在以下位置提供代码：\url{https://github.com/kshitij3112/EvPSNet}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的不确定性感知全景分割任务，旨在预测像素级语义和实例分割的同时，提供像素级的不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的分割方法仅关注分割质量指标，而忽视了预测不确定性对系统安全运行的重要性，需在实际应用中考虑不确定性因素。
AI.method: 提出拓扑向下证据全景分割网络（EvPSNet），包含利用预测不确定性的全景融合模块，并定义了不确定性感知全景质量（uPQ）和全景预期校准误差（pECE）指标。
AI.result: EvPSNet在标准全景质量（PQ）及不确定性感知指标上均达到最先进水平，且提供了多种结合最新分割网络与无采样不确定性估计的强基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合不确定性估计，本文方法提升了全景分割的可靠性，为自动驾驶等实际场景提供了更安全的决策依据。

authors_text: Guan Shen,Jieru Zhao,Quan Chen,Jingwen Leng,Chao Li,Minyi Guo
title: SALO: An Efficient Spatial Accelerator Enabling Hybrid Sparse Attention Mechanisms for Long Sequences
title_zh: SALO：一种高效的空间加速器，支持长序列的混合稀疏注意力机制
abstract: The attention mechanisms of transformers effectively extract pertinent information from the input sequence. However, the quadratic complexity of self-attention w.r.t the sequence length incurs heavy computational and memory burdens, especially for tasks with long sequences. Existing accelerators face performance degradation in these tasks. To this end, we propose SALO to enable hybrid sparse attention mechanisms for long sequences. SALO contains a data scheduler to map hybrid sparse attention patterns onto hardware and a spatial accelerator to perform the efficient attention computation. We show that SALO achieves 17.66x and 89.33x speedup on average compared to GPU and CPU implementations, respectively, on typical workloads, i.e., Longformer and ViL.
summary: The attention mechanisms of transformers effectively extract pertinent information from the input sequence. However, the quadratic complexity of self-attention w.r.t the sequence length incurs heavy computational and memory burdens, especially for tasks with long sequences. Existing accelerators face performance degradation in these tasks. To this end, we propose SALO to enable hybrid sparse attention mechanisms for long sequences. SALO contains a data scheduler to map hybrid sparse attention patterns onto hardware and a spatial accelerator to perform the efficient attention computation. We show that SALO achieves 17.66x and 89.33x speedup on average compared to GPU and CPU implementations, respectively, on typical workloads, i.e., Longformer and ViL.
abstract_zh: Transformer 的注意力机制有效地从输入序列中提取相关信息。然而，自注意力相对于序列长度的二次复杂度会带来沉重的计算和内存负担，特别是对于长序列的任务。现有加速器在这些任务中面临着性能下降的问题。为此，我们提出 SALO 来为长序列启用混合稀疏注意力机制。 SALO 包含一个数据调度器，用于将混合稀疏注意力模式映射到硬件上，以及一个空间加速器来执行高效的注意力计算。我们表明，在典型工作负载（即 Longformer 和 ViL）上，SALO 与 GPU 和 CPU 实现相比平均分别实现了 17.66 倍和 89.33 倍的加速。

AI.tldr: 设计高效空间加速器SALO以支持长序列的混合稀疏注意力机制。
AI.motivation: Transformer的自注意力机制存在二次复杂度问题，导致处理长序列时计算和内存负担过重，现有加速器性能不足。
AI.method: 提出SALO架构，包含数据调度器和空间加速器，分别用于映射混合稀疏注意力模式和执行高效计算。
AI.result: 在Longformer和ViL任务中，SALO相比GPU平均加速17.66倍，相比CPU加速89.33倍。
AI.conclusion: SALO通过混合稀疏注意力机制有效解决了长序列处理的计算瓶颈，具有实际应用价值。

tldr: 设计高效空间加速器SALO以支持长序列的混合稀疏注意力机制。
motivation: Transformer的自注意力机制存在二次复杂度问题，导致处理长序列时计算和内存负担过重，现有加速器性能不足。
method: 提出SALO架构，包含数据调度器和空间加速器，分别用于映射混合稀疏注意力模式和执行高效计算。
result: 在Longformer和ViL任务中，SALO相比GPU平均加速17.66倍，相比CPU加速89.33倍。
conclusion: SALO通过混合稀疏注意力机制有效解决了长序列处理的计算瓶颈，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: SALO: An Efficient Spatial Accelerator Enabling Hybrid Sparse Attention Mechanisms for Long Sequences SALO：一种高效的空间加速器，支持长序列的混合稀疏注意力机制 The attention mechanisms of transformers effectively extract pertinent information from the input sequence. However, the quadratic complexity of self-attention w.r.t the sequence length incurs heavy computational and memory burdens, especially for tasks with long sequences. Existing accelerators face performance degradation in these tasks. To this end, we propose SALO to enable hybrid sparse attention mechanisms for long sequences. SALO contains a data scheduler to map hybrid sparse attention patterns onto hardware and a spatial accelerator to perform the efficient attention computation. We show that SALO achieves 17.66x and 89.33x speedup on average compared to GPU and CPU implementations, respectively, on typical workloads, i.e., Longformer and ViL. Transformer 的注意力机制有效地从输入序列中提取相关信息。然而，自注意力相对于序列长度的二次复杂度会带来沉重的计算和内存负担，特别是对于长序列的任务。现有加速器在这些任务中面临着性能下降的问题。为此，我们提出 SALO 来为长序列启用混合稀疏注意力机制。 SALO 包含一个数据调度器，用于将混合稀疏注意力模式映射到硬件上，以及一个空间加速器来执行高效的注意力计算。我们表明，在典型工作负载（即 Longformer 和 ViL）上，SALO 与 GPU 和 CPU 实现相比平均分别实现了 17.66 倍和 89.33 倍的加速。 设计高效空间加速器SALO以支持长序列的混合稀疏注意力机制。 Guan Shen,Jieru Zhao,Quan Chen,Jingwen Leng,Chao Li,Minyi Guo cs.AR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ruolin Su,Xiao Liu,Sotirios A. Tsaftaris
title: Why patient data cannot be easily forgotten?
title_zh: 为什么患者数据不易被遗忘？
comment: Ruolin Su and Xiao Liu contributed equally. Accepted by MICCAI 2022
comments: Ruolin Su and Xiao Liu contributed equally. Accepted by MICCAI 2022
abstract: Rights provisioned within data protection regulations, permit patients to request that knowledge about their information be eliminated by data holders. With the advent of AI learned on data, one can imagine that such rights can extent to requests for forgetting knowledge of patient's data within AI models. However, forgetting patients' imaging data from AI models, is still an under-explored problem. In this paper, we study the influence of patient data on model performance and formulate two hypotheses for a patient's data: either they are common and similar to other patients or form edge cases, i.e. unique and rare cases. We show that it is not possible to easily forget patient data. We propose a targeted forgetting approach to perform patient-wise forgetting. Extensive experiments on the benchmark Automated Cardiac Diagnosis Challenge dataset showcase the improved performance of the proposed targeted forgetting approach as opposed to a state-of-the-art method.
summary: Rights provisioned within data protection regulations, permit patients to request that knowledge about their information be eliminated by data holders. With the advent of AI learned on data, one can imagine that such rights can extent to requests for forgetting knowledge of patient's data within AI models. However, forgetting patients' imaging data from AI models, is still an under-explored problem. In this paper, we study the influence of patient data on model performance and formulate two hypotheses for a patient's data: either they are common and similar to other patients or form edge cases, i.e. unique and rare cases. We show that it is not possible to easily forget patient data. We propose a targeted forgetting approach to perform patient-wise forgetting. Extensive experiments on the benchmark Automated Cardiac Diagnosis Challenge dataset showcase the improved performance of the proposed targeted forgetting approach as opposed to a state-of-the-art method.
abstract_zh: 数据保护法规中规定的权利允许患者要求数据持有者删除有关其信息的知识。随着基于数据学习的人工智能的出现，人们可以想象，这种权利可以延伸到忘记人工智能模型中患者数据知识的请求。然而，从人工智能模型中忘记患者的成像数据仍然是一个尚未探索的问题。在本文中，我们研究患者数据对模型性能的影响，并对患者数据提出两种假设：要么与其他患者常见且相似，要么形成边缘案例，即独特且罕见的案例。我们表明不可能轻易忘记患者数据。我们提出了一种有针对性的遗忘方法来执行患者明智的遗忘。在基准自动心脏诊断挑战数据集上进行的广泛实验展示了所提出的目标遗忘方法相对于最先进的方法的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从AI模型中有效删除患者数据，并提出针对性的遗忘方法。
AI.motivation: 数据保护法规赋予患者删除其信息的权利，但AI模型的复杂性使得这一过程面临挑战。
AI.method: 基于患者数据的两种假设（常见案例或边缘案例），设计针对性的遗忘方法。
AI.result: 在Automated Cardiac Diagnosis Challenge数据集上，所提方法性能优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 患者数据难以被AI模型轻易遗忘，但针对性遗忘方法可有效提升删除效果。

authors_text: Xiao Liu,Spyridon Thermos,Pedro Sanchez,Alison Q. O'Neil,Sotirios A. Tsaftaris
title: vMFNet: Compositionality Meets Domain-generalised Segmentation
title_zh: vMFNet：组合性满足领域通用分割
abstract: Training medical image segmentation models usually requires a large amount of labeled data. By contrast, humans can quickly learn to accurately recognise anatomy of interest from medical (e.g. MRI and CT) images with some limited guidance. Such recognition ability can easily generalise to new images from different clinical centres. This rapid and generalisable learning ability is mostly due to the compositional structure of image patterns in the human brain, which is less incorporated in medical image segmentation. In this paper, we model the compositional components (i.e. patterns) of human anatomy as learnable von-Mises-Fisher (vMF) kernels, which are robust to images collected from different domains (e.g. clinical centres). The image features can be decomposed to (or composed by) the components with the composing operations, i.e. the vMF likelihoods. The vMF likelihoods tell how likely each anatomical part is at each position of the image. Hence, the segmentation mask can be predicted based on the vMF likelihoods. Moreover, with a reconstruction module, unlabeled data can also be used to learn the vMF kernels and likelihoods by recombining them to reconstruct the input image. Extensive experiments show that the proposed vMFNet achieves improved generalisation performance on two benchmarks, especially when annotations are limited. Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/vios-s/vMFNet.
summary: Training medical image segmentation models usually requires a large amount of labeled data. By contrast, humans can quickly learn to accurately recognise anatomy of interest from medical (e.g. MRI and CT) images with some limited guidance. Such recognition ability can easily generalise to new images from different clinical centres. This rapid and generalisable learning ability is mostly due to the compositional structure of image patterns in the human brain, which is less incorporated in medical image segmentation. In this paper, we model the compositional components (i.e. patterns) of human anatomy as learnable von-Mises-Fisher (vMF) kernels, which are robust to images collected from different domains (e.g. clinical centres). The image features can be decomposed to (or composed by) the components with the composing operations, i.e. the vMF likelihoods. The vMF likelihoods tell how likely each anatomical part is at each position of the image. Hence, the segmentation mask can be predicted based on the vMF likelihoods. Moreover, with a reconstruction module, unlabeled data can also be used to learn the vMF kernels and likelihoods by recombining them to reconstruct the input image. Extensive experiments show that the proposed vMFNet achieves improved generalisation performance on two benchmarks, especially when annotations are limited. Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/vios-s/vMFNet.
abstract_zh: 训练医学图像分割模型通常需要大量的标记数据。相比之下，人类可以在一些有限的指导下快速学会从医学（例如 MRI 和 CT）图像中准确识别感兴趣的解剖结构。这种识别能力可以轻松推广到来自不同临床中心的新图像。这种快速且通用的学习能力主要归因于人脑中图像模式的组成结构，而在医学图像分割中较少采用这种结构。在本文中，我们将人体解剖学的组成部分（即模式）建模为可学习的 von-Mises-Fisher (vMF) 内核，该内核对于从不同领域（例如临床中心）收集的图像具有鲁棒性。图像特征可以通过组合操作分解为（或由其组合）分量，即 vMF 似然。 vMF 可能性表明每个解剖部分在图像的每个位置的可能性有多大。因此，可以基于 vMF 似然来预测分割掩模。此外，通过重建模块，未标记的数据还可以通过重新组合它们来学习 vMF 核和似然来重建输入图像。大量实验表明，所提出的 vMFNet 在两个基准上实现了改进的泛化性能，特别是当注释有限时。代码可公开获取：https://github.com/vios-s/vMFNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出vMFNet，通过结合图像模式的组合性与领域泛化能力，解决医学图像分割中数据标注不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割模型依赖大量标注数据，而人类仅需少量指导即可泛化到新领域，这源于人类对图像组合结构的认知能力，而现有方法对此利用不足。
AI.method: 将解剖结构建模为可学习的vMF核，通过分解/组合操作生成vMF似然图，结合重建模块利用未标注数据优化模型。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上验证了vMFNet的泛化性能提升，尤其在标注数据有限时表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模组合性结构并利用未标注数据，vMFNet有效提升了医学图像分割的领域适应能力，为数据稀缺场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Hyogo Hiruma,Hiroshi Ito,Hiroki Mori,Tetsuya Ogata
title: Deep Active Visual Attention for Real-time Robot Motion Generation: Emergence of Tool-body Assimilation and Adaptive Tool-use
title_zh: 用于实时机器人运动生成的深度主动视觉注意：工具体同化和自适应工具使用的出现
abstract: Sufficiently perceiving the environment is a critical factor in robot motion generation. Although the introduction of deep visual processing models have contributed in extending this ability, existing methods lack in the ability to actively modify what to perceive; humans perform internally during visual cognitive processes. This paper addresses the issue by proposing a novel robot motion generation model, inspired by a human cognitive structure. The model incorporates a state-driven active top-down visual attention module, which acquires attentions that can actively change targets based on task states. We term such attentions as role-based attentions, since the acquired attention directed to targets that shared a coherent role throughout the motion. The model was trained on a robot tool-use task, in which the role-based attentions perceived the robot grippers and tool as identical end-effectors, during object picking and object dragging motions respectively. This is analogous to a biological phenomenon called tool-body assimilation, in which one regards a handled tool as an extension of one's body. The results suggested an improvement of flexibility in model's visual perception, which sustained stable attention and motion even if it was provided with untrained tools or exposed to experimenter's distractions.
summary: Sufficiently perceiving the environment is a critical factor in robot motion generation. Although the introduction of deep visual processing models have contributed in extending this ability, existing methods lack in the ability to actively modify what to perceive; humans perform internally during visual cognitive processes. This paper addresses the issue by proposing a novel robot motion generation model, inspired by a human cognitive structure. The model incorporates a state-driven active top-down visual attention module, which acquires attentions that can actively change targets based on task states. We term such attentions as role-based attentions, since the acquired attention directed to targets that shared a coherent role throughout the motion. The model was trained on a robot tool-use task, in which the role-based attentions perceived the robot grippers and tool as identical end-effectors, during object picking and object dragging motions respectively. This is analogous to a biological phenomenon called tool-body assimilation, in which one regards a handled tool as an extension of one's body. The results suggested an improvement of flexibility in model's visual perception, which sustained stable attention and motion even if it was provided with untrained tools or exposed to experimenter's distractions.
abstract_zh: 充分感知环境是机器人运动生成的关键因素。尽管深度视觉处理模型的引入有助于扩展这种能力，但现有方法缺乏主动修改感知内容的能力；人类在视觉认知过程中进行内部表现。本文受人类认知结构的启发，提出了一种新颖的机器人运动生成模型来解决这个问题。该模型包含一个状态驱动的主动自上而下的视觉注意力模块，该模块获取可以根据任务状态主动改变目标的注意力。我们将这种注意力称为基于角色的注意力，因为获得的注意力指向在整个运动中共享连贯角色的目标。该模型接受了机器人工具使用任务的训练，其中基于角色的注意力分别在物体拾取和物体拖动运动期间将机器人抓手和工具视为相同的末端执行器。这类似于一种称为“工具-身体同化”的生物现象，即人们将手持的工具视为身体的延伸。结果表明，模型视觉感知的灵活性得到了改善，即使提供未经训练的工具或受到实验者的干扰，也能维持稳定的注意力和运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度主动视觉注意的实时机器人运动生成模型，通过模拟人类认知结构实现工具-身体同化与自适应工具使用。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人视觉感知方法缺乏主动调整关注目标的能力，而人类在视觉认知过程中会根据任务状态动态调整注意力，因此需开发更接近人类认知机制的模型。
AI.method: 设计状态驱动的自上而下主动视觉注意模块，引入基于角色的注意力机制，使机器人在抓取和拖拽任务中将机械手与工具视为相同末端执行器，模拟工具-身体同化现象。
AI.result: 模型在未训练工具和实验干扰环境下仍能保持稳定的注意力和运动控制，验证了视觉感知灵活性的提升。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过角色注意力机制实现了类似生物工具-身体同化的自适应工具使用能力，为机器人实时运动生成提供了新的认知启发方法。

search_text: Deep Active Visual Attention for Real-time Robot Motion Generation: Emergence of Tool-body Assimilation and Adaptive Tool-use 用于实时机器人运动生成的深度主动视觉注意：工具体同化和自适应工具使用的出现 Sufficiently perceiving the environment is a critical factor in robot motion generation. Although the introduction of deep visual processing models have contributed in extending this ability, existing methods lack in the ability to actively modify what to perceive; humans perform internally during visual cognitive processes. This paper addresses the issue by proposing a novel robot motion generation model, inspired by a human cognitive structure. The model incorporates a state-driven active top-down visual attention module, which acquires attentions that can actively change targets based on task states. We term such attentions as role-based attentions, since the acquired attention directed to targets that shared a coherent role throughout the motion. The model was trained on a robot tool-use task, in which the role-based attentions perceived the robot grippers and tool as identical end-effectors, during object picking and object dragging motions respectively. This is analogous to a biological phenomenon called tool-body assimilation, in which one regards a handled tool as an extension of one's body. The results suggested an improvement of flexibility in model's visual perception, which sustained stable attention and motion even if it was provided with untrained tools or exposed to experimenter's distractions. 充分感知环境是机器人运动生成的关键因素。尽管深度视觉处理模型的引入有助于扩展这种能力，但现有方法缺乏主动修改感知内容的能力；人类在视觉认知过程中进行内部表现。本文受人类认知结构的启发，提出了一种新颖的机器人运动生成模型来解决这个问题。该模型包含一个状态驱动的主动自上而下的视觉注意力模块，该模块获取可以根据任务状态主动改变目标的注意力。我们将这种注意力称为基于角色的注意力，因为获得的注意力指向在整个运动中共享连贯角色的目标。该模型接受了机器人工具使用任务的训练，其中基于角色的注意力分别在物体拾取和物体拖动运动期间将机器人抓手和工具视为相同的末端执行器。这类似于一种称为“工具-身体同化”的生物现象，即人们将手持的工具视为身体的延伸。结果表明，模型视觉感知的灵活性得到了改善，即使提供未经训练的工具或受到实验者的干扰，也能维持稳定的注意力和运动。 本文提出一种基于深度主动视觉注意的实时机器人运动生成模型，通过模拟人类认知结构实现工具-身体同化与自适应工具使用。 Hyogo Hiruma,Hiroshi Ito,Hiroki Mori,Tetsuya Ogata cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Fang Bai,Adrien Bartoli
title: Procrustes Analysis with Deformations: A Closed-Form Solution by Eigenvalue Decomposition
title_zh: 变形 Procrustes 分析：特征值分解的闭式解
comment: Published on International journal of computer vision (IJCV) 2022
comments: Published on International journal of computer vision (IJCV) 2022
abstract: Generalized Procrustes Analysis (GPA) is the problem of bringing multiple shapes into a common reference by estimating transformations. GPA has been extensively studied for the Euclidean and affine transformations. We introduce GPA with deformable transformations, which forms a much wider and difficult problem. We specifically study a class of transformations called the Linear Basis Warps (LBWs), which contains the affine transformation and most of the usual deformation models, such as the Thin-Plate Spline (TPS). GPA with deformations is a nonconvex underconstrained problem. We resolve the fundamental ambiguities of deformable GPA using two shape constraints requiring the eigenvalues of the shape covariance. These eigenvalues can be computed independently as a prior or posterior. We give a closed-form and optimal solution to deformable GPA based on an eigenvalue decomposition. This solution handles regularization, favoring smooth deformation fields. It requires the transformation model to satisfy a fundamental property of free-translations, which asserts that the model can implement any translation. We show that this property fortunately holds true for most common transformation models, including the affine and TPS models. For the other models, we give another closed-form solution to GPA, which agrees exactly with the first solution for models with free-translation. We give pseudo-code for computing our solution, leading to the proposed DefGPA method, which is fast, globally optimal and widely applicable. We validate our method and compare it to previous work on six diverse 2D and 3D datasets, with special care taken to choose the hyperparameters from cross-validation.
summary: Generalized Procrustes Analysis (GPA) is the problem of bringing multiple shapes into a common reference by estimating transformations. GPA has been extensively studied for the Euclidean and affine transformations. We introduce GPA with deformable transformations, which forms a much wider and difficult problem. We specifically study a class of transformations called the Linear Basis Warps (LBWs), which contains the affine transformation and most of the usual deformation models, such as the Thin-Plate Spline (TPS). GPA with deformations is a nonconvex underconstrained problem. We resolve the fundamental ambiguities of deformable GPA using two shape constraints requiring the eigenvalues of the shape covariance. These eigenvalues can be computed independently as a prior or posterior. We give a closed-form and optimal solution to deformable GPA based on an eigenvalue decomposition. This solution handles regularization, favoring smooth deformation fields. It requires the transformation model to satisfy a fundamental property of free-translations, which asserts that the model can implement any translation. We show that this property fortunately holds true for most common transformation models, including the affine and TPS models. For the other models, we give another closed-form solution to GPA, which agrees exactly with the first solution for models with free-translation. We give pseudo-code for computing our solution, leading to the proposed DefGPA method, which is fast, globally optimal and widely applicable. We validate our method and compare it to previous work on six diverse 2D and 3D datasets, with special care taken to choose the hyperparameters from cross-validation.
abstract_zh: 广义 Procrustes 分析 (GPA) 是通过估计变换将多个形状引入公共参考的问题。 GPA 已针对欧几里得变换和仿射变换进行了广泛研究。我们引入带有可变形变换的 GPA，这形成了一个更广泛、更困难的问题。我们专门研究了一类称为线性基础扭曲（LBW）的变换，它包含仿射变换和大多数常见的变形模型，例如薄板样条（TPS）。带有变形的 GPA 是一个非凸欠约束问题。我们使用两个需要形状协方差特征值的形状约束来解决可变形 GPA 的基本模糊性。这些特征值可以作为先验或后验独立计算。我们给出了基于特征值分解的可变形 GPA 的封闭形式最优解。该解决方案处理正则化，有利于平滑变形场。它要求转换模型满足自由翻译的基本属性，该属性断言该模型可以实现任何翻译。幸运的是，我们证明这一属性适用于大多数常见的变换模型，包括仿射模型和 TPS 模型。对于其他模型，我们给出了 GPA 的另一个封闭式解，它与自由翻译模型的第一个解完全一致。我们给出了计算解决方案的伪代码，从而得出了所提出的 DefGPA 方法，该方法快速、全局最优且广泛适用。我们验证了我们的方法，并将其与之前在六个不同的 2D 和 3D 数据集上的工作进行了比较，特别注意从交叉验证中选择超参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于特征值分解的闭式解方法，用于解决具有可变形变换的广义Procrustes分析（DefGPA）问题，能够处理包括薄板样条（TPS）在内的复杂形变模型。
AI.motivation: 传统Procrustes分析主要针对欧几里得和仿射变换，难以处理更复杂的可变形变换。现有方法在非凸且欠约束的形变Procrustes问题中存在根本性歧义，需通过形状约束解决。
AI.method: 通过形状协方差矩阵的特征值约束消除歧义，利用特征值分解构建闭式解。方法要求变换模型满足自由平移特性，并针对不同模型提供统一或特定的闭式解方案。
AI.result: 提出的DefGPA方法在六个2D/3D数据集上验证，相比现有方法具有更快的速度、全局最优性和广泛适用性，超参数通过交叉验证选择。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可变形Procrustes分析提供了理论完备且高效的解决方案，适用于多种变换模型，实验验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。

search_text: Procrustes Analysis with Deformations: A Closed-Form Solution by Eigenvalue Decomposition 变形 Procrustes 分析：特征值分解的闭式解 Generalized Procrustes Analysis (GPA) is the problem of bringing multiple shapes into a common reference by estimating transformations. GPA has been extensively studied for the Euclidean and affine transformations. We introduce GPA with deformable transformations, which forms a much wider and difficult problem. These eigenvalues can be computed independently as a prior or posterior. We give a closed-form and optimal solution to deformable GPA based on an eigenvalue decomposition. It requires the transformation model to satisfy a fundamental property of free-translations, which asserts that the model can implement any translation. We show that this property fortunately holds true for most common transformation models, including the affine and TPS models. We validate our method and compare it to previous work on six diverse 2D and 3D datasets, with special care taken to choose the hyperparameters from cross-validation. 广义 Procrustes 分析 (GPA) 是通过估计变换将多个形状引入公共参考的问题。 GPA 已针对欧几里得变换和仿射变换进行了广泛研究。我们引入带有可变形变换的 GPA，这形成了一个更广泛、更困难的问题。我们专门研究了一类称为线性基础扭曲（LBW）的变换，它包含仿射变换和大多数常见的变形模型，例如薄板样条（TPS）。带有变形的 GPA 是一个非凸欠约束问题。我们使用两个需要形状协方差特征值的形状约束来解决可变形 GPA 的基本模糊性。这些特征值可以作为先验或后验独立计算。我们给出了基于特征值分解的可变形 GPA 的封闭形式最优解。该解决方案处理正则化，有利于平滑变形场。它要求转换模型满足自由翻译的基本属性，该属性断言该模型可以实现任何翻译。幸运的是，我们证明这一属性适用于大多数常见的变换模型，包括仿射模型和 TPS 模型。对于其他模型，我们给出了 GPA 的另一个封闭式解，它与自由翻译模型的第一个解完全一致。我们给出了计算解决方案的伪代码，从而得出了所提出的 DefGPA 方法，该方法快速、全局最优且广泛适用。我们验证了我们的方法，并将其与之前在六个不同的 2D 和 3D 数据集上的工作进行了比较，特别注意从交叉验证中选择超参数。 本文提出了一种基于特征值分解的闭式解方法，用于解决具有可变形变换的广义Procrustes分析（DefGPA）问题，能够处理包括薄板样条（TPS）在内的复杂形变模型。 Fang Bai,Adrien Bartoli cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Qinwen Hu,Zhongshu Hou,Xiaohuai Le,Jing Lu
title: A light-weight full-band speech enhancement model
title_zh: 一种轻量级全频带语音增强模型
abstract: Deep neural network based full-band speech enhancement systems face challenges of high demand of computational resources and imbalanced frequency distribution. In this paper, a light-weight full-band model is proposed with two dedicated strategies, i.e., a learnable spectral compression mapping for more effective high-band spectral information compression, and the utilization of the multi-head attention mechanism for more effective modeling of the global spectral pattern. Experiments validate the efficacy of the proposed strategies and show that the proposed model achieves competitive performance with only 0.89M parameters.
summary: Deep neural network based full-band speech enhancement systems face challenges of high demand of computational resources and imbalanced frequency distribution. In this paper, a light-weight full-band model is proposed with two dedicated strategies, i.e., a learnable spectral compression mapping for more effective high-band spectral information compression, and the utilization of the multi-head attention mechanism for more effective modeling of the global spectral pattern. Experiments validate the efficacy of the proposed strategies and show that the proposed model achieves competitive performance with only 0.89M parameters.
abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络的全频带语音增强系统面临计算资源高需求和频率分布不平衡的挑战。本文提出了一种具有两种专用策略的轻量级全频带模型，即用于更有效的高频带光谱信息压缩的可学习光谱压缩映射，以及利用多头注意力机制来更有效地对全局光谱模式进行建模。实验验证了所提出策略的有效性，并表明所提出的模型仅用 0.89M 参数即可实现有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级全频带语音增强模型，解决深度神经网络在计算资源需求高和频率分布不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有全频带语音增强系统存在计算资源消耗大、高频段谱信息压缩效率低及频谱模式建模不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计可学习谱压缩映射增强高频段信息压缩效果，并引入多头注意力机制建模全局频谱模式。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型参数量仅0.89M即可达到与其他方法相当的语音增强性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两种策略有效平衡了模型轻量化与全频带增强性能，为低资源场景提供可行方案。

search_text: A light-weight full-band speech enhancement model 一种轻量级全频带语音增强模型 Deep neural network based full-band speech enhancement systems face challenges of high demand of computational resources and imbalanced frequency distribution. In this paper, a light-weight full-band model is proposed with two dedicated strategies, i.e., a learnable spectral compression mapping for more effective high-band spectral information compression, and the utilization of the multi-head attention mechanism for more effective modeling of the global spectral pattern. Experiments validate the efficacy of the proposed strategies and show that the proposed model achieves competitive performance with only 0.89M parameters. 基于深度神经网络的全频带语音增强系统面临计算资源高需求和频率分布不平衡的挑战。本文提出了一种具有两种专用策略的轻量级全频带模型，即用于更有效的高频带光谱信息压缩的可学习光谱压缩映射，以及利用多头注意力机制来更有效地对全局光谱模式进行建模。实验验证了所提出策略的有效性，并表明所提出的模型仅用 0.89M 参数即可实现有竞争力的性能。 本文提出一种轻量级全频带语音增强模型，解决深度神经网络在计算资源需求高和频率分布不平衡的问题。 Qinwen Hu,Zhongshu Hou,Xiaohuai Le,Jing Lu eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Huili Xing
title: An extension of process calculus for asynchronous communications between agents with epistemic states
title_zh: 具有认知状态的代理之间异步通信的过程演算的扩展
abstract: It plays a central role in intelligent agent systems to model agent's epistemic state and its change. Asynchrony plays a key role in distributed systems, in which the messages transmitted may not be received instantly by the agents. To characterize asynchronous communications, asynchronous announcement logic (AAL) has been presented, which focuses on the logic laws of the change of epistemic state after receiving information. However AAL does not involve the interactive behaviours between an agent and its environment. Through enriching the well-known pi-calculus by adding the operators for passing basic facts and applying the well-known action model logic to describe agents' epistemic states, this paper presents the e-calculus to model epistemic interactions between agents with epistemic states. The e-calculus can be adopted to characterize synchronous and asynchronous communications between agents. To capture the asynchrony, a buffer pools is constructed to store the basic facts announced and each agent reads these facts from this buffer pool in some order. Based on the transmission of link names, the e-calculus is able to realize reading from this buffer pool in different orders. This paper gives two examples: one is to read in the order in which the announced basic facts are sent (First-in-first-out, FIFO), and the other is in an arbitrary order.
summary: It plays a central role in intelligent agent systems to model agent's epistemic state and its change. Asynchrony plays a key role in distributed systems, in which the messages transmitted may not be received instantly by the agents. To characterize asynchronous communications, asynchronous announcement logic (AAL) has been presented, which focuses on the logic laws of the change of epistemic state after receiving information. However AAL does not involve the interactive behaviours between an agent and its environment. Through enriching the well-known pi-calculus by adding the operators for passing basic facts and applying the well-known action model logic to describe agents' epistemic states, this paper presents the e-calculus to model epistemic interactions between agents with epistemic states. The e-calculus can be adopted to characterize synchronous and asynchronous communications between agents. To capture the asynchrony, a buffer pools is constructed to store the basic facts announced and each agent reads these facts from this buffer pool in some order. Based on the transmission of link names, the e-calculus is able to realize reading from this buffer pool in different orders. This paper gives two examples: one is to read in the order in which the announced basic facts are sent (First-in-first-out, FIFO), and the other is in an arbitrary order.
abstract_zh: 它在智能代理系统中发挥着核心作用，对代理的认知状态及其变化进行建模。异步在分布式系统中起着关键作用，在分布式系统中，代理可能无法立即接收到传输的消息。为了表征异步通信，提出了异步公告逻辑（AAL），它关注接收信息后认知状态变化的逻辑规律。然而，AAL 不涉及智能体与其环境之间的交互行为。通过添加传递基本事实的算子来丰富众所周知的 pi 演算，并应用众所周知的动作模型逻辑来描述智能体的认知状态，本文提出了 e 演算来对具有认知状态的智能体之间的认知交互进行建模。可以采用电子演算来表征代理之间的同步和异步通信。为了捕获异步性，构建了一个缓冲池来存储所宣布的基本事实，并且每个代理以某种顺序从该缓冲池中读取这些事实。基于链接名称的传输，电子演算能够实现以不同的顺序从该缓冲池中读取。本文举了两个例子：一是按照公布的基本事实发送的顺序（先进先出，FIFO）读取，二是按照任意顺序读取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展的进程演算（e-calculus），用于建模具有认知状态的智能体之间的异步通信。
AI.motivation: 现有异步公告逻辑（AAL）无法描述智能体与其环境之间的交互行为，需结合进程演算与认知状态建模方法以解决异步通信中的认知动态问题。
AI.method: 通过扩展π演算引入基本事实传递算子，并结合行动模型逻辑描述认知状态，构建缓冲池存储异步消息，支持按发送顺序（FIFO）或任意顺序读取。
AI.result: e-calculus可表征同步与异步通信，通过缓冲池机制实现不同消息读取顺序的灵活性，并给出两种具体实现示例。
AI.conclusion: e-calculus有效融合了进程交互与认知状态演化，为异步通信场景下的智能体系统提供了更精确的建模框架。

authors_text: Johann Frei,Ludwig Frei-Stuber,Frank Kramer
title: GERNERMED++: Transfer Learning in German Medical NLP
title_zh: GERNERMED++：德国医学 NLP 中的迁移学习
abstract: We present a statistical model for German medical natural language processing trained for named entity recognition (NER) as an open, publicly available model. The work serves as a refined successor to our first GERNERMED model which is substantially outperformed by our work. We demonstrate the effectiveness of combining multiple techniques in order to achieve strong results in entity recognition performance by the means of transfer-learning on pretrained deep language models (LM), word-alignment and neural machine translation. Due to the sparse situation on open, public medical entity recognition models for German texts, this work offers benefits to the German research community on medical NLP as a baseline model. Since our model is based on public English data, its weights are provided without legal restrictions on usage and distribution. The sample code and the statistical model is available at: https://github.com/frankkramer-lab/GERNERMED-pp
summary: We present a statistical model for German medical natural language processing trained for named entity recognition (NER) as an open, publicly available model. The work serves as a refined successor to our first GERNERMED model which is substantially outperformed by our work. We demonstrate the effectiveness of combining multiple techniques in order to achieve strong results in entity recognition performance by the means of transfer-learning on pretrained deep language models (LM), word-alignment and neural machine translation. Due to the sparse situation on open, public medical entity recognition models for German texts, this work offers benefits to the German research community on medical NLP as a baseline model. Since our model is based on public English data, its weights are provided without legal restrictions on usage and distribution. The sample code and the statistical model is available at: https://github.com/frankkramer-lab/GERNERMED-pp
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于德国医学自然语言处理的统计模型，该模型经过训练以命名实体识别（NER）作为开放、公开可用的模型。这项工作是我们第一个 GERNERMED 模型的改进后继者，该模型的表现远远优于我们的工作。我们展示了结合多种技术的有效性，以便通过对预训练深度语言模型（LM）、单词对齐和神经机器翻译进行迁移学习来在实体识别性能方面取得优异的结果。由于德语文本的开放公共医疗实体识别模型很少，这项工作为德国研究界将医学 NLP 作为基线模型带来了好处。由于我们的模型基于公共英语数据，因此其权重的提供不受使用和分发的法律限制。示例代码和统计模型位于：https://github.com/frankkramer-lab/GERNERMED-pp

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个用于德语医学文本命名实体识别（NER）的统计模型GERNERMED++，通过迁移学习等技术提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有公开的德语医学NER模型稀缺且效果有限，需提供更优的基线模型以促进德语医学自然语言处理研究。
AI.method: 结合迁移学习、预训练语言模型、词对齐及神经机器翻译技术，基于公开英语数据训练德语医学NER模型。
AI.result: 新模型在实体识别性能上显著优于初代GERNERMED，且作为开源工具向德语研究社区提供无法律限制的使用权。
AI.conclusion: GERNERMED++为德语医学NLP提供了有效基准，其公开性与性能优势可推动相关领域研究进展。

Due to the sparse situation on open, public medical entity recognition models for German texts, this work offers benefits to the German research community on medical NLP as a baseline model. The sample code and the statistical model is available at: https://github.com/frankkramer-lab/GERNERMED-pp 我们提出了一种用于德国医学自然语言处理的统计模型，该模型经过训练以命名实体识别（NER）作为开放、公开可用的模型。这项工作是我们第一个 GERNERMED 模型的改进后继者，该模型的表现远远优于我们的工作。我们展示了结合多种技术的有效性，以便通过对预训练深度语言模型（LM）、单词对齐和神经机器翻译进行迁移学习来在实体识别性能方面取得优异的结果。由于德语文本的开放公共医疗实体识别模型很少，这项工作为德国研究界将医学 NLP 作为基线模型带来了好处。由于我们的模型基于公共英语数据，因此其权重的提供不受使用和分发的法律限制。示例代码和统计模型位于：https://github.com/frankkramer-lab/GERNERMED-pp 本文提出一个用于德语医学文本命名实体识别（NER）的统计模型GERNERMED++，通过迁移学习等技术提升性能。 Johann Frei,Ludwig Frei-Stuber,Frank Kramer cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Francesco Pinto,Harry Yang,Ser-Nam Lim,Philip H. S. Torr,Puneet K. Dokania
title: RegMixup: Mixup as a Regularizer Can Surprisingly Improve Accuracy and Out Distribution Robustness
title_zh: RegMixup：混合作为正则化器可以令人惊讶地提高准确性和输出分布鲁棒性
abstract: We show that the effectiveness of the well celebrated Mixup [Zhang et al., 2018] can be further improved if instead of using it as the sole learning objective, it is utilized as an additional regularizer to the standard cross-entropy loss. This simple change not only provides much improved accuracy but also significantly improves the quality of the predictive uncertainty estimation of Mixup in most cases under various forms of covariate shifts and out-of-distribution detection experiments. In fact, we observe that Mixup yields much degraded performance on detecting out-of-distribution samples possibly, as we show empirically, because of its tendency to learn models that exhibit high-entropy throughout; making it difficult to differentiate in-distribution samples from out-distribution ones. To show the efficacy of our approach (RegMixup), we provide thorough analyses and experiments on vision datasets (ImageNet & CIFAR-10/100) and compare it with a suite of recent approaches for reliable uncertainty estimation.
summary: We show that the effectiveness of the well celebrated Mixup [Zhang et al., 2018] can be further improved if instead of using it as the sole learning objective, it is utilized as an additional regularizer to the standard cross-entropy loss. This simple change not only provides much improved accuracy but also significantly improves the quality of the predictive uncertainty estimation of Mixup in most cases under various forms of covariate shifts and out-of-distribution detection experiments. In fact, we observe that Mixup yields much degraded performance on detecting out-of-distribution samples possibly, as we show empirically, because of its tendency to learn models that exhibit high-entropy throughout; making it difficult to differentiate in-distribution samples from out-distribution ones. To show the efficacy of our approach (RegMixup), we provide thorough analyses and experiments on vision datasets (ImageNet & CIFAR-10/100) and compare it with a suite of recent approaches for reliable uncertainty estimation.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，如果不将其作为唯一的学习目标，而是将其用作标准交叉熵损失的附加正则化器，则可以进一步提高著名的 Mixup [Zhang et al., 2018] 的有效性。这个简单的改变不仅大大提高了准确性，而且在大多数情况下在各种形式的协变量移位和分布外检测实验下显着提高了 Mixup 的预测不确定性估计的质量。事实上，我们观察到 Mixup 在检测分布外样本时可能会产生很大的性能下降，正如我们的经验所表明的那样，因为它倾向于学习始终表现出高熵的模型；使得区分分布内样本和分布外样本变得困难。为了展示我们的方法 (RegMixup) 的有效性，我们对视觉数据集 (ImageNet 和 CIFAR-10/100) 进行了全面的分析和实验，并将其与一系列最新的可靠不确定性估计方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RegMixup方法，通过将Mixup作为正则化项与交叉熵损失结合，提升模型准确率和分布外鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统Mixup作为单一学习目标存在局限，尤其在分布外检测中表现不佳，因其导致模型熵值过高而难以区分分布内与分布外样本。
AI.method: 在标准交叉熵损失基础上引入Mixup作为正则化项，通过调整损失函数形式优化训练过程，并在ImageNet、CIFAR等数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: RegMixup在准确率和分布外检测任务中均优于现有方法，有效缓解了Mixup导致的高熵问题，提升了不确定性估计质量。
AI.conclusion: RegMixup是一种简单有效的改进方案，通过正则化形式结合Mixup与交叉熵损失，显著提升了模型性能与分布外鲁棒性。

authors_text: Minhui Zou,Junlong Zhou,Xiaotong Cui,Wei Wang,Shahar Kvatinsky
title: Enhancing Security of Memristor Computing System Through Secure Weight Mapping
title_zh: 通过安全权重映射增强忆阻器计算系统的安全性
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, accepted by IEEE ISVLSI 2022
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures, accepted by IEEE ISVLSI 2022
abstract: Emerging memristor computing systems have demonstrated great promise in improving the energy efficiency of neural network (NN) algorithms. The NN weights stored in memristor crossbars, however, may face potential theft attacks due to the nonvolatility of the memristor devices. In this paper, we propose to protect the NN weights by mapping selected columns of them in the form of 1's complements and leaving the other columns in their original form, preventing the adversary from knowing the exact representation of each weight. The results show that compared with prior work, our method achieves effectiveness comparable to the best of them and reduces the hardware overhead by more than 18X.
summary: Emerging memristor computing systems have demonstrated great promise in improving the energy efficiency of neural network (NN) algorithms. The NN weights stored in memristor crossbars, however, may face potential theft attacks due to the nonvolatility of the memristor devices. In this paper, we propose to protect the NN weights by mapping selected columns of them in the form of 1's complements and leaving the other columns in their original form, preventing the adversary from knowing the exact representation of each weight. The results show that compared with prior work, our method achieves effectiveness comparable to the best of them and reduces the hardware overhead by more than 18X.
abstract_zh: 新兴的忆阻器计算系统在提高神经网络 (NN) 算法的能源效率方面展现出了巨大的前景。然而，由于忆阻器器件的非易失性，存储在忆阻器交叉开关中的神经网络权重可能面临潜在的盗窃攻击。在本文中，我们建议通过以 1 补码的形式映射其中选定的列并保留其他列的原始形式来保护神经网络权重，从而防止对手知道每个权重的准确表示。结果表明，与之前的工作相比，我们的方法取得了与其中最好的方法相当的有效性，并将硬件开销降低了 18 倍以上。

AI.tldr: 通过安全权重映射保护忆阻器计算系统中的神经网络权重，防止潜在的盗窃攻击
AI.motivation: 忆阻器的非易失性使得存储的神经网络权重容易受到盗窃攻击，需要保护权重的机密性
AI.method: 将选定的权重列转换为1的补码形式存储，其余列保持原样，增加攻击者解析权重的难度
AI.result: 相比现有方法，该方法在安全性效果相当的同时，硬件开销降低超过18倍
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了忆阻器计算系统的安全性，同时显著降低了硬件成本，为神经网络权重保护提供了高效解决方案

authors_text: Ben Sorscher,Robert Geirhos,Shashank Shekhar,Surya Ganguli,Ari S. Morcos
title: Beyond neural scaling laws: beating power law scaling via data pruning
title_zh: 超越神经缩放定律：通过数据修剪击败幂律缩放
comment: Outstanding Paper Award @ NeurIPS 2022. Added github link to metric scores
comments: Outstanding Paper Award @ NeurIPS 2022. Added github link to metric scores
abstract: Widely observed neural scaling laws, in which error falls off as a power of the training set size, model size, or both, have driven substantial performance improvements in deep learning. However, these improvements through scaling alone require considerable costs in compute and energy. Here we focus on the scaling of error with dataset size and show how in theory we can break beyond power law scaling and potentially even reduce it to exponential scaling instead if we have access to a high-quality data pruning metric that ranks the order in which training examples should be discarded to achieve any pruned dataset size. We then test this improved scaling prediction with pruned dataset size empirically, and indeed observe better than power law scaling in practice on ResNets trained on CIFAR-10, SVHN, and ImageNet. Next, given the importance of finding high-quality pruning metrics, we perform the first large-scale benchmarking study of ten different data pruning metrics on ImageNet. We find most existing high performing metrics scale poorly to ImageNet, while the best are computationally intensive and require labels for every image. We therefore developed a new simple, cheap and scalable self-supervised pruning metric that demonstrates comparable performance to the best supervised metrics. Overall, our work suggests that the discovery of good data-pruning metrics may provide a viable path forward to substantially improved neural scaling laws, thereby reducing the resource costs of modern deep learning.
summary: Widely observed neural scaling laws, in which error falls off as a power of the training set size, model size, or both, have driven substantial performance improvements in deep learning. However, these improvements through scaling alone require considerable costs in compute and energy. Here we focus on the scaling of error with dataset size and show how in theory we can break beyond power law scaling and potentially even reduce it to exponential scaling instead if we have access to a high-quality data pruning metric that ranks the order in which training examples should be discarded to achieve any pruned dataset size. We then test this improved scaling prediction with pruned dataset size empirically, and indeed observe better than power law scaling in practice on ResNets trained on CIFAR-10, SVHN, and ImageNet. Next, given the importance of finding high-quality pruning metrics, we perform the first large-scale benchmarking study of ten different data pruning metrics on ImageNet. We find most existing high performing metrics scale poorly to ImageNet, while the best are computationally intensive and require labels for every image. We therefore developed a new simple, cheap and scalable self-supervised pruning metric that demonstrates comparable performance to the best supervised metrics. Overall, our work suggests that the discovery of good data-pruning metrics may provide a viable path forward to substantially improved neural scaling laws, thereby reducing the resource costs of modern deep learning.
abstract_zh: 广泛观察到的神经缩放定律（其中误差随着训练集大小、模型大小或两者的幂而下降）推动了深度学习性能的显着提高。然而，仅通过扩展来实现这些改进就需要相当大的计算和能源成本。在这里，我们重点关注数据集大小的误差缩放，并展示理论上我们如何突破幂律缩放，​​甚至有可能将其减少到指数缩放，如果我们能够访问高质量的数据修剪指标，该指标对训练样本应被丢弃的顺序进行排序，以实现任何修剪的数据集大小。然后，我们使用修剪后的数据集大小凭经验测试这种改进的缩放预测，并且在 CIFAR-10、SVHN 和 ImageNet 上训练的 ResNet 实践中确实观察到比幂律缩放更好的结果。接下来，考虑到寻找高质量剪枝指标的重要性，我们在 ImageNet 上对十种不同的数据剪枝指标进行了首次大规模基准测试研究。我们发现大多数现有的高性能指标在 ImageNet 上的扩展性很差，而最好的指标都是计算密集型的，并且需要为每个图像添加标签。因此，我们开发了一种新的简单、廉价且可扩展的自监督修剪指标，其性能与最佳监督指标相当。总的来说，我们的工作表明，良好的数据修剪指标的发现可能为显着改进神经缩放定律提供一条可行的道路，从而降低现代深度学习的资源成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过数据剪枝打破神经网络的幂律扩展规律，以降低计算和能源成本。
AI.motivation: 神经网络的性能提升依赖于模型和数据集规模的扩展，但这一过程消耗大量计算资源和能源，需寻找更高效的方法。
AI.method: 理论上分析数据剪枝如何突破幂律扩展，并通过实验验证；在ImageNet上基准测试十种剪枝指标，提出一种高效自监督剪枝指标。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、SVHN和ImageNet上验证了剪枝后优于幂律扩展的性能；新提出的自监督指标性能接近最佳监督指标。
AI.conclusion: 优质数据剪枝指标可显著改进神经网络扩展规律，从而降低深度学习的资源消耗。

search_text: Beyond neural scaling laws: beating power law scaling via data pruning 超越神经缩放定律：通过数据修剪击败幂律缩放 Widely observed neural scaling laws, in which error falls off as a power of the training set size, model size, or both, have driven substantial performance improvements in deep learning. However, these improvements through scaling alone require considerable costs in compute and energy. Here we focus on the scaling of error with dataset size and show how in theory we can break beyond power law scaling and potentially even reduce it to exponential scaling instead if we have access to a high-quality data pruning metric that ranks the order in which training examples should be discarded to achieve any pruned dataset size. We then test this improved scaling prediction with pruned dataset size empirically, and indeed observe better than power law scaling in practice on ResNets trained on CIFAR-10, SVHN, and ImageNet. Next, given the importance of finding high-quality pruning metrics, we perform the first large-scale benchmarking study of ten different data pruning metrics on ImageNet. We find most existing high performing metrics scale poorly to ImageNet, while the best are computationally intensive and require labels for every image. We therefore developed a new simple, cheap and scalable self-supervised pruning metric that demonstrates comparable performance to the best supervised metrics. Overall, our work suggests that the discovery of good data-pruning metrics may provide a viable path forward to substantially improved neural scaling laws, thereby reducing the resource costs of modern deep learning. 广泛观察到的神经缩放定律（其中误差随着训练集大小、模型大小或两者的幂而下降）推动了深度学习性能的显着提高。然而，仅通过扩展来实现这些改进就需要相当大的计算和能源成本。在这里，我们重点关注数据集大小的误差缩放，并展示理论上我们如何突破幂律缩放，​​甚至有可能将其减少到指数缩放，如果我们能够访问高质量的数据修剪指标，该指标对训练样本应被丢弃的顺序进行排序，以实现任何修剪的数据集大小。然后，我们使用修剪后的数据集大小凭经验测试这种改进的缩放预测，并且在 CIFAR-10、SVHN 和 ImageNet 上训练的 ResNet 实践中确实观察到比幂律缩放更好的结果。接下来，考虑到寻找高质量剪枝指标的重要性，我们在 ImageNet 上对十种不同的数据剪枝指标进行了首次大规模基准测试研究。我们发现大多数现有的高性能指标在 ImageNet 上的扩展性很差，而最好的指标都是计算密集型的，并且需要为每个图像添加标签。因此，我们开发了一种新的简单、廉价且可扩展的自监督修剪指标，其性能与最佳监督指标相当。总的来说，我们的工作表明，良好的数据修剪指标的发现可能为显着改进神经缩放定律提供一条可行的道路，从而降低现代深度学习的资源成本。 本文提出通过数据剪枝打破神经网络的幂律扩展规律，以降低计算和能源成本。 Ben Sorscher,Robert Geirhos,Shashank Shekhar,Surya Ganguli,Ari S. Morcos cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Cédric Rommel,Joseph Paillard,Thomas Moreau,Alexandre Gramfort
title: Data augmentation for learning predictive models on EEG: a systematic comparison
title_zh: 脑电图学习预测模型的数据增强：系统比较
comment: Accepted in Journal of Neural Engineering
comments: Accepted in Journal of Neural Engineering
abstract: Objective: The use of deep learning for electroencephalography (EEG) classification tasks has been rapidly growing in the last years, yet its application has been limited by the relatively small size of EEG datasets. Data augmentation, which consists in artificially increasing the size of the dataset during training, can be employed to alleviate this problem. While a few augmentation transformations for EEG data have been proposed in the literature, their positive impact on performance is often evaluated on a single dataset and compared to one or two competing augmentation methods. This work proposes to better validate the existing data augmentation approaches through a unified and exhaustive analysis. Approach: We compare quantitatively 13 different augmentations with two different predictive tasks, datasets and models, using three different types of experiments. Main results: We demonstrate that employing the adequate data augmentations can bring up to 45% accuracy improvements in low data regimes compared to the same model trained without any augmentation. Our experiments also show that there is no single best augmentation strategy, as the good augmentations differ on each task. Significance: Our results highlight the best data augmentations to consider for sleep stage classification and motor imagery brain-computer interfaces. More broadly, it demonstrates that EEG classification tasks benefit from adequate data augmentation
summary: Objective: The use of deep learning for electroencephalography (EEG) classification tasks has been rapidly growing in the last years, yet its application has been limited by the relatively small size of EEG datasets. Data augmentation, which consists in artificially increasing the size of the dataset during training, can be employed to alleviate this problem. While a few augmentation transformations for EEG data have been proposed in the literature, their positive impact on performance is often evaluated on a single dataset and compared to one or two competing augmentation methods. This work proposes to better validate the existing data augmentation approaches through a unified and exhaustive analysis. Approach: We compare quantitatively 13 different augmentations with two different predictive tasks, datasets and models, using three different types of experiments. Main results: We demonstrate that employing the adequate data augmentations can bring up to 45% accuracy improvements in low data regimes compared to the same model trained without any augmentation. Our experiments also show that there is no single best augmentation strategy, as the good augmentations differ on each task. Significance: Our results highlight the best data augmentations to consider for sleep stage classification and motor imagery brain-computer interfaces. More broadly, it demonstrates that EEG classification tasks benefit from adequate data augmentation
abstract_zh: 目的：深度学习在脑电图（EEG）分类任务中的应用在过去几年中迅速增长，但其应用受到脑电图数据集相对较小的限制。数据增强，即在训练期间人为地增加数据集的大小，可以用来缓解这个问题。虽然文献中已经提出了一些针对脑电图数据的增强变换，但它们对性能的积极影响通常是在单个数据集上进行评估，并与一种或两种竞争增强方法进行比较。这项工作建议通过统一且详尽的分析来更好地验证现有的数据增强方法。方法：我们使用三种不同类型的实验，对 13 种不同的增强与两种不同的预测任务、数据集和模型进行定量比较。主要结果：我们证明，与未经任何增强训练的相同模型相比，采用适当的数据增强可以在低数据情况下提高高达 45% 的准确性。我们的实验还表明，不存在单一的最佳增强策略，因为每个任务的良好增强效果都不同。意义：我们的结果强调了睡眠阶段分类和运动想象脑机接口所需考虑的最佳数据增强。更广泛地说，它表明脑电图分类任务受益于充分的数据增强

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了13种EEG数据增强方法在不同预测任务中的效果，以提升深度学习模型性能。
AI.motivation: EEG数据集规模小限制了深度学习应用，现有数据增强方法缺乏全面评估，需统一验证其有效性。
AI.method: 定量比较13种增强方法在两种任务、多个数据集和模型中的表现，通过三类实验分析其影响。
AI.result: 合适的数据增强在低数据场景下可使模型准确率提升45%，但最佳方法因任务而异。
AI.conclusion: 睡眠阶段分类和运动想象脑机接口应选择特定增强策略，EEG分类任务需结合数据增强以提升性能。

authors_text: Javier Segovia-Aguas,Yolanda E-Martín,Sergio Jiménez
title: Representation and Synthesis of C++ Programs for Generalized Planning
title_zh: 广义规划C++程序的表示与综合
comment: Accepted at sixth workshop on Generalization in Planning at IJCAI-ECAI 2022
comments: Accepted at sixth workshop on Generalization in Planning at IJCAI-ECAI 2022
abstract: The paper introduces a novel representation for Generalized Planning (GP) problems, and their solutions, as C++ programs. Our C++ representation allows to formally proving the termination of generalized plans, and to specifying their asymptotic complexity w.r.t. the number of world objects. Characterizing the complexity of C++ generalized plans enables the application of a combinatorial search that enumerates the space of possible GP solutions in order of complexity. Experimental results show that our implementation of this approach, which we call BFGP++, outperforms the previous GP as heuristic search approach for the computation of generalized plans represented as compiler-styled programs. Last but not least, the execution of a C++ program on a classical planning instance is a deterministic grounding-free and search-free process, so our C++ representation allows us to automatically validate the computed solutions on large test instances of thousands of objects, where off-the-shelf classical planners get stuck either in the pre-processing or in the search.
summary: The paper introduces a novel representation for Generalized Planning (GP) problems, and their solutions, as C++ programs. Our C++ representation allows to formally proving the termination of generalized plans, and to specifying their asymptotic complexity w.r.t. the number of world objects. Characterizing the complexity of C++ generalized plans enables the application of a combinatorial search that enumerates the space of possible GP solutions in order of complexity. Experimental results show that our implementation of this approach, which we call BFGP++, outperforms the previous GP as heuristic search approach for the computation of generalized plans represented as compiler-styled programs. Last but not least, the execution of a C++ program on a classical planning instance is a deterministic grounding-free and search-free process, so our C++ representation allows us to automatically validate the computed solutions on large test instances of thousands of objects, where off-the-shelf classical planners get stuck either in the pre-processing or in the search.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了广义规划 (GP) 问题的新颖表示及其解决方案（C++ 程序）。我们的 C++ 表示形式允许正式证明广义计划的终止，并指定它们的渐近复杂度。世界物体的数量。表征 C++ 广义计划的复杂性可以应用组合搜索，该搜索按复杂性顺序枚举可能的 GP 解决方案的空间。实验结果表明，我们对这种方法（我们称之为 BFGP++）的实现优于之前的 GP 作为启发式搜索方法，用于计算表示为编译器样式程序的广义计划。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，在经典规划实例上执行 C++ 程序是一个确定性的无基础和无搜索的过程，因此我们的 C++ 表示允许我们自动验证数千个对象的大型测试实例上的计算解决方案，其中现成的经典规划器要么陷入预处理，要么陷入搜索。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种将通用规划问题及其解决方案表示为C++程序的新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理大规模对象时存在预处理或搜索阶段的限制，因此需要一种更高效的方式来验证和执行通用规划方案。
AI.method: 通过将通用规划方案表示为C++程序，可以形式化证明其终止性并指定其复杂度，从而按复杂度顺序枚举可能的解决方案。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法实现的BFGP++在处理大规模实例时优于传统的启发式搜索方法。
AI.conclusion: 该C++表示方法能够自动验证大规模测试实例中的解决方案，解决了传统规划器的局限性。

authors_text: Xiangyu Li,Xu Yang,Kun Wei,Cheng Deng,Muli Yang
title: Siamese Contrastive Embedding Network for Compositional Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 用于组合零样本学习的连体对比嵌入网络
abstract: Compositional Zero-Shot Learning (CZSL) aims to recognize unseen compositions formed from seen state and object during training. Since the same state may be various in the visual appearance while entangled with different objects, CZSL is still a challenging task. Some methods recognize state and object with two trained classifiers, ignoring the impact of the interaction between object and state; the other methods try to learn the joint representation of the state-object compositions, leading to the domain gap between seen and unseen composition sets. In this paper, we propose a novel Siamese Contrastive Embedding Network (SCEN) (Code: https://github.com/XDUxyLi/SCEN-master) for unseen composition recognition. Considering the entanglement between state and object, we embed the visual feature into a Siamese Contrastive Space to capture prototypes of them separately, alleviating the interaction between state and object. In addition, we design a State Transition Module (STM) to increase the diversity of training compositions, improving the robustness of the recognition model. Extensive experiments indicate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches on three challenging benchmark datasets, including the recent proposed C-QGA dataset.
summary: Compositional Zero-Shot Learning (CZSL) aims to recognize unseen compositions formed from seen state and object during training. Since the same state may be various in the visual appearance while entangled with different objects, CZSL is still a challenging task. Some methods recognize state and object with two trained classifiers, ignoring the impact of the interaction between object and state; the other methods try to learn the joint representation of the state-object compositions, leading to the domain gap between seen and unseen composition sets. In this paper, we propose a novel Siamese Contrastive Embedding Network (SCEN) (Code: https://github.com/XDUxyLi/SCEN-master) for unseen composition recognition. Considering the entanglement between state and object, we embed the visual feature into a Siamese Contrastive Space to capture prototypes of them separately, alleviating the interaction between state and object. In addition, we design a State Transition Module (STM) to increase the diversity of training compositions, improving the robustness of the recognition model. Extensive experiments indicate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches on three challenging benchmark datasets, including the recent proposed C-QGA dataset.
abstract_zh: 组合零样本学习（CZSL）旨在识别训练期间由可见状态和对象形成的未见过的组合。由于相同的状态在与不同的物体纠缠时可能在视觉外观上有所不同，因此 CZSL 仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。有些方法用两个经过训练的分类器来识别状态和对象，忽略对象和状态之间交互的影响；其他方法试图学习状态-对象组合的联合表示，从而导致可见和不可见的组合集之间的域差距。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的暹罗对比嵌入网络（SCEN）（代码：https://github.com/XDUxyLi/SCEN-master）用于看不见的构图识别。考虑到状态和对象之间的纠缠，我们将视觉特征嵌入到暹罗对比空间中以分别捕获它们的原型，从而减轻状态和对象之间的交互。此外，我们设计了状态转换模块（STM）来增加训练组合的多样性，提高识别模型的鲁棒性。大量实验表明，我们的方法在三个具有挑战性的基准数据集（包括最近提出的 C-QGA 数据集）上显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种暹罗对比嵌入网络（SCEN），用于解决组合零样本学习（CZSL）中未见状态-物体组合的识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或忽略状态与物体的交互影响，或导致可见与不可见组合间的领域差距，难以有效处理状态与物体的纠缠关系。
AI.method: 通过暹罗对比空间分离状态与物体原型，设计状态转移模块（STM）增强训练组合多样性，缓解交互影响并提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在C-QGA等三个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了SCEN的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SCEN通过分离表示与增强多样性有效解决了CZSL的挑战，为组合零样本学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Siamese Contrastive Embedding Network for Compositional Zero-Shot Learning 用于组合零样本学习的连体对比嵌入网络 Compositional Zero-Shot Learning (CZSL) aims to recognize unseen compositions formed from seen state and object during training. Since the same state may be various in the visual appearance while entangled with different objects, CZSL is still a challenging task. Some methods recognize state and object with two trained classifiers, ignoring the impact of the interaction between object and state; the other methods try to learn the joint representation of the state-object compositions, leading to the domain gap between seen and unseen composition sets. In this paper, we propose a novel Siamese Contrastive Embedding Network (SCEN) (Code: https://github.com/XDUxyLi/SCEN-master) for unseen composition recognition. Considering the entanglement between state and object, we embed the visual feature into a Siamese Contrastive Space to capture prototypes of them separately, alleviating the interaction between state and object. In addition, we design a State Transition Module (STM) to increase the diversity of training compositions, improving the robustness of the recognition model. Extensive experiments indicate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches on three challenging benchmark datasets, including the recent proposed C-QGA dataset. 组合零样本学习（CZSL）旨在识别训练期间由可见状态和对象形成的未见过的组合。由于相同的状态在与不同的物体纠缠时可能在视觉外观上有所不同，因此 CZSL 仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。有些方法用两个经过训练的分类器来识别状态和对象，忽略对象和状态之间交互的影响；其他方法试图学习状态-对象组合的联合表示，从而导致可见和不可见的组合集之间的域差距。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的暹罗对比嵌入网络（SCEN）（代码：https://github.com/XDUxyLi/SCEN-master）用于看不见的构图识别。考虑到状态和对象之间的纠缠，我们将视觉特征嵌入到暹罗对比空间中以分别捕获它们的原型，从而减轻状态和对象之间的交互。此外，我们设计了状态转换模块（STM）来增加训练组合的多样性，提高识别模型的鲁棒性。大量实验表明，我们的方法在三个具有挑战性的基准数据集（包括最近提出的 C-QGA 数据集）上显着优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种暹罗对比嵌入网络（SCEN），用于解决组合零样本学习（CZSL）中未见状态-物体组合的识别问题。 Xiangyu Li,Xu Yang,Kun Wei,Cheng Deng,Muli Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Quande Liu,Cheng Chen,Qi Dou,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: Single-domain Generalization in Medical Image Segmentation via Test-time Adaptation from Shape Dictionary
title_zh: 通过形状字典的测试时适应进行医学图像分割的单域泛化
abstract: Domain generalization typically requires data from multiple source domains for model learning. However, such strong assumption may not always hold in practice, especially in medical field where the data sharing is highly concerned and sometimes prohibitive due to privacy issue. This paper studies the important yet challenging single domain generalization problem, in which a model is learned under the worst-case scenario with only one source domain to directly generalize to different unseen target domains. We present a novel approach to address this problem in medical image segmentation, which extracts and integrates the semantic shape prior information of segmentation that are invariant across domains and can be well-captured even from single domain data to facilitate segmentation under distribution shifts. Besides, a test-time adaptation strategy with dual-consistency regularization is further devised to promote dynamic incorporation of these shape priors under each unseen domain to improve model generalizability. Extensive experiments on two medical image segmentation tasks demonstrate the consistent improvements of our method across various unseen domains, as well as its superiority over state-of-the-art approaches in addressing domain generalization under the worst-case scenario.
summary: Domain generalization typically requires data from multiple source domains for model learning. However, such strong assumption may not always hold in practice, especially in medical field where the data sharing is highly concerned and sometimes prohibitive due to privacy issue. This paper studies the important yet challenging single domain generalization problem, in which a model is learned under the worst-case scenario with only one source domain to directly generalize to different unseen target domains. We present a novel approach to address this problem in medical image segmentation, which extracts and integrates the semantic shape prior information of segmentation that are invariant across domains and can be well-captured even from single domain data to facilitate segmentation under distribution shifts. Besides, a test-time adaptation strategy with dual-consistency regularization is further devised to promote dynamic incorporation of these shape priors under each unseen domain to improve model generalizability. Extensive experiments on two medical image segmentation tasks demonstrate the consistent improvements of our method across various unseen domains, as well as its superiority over state-of-the-art approaches in addressing domain generalization under the worst-case scenario.
abstract_zh: 领域泛化通常需要来自多个源领域的数据来进行模型学习。然而，这种强有力的假设在实践中可能并不总是成立，特别是在数据共享受到高度关注的医疗领域，有时由于隐私问题而禁止数据共享。本文研究了重要但具有挑战性的单域泛化问题，其中在最坏情况下仅使用一个源域学习模型，以直接泛化到不同的未见过的目标域。我们提出了一种新的方法来解决医学图像分割中的这一问题，该方法提取并集成分割的语义形状先验信息，这些信息在跨域中不变，甚至可以从单域数据中很好地捕获，以促进分布变化下的分割。此外，进一步设计了具有双一致性正则化的测试时适应策略，以促进这些形状先验在每个未见域下的动态合并，以提高模型的泛化性。对两个医学图像分割任务的广泛实验证明了我们的方法在各种未见过的领域中的持续改进，以及它在最坏情况下解决领域泛化问题方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究医学图像分割中的单域泛化问题，提出通过提取跨域不变的语义形状先验信息并结合测试时自适应策略，实现模型在未见过目标域上的泛化。
AI.motivation: 传统领域泛化方法依赖多源域数据，但医学领域因隐私限制难以获取多源数据，需解决单域训练下模型适应不同目标域的挑战。
AI.method: 提出从单域数据中提取跨域不变的语义形状先验，并设计测试时自适应策略与双重一致性正则化，动态整合形状先验以提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在两个医学图像分割任务中，方法在多种未见过目标域上表现优于现有先进方法，且泛化性能稳定提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了单域泛化问题，为隐私敏感场景下的医学图像分割提供了新思路与技术方案。

authors_text: Jinsung Jeon,Noseong Park
title: SPI-GAN: Denoising Diffusion GANs with Straight-Path Interpolations
title_zh: SPI-GAN：具有直线插值的去噪扩散 GAN
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2024 Practical ML for Developing Countries Workshop (PML4DC)
comments: Accepted at ICLR 2024 Practical ML for Developing Countries Workshop (PML4DC)
abstract: Score-based generative models (SGMs) show the state-of-the-art sampling quality and diversity. However, their training/sampling complexity is notoriously high due to the highly complicated forward/reverse processes, so they are not suitable for resource-limited settings. To solving this problem, learning a simpler process is gathering much attention currently. We present an enhanced GAN-based denoising method, called SPI-GAN, using our proposed straight-path interpolation definition. To this end, we propose a GAN architecture i) denoising through the straight-path and ii) characterized by a continuous mapping neural network for imitating the denoising path. This approach drastically reduces the sampling time while achieving as high sampling quality and diversity as SGMs. As a result, SPI-GAN is one of the best-balanced models among the sampling quality, diversity, and time for CIFAR-10, and CelebA-HQ-256.
summary: Score-based generative models (SGMs) show the state-of-the-art sampling quality and diversity. However, their training/sampling complexity is notoriously high due to the highly complicated forward/reverse processes, so they are not suitable for resource-limited settings. To solving this problem, learning a simpler process is gathering much attention currently. We present an enhanced GAN-based denoising method, called SPI-GAN, using our proposed straight-path interpolation definition. To this end, we propose a GAN architecture i) denoising through the straight-path and ii) characterized by a continuous mapping neural network for imitating the denoising path. This approach drastically reduces the sampling time while achieving as high sampling quality and diversity as SGMs. As a result, SPI-GAN is one of the best-balanced models among the sampling quality, diversity, and time for CIFAR-10, and CelebA-HQ-256.
abstract_zh: 基于分数的生成模型 (SGM) 显示了最先进的采样质量和多样性。然而，由于高度复杂的前向/反向过程，它们的训练/采样复杂度非常高，因此不适合资源有限的设置。为了解决这个问题，学习更简单的过程目前引起了人们的广泛关注。我们使用我们提出的直线插值定义提出了一种增强的基于 GAN 的去噪方法，称为 SPI-GAN。为此，我们提出了一种 GAN 架构：i）通过直线路径去噪，ii）以连续映射神经网络为特征，用于模仿去噪路径。这种方法大大减少了采样时间，同时实现了与 SGM 一样高的采样质量和多样性。因此，SPI-GAN 是 CIFAR-10 和 CelebA-HQ-256 的采样质量、多样性和时间之间最佳平衡的模型之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于直通路径插值的增强型GAN去噪方法SPI-GAN，旨在解决基于分数的生成模型（SGMs）在资源受限环境下训练和采样复杂度过高的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管SGMs在采样质量和多样性上表现优异，但其复杂的前向/反向过程导致计算成本过高，难以适应资源受限场景，因此需要更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型GAN架构，通过直通路径插值定义实现去噪过程，并采用连续映射神经网络模拟去噪路径，从而显著降低采样时间。
AI.result: SPI-GAN在CIFAR-10和CelebA-HQ-256数据集上实现了与SGMs相当的采样质量与多样性，同时采样时间大幅缩短，成为质量、多样性与时效性平衡的最佳模型之一。
AI.conclusion: SPI-GAN通过直通路径插值和连续映射网络有效解决了SGMs的高复杂度问题，在资源受限场景下提供了更优的生成模型解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于直通路径插值的增强型GAN去噪方法SPI-GAN，旨在解决基于分数的生成模型（SGMs）在资源受限环境下训练和采样复杂度过高的问题。

search_text: SPI-GAN: Denoising Diffusion GANs with Straight-Path Interpolations SPI-GAN：具有直线插值的去噪扩散 GAN Score-based generative models (SGMs) show the state-of-the-art sampling quality and diversity. However, their training/sampling complexity is notoriously high due to the highly complicated forward/reverse processes, so they are not suitable for resource-limited settings. To solving this problem, learning a simpler process is gathering much attention currently. We present an enhanced GAN-based denoising method, called SPI-GAN, using our proposed straight-path interpolation definition. To this end, we propose a GAN architecture i) denoising through the straight-path and ii) characterized by a continuous mapping neural network for imitating the denoising path. This approach drastically reduces the sampling time while achieving as high sampling quality and diversity as SGMs. As a result, SPI-GAN is one of the best-balanced models among the sampling quality, diversity, and time for CIFAR-10, and CelebA-HQ-256. 基于分数的生成模型 (SGM) 显示了最先进的采样质量和多样性。然而，由于高度复杂的前向/反向过程，它们的训练/采样复杂度非常高，因此不适合资源有限的设置。为了解决这个问题，学习更简单的过程目前引起了人们的广泛关注。我们使用我们提出的直线插值定义提出了一种增强的基于 GAN 的去噪方法，称为 SPI-GAN。为此，我们提出了一种 GAN 架构：i）通过直线路径去噪，ii）以连续映射神经网络为特征，用于模仿去噪路径。这种方法大大减少了采样时间，同时实现了与 SGM 一样高的采样质量和多样性。因此，SPI-GAN 是 CIFAR-10 和 CelebA-HQ-256 的采样质量、多样性和时间之间最佳平衡的模型之一。 本文提出了一种基于直通路径插值的增强型GAN去噪方法SPI-GAN，旨在解决基于分数的生成模型（SGMs）在资源受限环境下训练和采样复杂度过高的问题。 Jinsung Jeon,Noseong Park cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yining Shi,Jingyan Shen,Yifan Sun,Yunlong Wang,Jiaxin Li,Shiqi Sun,Kun Jiang,Diange Yang
title: SRCN3D: Sparse R-CNN 3D for Compact Convolutional Multi-View 3D Object Detection and Tracking
title_zh: SRCN3D：用于紧凑卷积多视图 3D 对象检测和跟踪的稀疏 R-CNN 3D
comment: Accepted to Vision-centric Autonomous Driving(VCAD) Workshop at CVPR2023, For more details refer to http://vcad.site/#/papers
comments: Accepted to Vision-centric Autonomous Driving(VCAD) Workshop at CVPR2023, For more details refer to http://vcad.site/#/papers
abstract: Detection and tracking of moving objects is an essential component in environmental perception for autonomous driving. In the flourishing field of multi-view 3D camera-based detectors, different transformer-based pipelines are designed to learn queries in 3D space from 2D feature maps of perspective views, but the dominant dense BEV query mechanism is computationally inefficient. This paper proposes Sparse R-CNN 3D (SRCN3D), a novel two-stage fully-sparse detector that incorporates sparse queries, sparse attention with box-wise sampling, and sparse prediction. SRCN3D adopts a cascade structure with the twin-track update of both a fixed number of query boxes and latent query features. Our novel sparse feature sampling module only utilizes local 2D region of interest (RoI) features calculated by the projection of 3D query boxes for further box refinement, leading to a fully-convolutional and deployment-friendly pipeline. For multi-object tracking, motion features, query features and RoI features are comprehensively utilized in multi-hypotheses data association. Extensive experiments on nuScenes dataset demonstrate that SRCN3D achieves competitive performance in both 3D object detection and multi-object tracking tasks, while also exhibiting superior efficiency compared to transformer-based methods. Code and models are available at https://github.com/synsin0/SRCN3D.
summary: Detection and tracking of moving objects is an essential component in environmental perception for autonomous driving. In the flourishing field of multi-view 3D camera-based detectors, different transformer-based pipelines are designed to learn queries in 3D space from 2D feature maps of perspective views, but the dominant dense BEV query mechanism is computationally inefficient. This paper proposes Sparse R-CNN 3D (SRCN3D), a novel two-stage fully-sparse detector that incorporates sparse queries, sparse attention with box-wise sampling, and sparse prediction. SRCN3D adopts a cascade structure with the twin-track update of both a fixed number of query boxes and latent query features. Our novel sparse feature sampling module only utilizes local 2D region of interest (RoI) features calculated by the projection of 3D query boxes for further box refinement, leading to a fully-convolutional and deployment-friendly pipeline. For multi-object tracking, motion features, query features and RoI features are comprehensively utilized in multi-hypotheses data association. Extensive experiments on nuScenes dataset demonstrate that SRCN3D achieves competitive performance in both 3D object detection and multi-object tracking tasks, while also exhibiting superior efficiency compared to transformer-based methods. Code and models are available at https://github.com/synsin0/SRCN3D.
abstract_zh: 移动物体的检测和跟踪是自动驾驶环境感知的重要组成部分。在基于多视图 3D 相机的检测器的蓬勃发展领域，不同的基于 Transformer 的管道被设计为从透视视图的 2D 特征图学习 3D 空间中的查询，但占主导地位的密集 BEV 查询机制在计算上效率低下。本文提出了稀疏 R-CNN 3D (SRCN3D)，这是一种新颖的两级完全稀疏检测器，它结合了稀疏查询、带盒式采样的稀疏注意力以及稀疏预测。 SRCN3D采用级联结构，固定数量的查询框和潜在查询特征双轨更新。我们新颖的稀疏特征采样模块仅利用通过 3D 查询框的投影计算出的局部 2D 感兴趣区域 (RoI) 特征来进一步细化框，从而形成完全卷积且易于部署的管道。对于多目标跟踪，在多假设数据关联中综合利用运动特征、查询特征和RoI特征。 nuScenes 数据集上的大量实验表明，SRCN3D 在 3D 对象检测和多对象跟踪任务中实现了具有竞争力的性能，同时与基于 Transformer 的方法相比还表现出了卓越的效率。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/synsin0/SRCN3D 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SRCN3D，一种基于稀疏查询的紧凑卷积多视角3D目标检测与跟踪方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的多视角3D检测方法因密集BEV查询机制计算效率低下，亟需更高效的稀疏检测方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段全稀疏检测框架，结合稀疏注意力机制与框级采样，通过投影3D查询框提取局部2D RoI特征进行框优化，并利用运动特征与多假设数据关联实现跟踪。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，SRCN3D在3D检测与多目标跟踪任务中均达到与Transformer方法相当的性能，同时计算效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SRCN3D通过稀疏化设计实现了高效且部署友好的3D感知方案，为自动驾驶环境感知提供了新思路。

In the flourishing field of multi-view 3D camera-based detectors, different transformer-based pipelines are designed to learn queries in 3D space from 2D feature maps of perspective views, but the dominant dense BEV query mechanism is computationally inefficient. SRCN3D adopts a cascade structure with the twin-track update of both a fixed number of query boxes and latent query features. Our novel sparse feature sampling module only utilizes local 2D region of interest (RoI) features calculated by the projection of 3D query boxes for further box refinement, leading to a fully-convolutional and deployment-friendly pipeline.
