authors_text: Angelina Senchukova,Jarkko Suuronen,Jere Heikkinen,Lassi Roininen
title: Geometry parameter estimation for sparse X-ray log imaging
title_zh: 稀疏X射线测井成像的几何参数估计
abstract: We consider geometry parameter estimation in industrial sawmill fan-beam X-ray tomography. In such industrial settings, scanners do not always allow identification of the location of the source-detector pair, which creates the issue of unknown geometry. This work considers an approach for geometry estimation based on the calibration object. We parametrise the geometry using a set of 5 parameters. To estimate the geometry parameters, we calculate the maximum cross-correlation between a known-sized calibration object image and its filtered backprojection reconstruction and use differential evolution as an optimiser. The approach allows estimating geometry parameters from full-angle measurements as well as from sparse measurements. We show numerically that different sets of parameters can be used for artefact-free reconstruction. We deploy Bayesian inversion with first-order isotropic Cauchy difference priors for reconstruction of synthetic and real sawmill data with a very low number of measurements.
summary: We consider geometry parameter estimation in industrial sawmill fan-beam X-ray tomography. In such industrial settings, scanners do not always allow identification of the location of the source-detector pair, which creates the issue of unknown geometry. This work considers an approach for geometry estimation based on the calibration object. We parametrise the geometry using a set of 5 parameters. To estimate the geometry parameters, we calculate the maximum cross-correlation between a known-sized calibration object image and its filtered backprojection reconstruction and use differential evolution as an optimiser. The approach allows estimating geometry parameters from full-angle measurements as well as from sparse measurements. We show numerically that different sets of parameters can be used for artefact-free reconstruction. We deploy Bayesian inversion with first-order isotropic Cauchy difference priors for reconstruction of synthetic and real sawmill data with a very low number of measurements.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑工业锯木厂扇形束 X 射线断层扫描中的几何参数估计。在这种工业环境中，扫描仪并不总是允许识别源-探测器对的位置，这会产生未知几何形状的问题。这项工作考虑了一种基于校准对象的几何估计方法。我们使用一组 5 个参数对几何进行参数化。为了估计几何参数，我们计算已知大小的校准对象图像与其滤波反投影重建之间的最大互相关性，并使用差分进化作为优化器。该方法允许根据全角度测量以及稀疏测量来估计几何参数。我们以数字方式表明，不同的参数集可用于无伪影重建。我们部署具有一阶各向同性柯西差分先验的贝叶斯反演，以非常低的测量次数重建合成和真实锯木厂数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于校准物体的工业锯木厂扇形束X射线断层扫描几何参数估计方法，解决源-探测器位置未知导致的几何参数估计问题。
AI.motivation: 工业X射线扫描仪常因无法确定源-探测器位置导致几何参数未知，影响图像重建质量，需开发无需先验几何信息的参数估计方法。
AI.method: 通过5参数化几何模型，利用校准物体图像与滤波反投影重建图像的最大互相关计算，结合差分进化优化算法估计参数，并采用贝叶斯反演与各向同性柯西先验处理稀疏测量数据。
AI.result: 方法在全角度及稀疏测量数据下均实现无伪影重建，验证了不同参数集的有效性，成功应用于合成及实际锯木数据的低测量量重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过校准物体与贝叶斯优化有效解决工业X射线几何参数估计问题，为稀疏测量下的高质量重建提供可行方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过校准物体与贝叶斯优化有效解决工业X射线几何参数估计问题，为稀疏测量下的高质量重建提供可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于校准物体的工业锯木厂扇形束X射线断层扫描几何参数估计方法，解决源-探测器位置未知导致的几何参数估计问题。
motivation: 工业X射线扫描仪常因无法确定源-探测器位置导致几何参数未知，影响图像重建质量，需开发无需先验几何信息的参数估计方法。
method: 通过5参数化几何模型，利用校准物体图像与滤波反投影重建图像的最大互相关计算，结合差分进化优化算法估计参数，并采用贝叶斯反演与各向同性柯西先验处理稀疏测量数据。
result: 方法在全角度及稀疏测量数据下均实现无伪影重建，验证了不同参数集的有效性，成功应用于合成及实际锯木数据的低测量量重建。
conclusion: 该方法通过校准物体与贝叶斯优化有效解决工业X射线几何参数估计问题，为稀疏测量下的高质量重建提供可行方案。
search_text: Geometry parameter estimation for sparse X-ray log imaging 稀疏X射线测井成像的几何参数估计 We consider geometry parameter estimation in industrial sawmill fan-beam X-ray tomography. In such industrial settings, scanners do not always allow identification of the location of the source-detector pair, which creates the issue of unknown geometry. This work considers an approach for geometry estimation based on the calibration object. We parametrise the geometry using a set of 5 parameters. To estimate the geometry parameters, we calculate the maximum cross-correlation between a known-sized calibration object image and its filtered backprojection reconstruction and use differential evolution as an optimiser. The approach allows estimating geometry parameters from full-angle measurements as well as from sparse measurements. We show numerically that different sets of parameters can be used for artefact-free reconstruction. We deploy Bayesian inversion with first-order isotropic Cauchy difference priors for reconstruction of synthetic and real sawmill data with a very low number of measurements. 我们考虑工业锯木厂扇形束 X 射线断层扫描中的几何参数估计。在这种工业环境中，扫描仪并不总是允许识别源-探测器对的位置，这会产生未知几何形状的问题。这项工作考虑了一种基于校准对象的几何估计方法。我们使用一组 5 个参数对几何进行参数化。为了估计几何参数，我们计算已知大小的校准对象图像与其滤波反投影重建之间的最大互相关性，并使用差分进化作为优化器。该方法允许根据全角度测量以及稀疏测量来估计几何参数。我们以数字方式表明，不同的参数集可用于无伪影重建。我们部署具有一阶各向同性柯西差分先验的贝叶斯反演，以非常低的测量次数重建合成和真实锯木厂数据。 本文提出一种基于校准物体的工业锯木厂扇形束X射线断层扫描几何参数估计方法，解决源-探测器位置未知导致的几何参数估计问题。 Angelina Senchukova,Jarkko Suuronen,Jere Heikkinen,Lassi Roininen cs.CE,eess.IV

authors_text: Aleksey Postnikov,Aleksander Gamayunov,Gonzalo Ferrer
title: Conditioned Human Trajectory Prediction using Iterative Attention Blocks
title_zh: 使用迭代注意力块进行条件人体轨迹预测
abstract: Human motion prediction is key to understand social environments, with direct applications in robotics, surveillance, etc. We present a simple yet effective pedestrian trajectory prediction model aimed at pedestrians positions prediction in urban-like environments conditioned by the environment: map and surround agents. Our model is a neural-based architecture that can run several layers of attention blocks and transformers in an iterative sequential fashion, allowing to capture the important features in the environment that improve prediction. We show that without explicit introduction of social masks, dynamical models, social pooling layers, or complicated graph-like structures, it is possible to produce on par results with SoTA models, which makes our approach easily extendable and configurable, depending on the data available. We report results performing similarly with SoTA models on publicly available and extensible-used datasets with unimodal prediction metrics ADE and FDE.
summary: Human motion prediction is key to understand social environments, with direct applications in robotics, surveillance, etc. We present a simple yet effective pedestrian trajectory prediction model aimed at pedestrians positions prediction in urban-like environments conditioned by the environment: map and surround agents. Our model is a neural-based architecture that can run several layers of attention blocks and transformers in an iterative sequential fashion, allowing to capture the important features in the environment that improve prediction. We show that without explicit introduction of social masks, dynamical models, social pooling layers, or complicated graph-like structures, it is possible to produce on par results with SoTA models, which makes our approach easily extendable and configurable, depending on the data available. We report results performing similarly with SoTA models on publicly available and extensible-used datasets with unimodal prediction metrics ADE and FDE.
abstract_zh: 人体运动预测是理解社会环境的关键，可直接应用于机器人、监控等领域。我们提出了一种简单而有效的行人轨迹预测模型，旨在预测受环境影响的类城市环境中的行人位置：地图和周围智能体。我们的模型是一种基于神经的架构，可以以迭代顺序方式运行多层注意力块和变压器，从而能够捕获环境中的重要特征，从而改善预测。我们表明，无需显式引入社交掩码、动态模型、社交池层或复杂的类图结构，就可以产生与 SoTA 模型相当的结果，这使得我们的方法可以根据可用数据轻松扩展和配置。我们报告了与 SoTA 模型在公开可用和可扩展使用的数据集上具有单峰预测指标 ADE 和 FDE 类似的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迭代注意力块的行人轨迹预测模型，能够在城市环境中利用地图和周围代理信息进行条件化预测。
AI.motivation: 现有社会环境建模方法依赖复杂结构（如社交掩码、图网络），导致模型可扩展性差，需探索更简洁有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用神经网络架构，通过迭代执行多层注意力块与Transformer，无需社交掩码或图结构即可捕捉环境关键特征。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，模型在单模态指标ADE/FDE上达到与当前最优模型相当的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化架构实现高性能预测，具有良好的扩展性和配置灵活性，适用于不同数据场景。

authors_text: Yash Sharma,Sana Syed,Donald E. Brown
title: MaNi: Maximizing Mutual Information for Nuclei Cross-Domain Unsupervised Segmentation
title_zh: MaNi：最大化核跨域无监督分割的互信息
abstract: In this work, we propose a mutual information (MI) based unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) method for the cross-domain nuclei segmentation. Nuclei vary substantially in structure and appearances across different cancer types, leading to a drop in performance of deep learning models when trained on one cancer type and tested on another. This domain shift becomes even more critical as accurate segmentation and quantification of nuclei is an essential histopathology task for the diagnosis/ prognosis of patients and annotating nuclei at the pixel level for new cancer types demands extensive effort by medical experts. To address this problem, we maximize the MI between labeled source cancer type data and unlabeled target cancer type data for transferring nuclei segmentation knowledge across domains. We use the Jensen-Shanon divergence bound, requiring only one negative pair per positive pair for MI maximization. We evaluate our set-up for multiple modeling frameworks and on different datasets comprising of over 20 cancer-type domain shifts and demonstrate competitive performance. All the recently proposed approaches consist of multiple components for improving the domain adaptation, whereas our proposed module is light and can be easily incorporated into other methods (Implementation: https://github.com/YashSharma/MaNi ).
summary: In this work, we propose a mutual information (MI) based unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) method for the cross-domain nuclei segmentation. Nuclei vary substantially in structure and appearances across different cancer types, leading to a drop in performance of deep learning models when trained on one cancer type and tested on another. This domain shift becomes even more critical as accurate segmentation and quantification of nuclei is an essential histopathology task for the diagnosis/ prognosis of patients and annotating nuclei at the pixel level for new cancer types demands extensive effort by medical experts. To address this problem, we maximize the MI between labeled source cancer type data and unlabeled target cancer type data for transferring nuclei segmentation knowledge across domains. We use the Jensen-Shanon divergence bound, requiring only one negative pair per positive pair for MI maximization. We evaluate our set-up for multiple modeling frameworks and on different datasets comprising of over 20 cancer-type domain shifts and demonstrate competitive performance. All the recently proposed approaches consist of multiple components for improving the domain adaptation, whereas our proposed module is light and can be easily incorporated into other methods (Implementation: https://github.com/YashSharma/MaNi ).
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于互信息（MI）的无监督域适应（UDA）方法，用于跨域核分割。不同癌症类型的细胞核在结构和外观上存在很大差异，导致深度学习模型在一种癌症类型上进行训练并在另一种癌症类型上进行测试时性能下降。这种领域的转变变得更加重要，因为细胞核的精确分割和定量是患者诊断/预后的一项重要的组织病理学任务，并且在新癌症类型的像素水平上注释细胞核需要医学专家的大量努力。为了解决这个问题，我们最大化标记的源癌症类型数据和未标记的目标癌症类型数据之间的 MI，以跨领域传输细胞核分割知识。我们使用 Jensen-Shanon 散度界，只需要每个正对有一个负对即可实现 MI 最大化。我们评估了多个建模框架和包含 20 多个癌症类型域转换的不同数据集的设置，并展示了竞争性能。最近提出的所有方法都包含用于改进域适应的多个组件，而我们提出的模块很轻，可以轻松合并到其他方法中（实现：https://github.com/YashSharma/MaNi）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于互信息（MI）的无监督域适应（UDA）方法，用于跨域核分割任务。
AI.motivation: 不同癌症类型的细胞核在结构和外观上差异显著，导致深度学习模型在跨域测试时性能下降，而新癌症类型的核分割标注需要大量专家工作。
AI.method: 通过最大化标注源域数据与未标注目标域数据之间的互信息，利用Jensen-Shannon散度界，仅需每对正样本对应一个负样本进行互信息最大化。
AI.result: 在包含20多种癌症类型域迁移的多个数据集上验证，方法表现具有竞争力，且模块轻量可集成到其他方法中。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决跨域核分割问题，提供了一种轻量且通用的域适应方案。

authors_text: Guy Blanc,Jane Lange,Mingda Qiao,Li-Yang Tan
title: Open Problem: Properly learning decision trees in polynomial time?
title_zh: 开放问题：在多项式时间内正确学习决策树？
comment: 5 pages, to appear at the Open Problem sessions at COLT 2022
comments: 5 pages, to appear at the Open Problem sessions at COLT 2022
abstract: The authors recently gave an $n^{O(\log\log n)}$ time membership query algorithm for properly learning decision trees under the uniform distribution (Blanc et al., 2021). The previous fastest algorithm for this problem ran in $n^{O(\log n)}$ time, a consequence of Ehrenfeucht and Haussler (1989)'s classic algorithm for the distribution-free setting. In this article we highlight the natural open problem of obtaining a polynomial-time algorithm, discuss possible avenues towards obtaining it, and state intermediate milestones that we believe are of independent interest.
summary: The authors recently gave an $n^{O(\log\log n)}$ time membership query algorithm for properly learning decision trees under the uniform distribution (Blanc et al., 2021). The previous fastest algorithm for this problem ran in $n^{O(\log n)}$ time, a consequence of Ehrenfeucht and Haussler (1989)'s classic algorithm for the distribution-free setting. In this article we highlight the natural open problem of obtaining a polynomial-time algorithm, discuss possible avenues towards obtaining it, and state intermediate milestones that we believe are of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 作者最近给出了一种用于在均匀分布下正确学习决策树的 $n^{O(\log\log n)}$ 时间隶属度查询算法 (Blanc et al., 2021)。之前针对此问题最快的算法运行时间为 $n^{O(\log n)}$，这是 Ehrenfeucht 和 Haussler (1989) 的无分布设置经典算法的结果。在本文中，我们重点介绍了获得多项式时间算法的自然开放问题，讨论了获得该算法的可能途径，并陈述了我们认为具有独立利益的中间里程碑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个开放问题：能否在多项式时间内正确学习决策树？
AI.motivation: 现有的决策树正确学习算法时间复杂度为n^{O(log log n)}，尚未达到多项式时间，作者希望推动实现多项式时间算法这一目标。
AI.method: 本文并未提出新算法，而是通过讨论现有算法的进展、可能的改进方向以及提出具有独立意义的中间里程碑来指引后续研究。
AI.result: 指出当前最快算法为n^{O(log log n)}时间，比之前的n^{O(log n)}有显著改进，但多项式时间算法仍未实现。
AI.conclusion: 正确学习决策树的多项式时间算法仍是一个开放问题，值得进一步研究。

search_text: Open Problem: Properly learning decision trees in polynomial time? 开放问题：在多项式时间内正确学习决策树？ The authors recently gave an $n^{O(\log\log n)}$ time membership query algorithm for properly learning decision trees under the uniform distribution (Blanc et al., 2021). The previous fastest algorithm for this problem ran in $n^{O(\log n)}$ time, a consequence of Ehrenfeucht and Haussler (1989)'s classic algorithm for the distribution-free setting. In this article we highlight the natural open problem of obtaining a polynomial-time algorithm, discuss possible avenues towards obtaining it, and state intermediate milestones that we believe are of independent interest. 作者最近给出了一种用于在均匀分布下正确学习决策树的 $n^{O(\log\log n)}$ 时间隶属度查询算法 (Blanc et al., 2021)。之前针对此问题最快的算法运行时间为 $n^{O(\log n)}$，这是 Ehrenfeucht 和 Haussler (1989) 的无分布设置经典算法的结果。在本文中，我们重点介绍了获得多项式时间算法的自然开放问题，讨论了获得该算法的可能途径，并陈述了我们认为具有独立利益的中间里程碑。 本文提出一个开放问题：能否在多项式时间内正确学习决策树？ Guy Blanc,Jane Lange,Mingda Qiao,Li-Yang Tan cs.DS,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Chenyu Yang,Guo Ning Sue,Zhongyu Li,Lizhi Yang,Haotian Shen,Yufeng Chi,Akshara Rai,Jun Zeng,Koushil Sreenath
title: Collaborative Navigation and Manipulation of a Cable-towed Load by Multiple Quadrupedal Robots
title_zh: 多个四足机器人对缆索牵引负载的协作导航和操纵
comment: Extended version of the manuscript accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) 2022
comments: Extended version of the manuscript accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) 2022
abstract: This paper tackles the problem of robots collaboratively towing a load with cables to a specified goal location while avoiding collisions in real time. The introduction of cables (as opposed to rigid links) enables the robotic team to travel through narrow spaces by changing its intrinsic dimensions through slack/taut switches of the cable. However, this is a challenging problem because of the hybrid mode switches and the dynamical coupling among multiple robots and the load. Previous attempts at addressing such a problem were performed offline and do not consider avoiding obstacles online. In this paper, we introduce a cascaded planning scheme with a parallelized centralized trajectory optimization that deals with hybrid mode switches. We additionally develop a set of decentralized planners per robot, which enables our approach to solve the problem of collaborative load manipulation online. We develop and demonstrate one of the first collaborative autonomy framework that is able to move a cable-towed load, which is too heavy to move by a single robot, through narrow spaces with real-time feedback and reactive planning in experiments.
summary: This paper tackles the problem of robots collaboratively towing a load with cables to a specified goal location while avoiding collisions in real time. The introduction of cables (as opposed to rigid links) enables the robotic team to travel through narrow spaces by changing its intrinsic dimensions through slack/taut switches of the cable. However, this is a challenging problem because of the hybrid mode switches and the dynamical coupling among multiple robots and the load. Previous attempts at addressing such a problem were performed offline and do not consider avoiding obstacles online. In this paper, we introduce a cascaded planning scheme with a parallelized centralized trajectory optimization that deals with hybrid mode switches. We additionally develop a set of decentralized planners per robot, which enables our approach to solve the problem of collaborative load manipulation online. We develop and demonstrate one of the first collaborative autonomy framework that is able to move a cable-towed load, which is too heavy to move by a single robot, through narrow spaces with real-time feedback and reactive planning in experiments.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了机器人通过电缆协作将负载拖曳到指定目标位置，同时实时避免碰撞的问题。电缆（而不是刚性连接）的引入使机器人团队能够通过电缆的松弛/拉紧开关改变其固有尺寸，从而穿过狭窄的空间。然而，由于混合模式切换以及多个机器人和负载之间的动态耦合，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。之前解决此类问题的尝试都是离线进行的，并没有考虑在线避障。在本文中，我们介绍了一种具有并行集中轨迹优化的级联规划方案，可处理混合模式切换。我们还为每个机器人开发了一组分散的规划器，这使得我们的方法能够解决在线协作负载操纵的问题。我们开发并演示了第一个协作自主框架，该框架能够移动缆索牵引的负载，该负载太重而无法由单个机器人移动，通过狭窄的空间，并在实验中提供实时反馈和反应性规划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多足机器人协作拖拽缆绳负载的导航与操作方法，通过实时避障和动态调整缆绳松紧度以穿越狭窄空间。
AI.motivation: 传统方法无法在线处理缆绳拖拽负载的混合模式切换和多机器人动态耦合问题，且难以实现实时避障与狭窄空间通过。
AI.method: 采用级联规划方案结合并行集中轨迹优化，配合每个机器人的分布式规划器，实现混合模式切换与实时避障的在线协作控制。
AI.result: 成功开发并验证了首个能够通过实时反馈和反应式规划，协作搬运超单机负载能力的缆绳拖拽系统，实验显示其可穿越狭窄空间。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过集中与分布式规划结合，有效解决了多足机器人协作拖拽负载的混合模式控制与实时避障难题，为复杂环境下的重物搬运提供了新方案。

authors_text: Xian Lin,Li Yu,Kwang-Ting Cheng,Zengqiang Yan
title: The Lighter The Better: Rethinking Transformers in Medical Image Segmentation Through Adaptive Pruning
title_zh: 越轻越好：通过自适应修剪重新思考医学图像分割中的 Transformer
abstract: Vision transformers have recently set off a new wave in the field of medical image analysis due to their remarkable performance on various computer vision tasks. However, recent hybrid-/transformer-based approaches mainly focus on the benefits of transformers in capturing long-range dependency while ignoring the issues of their daunting computational complexity, high training costs, and redundant dependency. In this paper, we propose to employ adaptive pruning to transformers for medical image segmentation and propose a lightweight and effective hybrid network APFormer. To our best knowledge, this is the first work on transformer pruning for medical image analysis tasks. The key features of APFormer mainly are self-supervised self-attention (SSA) to improve the convergence of dependency establishment, Gaussian-prior relative position embedding (GRPE) to foster the learning of position information, and adaptive pruning to eliminate redundant computations and perception information. Specifically, SSA and GRPE consider the well-converged dependency distribution and the Gaussian heatmap distribution separately as the prior knowledge of self-attention and position embedding to ease the training of transformers and lay a solid foundation for the following pruning operation. Then, adaptive transformer pruning, both query-wise and dependency-wise, is performed by adjusting the gate control parameters for both complexity reduction and performance improvement. Extensive experiments on two widely-used datasets demonstrate the prominent segmentation performance of APFormer against the state-of-the-art methods with much fewer parameters and lower GFLOPs. More importantly, we prove, through ablation studies, that adaptive pruning can work as a plug-n-play module for performance improvement on other hybrid-/transformer-based methods. Code is available at https://github.com/xianlin7/APFormer.
summary: Vision transformers have recently set off a new wave in the field of medical image analysis due to their remarkable performance on various computer vision tasks. However, recent hybrid-/transformer-based approaches mainly focus on the benefits of transformers in capturing long-range dependency while ignoring the issues of their daunting computational complexity, high training costs, and redundant dependency. In this paper, we propose to employ adaptive pruning to transformers for medical image segmentation and propose a lightweight and effective hybrid network APFormer. To our best knowledge, this is the first work on transformer pruning for medical image analysis tasks. The key features of APFormer mainly are self-supervised self-attention (SSA) to improve the convergence of dependency establishment, Gaussian-prior relative position embedding (GRPE) to foster the learning of position information, and adaptive pruning to eliminate redundant computations and perception information. Specifically, SSA and GRPE consider the well-converged dependency distribution and the Gaussian heatmap distribution separately as the prior knowledge of self-attention and position embedding to ease the training of transformers and lay a solid foundation for the following pruning operation. Then, adaptive transformer pruning, both query-wise and dependency-wise, is performed by adjusting the gate control parameters for both complexity reduction and performance improvement. Extensive experiments on two widely-used datasets demonstrate the prominent segmentation performance of APFormer against the state-of-the-art methods with much fewer parameters and lower GFLOPs. More importantly, we prove, through ablation studies, that adaptive pruning can work as a plug-n-play module for performance improvement on other hybrid-/transformer-based methods. Code is available at https://github.com/xianlin7/APFormer.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器因其在各种计算机视觉任务上的出色表现，最近在医学图像分析领域掀起了一股新浪潮。然而，最近基于混合/变压器的方法主要关注变压器在捕获远程依赖性方面的好处，而忽略了其令人畏惧的计算复杂性、高训练成本和冗余依赖性的问题。在本文中，我们建议对医学图像分割的变压器采用自适应剪枝，并提出一种轻量级且有效的混合网络 APFormer。据我们所知，这是针对医学图像分析任务的变压器修剪的第一项工作。 APFormer 的关键特征主要是自监督自注意力（SSA）以提高依赖关系建立的收敛性，高斯先验相对位置嵌入（GRPE）以促进位置信息的学习，以及自适应剪枝以消除冗余计算和感知信息。具体来说，SSA和GRPE分别考虑收敛良好的依赖分布和高斯热图分布作为自注意力和位置嵌入的先验知识，以简化变压器的训练，并为后续剪枝操作打下坚实的基础。然后，通过调整门控制参数来执行查询方式和依赖方式的自适应变压器修剪，以降低复杂性并提高性能。对两个广泛使用的数据集进行的大量实验表明，与参数更少、GFLOP 更低的最先进方法相比，APFormer 具有显着的分割性能。更重要的是，我们通过消融研究证明，自适应修剪可以作为即插即用模块，用于提高其他基于混合/变压器的方法的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/xianlin7/APFormer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过自适应剪枝优化Transformer结构的轻量级医学图像分割网络APFormer。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在医学图像分析中表现出色，但其计算复杂度高、训练成本大且存在冗余依赖问题，亟需通过剪枝技术提升效率。
AI.method: 设计了自监督自注意力（SSA）、高斯先验相对位置嵌入（GRPE）和自适应剪枝模块，通过调整门控参数实现查询级和依赖级的剪枝，减少计算量并保留关键信息。
AI.result: 在两个常用数据集上，APFormer相比现有方法参数量减少且GFLOPs更低，分割性能更优，并通过消融实验证明剪枝模块可通用到其他模型。
AI.conclusion: APFormer通过自适应剪枝有效平衡了Transformer的性能与效率，为医学图像分析提供了轻量化解决方案，代码已开源。

ai_content_json.method: 设计了自监督自注意力（SSA）、高斯先验相对位置嵌入（GRPE）和自适应剪枝模块，通过调整门控参数实现查询级和依赖级的剪枝，减少计算量并保留关键信息。
ai_content_json.result: 在两个常用数据集上，APFormer相比现有方法参数量减少且GFLOPs更低，分割性能更优，并通过消融实验证明剪枝模块可通用到其他模型。
ai_content_json.conclusion: APFormer通过自适应剪枝有效平衡了Transformer的性能与效率，为医学图像分析提供了轻量化解决方案，代码已开源。

method: 设计了自监督自注意力（SSA）、高斯先验相对位置嵌入（GRPE）和自适应剪枝模块，通过调整门控参数实现查询级和依赖级的剪枝，减少计算量并保留关键信息。
result: 在两个常用数据集上，APFormer相比现有方法参数量减少且GFLOPs更低，分割性能更优，并通过消融实验证明剪枝模块可通用到其他模型。
conclusion: APFormer通过自适应剪枝有效平衡了Transformer的性能与效率，为医学图像分析提供了轻量化解决方案，代码已开源。
search_text: The Lighter The Better: Rethinking Transformers in Medical Image Segmentation Through Adaptive Pruning 越轻越好：通过自适应修剪重新思考医学图像分割中的 Transformer Vision transformers have recently set off a new wave in the field of medical image analysis due to their remarkable performance on various computer vision tasks. However, recent hybrid-/transformer-based approaches mainly focus on the benefits of transformers in capturing long-range dependency while ignoring the issues of their daunting computational complexity, high training costs, and redundant dependency. In this paper, we propose to employ adaptive pruning to transformers for medical image segmentation and propose a lightweight and effective hybrid network APFormer. To our best knowledge, this is the first work on transformer pruning for medical image analysis tasks. The key features of APFormer mainly are self-supervised self-attention (SSA) to improve the convergence of dependency establishment, Gaussian-prior relative position embedding (GRPE) to foster the learning of position information, and adaptive pruning to eliminate redundant computations and perception information. Specifically, SSA and GRPE consider the well-converged dependency distribution and the Gaussian heatmap distribution separately as the prior knowledge of self-attention and position embedding to ease the training of transformers and lay a solid foundation for the following pruning operation. Then, adaptive transformer pruning, both query-wise and dependency-wise, is performed by adjusting the gate control parameters for both complexity reduction and performance improvement. Extensive experiments on two widely-used datasets demonstrate the prominent segmentation performance of APFormer against the state-of-the-art methods with much fewer parameters and lower GFLOPs. More importantly, we prove, through ablation studies, that adaptive pruning can work as a plug-n-play module for performance improvement on other hybrid-/transformer-based methods. Code is available at https://github.com/xianlin7/APFormer. 视觉转换器因其在各种计算机视觉任务上的出色表现，最近在医学图像分析领域掀起了一股新浪潮。然而，最近基于混合/变压器的方法主要关注变压器在捕获远程依赖性方面的好处，而忽略了其令人畏惧的计算复杂性、高训练成本和冗余依赖性的问题。在本文中，我们建议对医学图像分割的变压器采用自适应剪枝，并提出一种轻量级且有效的混合网络 APFormer。据我们所知，这是针对医学图像分析任务的变压器修剪的第一项工作。 APFormer 的关键特征主要是自监督自注意力（SSA）以提高依赖关系建立的收敛性，高斯先验相对位置嵌入（GRPE）以促进位置信息的学习，以及自适应剪枝以消除冗余计算和感知信息。具体来说，SSA和GRPE分别考虑收敛良好的依赖分布和高斯热图分布作为自注意力和位置嵌入的先验知识，以简化变压器的训练，并为后续剪枝操作打下坚实的基础。然后，通过调整门控制参数来执行查询方式和依赖方式的自适应变压器修剪，以降低复杂性并提高性能。对两个广泛使用的数据集进行的大量实验表明，与参数更少、GFLOP 更低的最先进方法相比，APFormer 具有显着的分割性能。更重要的是，我们通过消融研究证明，自适应修剪可以作为即插即用模块，用于提高其他基于混合/变压器的方法的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/xianlin7/APFormer 获取。 本文提出了一种通过自适应剪枝优化Transformer结构的轻量级医学图像分割网络APFormer。 Xian Lin,Li Yu,Kwang-Ting Cheng,Zengqiang Yan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Xian Lin,Li Yu,Kwang-Ting Cheng,Zengqiang Yan
title: BATFormer: Towards Boundary-Aware Lightweight Transformer for Efficient Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: BATFormer：迈向边界感知轻量级 Transformer 以实现高效医学图像分割
comment: Accepted by IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/xianlin7/BATFormer
comments: Accepted by IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/xianlin7/BATFormer
abstract: Objective: Transformers, born to remedy the inadequate receptive fields of CNNs, have drawn explosive attention recently. However, the daunting computational complexity of global representation learning, together with rigid window partitioning, hinders their deployment in medical image segmentation. This work aims to address the above two issues in transformers for better medical image segmentation. Methods: We propose a boundary-aware lightweight transformer (BATFormer) that can build cross-scale global interaction with lower computational complexity and generate windows flexibly under the guidance of entropy. Specifically, to fully explore the benefits of transformers in long-range dependency establishment, a cross-scale global transformer (CGT) module is introduced to jointly utilize multiple small-scale feature maps for richer global features with lower computational complexity. Given the importance of shape modeling in medical image segmentation, a boundary-aware local transformer (BLT) module is constructed. Different from rigid window partitioning in vanilla transformers which would produce boundary distortion, BLT adopts an adaptive window partitioning scheme under the guidance of entropy for both computational complexity reduction and shape preservation. Results: BATFormer achieves the best performance in Dice of 92.84%, 91.97%, 90.26%, and 96.30% for the average, right ventricle, myocardium, and left ventricle respectively on the ACDC dataset and the best performance in Dice, IoU, and ACC of 90.76%, 84.64%, and 96.76% respectively on the ISIC 2018 dataset. More importantly, BATFormer requires the least amount of model parameters and the lowest computational complexity compared to the state-of-the-art approaches. Conclusion and Significance: Our results demonstrate the necessity of developing customized transformers for efficient and better medical image segmentation.
summary: Objective: Transformers, born to remedy the inadequate receptive fields of CNNs, have drawn explosive attention recently. However, the daunting computational complexity of global representation learning, together with rigid window partitioning, hinders their deployment in medical image segmentation. This work aims to address the above two issues in transformers for better medical image segmentation. Methods: We propose a boundary-aware lightweight transformer (BATFormer) that can build cross-scale global interaction with lower computational complexity and generate windows flexibly under the guidance of entropy. Specifically, to fully explore the benefits of transformers in long-range dependency establishment, a cross-scale global transformer (CGT) module is introduced to jointly utilize multiple small-scale feature maps for richer global features with lower computational complexity. Given the importance of shape modeling in medical image segmentation, a boundary-aware local transformer (BLT) module is constructed. Different from rigid window partitioning in vanilla transformers which would produce boundary distortion, BLT adopts an adaptive window partitioning scheme under the guidance of entropy for both computational complexity reduction and shape preservation. Results: BATFormer achieves the best performance in Dice of 92.84%, 91.97%, 90.26%, and 96.30% for the average, right ventricle, myocardium, and left ventricle respectively on the ACDC dataset and the best performance in Dice, IoU, and ACC of 90.76%, 84.64%, and 96.76% respectively on the ISIC 2018 dataset. More importantly, BATFormer requires the least amount of model parameters and the lowest computational complexity compared to the state-of-the-art approaches. Conclusion and Significance: Our results demonstrate the necessity of developing customized transformers for efficient and better medical image segmentation.
abstract_zh: Objective: Transformer 是为了弥补 CNN 感受野不足而诞生的，最近引起了爆炸性的关注。然而，全局表示学习令人畏惧的计算复杂性以及严格的窗口划分阻碍了它们在医学图像分割中的部署。这项工作旨在解决 Transformer 中的上述两个问题，以实现更好的医学图像分割。方法：我们提出了一种边界感知轻量级变压器（BATFormer），它可以以较低的计算复杂度构建跨尺度的全局交互，并在熵的指导下灵活地生成窗口。具体来说，为了充分发挥 Transformer 在远程依赖关系建立中的优势，引入了跨尺度全局 Transformer（CGT）模块，以联合利用多个小尺度特征图，以较低的计算复杂度获得更丰富的全局特征。鉴于形状建模在医学图像分割中的重要性，构建了边界感知局部变换器（BLT）模块。与普通 Transformer 中会产生边界失真的刚性窗口划分不同，BLT 采用熵指导下的自适应窗口划​​分方案，以降低计算复杂度并保持形状。结果：BATFormer 在 ACDC 数据集上的平均、右心室、心肌和左心室的 Dice 中取得最佳性能，分别为 92.84%、91.97%、90.26% 和 96.30%，在 ISIC 上的 Dice、IoU 和 ACC 中分别取得最佳性能，分别为 90.76%、84.64% 和 96.76% 2018 年数据集。更重要的是，与最先进的方法相比，BATFormer 需要最少的模型参数和最低的计算复杂度。结论和意义：我们的结果证明了开发定制变压器以实现高效、更好的医学图像分割的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BATFormer，一种轻量级边界感知变压器，旨在解决医疗图像分割中变压器计算复杂度高和窗口划分僵硬的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统变压器在医疗图像分割中面临计算复杂度高和固定窗口划分导致的边界失真问题，需开发更高效的定制化变压器。
AI.method: 设计跨尺度全局变压器（CGT）模块实现多尺度特征融合，以及边界感知局部变压器（BLT）模块通过熵引导的自适应窗口划分减少计算量并保持形状准确性。
AI.result: 在ACDC数据集上平均Dice达92.84%，在ISIC 2018数据集上Dice/IoU/ACC分别为90.76%/84.64%/96.76%，参数量和计算复杂度优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 定制化变压器设计能有效提升医疗图像分割的效率和精度，为轻量化模型开发提供新方向。

authors_text: Yanxiang Wang,Jiawei Hu,Hong Jia,Wen Hu,Mahbub Hassan,Ashraf Uddin,Brano Kusy,Moustafa Youssef
title: Spectral-Loc: Indoor Localization using Light Spectral Information
title_zh: Spectral-Loc：使用光谱信息进行室内定位
abstract: For indoor settings, we investigate the impact of location on the spectral distribution of the received light, i.e., the intensity of light for different wavelengths. Our investigations confirm that even under the same light source, different locations exhibit slightly different spectral distribution due to reflections from their localised environment containing different materials or colours. By exploiting this observation, we propose Spectral-Loc, a novel indoor localization system that uses light spectral information to identify the location of the device. With spectral sensors finding their way in latest products and applications, such as white balancing in smartphone photography, Spectral-Loc can be readily deployed without requiring any additional hardware or infrastructure. We prototype Spectral-Loc using a commercial-off-the-shelf light spectral sensor, AS7265x, which can measure light intensity over 18 different wavelength sub-bands. We benchmark the localisation accuracy of Spectral-Loc against the conventional light intensity sensors that provide only a single intensity value. Our evaluations over two different indoor spaces, a meeting room and a large office space, demonstrate that use of light spectral information significantly reduces the localization error for the different percentiles.
summary: For indoor settings, we investigate the impact of location on the spectral distribution of the received light, i.e., the intensity of light for different wavelengths. Our investigations confirm that even under the same light source, different locations exhibit slightly different spectral distribution due to reflections from their localised environment containing different materials or colours. By exploiting this observation, we propose Spectral-Loc, a novel indoor localization system that uses light spectral information to identify the location of the device. With spectral sensors finding their way in latest products and applications, such as white balancing in smartphone photography, Spectral-Loc can be readily deployed without requiring any additional hardware or infrastructure. We prototype Spectral-Loc using a commercial-off-the-shelf light spectral sensor, AS7265x, which can measure light intensity over 18 different wavelength sub-bands. We benchmark the localisation accuracy of Spectral-Loc against the conventional light intensity sensors that provide only a single intensity value. Our evaluations over two different indoor spaces, a meeting room and a large office space, demonstrate that use of light spectral information significantly reduces the localization error for the different percentiles.
abstract_zh: 对于室内环境，我们研究位置对接收光的光谱分布（即不同波长的光强度）的影响。我们的研究证实，即使在相同的光源下，由于包含不同材料或颜色的局部环境的反射，不同位置也会表现出略有不同的光谱分布。通过利用这一观察结果，我们提出了 Spectral-Loc，这是一种新颖的室内定位系统，它使用光谱信息来识别设备的位置。随着光谱传感器在最新产品和应用中的应用，例如智能手机摄影中的白平衡，Spectral-Loc 可以轻松部署，无需任何额外的硬件或基础设施。我们使用商用现成光谱传感器 AS7265x 制作 Spectral-Loc 原型，该传感器可以测量 18 个不同波长子带的光强度。我们将 Spectral-Loc 的定位精度与仅提供单一强度值的传统光强度传感器进行基准测试。我们对两个不同的室内空间（会议室和大型办公空间）的评估表明，光谱信息的使用显着减少了不同百分位的定位误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于光谱信息的室内定位系统Spectral-Loc，通过分析不同位置的光谱分布差异实现定位。
AI.motivation: 传统光照强度传感器定位精度有限，而不同材质/颜色的环境反射会导致同一光源在不同位置产生独特的光谱分布特征。
AI.method: 使用AS7265x光谱传感器测量18个波长子带的光强数据，在会议厅和办公空间进行定位精度对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明光谱信息使定位误差在多个百分位数上显著降低，验证了光谱特征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Spectral-Loc无需额外硬件即可利用现有光谱传感器实现高精度室内定位，为定位技术提供新思路。

search_text: Spectral-Loc: Indoor Localization using Light Spectral Information Spectral-Loc：使用光谱信息进行室内定位 For indoor settings, we investigate the impact of location on the spectral distribution of the received light, i.e., the intensity of light for different wavelengths. Our investigations confirm that even under the same light source, different locations exhibit slightly different spectral distribution due to reflections from their localised environment containing different materials or colours. By exploiting this observation, we propose Spectral-Loc, a novel indoor localization system that uses light spectral information to identify the location of the device. With spectral sensors finding their way in latest products and applications, such as white balancing in smartphone photography, Spectral-Loc can be readily deployed without requiring any additional hardware or infrastructure. We prototype Spectral-Loc using a commercial-off-the-shelf light spectral sensor, AS7265x, which can measure light intensity over 18 different wavelength sub-bands. We benchmark the localisation accuracy of Spectral-Loc against the conventional light intensity sensors that provide only a single intensity value. Our evaluations over two different indoor spaces, a meeting room and a large office space, demonstrate that use of light spectral information significantly reduces the localization error for the different percentiles. 对于室内环境，我们研究位置对接收光的光谱分布（即不同波长的光强度）的影响。我们的研究证实，即使在相同的光源下，由于包含不同材料或颜色的局部环境的反射，不同位置也会表现出略有不同的光谱分布。通过利用这一观察结果，我们提出了 Spectral-Loc，这是一种新颖的室内定位系统，它使用光谱信息来识别设备的位置。随着光谱传感器在最新产品和应用中的应用，例如智能手机摄影中的白平衡，Spectral-Loc 可以轻松部署，无需任何额外的硬件或基础设施。我们使用商用现成光谱传感器 AS7265x 制作 Spectral-Loc 原型，该传感器可以测量 18 个不同波长子带的光强度。我们将 Spectral-Loc 的定位精度与仅提供单一强度值的传统光强度传感器进行基准测试。我们对两个不同的室内空间（会议室和大型办公空间）的评估表明，光谱信息的使用显着减少了不同百分位的定位误差。 本文提出一种基于光谱信息的室内定位系统Spectral-Loc，通过分析不同位置的光谱分布差异实现定位。 Yanxiang Wang,Jiawei Hu,Hong Jia,Wen Hu,Mahbub Hassan,Ashraf Uddin,Brano Kusy,Moustafa Youssef cs.HC

authors_text: Qizhang Feng,Mengnan Du,Na Zou,Xia Hu
title: Fair Machine Learning in Healthcare: A Review
title_zh: 医疗保健中的公平机器学习：回顾
abstract: The digitization of healthcare data coupled with advances in computational capabilities has propelled the adoption of machine learning (ML) in healthcare. However, these methods can perpetuate or even exacerbate existing disparities, leading to fairness concerns such as the unequal distribution of resources and diagnostic inaccuracies among different demographic groups. Addressing these fairness problem is paramount to prevent further entrenchment of social injustices. In this survey, we analyze the intersection of fairness in machine learning and healthcare disparities. We adopt a framework based on the principles of distributive justice to categorize fairness concerns into two distinct classes: equal allocation and equal performance. We provide a critical review of the associated fairness metrics from a machine learning standpoint and examine biases and mitigation strategies across the stages of the ML lifecycle, discussing the relationship between biases and their countermeasures. The paper concludes with a discussion on the pressing challenges that remain unaddressed in ensuring fairness in healthcare ML, and proposes several new research directions that hold promise for developing ethical and equitable ML applications in healthcare.
summary: The digitization of healthcare data coupled with advances in computational capabilities has propelled the adoption of machine learning (ML) in healthcare. However, these methods can perpetuate or even exacerbate existing disparities, leading to fairness concerns such as the unequal distribution of resources and diagnostic inaccuracies among different demographic groups. Addressing these fairness problem is paramount to prevent further entrenchment of social injustices. In this survey, we analyze the intersection of fairness in machine learning and healthcare disparities. We adopt a framework based on the principles of distributive justice to categorize fairness concerns into two distinct classes: equal allocation and equal performance. We provide a critical review of the associated fairness metrics from a machine learning standpoint and examine biases and mitigation strategies across the stages of the ML lifecycle, discussing the relationship between biases and their countermeasures. The paper concludes with a discussion on the pressing challenges that remain unaddressed in ensuring fairness in healthcare ML, and proposes several new research directions that hold promise for developing ethical and equitable ML applications in healthcare.
abstract_zh: 医疗保健数据的数字化加上计算能力的进步推动了机器学习 (ML) 在医疗保健领域的采用。然而，这些方法可能会延续甚至加剧现有的差异，导致公平问题，例如不同人口群体之间资源分配不均和诊断不准确。解决这些公平问题对于防止社会不公正进一步加剧至关重要。在这项调查中，我们分析了机器学习的公平性和医疗保健差异的交叉点。我们采用基于分配正义原则的框架，将公平问题分为两个不同的类别：平等分配和平等绩效。我们从机器学习的角度对相关公平性指标进行了严格审查，并检查了机器学习生命周期各个阶段的偏见和缓解策略，讨论了偏见及其对策之间的关系。本文最后讨论了在确保医疗保健机器学习公平性方面尚未解决的紧迫挑战，并提出了几个新的研究方向，这些方向有望在医疗保健领域开发道德和公平的机器学习应用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了医疗健康领域机器学习中的公平性问题，分析了算法偏见的来源及缓解策略，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据数字化和计算能力提升推动了机器学习的应用，但算法可能加剧资源分配不均和诊断偏差，需解决公平性以避免社会不公。
AI.method: 基于分配正义原则，将公平性问题分为资源分配平等与性能平等两类，系统梳理公平性指标、偏见类型及机器学习生命周期中的缓解策略。
AI.result: 总结了现有公平性度量方法与偏见缓解技术，指出当前研究在跨领域适用性、动态数据适应性及可解释性方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究动态环境下的公平性保障机制、跨学科协作框架及符合医疗伦理的算法设计准则，以推动公平可信赖的医疗AI发展。
